quotes.text: In physical terms the tides and geographical aspects are involved, but these are "effects" having to do with curves of energy of which consciousness is composed. These rhythms are minutely but perfectly reflected in other ways. The seventh dream of any given night is the most important -- not (louder, smiling) that anyone is counting, and say I said it humorously.
quotes.translation: 就物质层面而言，潮汐与地理因素牵涉其中，但这些只是"效应"，与构成意识的能量曲线有关。这些节律以其他方式得到精微而完美的反映。任何特定夜晚的第七个梦最为重要——并非（提高音量，微笑）真有人去数，且容我幽默地这么说。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: You are part of God in that you are part of the consciousness that is, but you are not apart from a god who looks down on you and speaks... There is indeed as you conceive of it no hell or heaven. These ideas have been distorted through the ages... You could call hell a separation from the main stream of consciousness called God, but this is impossible actually...
quotes.translation: 你们是神的一部分，因为你们是存在之意识的一部分，但你们并非与俯视你们并说话的神分离...按你们的理解，确实没有地狱或天堂。这些观念历经时代已被扭曲...你们可将地狱称为与称为神的意识主流分离，但这实际上是不可能的...
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The newsprint to this degree, you see, has a consciousness, even in this regard. The least information is not inert. All symbols have a meaning therefore in themselves also, and a reality apart from that which they are meant to display. You can see this easily. The painting of a tree, while a symbol for the tree, nevertheless has its own consciousness and reality.
quotes.translation: 你看，新闻纸到这种程度也拥有意识，即便在此方面。最微小的信息也非惰性。所有符号因此本身也具有意义，以及独立于它们所要展示之物的实相。你们很容易理解这点。一幅树的画作，虽是树的象征，却拥有自身的意识与实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: In closing: See the 593rd session in the Appendix of Seth Speaks for Seth's material on black holes, white holes, and coordination points: "A black hole is a white hole turned inside out ... The holes, therefore, or coordination points [points of double reality, or where realities merge], are actually great accelerators that reenergize energy itself." In the 688th session for Volume 1, Seth presents an analogy in which his basic units of consciousness, or CU's, operate as minute but very powerful black holes and white holes.
quotes.translation: 最后：请参阅《赛斯书》附录中的第593节，了解赛斯关于黑洞、白洞和协调点的资料：“黑洞是里外翻转的白洞……因此，这些洞或协调点[双重实相的点，或实相融合之处]实际上是巨大的加速器，能重新激活能量本身。”在《早期课》第一卷第688节中，赛斯提出一个类比，他的意识基本单位（CU）运作如同微小但强大的黑洞和白洞。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: You are biologically connected, chemically connected with the earth that you know; but since it is also formed naturally and spontaneously from your own projected psychic energy, since you and the seasons even have a psychic interaction, then the self must be understood in a far greater context. Such a context would allow you to share in life experiences of many other forms, to follow patterns of energy and emotion of which you barely conceive, and to sense a world-consciousness in which you have your own independent part.
quotes.translation: 你在生物上与化学上与你所知的地球相连；但由于地球也是由你自身投射的心灵能量自然自发形成的，由于你与季节甚至存在心灵互动，因此必须在更广阔的脉络中理解自己。这样的脉络会让你分享许多其他生命形态的生活经验，追随你几乎无法想象的能量与情感模式，并感知一种你拥有独立角色的世界意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The true unconscious is not unconscious. Instead, it is so profoundly and unutteringly conscious that it bubbles over. The life that you know is simply one of the many areas in which it is conscious. In each facet of its consciousness, literally tremendous power and balance must be maintained to hold aloft this particular consciousness-experience from all others.
quotes.translation: 真正的无意识并非无意识。相反，它如此深刻且难以言喻地有意识，以至于满溢而出。你所知晓的生命只是它有意识的众多领域之一。在其意识的每一个面向中，必须维持巨大的力量与平衡，才能将这种特定的意识体验从其他所有体验中托举出来。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Through dreams the self communicates with the self, and with all layers of the self. For the self is not one concrete thing. The self has no boundaries, the self is not limited. Consciousness is the direction in which the self looks, again, but the ego is not aware of the whole self. The ego is not even familiar with the context or the meaning of your own dreams.
quotes.translation: 通过梦境，自我与自我沟通，并与自我的所有层次交流。因为自我并非一个具体的事物。自我没有边界，自我不受限制。意识是自我注视的方向，但自我并不知晓整个自我。自我甚至不熟悉你自己梦境的情境或意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Art creation is a most basic creation then, not even a mimicking act but a genuine creation of another plane, done self-consciously from the perspective of an imprisoning camouflage pattern. Quite an achievement, therefore. It should be simple as an analogy to consider the next point, where the figure in a painting would not only have a certain consciousness for example but would have other freedoms also; and this would give you a limited conception of what is involved in the creation of other planes of more varied scope.
quotes.translation: 艺术创作因此是最基本的创造，甚至不是模仿行为，而是对另一个层面的真实创造，从禁锢的伪装模式视角有意识地完成。因此，这是一项相当了不起的成就。作为类比，考虑下一点应该很简单：例如，画中的人物不仅拥有某种意识，还拥有其他自由；这将让你对创造其他更广阔层面的过程有一个有限的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: One form may indeed serve, and then consciousness may project out of it into a new form that is familiar with other dimensions. In Ruburt's experience three different forms were used. He spoke, incidentally to his Father Trainor, and Lizzie Roohan together, while he was in the second form . He was then led by me into a further dimension of reality in which his third form was used. You must remember that all of these portions of the self exist at once, and that the whole inner self knows them as a part of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一种形式确实可能暂时适用，随后意识可能从中投射进入另一个熟悉其他维度的新形式。在鲁柏的经历中，他使用了三种不同的形式。当他处于第二种形式时，他偶然与特雷纳神父和莉齐·鲁汉交谈。随后，我被引导进入一个更深的实相维度，在那里他使用了第三种形式。你必须记住，自我的所有这些部分同时存在，而整个内在自我将它们视为自身身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: These minds all work together to keep you alive through the physical structure of the brain. When you use all of these minds, then and only then do you become fully aware of your surroundings: You perceive reality more clearly than you do now, more sharply, brilliantly, and concisely. At the same time, however, you comprehend it directly. You comprehend what it is apart from your physical perception of it. You accept as yourself those other states of consciousness native to your other minds. You achieve true personhood.
quotes.translation: 这些心智共同协作，通过大脑的物理结构维持你的生命。当你运用所有这些心智时，唯有此时你才能完全觉察周遭环境：你比现在更清晰地、更锐利地、更灿烂而精准地感知实相。然而与此同时，你直接领悟它。你领悟它脱离你物理感知之外的本来面目。你将那些属于你其他心智的、与生俱来的其他意识状态接纳为自身。你成就了真正的人格。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: He dreamed of flying, and that impetus led to the physical inventions that made mechanical flight possible. I am not speaking symbolically here, but quite literally. From the beginning, I said that the self was not confined to the body. This means that the consciousness has other methods of perceiving information, that even in physical life experience is not confined to what is sensed in usual terms. This remains fine theory, however, unless you allow yourself enough freedom to experiment with other modes of perception.
quotes.translation: 他梦见飞翔，那动力催生了使机械飞行成为可能的物理发明。我在此并非象征性地说，而是字面意义。从一开始我就说过，自我并不局限于身体。这意味着意识有其他感知信息的方法，即使在物质生命中，体验也不局限于通常意义上的感官所感知之物。然而这仍是精妙的理论，除非你给予自己足够的自由去实验其他感知模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Personality is a gestalt of ever-changing perception. It is the part of the identity which perceives. I do not force my perceptions upon the woman through whom I speak, nor is her consciousness blotted out during our communications. Instead there is an expansion of her consciousness and a projection of energy that is directed away from three-dimensional reality.
quotes.translation: 人格是不断变化的感知的完形。它是身份中感知的部分。我并未将我的感知强加于借之说话的女子，我们的交流中她的意识也未被抹除。相反，她的意识得以扩展，能量投射远离三维实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Our environment therefore is composed of exquisite imbalances, where change is allowed full play. Your own time structure misleads you into your ideas of the relative permanency of physical matter, and you close your eyes to the constant alterations within it. Your physical senses confine you as best they can to the perception of a highly formalized reality. Only through the use of the intuitions and in sleep and dream states, as a rule, can you perceive the joyfully changing nature of your own, and any, consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，我们的环境由精妙的不平衡构成，变化在其中得以充分展现。你们的时间结构误导你们形成对物质实相相对恒常的观念，你们对其中持续的变化视而不见。你们的肉体感官尽可能将你们限制在对高度形式化实相的感知中。通常，只有通过运用直觉、在睡眠与梦境状态中，你们才能感知到自己及任何意识那喜悦变化的本质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The earth then appeared as consciousness transformed itself into the many facets of nature. The atoms and molecules were alive, aware--they were no longer simply a part of a divine syntax, but they spoke themselves through the very nature of their being (gesturing). They became the living, aware vowels and syllables through which consciousness could form matter.
quotes.translation: 随后大地显现，意识将自己转化为自然的诸多面貌。原子与分子是活生生的、有觉知的——它们不再只是神圣句法的一部分，而是通过自身存在的本质（手势）言说自身。它们成为活生生的、有觉知的元音与音节，意识借此得以形成物质。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: I will have more to say, per usual. I suggest your break, and keep in mind that I will speak more on the construction of the entity, the tree analogy being a good one, because all of our imaginary seeds do not develop into trees. This does not necessarily mean, either, that there is a deficiency; merely that the consciousness involved does not choose for one reason or another to materialize fully in a particular form, or to develop any given abilities along certain lines. This may also represent a needed resting point.
quotes.translation: 照例我还会说更多。我建议你们休息，并记住我将进一步谈论"存有"的建构——树木的比喻很恰当，因为我们所有想象中的种子并非都能长成树木。这未必意味着存在缺陷；只是所涉意识出于某种原因，选择不完全以特定形式物质化，或沿着特定路线发展任何既定能力。这也可能代表一个必要的休憩点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now. I do not dream of Ruburt because I do not dream at all, in the same terms that you do. I switch the focus of my attention with conscious intent, so to speak. I take all portions of myself into any particular state of consciousness, and I enter various states of consciousness somewhat in the same manner that you can move from one physical country to another.
quotes.translation: 现在。我并非以你们做梦的方式梦见鲁柏——因为我根本不做梦。可以说，我是有意识地转换注意力的焦点。我将自身的所有部分带入任何特定的意识状态，我进入不同意识状态的方式，类似于你们可以从一个物质国度移动到另一个国度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: These units are sent out indiscriminately by the various atoms and molecules, but portions of them are also directed by the overall rock consciousness. The units are sent out then from the rock, informing the rock as to the nature of its changing environment, the angle of the sun, and temperature changes for example as night falls; and even in the case of a rock, they change as the rock's loosely called emotional tone changes. As the units change they alter the air about them, which is the result of their own activity.
quotes.translation: 这些单位被各种原子和分子无差别地发送出去，但其中一部分也受到整体岩石意识的引导。这些单位从岩石中发出，告知岩石其变化环境的性质，例如太阳的角度、夜幕降临时的温度变化；即使是岩石，这些单位也会随着岩石所谓的情感基调的变化而改变。当这些单位变化时，它们会改变周围的空气，这是它们自身活动的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: (9:35.) Now this particular level of consciousness, occurring in the sleep state, has not been pinpointed by your scientists. During it, energy is generated that makes the dream state itself possible. It is true that dreams allow the physically oriented self to digest current experience, but it is also true that the experience is then returned to its initial components. It breaks apart, so to speak. Portions of it are retained as "past" physical sense data, but the whole experience returns to its initial direct state.
quotes.translation: （9:35。）现在，这种特定层次的意识，发生在睡眠状态中，尚未被你们的科学家准确识别。在此过程中，产生的能量使梦境状态本身成为可能。确实，梦境让面向物质世界的自我消化当前经验，但同样真实的是，这些经验随后被分解回其初始成分。可以说，它被拆解了。其中一部分作为“过去的”物质感官数据被保留，但整个经验回归其初始的直接状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Your psychic work will also help them question the values of their lives. In any case, barriers will drop on both sides. Many of the children are grown, and the adults have more time to think and ponder. They also need to see other life-styles. The mixture of families of consciousness allows you also to take a close look at the ways in which these tendencies merge to form communities. You are not moving into a closed psychic area, then, where everyone sees the world as you do, even generally speaking. Nor should you.
quotes.translation: 你的心灵工作也会帮助他们质疑自己生活的价值。无论如何，双方之间的障碍都会消除。许多孩子已经长大成人，成年人则有更多时间思考与沉思。他们也需要看到其他生活方式。意识家族的融合让你得以近距离观察这些倾向如何汇聚成社群。因此，你并非要进入一个封闭的心灵领域——在那里，即使泛泛而言，每个人都以你的方式看待世界。你也不该如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: If you think of your world with all of its great natural splendors as coming about initially through the auspices of chance -- through an accident of cosmic proportions -- then it certainly often seems that such a world can have no greater meaning. Its animation is seen as having no source outside itself. The myth of the great CHANCE ENCOUNTER, in caps, that is supposed to have brought forth life on your planet then presupposes, of course, an individual consciousness that is, in certain terms, alive by chance alone.
quotes.translation: 若你认为你的世界及其所有壮丽自然奇观最初源于偶然——源于一场宇宙级的意外——那么这样的世界显然常常显得毫无更深意义。它的生机被认为没有外在源头。那场被冠以大写字母的"伟大偶然邂逅"神话——据称正是它在地球上催生了生命——自然预设了一个在特定意义上仅凭偶然存活的个体意识。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: It is useless then to say, "When this life is over I will look back upon my experience and mend my ways." This is like a young man saying, "When I grow old and retire, I will use all those abilities that I am not now developing." You are setting the stage for your "next" life now. The thoughts you think today will in one way or another become the fabric of your next existence. There are no magic words that will make you wise, that will fill you with understanding and compassion, that will expand your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此说“此生结束后，我将回顾我的经历并改正我的方式”是无用的。这就像一个年轻人说：“等我老了退休时，我会运用所有我现在没有发展的能力。”你现在正在为你的“下一世”搭建舞台。你今天所想的念头，会以某种方式成为你下一世存在的结构。没有任何神奇的话语能让你变得智慧，能让你充满理解与慈悲，能扩展你的意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now any individual can pass through these levels and remain relatively untouched and unaware, can travel through them unperceiving. The overall intentions and characteristics of the personality will determine the quality of perception and understanding. The material mentioned is available in each of the levels of consciousness given, but it must be sought out, either through conscious desire or strong unconscious desire. If it is not, then the gifts available and the potentials simply remain unused and unclaimed.
quotes.translation: 现在，任何个体都可以穿越这些层次而保持相对不受影响、毫无察觉，可以毫无感知地穿行其中。人格的整体意图和特性将决定感知与理解的质量。所提及的材料在给出的每个意识层次中都是可用的，但它必须通过有意识的渴望或强烈的无意识渴望去寻求。如果不这样做，那么可得的礼物和潜能就只是未被使用、未被认领。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The entire subject is very important, however. As far as a true psychology is concerned, individuals who are made aware of the existence of probable realities will no longer feel trapped by events. Your consciousness is at a point where it is beginning to understand the significance of "predictive action" -- and predictive action always involves probabilities.
quotes.translation: 然而，整个主题非常重要。就真正的心理学而言，那些意识到可能实相存在的人将不再感到被事件所困。你的意识正处于开始理解"预测性行动"重要性的阶段——而预测性行动总是涉及可能性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: You can "come awake" from your normal waking state, and that is the natural next step for consciousness to follow -- one for which your biology has already equipped you. Indeed, each person does attain that recognition now and then. It brings triumphs and challenges as well. In those areas of life where you are satisfied, give yourselves credit, and in those areas where you are not, remind yourselves that you are involved in a learning process; you are daring enough to accept the responsibility for your actions.
quotes.translation: 你可以从正常的清醒状态"醒过来"，这是意识自然的下一个步骤——你的生物学构造已为此做好准备。事实上，每个人都会不时达到这种认知。它既带来胜利也带来挑战。在那些你感到满意的生活领域，请给予自己肯定；而在那些你不满意的领域，提醒自己你正参与一个学习过程；你足够勇敢去承担自己行为的责任。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: "Science would say that the idea of meaning itself is simply a reflection of the state of the brain, as is the illusion of our consciousness. But a science that disregards consciousness must necessarily end up creating its own illusion. It ignores the reality of experience, the evidence of being, and in so doing it denies rather than reinforces life's values."
quotes.translation: "科学会说意义本身的概念只是大脑状态的反映，就像我们意识的幻象一样。但忽视意识的科学最终必然制造出自己的幻象。它忽略了经验的实相、存在的证据，这样做是在否定而非强化生命的价值。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: These CU's can operate as separate entities, as identities, or they can flow together in a vast, harmonious wave of activity, as a force. Period. Actually, units of consciousness operate in both ways all of the time. No identity, once "formed," is ever annihilated, for its existence is indelibly a part of "the entire wave of consciousness to which it belongs."
quotes.translation: 这些意识单位可以独立运作，作为独立的身份，也可以汇聚成一股浩瀚和谐的活动浪潮，作为一种力量。句号。实际上，意识单位始终以两种方式运作。一旦“形成”，任何身份都不会被消灭，因为其存在不可磨灭地是“它所属的整个意识浪潮”的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: It is not in any manner inevitable or a law of the universe. Far from it. For some reason mankind as a species on your plane has become much more attached to its camouflage patterns than most other kinds of consciousness. And with some important exceptions, all types of consciousness do have their peculiar camouflage patterns to which they more or less adhere.
quotes.translation: 这绝非必然，也不是宇宙的法则。远非如此。出于某种原因，你们层面上的人类作为一个物种，比大多数其他类型的意识更执着于其伪装模式。除了一些重要的例外，所有类型的意识确实都有其或多或少遵循的独特伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In prehistoric times mankind evolved the ego and self-consciousness to help him deal with the camouflage patterns that he had created. This is no contradiction, and will be explained later. He did the job so well that even when he had things under control he was not satisfied. He developed at a lopsided level. He used himself as a tool to dissect himself. The inside senses led him to a reality he could not manipulate as easily as he could a camouflage world, and he feared what he thought of as a loss of mastery.
quotes.translation: 在史前时代，人类进化出了自我和自我意识，以帮助他处理自己创造的伪装模式。这并不矛盾，稍后会解释。他做得如此出色，以至于即使他掌控了局面，他仍不满足。他以一种不平衡的方式发展。他把自己当作工具来剖析自己。内在感官引导他进入一个他无法像操纵伪装世界那样轻易操纵的现实，他害怕自己认为的掌控力丧失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: I can then, therefore, enter the limits of your psychic comprehension. This is a very simplified version, but I must, so to speak, therefore journey through the various areas of Ruburt's whole self, or inner self, until I reach a point where entry into your consciousness is possible. This happens to be the third undifferentiated layer of Ruburt's subconscious.
quotes.translation: 因此，我可以进入你们心灵理解的界限。这是一个极度简化的版本，但可以说，我必须穿越鲁柏整个自我或内在自我的各个领域，直到抵达一个能进入你们意识的点。这恰好是鲁柏潜意识中第三层未分化的层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In this abundance nothing is meaningless nor wasted. There is interrelationship, intertwining realities, and connections that cannot be denied. I told you that dream reality consisted of more than you knew, and that the dream universe continued whether or not you perceived it. Within that context those inhabitants dream in turn their own dreams and form electromagnetic realities. You are not at the top nor at the bottom of the heap of consciousness, so to speak. You are not at the center. You are not at the rim.
quotes.translation: 在这丰盛之中，没有任何事物是毫无意义或被浪费的。存在着无法否认的相互关联、交织的现实与连结。我曾告诉你们，梦的实相远超过你们所知，而无论你们是否感知到，梦的宇宙都持续存在。在此脉络下，那些居民反过来也做着他们自己的梦，并形成电磁实相。可以说，你们既不在意识堆叠的顶端，也不在底层。你们不在中心，也不在边缘。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: 1. I can note a good deal later that Seth's material on our making further distinctions in the families of consciousness, beyond the nine he's already named for us, is certainly related to the passages from a private session that I quoted in the last three paragraphs of Note 8 for the 732nd session: Seth stated that Peter Smith and I "are and are not counterparts" -- that with another in this life each of us may often come together, then part, "forming a counterpart relationship when it suits your purposes...."
quotes.translation: 1. 我后来清楚注意到，赛斯关于我们在意识家族中做出更细致区分的资料——超越他已为我们命名的九个家族——确实与我在第732节注8最后三段引用的私人课段落相关：赛斯指出彼得·史密斯与我"是且不是对应体"——在此生中，我们各自常与另一个人相遇又分离，"在符合你目的时形成对应体关系……"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: "Sure, I was a Sumari then, too. I've always been one. I've always had the knowledge of Sumari, I think ... Funny -- I don't know how to describe it, really, but I feel that through all of my lives at least one of my functions has been to act as a sort of catalyst between the Sumari and other families of consciousness. I seem to have played roles where I'd get involved with people in other families, then lead them over to the Sumari. At least that way different groups made contact and learned from each other."7
quotes.translation: "当然，那时我也是苏马利家族的一员。我一直都是。我一直拥有苏马利的知识，我想……有趣的是——我真的不知道该怎么形容，但我感觉在我所有的转世中，至少有一个功能是充当苏马利与其他意识家族之间的催化剂。我似乎扮演过这样的角色：与其它家族的人打交道，然后引导他们走向苏马利。至少这样不同的群体得以接触并互相学习。"7
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: It should be obvious that there is nothing strange in the fact that the dreaming self and the waking self appear so unfamiliar to each other. The study of hypnotism will greatly enlarge man's understanding of human personality in general. These separate states of consciousness, these multiple levels of awareness, these seemingly unrelated personality aspects, are not unnatural artificial productions, brought about through hypnosis. Hypnotism is merely a method that allows you to study the personality directly.
quotes.translation: 梦中的自我与清醒的自我彼此显得如此陌生，这并没有什么奇怪的。催眠术的研究将大大增进人类对人格整体的理解。这些分离的意识状态、这些多层次的觉知、这些看似无关的人格面向，并非通过催眠产生的不自然的人为产物。催眠术只是一种让你能够直接研究人格的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: To some extent this transmutation of symbol can be observed in various stages of waking consciousness also. When you are at rest, awake but with eyes closed, images and pictures will often appear to your inner eye. Some will be physical-like materializations, images of trees or houses or people. Others will be simply shapes that change swiftly and seem to flow one into the other. As a rule, even the images that are recognizable will quickly be replaced by others in a kaleidoscope of constantly changing forms.
quotes.translation: 在清醒意识的各个阶段，也能观察到某种程度的象征转化。当你处于休息状态、清醒但闭着眼睛时，内眼常会浮现影像和画面。有些是类似物质化的具象，如树木、房屋或人物的图像；另一些则只是快速变化、相互交融的形态。通常，即使是可辨识的影像，也会在万花筒般不断变化的形态中被迅速取代。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I do not mean by such a description to minimize the importance of physical life, for All That Is endows each portion of its own transformed reality with a unique existence that is duplicated nowhere else, and each spark of consciousness is endowed with a divine heritage that is never extinguished--a spark that is apparent in all other corners of the universe.
quotes.translation: 我这样描述并非要贬低物质生命的重要性，因为“一切万有”赋予其自身转化实相的每个部分独一无二的存在，这种存在在任何其他地方都无法复制，而意识的每个火花都被赋予了永不熄灭的神圣传承——这火花在宇宙所有其他角落都清晰可见。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: Certain kinds of medications can indeed help, but those given in your hospitals simply drug the consciousness out of its own understanding, and inhibit the body mechanisms that make for an easy transition. In your prisons you do the same thing, of course, isolating groups of people with like beliefs -- denying them all natural stimuli so that a greater contagion of similar beliefs ensues. You separate such people from the normal contact of their loved ones, and all usual conditions for growth or development.
quotes.translation: 某些药物确实能有所帮助，但你们医院里给的那些药物只是将意识从其自身理解中麻醉出来，并抑制了本可促成顺利过渡的身体机制。在你们的监狱里，你们当然也做着同样的事——将持有相似信念的人群隔离起来，剥夺他们所有自然刺激，从而导致相似信念的更大规模传染。你们让这些人脱离与所爱之人的正常接触，以及所有通常的成长或发展条件。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Many cavemen doubtlessly feared for their personal survival when they ventured forth upon the earth in daylight. They feared that their selves would be annihilated. Such a development as we are considering involves instead an expansion or extension; in the same manner that the expanding universe takes up no space, but expands in terms of value fulfillment, so the expanding consciousness would take up no space, but would also expand in terms of value fulfillment. This is your new frontier, your new challenge.
quotes.translation: 许多穴居人无疑在白天外出探索大地时，会为自身的生存感到恐惧。他们害怕自我会被消灭。而我们正在探讨的这种发展，反而涉及一种扩张或延伸；正如不断膨胀的宇宙并不占据空间，而是以价值完成的方式扩张，同样地，不断扩展的意识也不会占据空间，而是同样以价值完成的方式扩展。这就是你们的新疆域、你们的新挑战。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The overly specific sexual orientation, then, reflects a basic division in consciousness. It not only separates a man from his own intuitions and emotions to some extent, or a woman from her own intellect, but it effectively provides a civilization in which mind and heart, fact and revelation, appear completely divorced. To some degree each person is at war with the psyche, for all of an individual's human characteristics must be denied unless they fit in with those considered normal to the sexual identity.
quotes.translation: 因此，过度特定的性取向反映了意识中的基本分裂。它不仅在一定程度上使男性与自身的直觉和情感分离，或使女性与自身的理智分离，而且有效地造就了一种文明，在其中心智与心灵、事实与启示似乎完全割裂。在某种程度上，每个人都与自己的心灵交战，因为除非符合被视为正常的性别身份特征，否则个体所有的人类特质都必须被否定。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The horror and the results of mismanagement, and the vulnerability, are the teaching methods that each consciousness has accepted before entering your system. There is no way out but to learn or to ruin the entire system. In no other field of reality are the terms so drastic. For this reason the inner self withholds much of its knowledge. There must be no leaning upon the very basic fact that behind and within the system there is relief. You must believe in the physical reality and accept the vulnerability.
quotes.translation: 管理不当的恐怖、后果以及脆弱性，是每个意识在进入你们系统之前就已接受的教学方法。除了学习或摧毁整个系统之外，别无他途。在现实的其他领域中，没有如此严苛的条件。正因如此，内在自我保留了它的大部分知识。绝不能依赖系统背后和系统内部存在解脱这一基本事实。你们必须相信物质实相，并接受脆弱性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Your own kind of focus emerged from such a background, so that within yourselves you contain myriad consciousnesses of which you are unaware. Through your own particular focus, the consciousnesses of the natural world merged to form a synthesis in which, for example, symphonies can emerge. You act not only for yourselves, but also for other kinds of consciousness that you have purposefully forgotten. In following your own purposes, which are yours, you also serve the purposes of others you have forgotten.
quotes.translation: 你们这种特定的焦点正是从这样的背景中浮现出来的，因此在你们自身之内，蕴含着无数你们未曾察觉的意识。通过你们独特的焦点，自然界的各种意识融合成一种综合形态，例如交响乐便由此而生。你们不仅为自己而行动，也为那些你们刻意遗忘的其他意识类型而行动。在追寻属于你们自身的目标时，你们也在服务那些已被遗忘的存有们的目的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: 1. Seth's material on dying and the nature of consciousness immediately reminded me of what he'd said at 11:20 in the 801st session: "Dying is a biological necessity ... Inherently, each individual knows that he or she must die physically in order to survive spiritually and psychically ... The self outgrows the flesh." I'd been thinking about those passages, and when Seth returned to the subject tonight I decided to have some fun with our accepted social and scientific establishments by writing this note.
quotes.translation: 1. 赛斯关于死亡与意识本质的资料，立即让我想起他在第801节课11:20所说的话："死亡是生物学上的必然……本质上，每个个体都知道自己必须在肉体上死亡，才能在灵性与心灵层面存活……自我终将超越血肉之躯。"我一直在思考这些段落，当赛斯今晚重拾这个话题时，我决定通过写下这段笔记，来对我们公认的社会与科学体系开个玩笑。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: As Ruburt mentioned in Psychic Politics, there are many gradations of consciousness, and as I mentioned in The Nature of the Psyche, early man used his consciousness in other ways than those you are familiar with. He often perceived what you would call the products of the imagination as sense data, for example, more or less objectified in the physical world.
quotes.translation: 正如鲁柏在《心灵政治》中所提，意识存在许多层次；而我在《心灵的本质》中说过，早期人类使用意识的方式与你们所熟悉的不同。举例来说，他们常将你们所谓想象力的产物感知为感官资料，这些资料或多或少会具体化在物质世界中。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: (10:26.) At a very simple level, for example, your consciousness leaves your body often in the sleep state. You communicate with people in other levels of reality that you have known, but far beyond this, you creatively maintain and revitalize your physical image. You process daily experience, project it into what you think of as the future, choose from an infinity of probable events those you will make physical, and begin the mental and psychic processes that will bring them into the world of substance.
quotes.translation: （十点二十六分。）举个简单的例子，在睡眠状态中，你们的意识常常离开身体。你们与认识的其他实相层面的人沟通，但远不止于此，你们还创造性地维持并更新自己的物质形象。你们处理日常经验，将其投射到你们所谓的未来，从无限的可能事件中选择那些你们将使其物质化的事件，并开始心智与心灵的过程，将这些事件带入物质世界。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Your own kind of conscious mind is splendid and unique. It causes you, however, to interpret all other kinds of life according to your own specifications and experience. The complex nature of other animal consciousness escapes you completely. And when you compare your technologies, learning, logical thought, cultures and arts with what you understand of animal experience, there seems no doubt that you are superior and "the Flower of Evolution" -- that all other kinds of life are topped by your existence.
quotes.translation: 你们这种意识心是卓越而独特的。然而，它导致你们按照自己的规格和经验去解读所有其他种类的生命。其他动物意识的复杂本质完全被你们忽略了。当你们将自己的技术、学识、逻辑思维、文化和艺术与你们所理解的动物经验相比较时，似乎毫无疑问你们是优越的，是“进化的花朵”——所有其他种类的生命都被你们的存在所超越。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: In such ways each individual maintains a picture of the everchanging physical and psychological mass environment. Physical events as you understand them could not exist otherwise. (Long pause.) Basically, information is experience. In dreams you attain the necessary information to form your lives. That state of sleep, therefore, is not simply the other side of your consciousness, but makes your waking life and culture possible.
quotes.translation: 通过这种方式，每个个体都维持着一幅不断变化的物质与心理群体环境的画面。否则，你们所理解的物质事件就不可能存在。（长停顿。）基本上，信息就是经验。在梦中，你们获得形成生活所必需的信息。因此，睡眠状态不仅仅是你们意识的另一面，而是使你们的清醒生活和文化成为可能。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: There is less differentiation, in your terms, in no time, but far more differentiation in terms of consciousness, and psychological experience. All probabilities have their reality in no time, and the creative accomplishments that take place within no time generate all the probable realities that will ever exist or have existed within the various time systems. In various dream states you do delve into no time, and it is of course here that you have your primary existence and the ground of your identity.
quotes.translation: 用你们的说法，在无时间中分化较少，但在意识与心理经验方面分化却大得多。所有可能性都在无时间中拥有其真实性，而在无时间内发生的创造性成就，生成了所有曾经存在或将在不同时间系统内存在的可能实相。在各种梦境状态中，你们确实深入无时间之境，而这里正是你们主要的存在处所与身份根基。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: They represent, however, deep unities that you do not understand. Your conception of good and evil results in large part from the kind of consciousness you have presently adopted. You do not perceive wholes, but portions. The conscious mind focuses with a quick, limited, but intense light, perceiving from a given field of reality only certain "stimuli." It then puts these stimuli together, forming the liaison of similarity. Anything that it does not accept as a portion of reality, it does not perceive.
quotes.translation: 然而，它们代表着你们尚未理解的深层统一性。你们对善恶的概念，很大程度上源于你们目前所采用的意识类型。你们无法感知整体，只能感知片段。意识心以快速、有限但强烈的光芒聚焦，从特定实相场域中仅感知某些"刺激"。然后它将这些刺激组合起来，形成相似性的联结。任何它不承认为实相组成部分的事物，它便无法感知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (Slowly:) The dream state, however, does operate as a rich web of communication between probable selves and probable existences. All probabilities spring from inner reality, from the psyche's own inner activity and structure. (Long pause.) The consciousness that you know can indeed now emerge into even greater realization of itself, but not by obsessively defending its old position. Instead it must recognize its power as the director of probable action, and no longer inhibit its own greater capacities.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）然而，梦境状态确实在可能自我与可能存在之间充当着丰富的沟通网络。所有可能性都源自内在实相，源自心灵自身的内在活动与结构。（长停顿。）你所知的意识确实能够进入对自身更伟大的认知，但并非通过偏执地固守旧有立场。相反，它必须认识到自身作为可能行动导演的力量，不再抑制自己更伟大的能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Earlier, I also spoke about the importance of dreams in man's early background, and their importance to you as a species. Here, I want to stress the social aspects of dreams, and to point out the fact that dreams also show you some of the processes that are involved in the actual formation of physical events: You actually come into an event, therefore, long before the event physically happens, at other levels of consciousness, and a good deal of this prior activity takes place in the state of dreaming.
quotes.translation: 此前，我也谈到过梦境在人类早期背景中的重要性，以及它们作为一个物种对你们的重要性。在此，我想强调梦境的社会面向，并指出一个事实：梦境也向你们展示了物质事件实际形成过程中所涉及的某些过程——你们实际上在事件物质发生之前，早已在其他意识层面进入该事件，而这类先期活动有很大一部分发生在梦境状态中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: (All more intently:) I hope that this book to some extent or another puts each of you in touch with your own inner psychological motion, your creative breath, so that you are invigorated and sense within your own minds and spirit a new promise, a new intent, and the exhilaration of earthly and spiritual strength. You dwell in a state of natural grace that is quite alive and vital whether or not science decrees that consciousness possesses its own intent. Nature is supernatural all the while, of course.
quotes.translation: （更加专注地：）我希望这本书能在某种程度上让各位与自身内在的心理运动、创造性的呼吸重新连结，使你们重获活力，并在自己的心智与灵性中感知到新的承诺、新的意图，以及世俗与灵性力量带来的振奋。你们栖身于一种自然恩宠的状态中，无论科学是否承认意识拥有自身意图，这种状态都充满生机与活力。当然，大自然始终是超自然的。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: It will involve an expansion of consciousness, not physical knowledge... You will directly and simply perceive more... I cannot make Ruburt find all the words. Your God is part of a larger reality. We see what we can see... This larger reality is also a part of our dreams: it is more important and vital than breath, for you are all part of this individually. There is a give and take between you and the stars on a physical basis, just as there is also a connection between selves and what you call a god.
quotes.translation: 这将涉及意识的扩展，而非物质知识……你将直接而单纯地感知更多……我无法让鲁柏找到所有词汇。你们的神是更大实相的一部分。我们看见我们能看见的……这个更大的实相也是我们梦境的一部分：它比呼吸更重要、更充满活力，因为你们每个人都各自是它的一部分。在物质基础上，你们与星辰之间存在一种给予与接受的关系，正如自我与你们所谓的神之间也存在一种联结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It helps form the new individual, and then it must withdraw. The new self unit must be free and not hampered by the demands that could otherwise be put upon it. The new individual has a deeply buried memory of its past lives, but the personal consciousness of the last reincarnated self must not be superimposed upon this new identity. The new personality, in its small astral body, does visit with other portions of the entire identity. It is even given lessons of a kind, but it is very much its own self.
quotes.translation: 它帮助形成新的个体，然后必须退出。新的自我单元必须自由，不受可能加诸其上的要求所阻碍。新个体对其前世有着深埋的记忆，但上一个转世自我的个人意识绝不能叠加于这个新身份之上。新的人格，在其小小的星光体中，确实会与整个身份的其他部分交流。它甚至接受某种形式的教导，但它很大程度上仍是它自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: (9:45. A pause lasting well over a minute.) Your current decisions to accept one specific line of consciousness as real, and to ignore others, makes such concepts difficult to understand. You train yourselves -- biologically, even -- to inhibit certain stimuli, yet often the body itself responds to the very stimuli that you consciously ignore. By opening up your minds to new kinds of significances, however, you can begin to glimpse other orders of events4 with which you are quite intimately concerned.
quotes.translation: （9点45分。停顿超过一分钟。）你们当前决定将某一条意识线视为真实，而忽略其他，这使得这些概念难以理解。你们训练自己——甚至在生理上——去抑制某些刺激，然而身体本身常常会回应你们有意识忽略的那些刺激。不过，通过向新的意义类型敞开你们的心智，你们就能开始瞥见与你们密切相关的其他事件秩序。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: "Returning to the material on perception, there are changes in the positive and negative atomic charges, alterations of movement inside the atoms in the smaller particles, a change in pulsation rate. The activity of atoms is actually caused by perceptive qualities. To begin with, atoms do not just move within themselves because they are atoms. The constant motion within them is caused by the unending perceptive nature of any consciousness, however minute in your terms. Does that answer your question?"
quotes.translation: "回到感知的材料上，正负原子电荷存在变化，原子内部较小粒子的运动发生改变，脉动频率也有变化。原子的活动实际上是由感知特质引起的。首先，原子并非仅仅因为是原子就在自身内部运动。它们内部的持续运动是由任何意识永不停歇的感知本质所导致的——无论以你们的说法来看这种意识多么微小。这回答了你的问题吗？"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Referring to his Introduction again, he remarks that he misses the excitement of the chase, encountered in his own creative work. Here, you see, the acceleration is so rapid and intense that he is not consciously able to follow it. The unconscious, so-called, has little to do with this phenomenon. It is, however, related strongly to qualities inherent within each consciousness. Such ability is rarely used to full advantage. Connections are made so rapidly that the physical brain is not aware of them.
quotes.translation: 再次提及他的引言时，他提到自己怀念在创作工作中所体验到的追逐的兴奋感。你看，这里的加速如此迅速而强烈，以至于他有意识地无法跟上。所谓的无意识与这种现象几乎无关。然而，这与每个意识内在的特质密切相关。这种能力很少被充分利用。连接建立得如此之快，以至于物质大脑无法察觉它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The integrity of any intuitive information depends upon the inner integrity of the person who receives it. Expansion of consciousness, therefore, requires honest self appraisal, an awareness of one's own beliefs and prejudices. (Long pause at 11:01.) It brings a gift and a responsibility. All who wish to look within themselves, to find their own answers, to encounter their own "appointment with the universe," should therefore become well acquainted with the intimate workings of their own personality.
quotes.translation: 任何直觉信息的完整性取决于接收者内在的完整性。因此，意识的扩展需要诚实的自我评估，对自己信念和偏见的觉察。（11:01长时间停顿。）它带来了一份天赋和一份责任。所有希望向内探索、寻找自己的答案、迎接自己“与宇宙的约定”的人，都应该充分了解自己人格的内在运作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Such subjective events therefore manipulate physical matter through the personality who experiences them. The field of reality for any given personality must and does include all these areas of activity, for they give form and dimension to his existence. I have said earlier that the individual could not exist in a physical universe if he did not also exist in the dream universe. Again, there are chemical and electromagnetic connections that cannot be severed between all these states of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，这类主观事件通过体验它们的人格来操控物质实相。任何特定人格的实相场必然且确实包含所有这些活动领域，因为它们赋予其存在以形式和维度。我先前说过，个体若不存在于梦境宇宙中，便无法存在于物质宇宙里。同样，所有这些意识状态之间存在着无法切断的化学与电磁连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: （In the 44th session, Seth began a list of qualities and attributes which are included in the spacious present. To date there are eleven of these: Value climate of psychological reality; energy transformation; spontaneity; durability; creation; consciousness; capacity for infinite mobility; law of infinite changeability and transmutation; cooperation; arrival and departure, meaning physical birth and death; and quality depth, the perspective in which an idea can expand, replacing our time and space.）
quotes.translation: （在第四十四节中，赛斯开始列举包含在广袤当下中的特质与属性清单。至今已有十一项：心理实相的价值气候；能量转化；自发性；耐久性；创造；意识；无限移动能力；无限可变性与转化法则；合作；到来与离去，意指物质性出生与死亡；以及品质深度，即观念得以扩展的视角，取代我们的时间与空间。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: "Seth as a 'master event.' As the Mona Lisa is 'more real' than, say, a normal object or the [materials] that compose it, so is all good or great art more than its own physical manifestation. Consider art as a natural phenomenon constructed by the psyche, a transspecies of perception and consciousness that changes, enlarges and expands life's experiences and casts them in a different light, offering new opportunities for creating action and new solutions to problems by inserting new, original data.
quotes.translation: 赛斯作为一个"大师事件"。正如蒙娜丽莎比普通物体或构成它的材料更"真实"，所有优秀或伟大的艺术都超越其物理表现。将艺术视为心灵构建的自然现象，一种感知与意识的跨物种形态，它改变、扩大并拓展生命体验，以不同视角呈现它们，通过插入新的原创数据，为创造行动提供新机遇，为问题提供新解决方案。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: There is one difference of course. The star does not know upon whom its light falls. It is blind to the landscape that it brightens. It cannot see that which it illuminates. In the case of these psychological structures however, because of the multidimensional aspects, there is understanding and purpose. A portion of that kind of personality structure knows well that while its main focus of consciousness has gone into other dimensions, it will nevertheless be perceived by others at any given point.
quotes.translation: 当然有一个区别。星星不知道它的光芒落在谁身上。它对自己照亮的大地视而不见。它无法看见它所照亮的事物。然而，在这些心理结构的情况下，由于多维面向的存在，其中包含理解与目的。这种人格结构的一部分清楚地知道，虽然其主要意识焦点已进入其他维度，但它仍会在任何特定时间点被他人感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: (11:00.) Trees as they stand are a sound that, again, you do not perceive. In your dreams and particularly beyond those dreams that you recall, are areas of consciousness in which these sounds are automatically perceived and translated into visual images. They operate as a sort of shorthand. Given certain sounds, you could recreate your universe as you know it unconsciously, and any one multidimensional symbol can contain all the reality that you know. End of dictation. (Pause.) Now a few remarks.
quotes.translation: (11:00.) 树木伫立时发出的声音，同样是你无法感知的。在你的梦境中，尤其是超越你回忆的那些梦境，存在着意识领域，这些声音在其中被自动感知并转化为视觉图像。它们作为一种速记方式运作。给定某些声音，你就能在无意识中重建你所知的宇宙，而任何一个多维符号都能包含你所知的所有实相。口授结束。(停顿。)现在说几句。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:52.) It will not be physically perceived. You see only its results. Since consciousness can travel faster than the speed of light, then when it is not imprisoned by the slower particles of the body it can become aware of some of these other realities. Without training, however, it will not know how to interpret what it sees. The physical brain is the mechanism by which thought or emotion is automatically formed into EE units of the proper range and intensity to be used by the physical organism.
quotes.translation: （9点52分。）它不会被肉体感知。你只能看到它的结果。由于意识能以超过光速的速度移动，当它不被身体较慢的粒子所囚禁时，就能觉察到某些其他实相。然而，若未经训练，它将不知如何解读所见之物。肉体大脑是一种机制，思想或情感通过它自动形成适当范围和强度的EE单位，以供肉体有机体使用。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You are bringing into your consciousness traces of events that have not been registered in the same way that waking events are (emphatically) by the brain. The dream events are partially brain-recorded, but the brain separates such experience from waking events. Dreams can provide you with experience that in a manner of speaking, at least, is not encountered in time. The dream itself is recorded by the brain's time sequences, but in the dream itself there is a duration of time "that is timeless."
quotes.translation: 你正将那些未被大脑以清醒事件相同方式（强调地）记录的事件痕迹带入你的意识。梦境事件部分由大脑记录，但大脑将此类体验与清醒事件区分开来。梦境能为你提供至少可以说在时间中不会遇到的体验。梦境本身由大脑的时间序列记录，但在梦境本身中，存在一种"无时间性"的时间持续。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Now it takes study, development, and experience before an identity can learn to hold its own stability in the face of such constant stimuli; and many of us have gotten lost, even forgetting who we were until we once more awakened to ourselves. Much of this is quite automatic to us now. In the infinite varieties of consciousness, we are still aware of a small percentage of the entire banks of personalities that exist. For our "vacations" we visit amid quite simple life forms, and blend with them.
quotes.translation: 现在，一个身份需要经过学习、发展和经验，才能学会在面对如此持续不断的刺激时保持自身的稳定性；我们中许多人曾迷失方向，甚至忘记自己是谁，直到我们再次觉醒。如今这对我们而言大多已是自动化的过程。在意识的无限变体中，我们仍只意识到存在的人格库中的一小部分。为了我们的“假期”，我们会探访简单的生命形态，并与它们融合。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: 3. Seth began discussing coordinate points in Chapter 5 of Seth Speaks. See the 524th session: "Other kinds of consciousness coexist within the same 'space' that your world inhabits. They do not perceive your physical objects, for their reality is composed of a different camouflage structure. This is a general statement, however, for various points of your realities can and do coincide ... points of what you would call double reality, containing great energy potential ... where realities merge."
quotes.translation: 赛斯在《灵魂永生》第五章开始讨论坐标点。参见第524节："其他种类的意识与你们世界共处于同一'空间'中。它们感知不到你们的物质物体，因为它们的实相由不同的伪装结构组成。不过这只是概括性说法，因为你们实相的各种点确实可以且确实会重合……形成你们所谓的双重实相之点，蕴含着巨大的能量潜能……是实相融合之处。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (A note: Those who are interested in material on the fluctuations of consciousness can refer to the following sessions in Seth Speaks: the 567th session in Chapter Sixteen, on the phasing of atoms in and out of our system; the 576th session in Chapter Nineteen, on alternate presents; and the ESP class session for June 23, 1970, in the Appendix, on organization in our present reality. Seth states therein: "But the fact is that physical matter is not solid except when you believe that it is ...")
quotes.translation: （注：对意识波动资料感兴趣的读者可参阅《赛斯书》中的以下章节：第十六章第567节关于原子进出我们系统的相位变化；第十九章第576节关于交替的当下；以及附录中1970年6月23日ESP课关于当前实相组织的记录。赛斯在其中指出："但事实是，物质并非坚实，除非你相信它是……"）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: All this involved an idea of, and I hesitate to say advancement, but an idea of change along certain lines. We have spoken of mental genes. These are more or less psychic blueprints for physical matter, and in these mental genes existed the pattern for your human type of self-consciousness. It did not appear constructed, that is in constructed form, for a long period of physical time however, and we have discussed psychological time as being part of what I will call for now an inner time sense.
quotes.translation: 这一切涉及某种概念——我犹豫是否称之为进步——但确实是沿特定方向的改变概念。我们曾讨论过心灵基因。这些可视为物质实相的心灵蓝图，其中存有人类自我意识类型的模式。然而在漫长的物理时间中，它并未以建构形态显现。我们讨论过心理时间，它属于我暂称为内在时间感的一部分。"
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: (10:10.) It greatly needs a stabilizing factor. Previously the body consciousness has been enriched and supported by deep biological and telepathic identification with the mother. The communication of the living cells is far more profound than you imagine. The identification is almost complete before birth as far as body consciousness alone is concerned.
quotes.translation: （十点十分。）它极需一个稳定因素。此前，身体意识通过与母亲深层的生物性与心灵感应的认同，获得了滋养与支持。活细胞之间的沟通远比你所想象的更为深刻。就身体意识本身而言，这种认同在出生前几乎已完全建立。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "The cautions are natural enough under the restrictions man usually places upon consciousness. Ruburt carries his protection and safety wherever he goes. It is a natural grace, characteristic of consciousness of any kind. Its protection and validity are always honored. Ruburt is safe wherever he goes. His psychological stance is honored wherever he goes.
quotes.translation: “在人类通常加诸于意识之上的限制下，这些谨慎态度自然是可以理解的。鲁柏无论走到何处，都随身携带他的保护与安全。这是一种自然的天恩，是任何意识都具备的特性。它的保护与有效性始终受到尊重。鲁柏无论走到何处都是安全的。他的心理立场无论走到何处都受到尊重。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: Growth is an erroneous conception that begins with the distortive idea of continuous physical matter, durable in time. And as you know instead, matter is the simultaneous expression of consciousness. Matter has little, really no, durability in itself, and is merely the instantaneous form taken by consciousness as it projects itself in the physical field.
quotes.translation: 成长是一个错误的观念，始于对连续物质实相（在时间中持久存在）的扭曲认知。而如你所知，物质其实是意识的同时性表达。物质本身几乎没有——实际上完全没有——持久性，它仅仅是意识在物质场域中投射自身时所采取的瞬间形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: ("The entity was born once as John the Baptist, and then he was born in two other forms. One of these contained the personality that most stories of Christ refer to.... I will tell you about the other personality at a later time. There was constant communication between these three portions of one entity, though they were born and buried at different dates. The race called up these personalities from its own psychic bank, from the pool of individualized consciousness that was available to it."
quotes.translation: 该存有曾以施洗约翰的身份诞生过一次，随后又以另外两种形态降生。其中一种形态包含了大多数基督故事所指涉的人格……我将在稍后告诉你另一种人格的事。尽管这三个部分在不同时期出生与埋葬，但它们之间始终保持着持续沟通。人类种族从自身的心理银行中召唤出这些人格，从可供其取用的个体化意识之池中汲取。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The brain with its bodily connections must deal with the time lapses that sensual perception always imply. The interior workings of the body, to be conscious, would have to deal with time sequences that would present the physically attuned consciousness with "mathematical" deductions and calculations far too numerous for it to handle. For example, it would have to keep conscious track of all the muscles, nerves, organs, cells, molecules and atoms, while manipulating the body in space and time.
quotes.translation: 大脑及其身体连接必须处理感官知觉始终隐含的时间延迟。身体的内在运作若要具备意识，就必须处理时间序列——这些序列会向物理调谐的意识呈现过多"数学"推导与计算，使其难以负荷。例如，在时空操控身体的同时，它必须持续追踪所有肌肉、神经、器官、细胞、分子与原子。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: "In many ways, we're a lonely species. We seem to be forever prowling around the confines of our own nature. Maybe our idea of identity is like a magic circle we've drawn around our minds, so that everything outside seems dark and alien, unselflike. There may be other psychic fires lighting up that inner landscape with a far greater light than ours; other aspects of consciousness to which we're connected as surely as we're connected also to the animals in a chain of being we barely comprehend.
quotes.translation: "从许多方面来说，我们是孤独的物种。我们似乎永远在自己本性的边界徘徊。也许我们对身份认同的认知，就像在意识周围画下的魔法圆圈，使得圈外的一切显得黑暗陌生、不像自我。或许存在着其他心灵之火，以远胜于我们的光芒照亮那内在景观；还有其他意识面向，我们与它们紧密相连，正如我们与动物在几乎无法理解的存有之链中相连那般确定。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The combined molecular consciousnesses, retaining identity, form a gestalt consciousness that is the ego, the outer ego, that is in turn utilized by the consciousness of the inner ego. The inner ego being unhampered by the laws of your plane, once having entered your plane at physical birth, can therefore leave the physical body and then reconstruct it.
quotes.translation: 结合在一起的分子意识，在保持各自特性的同时，形成一个完形意识，即自我——外在自我。这个外在自我又被内在自我的意识所运用。由于内在自我不受你们物质层面法则的束缚，一旦在物质出生时进入你们的层面，它便能离开物质身体，随后再将其重组。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The atoms and molecules that make up all physical cells are not basically bound by your time. They act within the framework of your time, but the condensed knowledge that they contain carries with it its own peculiar and unique consciousness, that is not bound by your physical laws.
quotes.translation: 构成所有物质细胞的原子与分子，本质上并不受你们时间的束缚。它们虽在你们的时间框架内运作，但其所蕴含的浓缩知识，携带着自身独特且不受物质法则约束的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: He simply adds some of his energy to that present in the animal, mixing this vitality with the animal's own. This does not mean that all animals are fragments in this manner, however. Animals, as any pet owner knows, have their own personalities and characteristics, and individual ways of perceiving the reality available to them. Some gobble experience. Their consciousness can be immeasurably quickened by contact with friendly humans, and emotional involvement with life is strongly developed.
quotes.translation: 他只是将自己的一部分能量注入动物体内，与动物自身的生命力相融合。但这并不意味着所有动物都是这样被分割出来的。正如任何宠物主人所知，动物拥有自己的个性与特质，以及各自感知现实的方式。有些动物会狼吞虎咽地吸收经验。通过与友善人类的接触，它们的意识能被无限加速，与生命的情感联结也会被强烈激发。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:55.) Such selectivity and specialization therefore represented a pertinent method, as consciousness familiarized itself with earthly experience. Hunters had to respond at once to the present situation. In time terms, the "present" animal had to be killed for food -- not the "past" animal. That animal -- the past one -- existed as surely as the one presently perceived, yet in man's context, physical action had to be directed to a highly specific area, for physical survival depended upon it.
quotes.translation: （9:55）因此，这种选择性与专门化代表了意识熟悉尘世经验时的一种恰当方法。猎人必须立即对当下情境做出反应。从时间角度来看，必须杀死"当下"的动物作为食物——而非"过去"的动物。那只"过去"的动物与此刻被感知的动物一样真实存在，但在人类的认知框架中，肉体行动必须指向高度特定的区域，因为肉体生存有赖于此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: "Using that language, however, Seth's intent is also clear: Individual identity comes before sexual affiliation. That affiliation is a mixture of 'female' and 'male' elements that are complementary, not opposing. Neither is superior. Male and female also represent psychic and biological faces and a sexual stance. Through all of Seth's books runs one common thread: Our sexual prejudice is the result of certain aspects of consciousness that we as a species long ago began stressing over others."
quotes.translation: 然而，赛斯使用这种语言时，其意图也很明确：个体身份先于性别归属。这种归属是"女性"与"男性"元素的混合，两者互补而非对立，没有孰优孰劣。男性与女性也代表着心灵与生物层面的面貌，以及一种性立场。赛斯的所有著作都贯穿着一条主线：我们的性别偏见，源于我们作为物种在很久以前就开始过度强调意识的某些面向。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The consciousness had its origin in the subconscious, from which it sprang. The consciousness was not at one time the center of the subconscious. However, the inner ego was always the center of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 意识起源于潜意识，并从其中迸发而出。意识并非始终是潜意识的中心。然而，内在自我始终是潜意识的中心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The form that you use does not dictate the various abilities. You don the particular form in line with your abilities. You do the best you can, in other words. （Smile.） It is possible to begin an experience in one form, and change to another, or to go from the first to the third. On such occasions you must therefore, you see, pass through in reverse direction. The forms do merely represent various stages of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你所使用的形态并不决定各种能力。你根据自身能力穿上特定的形态。换句话说，你尽己所能。（微笑。）有可能以一种形态开始体验，再转换为另一种形态，或者从第一形态过渡到第三形态。因此，你看，在这些情况下你必须逆向穿越。这些形态仅仅代表意识的不同阶段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: (10:20.) It is quite obvious that people must die -- not only because otherwise you would overpopulate your world into extinction, but because the nature of consciousness requires new experience, challenge, and accomplishment. This is everywhere apparent in nature itself. (Pause.) If there were no death, you would have to invent it (smile) -- for the context of that selfhood would be as limited as the experience of a great sculptor given but one hunk of stone (with quiet dramatic emphasis).1
quotes.translation: （10:20。）显然人必须死亡——不仅因为否则你们的世界会因人口过剩而灭绝，更因为意识的本质需要新的体验、挑战和成就。这在自然界本身随处可见。（停顿。）如果没有死亡，你们就得发明它（微笑）——因为那种自我性的背景会像一位伟大的雕塑家只得到一块石头那样受限（带着沉静的戏剧性强调）。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Now the image analogy is in some respects distortive, but good enough for our present purposes. For as you think of the matter of your cells as only matter, then it is hard to follow our analogy. But when you realize that your own body cells are much more than physical, contain their own capsule comprehension , then you will see that they could, at least theoretically, operate in such a manner if you could throw your own consciousness into them, and perceive their seemingly alien experience.
quotes.translation: 现在这个图像类比在某些方面具有扭曲性，但对我们当前的目的已经足够。因为当你们将细胞物质仅仅视为物质时，就很难理解我们的类比。但当你们意识到自己的身体细胞远非物质性，它们包含自身的内蕴理解时，你们就会明白，如果你们能将自身意识投入其中，并感知它们看似陌生的体验，那么至少在理论上，它们能够以这种方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Your consciousness fluctuates in the same way. It is here and then it is not here, but the physical self focuses upon only those moments of physical reality. Because consciousness fluctuates however, other portions of your self have memory of those times when it is not focused in "physical reality," and this is also a portion of your entire existence.
quotes.translation: 你的意识以同样的方式波动。它在此处，然后又不在此处，但物质自我只聚焦于物质实相的瞬间。然而，由于意识波动，你自我的其他部分会记得那些它不聚焦于“物质实相”的时刻，这也是你整体存在的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The journeys of the gods, therefore, represent the journeys of man's own consciousness projected outward. All That Is, however, is within each such adventure. Its consciousness, and its reality, is within each man, and within the gods he has created. That last is in small letters, and gods shall always be in small letters. All That Is is capitalized.
quotes.translation: 因此，诸神的旅程代表人类自身意识向外投射的旅程。然而，一切万有都在每一次这样的冒险之中。它的意识与实相存在于每个人之内，也存在于人类所创造的诸神之内。最后这句的"神"使用小写字母，而"诸神"始终使用小写。一切万有则使用大写。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Because of such identification with nature, the death experience, as you understand it, was in no way considered an end. The mobility of consciousness was a fact of experience. The self was not considered to be stuck within the skin. The body was considered more or less like a friendly home or cave, kindly giving the self refuge but not confining it.
quotes.translation: 由于这种与自然的认同，死亡经验——就你们所理解的那样——绝不被视为终结。意识的流动性是经验的事实。自我不被认为局限于皮肤之内。身体或多或少被视为一个友善的家或洞穴，仁慈地给予自我庇护，却不限制它。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: There are such lights throughout the entire universe, but this one is at your own apex point, to which your consciousness are attuned. You can see but dimly but some vision is better than no vision at all. When you are no longer blind, all possibilities that belong to the sighted (Pause), come at least within your grasp. You are learning inner sight.
quotes.translation: 整个宇宙中存在着这样的光，但这一道就在你们自己的顶点，你们的意识与之调准。你们只能隐约看见，但有些视野总比完全没有视野要好。当你们不再盲目时，所有属于有视力者的可能性（停顿）至少会进入你们的掌握之中。你们正在学习内在视觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: "While doing it, I felt mildly exhilarated. My consciousness gets a smooth feeling at such times, an easiness. Yet I was also aware of the same kind of reluctance I'd felt in the sleep state last night; as if I was trying to do something ... difficult, or translate information that was more distant than usual from our ordinary concepts. I almost felt stubborn, like a reluctant child, wanting to do the thing but not wanting to make the effort at the same time. The easiness won over, though.
quotes.translation: 在做这件事时，我感到些许振奋。我的意识在此时获得一种平滑感、一种轻松感。然而我也意识到昨晚在睡眠状态中感受到的那种抗拒——仿佛我正试图做某件...困难的事，或是翻译某种比寻常概念更遥远的信息。我几乎感到固执，像个不情愿的孩子，既想完成这件事，又不想付出努力。不过轻松感最终占了上风。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: (10:40.) There are intensities of behavior, then, in which the activity, the inside activity, of any being or particle is directed toward [the] physical force [that is] involved in the cooperative venture that causes your reality. There are variances, however, when such activity is directed instead into the interior nature of reality. You have an inner system of communication, then, in which the cells of all living things are connected. In those terms there is a continuum of consciousness.
quotes.translation: （10:40分）因此存在行为强度的差异，当任何存有或粒子的活动（内在活动）指向构成你们实相的合作事业所涉及的物理力时，便会产生这种差异。然而当此类活动转而指向实相的内在本质时，则会产生变异。你们拥有内在的沟通系统，所有生物细胞皆相互联结。就这些术语而言，存在意识的连续体。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Some of you will meet with some resistance in these exercises. You will enjoy reading about them, but you will find all kinds of excuses that prevent you from trying them yourself. If you are honest, many of you will sense a reluctance, for certain qualities of consciousness are brought into play that run counter to your usual conscious experience.
quotes.translation: 你们有些人会在这些练习中遇到一些抗拒。你们会喜欢阅读这些内容，但会找各种借口阻止自己实际尝试。如果诚实面对自己，许多人会察觉到一种不情愿，因为某些意识特质被启动，这与你们平常的意识经验相悖。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: This self-awareness in each atom and molecule determines what sort of cell or combination that the particular atom or molecule will form. The cells then, being a gestalt, contain the individual conscious components, which then form a consciousness greater than the consciousness of any individual component within, and different in scope and ability.
quotes.translation: 每个原子和分子中的这种自我意识，决定了该原子或分子会形成何种细胞或组合。细胞作为一个完形，包含了各个有意识的组成部分，这些部分进而形成一种意识，其境界和能力都超越其中任何个别组成部分的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Consciousness must use its abilities. The boredom and stagnation of a stereotyped heaven will not for long content the striving consciousness. There are teachers to explain the conditions and circumstances. You are not left alone, therefore, lost in mazes of hallucination. You may or may not realize immediately that you are dead in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 意识必须运用其能力。刻板天堂的厌倦与停滞，无法长久满足不断进取的意识。有导师会解释各种状况与环境。因此你并非孤身一人，迷失在幻觉的迷宫中。你可能立即意识到自己在物质层面已死亡，也可能不会。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Open up the gates of your consciousness while you sleep! you know you are more than what you refer to as your conscious I. But you should know it through experience! Open up the barriers in your daily lives... step outside of the self that you know--and you will solve your difficulties! you will solve them and you will know that you have done so. You will know that the ability is within yourself and you have used it--then you may hit me over the head with your crutches and I will laugh!
quotes.translation: 在你睡眠时敞开意识之门！你知道自己远不止你所称的"意识我"。但你应该通过体验来知晓！在日常生活中打破屏障……踏出你所认知的自我——你将解决你的困境！你会解决它们，并且知道你已经做到了。你会明白能力就在你之内，而你已经运用了它——那时你尽可用拐杖敲我的头，而我会大笑！
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Waking consciousness is taken into the dream state, but the ego is not. The ego would immediately falter, and cause immediate failure and catastrophe. What you will meet in your experiments are varieties of conditions, and until you have learned the control it may be difficult to distinguish between them. Some you can manipulate, some you cannot.
quotes.translation: 清醒意识会被带入梦境状态，但自我不会。自我会立刻动摇，导致即刻的失败与灾难。你在实验中会遇到各种状况，在学会掌控之前，可能难以区分它们。有些你可以操控，有些则不能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Mankind's consciousness, however, experimented along time-specific lines. As he developed along those lines, various biological and mental methods of selectivity and discrimination were utilized. When in historic terms mankind became aware of memory, and recalled his past as a past in your terms, it was possible for him to confuse past and present. Vivid memories, out of context but given immediate neurological validity, could compete with the brilliant focus necessary in his present.1
quotes.translation: 人类的意识却沿着时间特定路线进行实验。当它沿着这些路线发展时，运用了各种生物与心智的选择与辨识方法。从历史角度而言，当人类开始意识到记忆，并以你们的时间观念将过往视为过去时，便可能混淆过去与现在。脱离脉络却具有即时神经真实性的鲜活记忆，会与当下所需的鲜明焦点产生竞争。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: In the distant past some ancient civilizations did indeed use animals in such a fashion, but in a far different framework. The doctors or priests humbly stated their problems verbally and through ritualistic dancing, and then requested the help of the animal -- so that the animals were not sacrificed, in those terms, nor taken advantage of. Instead, they united in a cooperative venture, in which animals and man both understood that no consciousness truly died but only changed its form.
quotes.translation: 在远古时期，某些古老文明确实以这种方式运用动物，但处于截然不同的框架中。医师或祭司通过言语和仪式舞蹈谦卑地陈述问题，随后请求动物的协助——因此在这些层面上，动物既未被牺牲，也未被利用。相反，它们参与了一场合作性冒险，动物与人类都明白：没有意识真正死亡，只是改变了形态。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health

quotes.text: You begin to manipulate the dream state, or rather you begin to manipulate yourself within dream reality, which is something different. It is an entirely new environment. In ordinary dreaming, without the awareness of usual waking consciousness, perception of dream reality is limited and instinctive. All in all you get along quite well. You are like a child in objective reality. When you learn to take waking awareness into the dream condition, you are reaching adolescence, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 你们开始操控梦境状态，更准确地说，你们开始在梦境实相中操控自己——这是截然不同的概念。这是一个全新的环境。在普通梦境中，若缺乏通常清醒意识的觉知，对梦境实相的感知是有限且本能的。总体而言，你们适应得相当不错，如同客观实相中的孩童。当你们学会将清醒意识带入梦境状态时，可以说你们正步入青春期。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: As far as your system is concerned, they cannot be suddenly made flesh, to dwell among you. REM sleep or no REM sleep, your dreams exist constantly, beneath consciousness, even in the waking state. The personality is constantly affected by them. Their existence has its own dimension which is connected to the physical organism. It is impossible to deprive a human being of dreams, for even though you deprive him of sleep, this necessary mental function will be carried on subconsciously.
quotes.translation: 就你们的系统而言，他们无法突然化为血肉之躯与你们同住。无论是否存在快速眼动睡眠，你们的梦境始终存在，潜藏于意识之下，即使在清醒状态也是如此。人格持续受其影响。梦境的存在自有其维度，与肉体组织相连。人类不可能被剥夺梦境，因为即使剥夺其睡眠，这种必要的心智功能仍会在潜意识层面持续运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Animal consciousness is different than your own. With yours, a finer discrimination is necessary so that unconscious material can be assimilated. (Long pause.) All of mankind's developments however are latent in the animal brain, and many attributes of which you are unaware are latent in your own. The biological pathways for them already exist.
quotes.translation: 动物的意识与你们不同。你们的意识需要更精细的辨别力，以便同化无意识材料。（长停顿。）然而人类所有的发展潜能都潜伏于动物脑内，而你们自身也潜藏着许多自身未曾察觉的特质。这些特质的生物路径早已存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: There are strange benefits that can result. Some cases are on record where individuals are suddenly propelled out of the path of danger. This involves instantaneous projection. The fear and panic that could make the body vulnerable is not present, and the body escapes danger precisely because consciousness is not there to cause panic reactions.
quotes.translation: 有些奇特的好处可能随之而来。有记录显示，某些案例中个体突然被弹射出危险路径。这涉及瞬间投射。恐惧与惊慌本可能使身体变得脆弱，但此刻它们并不存在，身体之所以能避开危险，恰恰是因为意识不在场，不会引发恐慌反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The atoms and molecules themselves possess kinds of consciousness impossible for you to analyze, because the scales of your activities are so different. They are information-gathering processes, however, containing codified electromagnetic properties that slip between all of your devices. The atoms and molecules and all of the seemingly smaller "particles" within them are, again, information-carrying processes, and upon them depends your entire interpretation of the nature of events.
quotes.translation: 原子与分子本身拥有你无法分析的意识种类，因为你的活动尺度与之截然不同。然而，它们是信息收集过程，携带着编码的电磁特性，能滑过你所有的仪器设备。原子、分子以及其中所有看似更小的"粒子"，再次成为携带信息的过程，你对事件本质的整个解读都依赖于它们。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: This response to fear is a danger to psychic work, where freedom is necessary. In projections most of all the self must be mobile. Rapidity of perception, mobility of consciousness, openness of Emotional response, are prerequisites for our work. The fearful spirit fears to leave the body, and fears to reside in it also. Ruburt has my congratulations, for he has now successfully passed a period of trial. He tried without involving you except when he grew more than usually discouraged.
quotes.translation: 这种对恐惧的反应对灵性工作构成危险，而自由是灵性工作的必要条件。在投射中，自我必须保持机动性。感知的迅捷、意识的流动、情感反应的开放，是我们工作的先决条件。恐惧的心灵既害怕离开身体，也害怕栖身其中。鲁柏值得我的祝贺，因为他现已成功度过一段考验期。他尝试不把你牵扯进来，除非他比平时更加沮丧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: But all things have consciousness, and in those terms possess a soul-nature. There are no gradations as to soul. Soul is the life within everything that is. Of course the fetus "has a soul" -- but in the same way, if you think in those terms, then each cell within the fetus must be granted a soul (leaning forward with humorous emphasis, voice deeper). The course of a cell is not predetermined. Cells are usually very cooperative, particularly as they form the structures of the body.3
quotes.translation: 但万物皆有意识，就这些术语而言，它们都拥有灵魂本质。灵魂没有等级之分。灵魂是存在于一切万有之内的生命。当然，胎儿"有灵魂"——但同样地，如果你用这些术语思考，那么胎儿内的每个细胞都必须被赋予灵魂（身体前倾，带着幽默的强调，声音更低沉）。细胞的历程并非预先注定。细胞通常非常合作，尤其是在它们形成身体结构时。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Genetic dreams of one kind or another continue throughout your lives, whether or not you are consciously aware of them. They were of prime importance in "man's evolution," as you think of it. They were the source of dreams, mentioned earlier, that sent man on migrations after food, that led him toward fertile land. Those dreams are most closely related to survival in physical existence, and whenever that survival seems threatened such dreams arise to consciousness whenever possible.
quotes.translation: 无论你是否意识到，各种基因梦境都会贯穿你的一生。它们在你所认为的"人类进化"中具有首要重要性。它们是梦的源头，如前所述，这些梦驱使人类为食物而迁徙，引领他们走向肥沃的土地。这些梦与物质生存最为密切相关，每当生存似乎受到威胁时，这些梦就会尽可能浮现到意识中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: Each individual atom within its generalized consciousness has the capacity, in some degree, to construct its portion of energy into physical construction. It is extremely important that you understand this fact, and realize that the individual cells, for example, lose no individuality in this process, and gain immeasurably, the whole physical structure of the body being the result of this cooperation of cells which are themselves the result of the cooperation of atoms and molecules.
quotes.translation: 每个原子在其广义意识中，都具备一定程度的能力，将自身那部分能量构建为物质结构。理解这一事实极为重要——例如，个体细胞在此过程中并未丧失任何独特性，反而获得无可估量的增益，整个身体的物质结构正是细胞合作的结果，而细胞本身又是原子与分子合作的产物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Some sense impressions fall beneath the threshold of consciousness, these impressions coming from the outside environment. Some impressions however have their origin within inner reality, and the personality is receiving information not available to the egotistical self. If such inner data is to become at all conscious, it must be translated into terms that the ego can recognize. In other words, into sense data.
quotes.translation: 某些感官印象落在意识门槛之下，这些印象来自外部环境。然而有些印象源于内在实相，人格正接收着自我意识无法获取的信息。若要使这类内在数据进入意识层面，必须将其转译为自我能够识别的形式——换言之，即转译为感官资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You can direct the healing of your body, telling yourself that this will be accomplished by you at one of the other levels of sleep consciousness, and you may ask for the aid of a Speaker to give you any necessary psychological guidance that is needed to maintain health. If you have particular conscious goals and if you are reasonably certain that they are beneficial ones, then you can suggest dreams in which they occur, for the dreams themselves will hasten their physical reality.
quotes.translation: 你可以引导身体的疗愈，告诉自己这将在睡眠意识的某个其他层面完成，并可请求"代言者"提供维持健康所需的必要心理指引。若你怀有特定的意识目标，且合理确信这些目标具有建设性，那么你可以暗示相关梦境的发生，因为梦境本身将加速其物质实相的实现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: It goes without saying that each newborn consciousness within your system carries within it the capsule comprehension of which I have previously spoken; and if you recall, each atom and molecule, each and every smallest particle that can by any stretch of the imagination be called physical matter, contains within it its own independent capsule comprehension--inherent suggestions in coded form, in not one but several codes, that give complete instructions for development and growth.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，你们系统内的每个新生意识都携带着我之前提过的胶囊理解；而且，如果你还记得，每个原子和分子，每个能被想象力延伸称为物质的最小粒子，都内含其独立的胶囊理解——以编码形式存在的内在暗示，不是一种而是多种编码，提供了发展与成长的完整指令。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: （Tired consciousness sometimes yields good results; so may a clogged-up consciousness. The middle state is usually too concerned with practical matters. Bill MacDonnell should be good in seance sessions, though he is somewhat like mercury changeable; at times he may not do well, other times good. James Spaziani might be good. [Our landlord.]
quotes.translation: （疲惫的意识有时会产生良好结果；堵塞的意识也可能如此。中间状态通常过于关注实际事务。比尔·麦克唐纳在通灵会上应该表现不错，虽然他有些像水银般善变；有时他可能表现不佳，有时又很好。詹姆斯·斯帕齐亚尼或许会不错。[我们的房东。]）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: This is the case, but not the case. The choices are small to your way, but choice is not impossible. Actually there is choice, but the manipulation of camouflage is not developed along your lines. This does not mean that there is no consciousness in such species, nor does it mean there is no self-consciousness. There is, to a limited degree.
quotes.translation: 情况确实如此，但又不尽然。以你们的方式来看，选择是有限的，但选择并非不可能。实际上确实存在选择，只是对伪装的操控并非沿着你们的路线发展。这并不意味着这类物种没有意识，也不意味着没有自我意识。它们确实拥有，只是程度有限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Each consciousness, besides the material structure or material form, also possesses a psychological structure that exists in a depth and solidity in another perspective which the outer senses do no perceive. Here you will find the entity. Consciousness adopts many forms, in as many various perspectives as it is capable of manifesting itself.
quotes.translation: 每个意识除了物质结构或物质形态外，还拥有一个心理结构，这个结构在另一种外在感官无法感知的视角中，具有深度和坚实性。在这里你将找到存有。意识会采取多种形态，以它所能展现的多种不同视角呈现自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: All That Is is a part of creation, but more than what creation is. There are pyramid gestalts of being impossible to describe, whose awareness includes knowledge and experience of what would seem to be to you a vast number of other realities. In the terms of which I am speaking for your benefit, their present might, for example, include the life and death of your planet in a moment of their "time." Seth Two's existence is at the outside fringes of one such galaxy of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 一切万有是创造的一部分，但又超越创造本身。存在着无法描述的存有金字塔形整体，其觉知包含对你们而言似乎是大量其他实相的知识与经验。为了你们的利益，我用你们能理解的术语来说，例如，它们的当下可能包含你们星球在其"时间"的一瞬间的生死。赛斯第二的存在正处于这样一个意识星系的边缘地带。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:30.) Now (underlined): When he dreamed--when he dreamed (underlined)--man actually returned to a state prior to waking, from which his physical life itself had emerged--only now he was a new creature, a new kind of consciousness, and so were all of the other species. In dreams all of the species familiarized themselves with their old affiliations, and they read their own identities in different fashions. "They remembered how it was." They remembered that they formed each other.
quotes.translation: （9:30处。）现在（加下划线）：当他做梦时——当他做梦时（加下划线）——人类实际上回到了清醒前的状态，而他的物质生命本身正是从这种状态中涌现出来的——只不过现在他已成为一种新的生物，一种新的意识，所有其他物种也是如此。在梦中，所有物种都重新熟悉了它们古老的关联，并以不同的方式解读自身的身份。“它们记得曾经的模样。”它们记得是彼此塑造了对方。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The brain looks out upon the physical universe, and consciousness then reacts, again creatively, to that environment. Information is now carried in reverse fashion back to the inner self, in an instantaneous and automatic procedure. Thus thought becomes an inner image which is translated into a thermal image, and then into intuitional form, into highly condensed and codified data, and then into a pure and direct sort of experience which you cannot understand as physical creatures.
quotes.translation: 大脑向外观察物质宇宙，而意识则再次创造性地对该环境做出反应。信息以反向方式瞬间自动传回内在自我。因此，思想成为内在影像，被转化为热影像，再转化为直觉形式，成为高度浓缩编码的数据，最后转化为一种你们作为物质生物无法理解的纯粹直接的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: This is in itself an expression of the dualism of which I have spoken. Evolution does not of course apply only to the human species, and as I have said consciousness on your plane exists in all things. When your friend asked his question he was, I believe, referring to the point at which self-consciousness entered into so-called inert form.
quotes.translation: 这本身即是我所提及的二元论的一种表达。进化当然不仅适用于人类物种，正如我所说，你们层面的意识存在于万物之中。当你的朋友提出问题时，我相信他指的是自我意识进入所谓惰性形态的那个节点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now your consciousness will not be in it, but it is hardly lifeless. Its maintenance is being controlled by the consciousness of the individual cells and organs of which we have spoken. I will give you alternate methods of projecting, but I will be concerned now with what you can expect the few moments after you have left the physical body.
quotes.translation: 现在，你的意识不会存在于其中，但它绝非无生命。其维持由我们讨论过的个体细胞与器官的意识所控制。我将提供你们投射的替代方法，但此刻我要关注的是你们离开肉体后最初几秒钟可能经历的状况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Any such physical clues can help you differentiate between this state of consciousness and the usual predominating one. You have only to recognize it, learn to hold it, and then proceed to experiment in its use. As a rule, it is still physically oriented, in that the abilities are usually directed toward the inner perception and manipulation of matter or physical environment. You can therefore perceive the present moment from a variety of unique standpoints not usually available.
quotes.translation: 任何此类物理线索都能帮助你区分这种意识状态与通常的主导状态。你只需识别它，学会保持它，然后着手实验运用它。通常而言，它仍以物理为导向，因为其能力通常指向对物质或物理环境的内在感知与操控。因此，你能从通常无法企及的多种独特视角感知当下时刻。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: New paragraph: Nevertheless, the blueprints lie within. Give us a moment ... We will have more to say very shortly about our dream-art scientist (see the last session); yet there are also other important ways that could be used to study the nature of reality. One in particular does not involve the dream state per se. It does include the manipulation of consciousness, however. To some extent it includes identification with, rather than separation from, that which is being studied.
quotes.translation: 新段落：然而，蓝图存于内在。请稍候片刻……我们很快会进一步讨论我们的梦艺术科学家（见上一节）；但还有其他重要方法可用于研究实相的本质。其中一种方法并不涉及梦境状态本身，但确实包含对意识的操控。在某种程度上，它强调与研究对象认同，而非与之分离。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The great creativity of consciousness is your heritage. It does not belong to mankind alone, however. Each living being possesses it, and the living world consists of a spontaneous cooperation that exists between the smallest and the highest, the greatest and the lowly, between the atoms and the molecules and the conscious, reasoning mind.
