quotes.translation: 意识那伟大的创造力是你的传承。然而，它并非人类所独有。每个生灵都拥有它，而生命世界由最小与最高、最伟大与最卑微者之间，原子与分子之间，以及有意识、能推理的心智之间自发合作所构成。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Through the ages, again, underground philosophies have tried to combine the two concepts, usually going from one extreme to the other in combating the current ideas in historical terms. In some of these philosophies the daylight is seen as pallid, for example, in comparison with the true brilliance of knowledge that illuminates the dream state, and black is the symbol then of secret knowledge that cannot be found with normal consciousness, or be scrutinized in the light of day.
quotes.translation: 同样地，历经各个时代，地下哲学试图将这两个概念结合起来，往往在对抗历史语境下的主流观念时从一个极端摆向另一个极端。例如，在这些哲学中，与照亮梦境状态的知识之真正光辉相比，日光被视为苍白无力，而黑色则象征着无法以正常意识找到、也无法在白昼之光下审视的隐秘知识。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Scientifically, with all of your instruments, you are thus far able to perceive the atom's presence only in the field of your own system of probability. Since you perceive physically through the body, which is atomically structured, then of course your sense perceptions lead you to block out recognition of other probable stimuli or reactions. In his book Adventures in Consciousness, Ruburt mentions what he calls "prejudiced perception.''1 It is an excellent term in this regard.
quotes.translation: 从科学角度而言，凭借你们所有的仪器，迄今为止只能在你们自身概率系统的场域中感知原子的存在。由于你们通过身体进行物理感知，而身体是由原子结构构成的，那么你们的感官知觉自然会引导你们屏蔽对其他可能刺激或反应的认识。在鲁柏的《意识探险》一书中，他提到了他所谓的"偏见性感知"¹。就这一点而言，这是一个极佳的术语。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Children try to imagine what the world was like before they entered it. Do the same thing. The way you follow these directions can be illuminating, for the areas of activity you choose will tell you something about the unique qualities of your own consciousness. Adult games deal largely with manipulations in space, while children's play, again, often involves variations in time. Look at a natural object, say a tree; if it is spring now, then imagine that you see it in the fall.
quotes.translation: 孩子们试图想象自己进入世界之前的世界是什么样子。你也这样做。你遵循这些指示的方式可能具有启发性，因为你选择的活动领域会告诉你关于你自己意识的独特特质。成人的游戏大多涉及空间中的操控，而孩子的游戏则常常涉及时间的变化。观察一个自然物体，比如一棵树；如果现在是春天，那么想象你在秋天看到它。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: And so in the present circumstance the overcrowded conditions will still be further accelerated, until a new synthesis is formed--and it will be. The psychic activity engendered will finally form the basis for a greater understanding. It will be quite obvious that telepathic thoughts travel quicker than good news or faster than a pestilence. Man will be so shoved together that the impact will literally explode into a new level of consciousness, a new development in those terms.
quotes.translation: 因此在目前的情况下，过度拥挤的状况仍将进一步加速，直到形成新的综合——而这将会发生。由此产生的精神活动最终将为更深刻的理解奠定基础。很明显，心电感应思想的传播速度比好消息更快，甚至比瘟疫还快。人类将被如此紧密地挤压在一起，以至于这种冲击将真正爆炸进入一个新的意识层面，在这些方面产生新的发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Within your biological experience, however, plant, mineral, animal, and human consciousness intersect. They encounter each other. In the language of the self that you speak, these encounters are like the implied pauses in your verbal language. These other kinds of consciousness then form inner rhythms upon which you superimpose your own.
quotes.translation: 然而，在你的生物经验中，植物、矿物、动物和人类的意识相互交织。它们彼此相遇。在你所说的自我语言中，这些相遇就像你口头语言中的隐含停顿。这些其他种类的意识于是形成了内在的节奏，你将自己的意识叠加其上。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: I hope, quite frankly, to do far more than this. I hope to take you on a tour through the levels of reality that are available to you, and to guide you on a journey through the dimensions of your own psychological structure -- to open up whole areas of your own consciousness of which you have been relatively unaware. I hope, therefore, not only to explain the multidimensional aspects of personality, but to give each reader some glimpse of that greater identity that is his own.
quotes.translation: 我坦率地说，希望做的远不止于此。我希望带领你游历你所能触及的现实层次，引导你穿越自身心理结构的维度——开启你相对未曾察觉的整个意识领域。因此，我不仅希望解释人格的多维面向，更希望让每位读者一窥那属于他自己的更伟大的本体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The physical organism itself is so equipped. Blood pressure rises in whole populations -- stress signals in terms of hormones are activated, but you are not taught to recognize these natural signals. There is a give-and-take between all portions of nature. You are as natural as an animal, and as "tuned in" to the deep rhythms of the earth -- those that you consciously perceive and those that are perceived by your body consciousness, but are screened out by the "official mind."
quotes.translation: 生理有机体本身便具备这样的机制。整个人群血压升高——以荷尔蒙形式发出的压力信号被激活，但你未被教导去识别这些自然信号。自然界的各个部分之间存在着相互给予与索取。你与动物一样自然，同样"调谐"于地球的深层韵律——那些你有意识感知的韵律，以及那些被你的身体意识感知却被"官方心智"过滤掉的韵律。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Each one carries hints and clues about the others. In the terms used by science, there was no evolution in linear terms, but vast (long pause) explosions of consciousness, expansions of capacities, unfoldings on the parts of all species, and these still continue. They are the inner manipulations with which consciousness presents itself.
quotes.translation: 每个物种都携带着关于其他物种的暗示与线索。以科学术语来说，并不存在线性式的进化，而是存在着（长停顿）意识的巨大爆发、能力的扩展、所有物种的展开，这些过程仍在持续。它们是意识呈现自身的内在运作。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: In actuality, since all atoms and molecules possess the potentiality to form in so many varieties, and since the atoms and molecules possess their own generalized consciousness, there is basically a strong inner cohesion and relationship between all cells and molecules, regardless of their patterned structural formation, and the human structure is connected to all other such psychio-physical constructions.
quotes.translation: 事实上，由于所有原子与分子都具备形成多种形态的潜能，且它们拥有自身广义的意识，因此所有细胞与分子之间——无论其结构模式如何——都存在着根本性的内在凝聚力与关联性，而人类结构也与所有其他此类心灵-物理构造相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: (9:38.) The conditions connected with an act of suicide are also important, and the inner reality and realization of the individual. I mention this here because many philosophies teach that suicides are met by a sort of special, almost vindictive fate, and such is not the case. However, if a person kills himself, believing that the act will annihilate his consciousness forever, then this false idea may severely impede his progress, for it will be further intensified by guilt.
quotes.translation: （9点38分）与自杀行为相关的条件同样重要，个体的内在实相与认知亦不容忽视。我在此提及这点，是因为许多哲学流派教导说，自杀者会遭遇某种特殊甚至近乎报复性的命运，但事实并非如此。然而，若有人因相信自杀能永远消灭其意识而结束生命，这种错误观念可能严重阻碍其进展，因为内疚感会进一步强化这种认知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: At this level many abilities may be used, and the present moment can be experienced in many different fashions, using as a basis the physical data with which you are already familiar. In your normal state you see the body. In A-l your consciousness can enter the body of another, and heal it. You can in the same manner perceive the state of your own physical image. You can, according to your abilities, manipulate matter from the inside consciously, with lucidity and alertness.
quotes.translation: 在此层次中，许多能力得以运用，当下时刻能以多种不同方式被体验——以你已熟悉的物质资料为基础。在正常状态下你看见身体。在A-1状态中，你的意识能进入他人身体并疗愈它。你同样能感知自身物质形象的状态。你能根据自身能力，以清醒与警觉的状态，从内部有意识地操控物质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Some systems use methods of perception that cannot be explained, since they contain nothing that is familiar to you. Within most systems death as you know it, with the meaning you attach to it, has no importance. The advanced consciousness can focus within one in quotes "life" while already sending portions of itself into the next quote "life," as for example you might in school take advanced calculus while still remaining in an elementary philosophy class. Do you understand?
quotes.translation: 有些系统使用无法解释的感知方法，因为它们不包含任何你熟悉的事物。在大多数系统中，你所知的死亡以及你赋予它的意义并不重要。高级意识可以在一个所谓的"生命"中聚焦，同时已经将自身的一部分送入下一个所谓的"生命"，就像你可能在学校里一边修高等微积分，一边仍留在基础哲学课上。你明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: "I would even advise a double reading of the above sentence, for it is a keystone, and a vital one. Rising to challenges is a basis for existence in every aspect of existence. It is the developer of all abilities, and at the risk of being trite, it is the responsibility of even the most minute particle of consciousness to use its own abilities, and all of its abilities, to the utmost. Upon the degree to which this is done rests the power and coherence of everything that is."
quotes.translation: "我甚至建议将上述句子读两遍，因为它是基石，而且是至关重要的基石。迎接挑战是存在每个面向的基础。它是所有能力的发展者，即使冒着陈词滥调的风险，即使是最微小的意识粒子也有责任尽其所能运用自身所有能力。这一切所达到的程度，决定了万物的力量与连贯性。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: (11:17.) While your future can on occasion be correctly perceived ahead of time by a gifted psychic, the future is too plastic for any kind of systematized framework. Free will is always involved. Yet many people are frightened of remembering dreams because they fear that a dream of disaster will necessarily be followed by such an event. The mobility of consciousness provides far greater freedom. In fact, such a dream can instead be used to circumnavigate such a probability.
quotes.translation: (11:17。) 虽然你的未来有时能被有天赋的通灵者正确预知，但未来过于可塑，无法被任何系统化框架所框定。自由意志始终参与其中。然而许多人害怕记住梦境，因为他们担心灾难之梦必然会导致此类事件发生。意识的流动性提供了远为更大的自由。事实上，这样的梦境反而可以用来规避这种可能性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Know that within your physical atoms now the origins of all consciousness still sings and that all the human characteristics by which you know yourselves still exist within the eye of all our consciousness never diminished but always present; your individualities never diminished... not only never diminished but gaining in experience.
quotes.translation: 要知道，在你们身体的原子之内，所有意识的起源仍在歌唱，你们藉以认识自己的所有人类特质，仍存在于我们所有意识的眼中，从未减少，始终存在；你们的个体性从未减少……不仅从未减少，反而在经验中增益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: I admit that a birthday operates as a handy reference. But if you realized that your consciousness did exist before that time, your memory will open up, and your accepted birthdate will appear far less important. "Coming out of the womb" is an event, and much better to use than "birth." In greater terms -- far greater terms than you imagine -- you are aware of probable "births," and your other parentages [that are] quite as legitimate as the personal history you now accept.
quotes.translation: 我承认生日是一个方便的参考点。但如果你们意识到自己的意识在那之前就已存在，你们的记忆将会开启，你们所接受的出生日期将显得远不那么重要。"从子宫出来"是一个事件，比"出生"这个说法好得多。在更宏大的层面——远比你们想象的更宏大——你们意识到可能的"出生"，以及你们其他的"父母渊源"，它们与你们现在所接受的个人历史同样合理。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Now there are deep correlations between these symbols and the struggle in which mankind is involved. Your consciousness as you know it, your particular present kind of consciousness, is a statement of awareness brought about by a particular kind of tension, a specific kind of focus arising from the true unconscious of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这些符号与人类所涉的挣扎之间存在着深刻的关联。你所认知的意识，你当前这种特定的意识形态，是由一种特定张力所引发的觉察陈述——这种张力源于整体自性之真正无意识所产生的特定聚焦。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You may not be aware of the conscious nature of each atom in your body, or of the gestalt consciousness formed by those atoms as they build into cells, but it is not necessary for them, or for their own awareness of themselves, that you give them that recognition. The consciousness in the cells exists whether or not you recognize it.
quotes.translation: 你可能并未意识到体内每个原子的意识本质，也未察觉这些原子构建成细胞时所形成的整体意识，但你的认可对它们或它们对自身的觉察而言并非必要。无论你是否承认，细胞中的意识始终存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: (The immediately preceding pages contain the session for Janes ESP class of Tuesday, August 20, 1968. This is a very good session, dealing with probabilities, personal consciousness of many kinds, electrical realities, etc. Some of the data on body consciousness has not been presented in just this way by Seth during regular sessions.
quotes.translation: （紧接前文的是1968年8月20日周二珍的ESP课堂的课节。这是一次非常精彩的课节，涉及概率、多种形式的个人意识、电性实相等内容。关于身体意识的某些资料，在常规课节中赛斯并未以这种方式呈现过。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: In your world you identify as yourself only, and yet love can expand that identification to such an extent that the intimate awareness of another individual is often a significant portion of your own consciousness. You look outward at the world not only through your eyes, but also, to some extent at least, through the eyes of another. It is true to say, then, that a portion of you figuratively walks with this other person as he or she goes about separate from you in space.
quotes.translation: 在你们的世界里，你只将自己视为自我，然而爱能将这种认同扩展到如此程度，以至于对另一个个体的亲密觉知往往成为你自身意识的重要部分。你不仅通过自己的眼睛向外看世界，至少在一定程度上，也通过他人的眼睛。因此，可以确切地说，当这个人在空间中与你分离行动时，你的一部分仿佛与他或她同行。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Action, you may say, is carried away by itself. Reality possibilities are endless. You are familiar with very small portions of reality. Your perception characteristics at this time dictate and limit the aspects of action that you can perceive. You can, however, focus very clearly on other aspects. And particular types of consciousness and identities are merely the result of action's formation into perception patterns with which it can focus upon certain aspects of itself.
quotes.translation: 行动，你可以说，是被自身所带走的。实相的可能性是无穷无尽的。你所熟悉的只是实相中极小的一部分。你此时的感知特性决定了你能感知到的行动面向，并限制了这些面向。然而，你可以非常清晰地聚焦于其他面向。而特定的意识类型与身份，不过是行动形成感知模式的结果，通过这些模式，行动得以聚焦于自身的某些面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: From this layer many of the deepest inspirations come. These ideas and concepts, having their own electromagnetic identity, nevertheless appear as "the symbolic landscape" at this level of consciousness. This is difficult to explain. The thoughts do not appear as pseudoimages for example, or assume any pseudomaterialization, yet they are felt vividly, perceived and picked up by portions of the brain -- those seemingly unused portions for which science has found no answer.
quotes.translation: 许多最深的灵感都来自这一层面。这些观念与概念，拥有自身的电磁身份，却在此意识层次上显现为“象征性的风景”。这很难解释。这些思想并非以伪影像的形式出现，也不呈现任何伪物质化，但它们被生动地感受到，被大脑的某些部分——那些看似未被使用、科学尚未找到答案的部分——所感知和捕捉。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In these lapses you are perceiving other kinds of reality -- with other than normal waking consciousness. When you return, you lose the thread. Normal waking consciousness pretends there was never any break. This happens with some regularity, and to varying degrees, from fifteen to fifty times an hour, according to your activities.
quotes.translation: 在这些间隙中，你正在感知其他种类的实相——以不同于正常清醒意识的方式。当你返回时，你会失去线索。正常清醒意识假装从未有过任何中断。这种情况会以一定的规律发生，并根据你的活动，每小时发生十五到五十次，程度各不相同。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "The varieties of consciousness--the inner 'psychological particles,' the equivalent, say, of the atom or molecule, or proton, neutron or quark--those nonphysical, 'charmed,' 'strange,' forms of consciousness that make experience go up or down (all with amusement), and around and around--are never of course dealt with (by science).
quotes.translation: 意识的种种变体——内在的“心理粒子”，相当于原子、分子、质子、中子或夸克——那些非物质、带有“魅”与“奇”特性的意识形式，它们让经验上下起伏（皆带着愉悦），并循环往复——科学自然从未处理过这些。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The specific concentration, however, results in an exquisite focus. Ego consciousness lost part of that focus in comparison. The totem poles date back to the time when men and animals understood each other, before that point of departure. Physical species that existed and flourished in those epochs then became probable to you, for they did not develop in your system but became extinct. Their living relics exist in the god concepts that embodied them. Give us a moment ...
quotes.translation: 然而，特定的专注会带来精妙的聚焦。相比之下，自我意识失去了部分这种聚焦。图腾柱可追溯至人类与动物相互理解的年代，那是在分道扬镳之前。那些时代存在并繁盛的物质物种，对你们而言成了可能的物种，因为它们并未在你们的系统中发展，而是灭绝了。它们活生生的遗迹存在于体现它们的神祇概念中。请稍等片刻……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Ruburt has at times been able to throw his consciousness into small physical instruments (computer components, for instance), and to perceive their inner activity at the level of, say, electrons. Given time, in your terms, a knowledge of the structure of so-called particles could be quite as clearly understood by using such techniques. Now, however, your terms would not match. Yet your terms are precisely what imprison you, and lead you to the "wrong" kinds of questions.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏有时能将他的意识投入微小的物理仪器（例如计算机组件），并在电子层面感知其内在活动。用你们的时间尺度来说，若给予足够时间，运用这类技术，对所谓粒子结构的了解可以相当清晰。然而，你们的术语并不匹配。但正是你们的术语囚禁了你们，并引导你们提出“错误”的问题。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Consciousness, seeking to know itself, therefore knows you. You as a consciousness, seek to know yourself, and to some extent or other, you become aware of your self as a distinct and individual portion of All That Is. You not only draw upon this overall energy, but you do so automatically, for your existence is dependent upon it.
quotes.translation: 意识寻求认识自身，因此也认识了你。你作为意识，寻求认识自己，并在某种程度上意识到自己是万有中独特而独立的一部分。你不仅汲取这整体能量，而且自动如此运作，因为你的存在依赖于它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: When it enters at the point of birth, it is fairly independent, not yet identified with the form it has entered, and acting in a supportive role. If the personality entered at conception or sometime before birth, then it has to some extent identified with the body consciousness, with the fetus. It has already begun to direct perception -- though perception has begun whether or not it is so directed -- and it will experience the shock of birth in immediate, direct terms.
quotes.translation: 当它在出生时刻进入时，它相当独立，尚未认同它所进入的形体，并扮演着支持性的角色。如果人格在受孕时或出生前某个时刻进入，那么它在某种程度上已与身体意识、与胎儿认同。它已开始直接感知——尽管无论是否如此引导，感知都已开始——并且它将立即、直接地经历出生的冲击。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now even as you go about your day, your consciousness fluctuates, and you can catch yourself "symbolizing" in these different ways if you get in the habit of observing but not interpreting the state of your mind. Each physical event that has happened to you is filed away within your psyche as a definite group of symbols. These do not represent the experience, they contain the experience. These represent your personal symbol bank as far as your present life is concerned.
quotes.translation: 即使在你日常活动时，你的意识也在波动，如果你养成观察但不解释心智状态的习惯，你就能捕捉到自己以这些不同方式"象征化"。每个发生在你身上的物理事件，都作为一组明确的象征被归档于你的心灵中。这些象征并不代表经验，它们包含经验。就你今生而言，这些构成了你的个人象征库。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: It will be most difficult to convince others of the reality of other systems beside their own, yet none of this must be taken upon my say-so alone. For once the knowledge is available, others will become aware of their own experiences, and you see here how the conscious self becomes educated and enriched; for the knowledge becomes part of consciousness. In the past the same experience would have remained only in the subconscious, and you have had other such experiences.
quotes.translation: 要说服他人相信自身系统之外的其他系统之真实性，将极为困难，然而这一切绝不能仅凭我的一面之词。因为一旦知识可得，他人便会意识到自身的经验，你瞧，有意识自我在此过程中得以受教并丰富；因为知识成为了意识的一部分。在过去，同样的经验只会停留在潜意识层面，而你们曾有过其他此类经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: (10:45.) As you know, consciousness has a great tendency to maintain individuality, and yet to join in gestalts at the same time. An animal consciousness after death may form such a gestalt with other such consciousnesses, in which abilities are pooled and the combined cooperation makes possible, for example, a change of species.
quotes.translation: （10:45。）如你所知，意识有维持个体性的强烈倾向，但同时也会融入完形之中。动物意识在死后可能与其他此类意识形成这样的完形，其中能力被汇集，联合协作使得例如物种转变成为可能。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: * Inner vibrational touch is one of our Inner Senses. Seth lists these in Chapter Nineteen of The Seth Material. To paraphrase: Using this sense, an observer standing on a typical street would feel the experience of being anything he chose within his field of notice: people, trees, insects, blades of grass. He would retain his own consciousness, and would perceive sensations somewhat in the way we now feel heat and cold. This sense is like empathy, but much more vital.
quotes.translation: 内在振动性触觉是我们内在感官之一。赛斯在《赛斯资料》第十九章中列出了这些感官。转述如下：运用这种感官，站在普通街道上的观察者能感受到他注意范围内任何事物的体验——无论是人、树木、昆虫还是草叶。他会保留自身意识，并以类似我们现在感知冷热的方式去感受各种知觉。这种感官类似于同理心，但更为鲜活生动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Change of form is not destructive. The explosive energy of a storm is highly creative. Consciousness is not annihilated. A storm is part of creativity. You view it from your own perspective, and yet one individual will feel within the storm the unending cycle of creativity, and another will personify it as the work of the devil.
quotes.translation: 形态的改变并非破坏。风暴的爆发性能量具有高度创造性。意识不会被消灭。风暴本身就是创造力的一部分。你们从自身视角看待它，但有人会在风暴中感受到永无止境的创造循环，而另一些人则会将其人格化为魔鬼的杰作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Again, those who are so certain of their answers will lack that need to know that can lead them into still greater dimensions of understanding. Any valid expansion of consciousness is itself, of course, a part of the message. The personality finds itself encountering living truth, and knows that truth only exists in those terms.
quotes.translation: 再者，那些对自己的答案如此确信的人，将缺乏那种能引领他们进入更广阔理解维度的求知欲。任何有效的意识扩展本身，当然都是信息的一部分。人格发现自己正遭遇活生生的真理，并明白真理只存在于那种动态形式中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: ("I can sense the information outside of me, say, but I can't get it in my regular state of consciousness. When Seth comes through he's at the same level the material's at, and he -- or I -- can then pull it in ... It's as though there's a store of information there, but I have to go through a door of consciousness to reach it."
quotes.translation: （"我能感知到外界的信息，比如说，但无法在平常的意识状态下获取它。当赛斯传递信息时，他处于与材料相同的层次，他——或我——便能将其拉进来……仿佛那里储存着信息，但我必须通过一扇意识之门才能触及它。"）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: As you read those passages the question itself--"Are these after all the units of consciousness referred to earlier?"--should have triggered your intellect and your intuition to work together, even if only slightly, in another way. In other words, of course, I hope to inspire both your imagination and your intelligence in this chapter and in this section of the book, devoted to such subject matter.
quotes.translation: 当你阅读这些段落时，那个问题本身——"这些终究是先前提到的意识单位吗？"——应该已经触发你的智性与直觉以另一种方式协同运作，即便只是轻微地。换言之，我当然希望在这章及本书这一部分中，能同时激发你的想象力与智慧，以探讨此类主题。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: Such a belief in extinction, such a certainty that identity is about to be blotted out in the next moment, is a severe psychological experience, that in itself can bring about unfortunate reactions. What happens instead is that you find consciousness quite intact, and its expression far less limited than it was before. Joseph chose subconsciously to interrupt those methods of expression he was using at the time simply so that their interference would claim due notice.
quotes.translation: 相信意识会灭绝，确信身份下一刻就会被抹除，是一种严重的心理体验，本身就会引发不幸的反应。实际发生的情况是，你会发现意识完好无损，其表达方式比之前更少限制。约瑟夫下意识地选择中断他当时使用的那些表达方式，仅仅是为了让这些干扰引起应有的注意。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Psychosomatic medicine is in its infancy, but in this material, and in some future material along these lines, there will be found much that will apply. When the overall consciousness, for example, makes the decision to bring about the destruction or near destruction of a portion of the body, permission is asked for, and received or not received. This may seem a far cry from a discussion of entities. Nevertheless I am tying many subjects together for your edification.
quotes.translation: 心身医学尚处于萌芽阶段，但在这些资料以及未来相关主题的资料中，将会发现许多可应用的内容。例如，当整体意识决定摧毁或近乎摧毁身体某部分时，会请求许可，而许可可能被给予也可能不被给予。这听起来似乎与对存有的讨论相去甚远。然而，我正在将许多主题串联起来，以启迪你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The comprehension is condensed, but the term capsule is merely one that I have chosen. All units of individual consciousness contain this capsule comprehension, and it represents the most minute unit of consciousness about which a mental enclosure, or self, can be constructed. There is no smaller unit, and cannot be, than this.
quotes.translation: 理解是浓缩的，但“胶囊”一词只是我选择的一个术语。所有个体意识单位都包含这种胶囊式理解，它代表着能够构建精神外壳或自我意识的最小意识单位。没有比这更小的单位，也不可能存在更小的单位。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Action and consciousness are forever bound together, and we discussed the structure of the personality from this viewpoint. Action is perceived within your system electromagnetically, in terms of intensities. The personality as you know it is merely the result of action as you perceive it in certain groupings at any given time.
quotes.translation: 行动与意识永远紧密相连，我们曾从这个角度讨论过人格的结构。在你们的系统中，行动是以电磁方式被感知的，表现为强度变化。你们所知的人格，仅仅是行动在特定时间以特定组合被感知时的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: I am not de-emphasizing consciousness. I am trying to teach you to focus your consciousness in many directions, even to carry a portion of egotistical consciousness into the dream state.
quotes.translation: 我并非在贬低意识的重要性。我是在教导你们将意识聚焦于多个方向，甚至将一部分自我意识带入梦境状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Your theories of time are connected with your usual neurological pulses. It is one thing to play with concepts of multidimensionality, or probabilities, and quite another to be practically presented with them, even briefly, when your thought patterns and neurological habits tell you that they cannot be translated. So Ruburt felt frustrated, and he told me in no uncertain terms (see Appendix 4) that his consciousness could not contain the information he was receiving.
quotes.translation: 你们的时间理论与你们惯常的神经脉冲有关。玩弄多维性或或然率的概念是一回事，但当你们的思维模式和神经习惯告诉你们这些概念无法被转译时，实际面对它们——哪怕只是短暂地——又是另一回事。所以鲁柏感到挫败，他用毫不含糊的语气告诉我（见附录四），他的意识无法容纳他正在接收的信息。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Now I am simply giving you a brief idea of what is involved, and I expect each of you to follow through in your own way, to see the connections and think about them. And now, before you, what do you see? A woman or a man? You see a range of human being and personality that defies conventional ideas of sexuality or of consciousness -- that defies all of the ideas that have been handed down to you, and that challenges you each to look for the reality of your own being.
quotes.translation: 现在我只是简单向你们说明其中涉及的概念，并期待你们每个人用自己的方式去跟进，去发现其中的关联并加以思考。此刻在你们面前，你们看到了什么？一个女人还是一个男人？你们看到的是一个超越传统性别或意识观念的人类与人格范畴——它超越了所有传承给你们的观念，并挑战你们每个人去探寻自身存在的实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: They represent a present unique beyond telling, alive in each consciousness, more important than you recognize. There are no real rules to be followed that will bring you into such an encounter with the present moment of reality -- only a trust in the nature of your being. And that trust is within you whether or not you recognize it, for it gives you your present experience; and no matter how your mind questions, it rides securely in the great creativity of the soul.
quotes.translation: 它们代表着一个无可言喻的独特当下，在每个意识中鲜活存在，其重要性远超你们的认知。没有任何既定规则能引导你们与当下的实相相遇——唯有信任你们存在的本质。而这份信任就在你们之内，无论你们是否意识到它，因为它正赋予你们当下的体验；无论你们的头脑如何质疑，它都安然乘载于灵魂的伟大创造力之中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The animals possess a consciousness of self, and without the human intellect. You do not need a human intellect to be aware of your own consciousness. Animals, it is true, do not reflect upon the nature of their own identities as man does (pause), but this is because that nature is intuitively comprehended. It is self-evident.
quotes.translation: 动物拥有自我意识，却无需人类智力。你不需要人类智力就能觉察自己的意识。诚然，动物不像人类那样反思自身本质（停顿），但这只因那种本质已被直觉领悟。它是不证自明的。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach

quotes.text: Some of this is difficult to verbalize. The EE units2 within matter, within the atoms and molecules, are aware of the probable fields of action that are possible. While the body's integrity must lie in a constant reiteration in one probability, and maintain within that probable system a certain "constant," and while physically perception is largely directed there, the basic integrity of the body system and consciousness comes from outside the system into it. Period.
quotes.translation: 其中有些部分难以言传。物质内、原子与分子内的EE单位2，觉察着可能存在的行动场域。虽然身体的完整性必须持续重复于一种可能性中，并在那个可能系统内维持某种"恒常"，且物质感知主要导向于此，但身体系统与意识的基本完整性却来自系统之外而进入其中。句号。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: This is the year 1979, and the idea of time and of dates seems to be indelibly mixed into [everyone's] psychology. You can remember last year, and to some extent recall the past years of your lives. It appears to you that your present consciousness wanders backward into the past, until finally you can remember no longer--and on a conscious level, at least, you must take the very event of your birth under secondhanded evidence. Few people have conscious memory of it.
quotes.translation: 现在是1979年，时间与日期的概念似乎已不可磨灭地融入每个人的心理。你能记得去年，也能在一定程度上回忆过往的人生岁月。在你看来，你当前的意识正向后回溯过去，直到最终再也无法忆起——至少在意识层面，你必须依靠二手证据来确认自己的出生事件。很少有人对此保有意识记忆。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: As I explained earlier, the lives or the plays are happening at once. Creativity and consciousness are never linear achievements. In each life you choose and create your own settings or environments; and in this one you chose your parents and whatever childhood incidents that came within your experience. You wrote the script.
quotes.translation: 正如我先前解释的，所有生命或剧本都是同时发生的。创造力与意识从来不是线性成就。在每一世生命中，你都选择并创造自己的场景或环境；而在这一世，你选择了自己的父母，以及进入你经验的所有童年事件。你撰写了这出剧本。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: These are quite practical statements. Your body has an overall body consciousness filled with energy and vitality. It automatically rights any imbalances, but your conscious beliefs also affect this body consciousness. Your muscles believe what you tell them about themselves. So does every other portion of your physical body.
quotes.translation: 这些都是非常实际的陈述。你的身体拥有一个充满能量与活力的整体身体意识。它会自动修正任何失衡，但你意识层面的信念也会影响这个身体意识。你的肌肉相信你告诉它们的一切，你肉体的其他每个部分也是如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: You are covered in many ways that you were not covered in the past, and this is to your advantage. Any construction at all on your field, or on another, has consciousness to some degree. Consciousness however, may not always show the same characteristics that you are used to, and in many cases it will not be perceived by you.
quotes.translation: 你们现在受到许多过去未曾有过的保护，这对你们是有利的。你们场域或他人场域上的任何构造，都拥有某种程度的意识。然而，意识未必总是表现出你们所熟悉的特征，在许多情况下，你们甚至无法感知到它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The physical self as you know it is a focus of consciousness that forms a personality in response to that focus. It is very difficult to make analogies here, but I am foolhardy enough to try it. (Pause.) It seems to you that any naturally aborted fetus has no physical life at all, that such life has been denied to it for some reason. Instead, the fetus experiences another level: physical life at a different scale, that in your terms would apply to the distant past.
quotes.translation: 你们所熟知的物质自体，是意识的一个焦点，它因应这个焦点而形成一个人格。这里很难用类比来说明，但我还是斗胆尝试一下。（停顿。）在你们看来，任何自然流产的胎儿似乎完全没有物质生命，仿佛出于某种原因被剥夺了生命。然而，这个胎儿体验的是另一个层次：以不同尺度存在的物质生命，用你们的话说，这适用于远古时期。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (9:28.) A small note -- for this will be a brief session -- to add to your material on disease: All biological organisms know that physical life depends upon a constant transformation of consciousness and form. In your terms I am saying, of course, that physically death gives life. This biological knowledge is intimately acknowledged at microscopic levels. Even your c-e-l-l-s (spelled) know that their deaths are necessary for the continuation of your physical form.
quotes.translation: （9点28分。）一个小注解——因为这将是一次简短的课——为你们关于疾病的资料补充一点：所有生物有机体都知道，物质生命依赖于意识与形态的持续转化。当然，用你们的话说，物质层面是死亡赋予生命。这种生物学知识在微观层面上被深切认知。就连你们的细胞（拼写出来）也知道，它们的死亡对于你们物质形体的延续是必要的。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: (9:31.) I do not like the phrase, "to advance", yet in your terms "to advance" as a consciousness is to become more and more aware of these other materializations of your own identity. The probable selves are to gain awareness of the other probable selves, and realize that all are various manifestations of the true identity.
quotes.translation: 我并不喜欢“进步”这个词，然而以你们的说法，“进步”作为意识，就是越来越意识到你自身身份的其他这些物质化表现。可能的自我会逐渐觉察到其他可能的自我，并认识到所有这些都是真实身份的不同显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: It is aware energy, identified within itself as itself, not "personified" but awareized. It is therefore the source of all other kinds of consciousness, and the varieties of its activity are infinite. It combines with others of its kind, forming then units of consciousness -- as, mentioned often, atoms and molecules combine.
quotes.translation: 它是觉知的能量，在自身之内被识别为自身，并非“人格化”，而是被觉知化。因此它是所有其他种类意识的源头，其活动的变化无穷无尽。它与同类结合，形成意识单元——正如常被提及的，原子与分子结合那样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: For those who reach this state and utilize it, communication is clearest. It must be understood that this communication works in both ways. Leonardo da Vinci knew of Picasso, for example. There are great men and women who go unknown. Their contemporaries ignore them. Their achievements may be misunderstood or physically lost, but at this level of consciousness they share in these communications, and at another level of existence their achievements are recognized.
quotes.translation: 对于那些达到此状态并善加运用的人而言，沟通最为清晰。必须明白这种沟通是双向的。例如，达芬奇知晓毕加索的存在。有许多伟大的男女不为人知，他们的同代人忽视他们，他们的成就可能被误解或物质性遗失，但在此意识层面上他们共享这些沟通，而在另一存在层面上他们的成就获得认可。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: We are bringing the ego inward, so to speak. It is partaking of this consciousness expansion. In the past the ego has been over exaggerated. It has ruled the roost. This does not mean that the changing pendulum must now attempt to eliminate the ego. Any expansion of consciousness must also include this portion of the self.
quotes.translation: 可以说，我们正将自我向内引导。它正参与这场意识扩展。过去自我被过度夸大，它曾独揽大权。但这并不意味着摆动的钟摆现在必须试图消除自我。任何意识扩展都必须包含自我的这一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: If you thought or felt in such a fashion, then you would appreciate the fact that biologically your body is yours by virtue of the mineral, plant and animal life from which it gains its sustenance. You would not feel imprisoned as you often do within one corporal form, for you would understand that the body itself maintains its relative stability because of its constant give-and-take with the materials of the earth that are themselves possessed of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 如果你以这样的方式思考或感受，那么你就会认识到一个事实：从生物学角度而言，你的身体之所以属于你，是因为它从矿物、植物和动物生命中获取滋养。你不会像常有的那样感到被禁锢在一个肉体形态中，因为你会明白，身体本身之所以保持相对稳定，正是因为它与同样拥有意识的世间万物进行着持续的能量交换。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: (4:36.) This leads me of course to at least mention here the cruel methods used in the slaughtering of animals and fowls for human consumption. The creatures are treated as if they possessed no feeling or consciousness of their own -- and such attitudes show a most unfortunate misreading of natural events. As a direct result, at least as many diseases develop through such procedures as would exist in a highly primitive society with unsanitary conditions. Period.
quotes.translation: （4点36分。）这自然让我至少在此提及人类为食用而宰杀动物和家禽的残忍方式。这些生灵被当作毫无自身感受或意识的存在——这种态度显示出对自然现象最不幸的误读。直接后果是，由此引发的疾病数量至少与卫生条件极差的原始社会相当。句号。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health

quotes.text: Now nevertheless the dream world, the mind and the reality universe do exist. They exist in a climate that we will call the value climate of psychological reality. This is the medium. This takes the place of what you call space. This value climate of psychological reality is a quality which makes all existences and consciousness possible. It is one of the most powerful principles behind or within the vitality that itself composes from itself all other phenomena.
quotes.translation: 然而，梦境世界、心灵与实相宇宙确实存在。它们存在于我们称之为心理实相价值气候的场域中。这个媒介取代了你们所谓的空间。这种心理实相的价值气候是一种特质，它使所有存在与意识成为可能。它是生命力背后或内部最强大的原则之一，而生命力本身又从自身构成所有其他现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: In the creation of art forms, both self-consciousness are allowed with certain reservations to work together. The subconscious channel between them is allowed to open to a great degree. The product of such merging is extremely individualistic, and yet more comprehensible to others than say a fragment from the dream world.
quotes.translation: 在艺术形式的创作中，两种自我意识得以在特定保留条件下共同运作。它们之间的潜意识通道被允许大幅敞开。这种融合的产物极具个人色彩，却比来自梦境世界的片段更易为他人所理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Then you can prolong the experience, and recognize it as a valid out-of body excursion. The mobility of consciousness will automatically allow you greater freedom in using your inner perceptions in waking life also. For this is a motion of consciousness, a motion that has little to do with the motion of the physical body.
quotes.translation: 接着你可以延长这种体验，并将其视为有效的出体漫游。意识的流动性将自动让你在清醒生活中也能更自由地运用内在感知。因为这是意识的运动，一种与肉体运动几乎无关的运动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: It is somewhat fashionable to see man as ... the creature who dirties his own nest, and I am not condoning much of man's behavior in that regard. However, there are other issues, and questions seldom asked. You ignore the fact that [overall] the consciousness of animals has its own purposes and intents. It is true that animals are slaughtered under the most cruel of circumstances for human consumption--for then (underlined) they are treated simply as foodstuff.
quotes.translation: 将人类视为……弄脏自己巢穴的生物，这种观点颇为流行，我并非在宽恕人类在这方面的诸多行为。然而，还有其他议题和鲜少被提出的问题。你们忽视了这样一个事实：【整体而言】动物的意识有其自身的目的与意图。诚然，动物在最残酷的环境下被宰杀供人类食用——那时（强调）它们仅仅被当作食物原料。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: You will experience the vivid realization of your own dreams in this manner, and with some training you will record as much of the whole dream experience as any investigators manage to record when the training is done by a mechanical device, or another individual. And you will also be gaining, additionally, excellent discipline and training over your own states of consciousness, and this in itself you see will be an important yardstick of progress for you both.
quotes.translation: 你将以此方式体验自身梦境鲜活的实相，经过训练后，你能记录下整个梦境经验的完整程度，与任何研究者借助机械装置或他人协助所记录的内容不相上下。此外，你还能额外获得对自身意识状态的卓越训练与掌控，而这本身，你看，将成为衡量你们双方进步的重要标尺。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: There is a corresponding image, held always within the inner consciousness of those who pass out of your system. (Long pause. One of several here.) This is indelible, but not always immediately available for reference. It forms a part of the whole inner self. We would prefer that you not think of any given entire entity in terms of a physical structure, though we have ourselves used the term structure to make explanations simpler, and will probably do so again.
quotes.translation: 那些脱离你们系统的人，其内在意识中始终存有一幅对应的意象。（长停顿。此处为多次停顿之一。）这意象不可磨灭，但并非总能立即供参考。它构成整个内在自体的一部分。我们更希望你们不要将任何特定整体存有视为物质结构，尽管我们自身为简化解释曾使用"结构"一词，且未来可能再次沿用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Whatever your scientists think, your body and your consciousness and your universe spring constantly into actualization. Therefore, through cultivating the clear experience of your own consciousness and being with time and with the moment as you feel it, you can draw upon the greater vitality and power that is available.
quotes.translation: 无论你们的科学家如何认为，你们的身体、意识与宇宙始终在持续显化中。因此，通过培养对自身意识的清晰体验，并随你所感知的时间与当下同在，你便能汲取那可资利用的更大活力与力量。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: There were other tales, some that have not come down to you, in which Adam and Eve were created together, and in a dream fell apart into the separate male and female. In your particular legend Adam appears first. The woman being created from his rib symbolized the necessary emergence, even from the new creature, of the intuitive forces that will always come forth -- for without that development the race would not have attained self-consciousness in your terms.
quotes.translation: 还有其他的故事，有些并未流传到你们这里，其中亚当和夏娃一同被创造，并在梦中分裂为独立的男女。在你们特定的传说中，亚当先出现。女人由他的肋骨创造，象征着直觉力量必然从新生物中涌现——因为若没有这种发展，种族在你们的说法里就无法获得自我意识。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: You are familiar with your own view of the world. As you leave your usual orientation, however, altering the focus of your consciousness, you may very well structure your new experience just as you do your physical one. At the same time, you are more free. You have greater leeway. You are used to projecting your beliefs onto physical objects and events. When you leave your home station, those objects and events no longer present themselves in the same fashion.
quotes.translation: 你们熟悉自己看待世界的方式。然而，当你离开惯常的取向，改变意识的焦点时，你很可能会像构建物质实相那样构建你的新体验。同时，你更加自由，拥有更大的余地。你习惯于将自己的信念投射到物质物体和事件上。当你离开家园站时，那些物体和事件不再以同样的方式呈现。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: I will let you know very shortly what is happening if you are not aware yourself of contact. Conceivably he could make contact with you in the past, and you would have forgotten, but this is not the case. Although both of you realities are physical ones, the environments are entirely different. The forms you make out of matter are only generally similar. His consciousness has been perceiving this sort of unfamiliar environment with some awe. (Meaning our own.)
quotes.translation: 如果你自己未意识到接触，我会很快告诉你正在发生什么。可以想象，他可能在过去与你接触过，而你已经忘记，但事实并非如此。尽管你们两人的实相都是物质性的，但环境完全不同。你们用物质构建的形式只有大致相似。他的意识一直带着某种敬畏在感知这种不熟悉的环境。（意指我们自己的环境。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: To me there are connections between such periodic activity and Seth's information in the 684th session, in Section 1: "Your bodies blink off and on like lights ... For that matter, so does the physical universe." For additional references on the way atoms and molecules -- consciousness itself, in other words -- can phase in and out of our probable reality, see Note 3 for the 684th session.
quotes.translation: 对我而言，这种周期性活动与赛斯在第684节第一节中的信息存在关联："你们的身体像灯光一样闪烁明灭……就此而言，物质宇宙也是如此。"关于原子与分子——即意识本身——如何在我们可能的实相中出入显现的更多参考，请参见第684节注释3。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: In like manner you explore the mental and feeling aspects, then you turn your attention "outward," toward the environment that results from this alternate present. Mentally, events will appear to you. You may experience these strongly, or merely view them. They may become so vivid that you momentarily forget yourself, but if you maintain your contact with this level of consciousness, this will happen seldom. As a rule you are very aware of what you are doing.
quotes.translation: 同样地，你探索心智与感受的层面，然后将注意力"向外"转向这个替代性当下所衍生的环境。在精神层面，事件会向你显现。你可能强烈体验这些事件，或仅仅旁观它们。它们可能变得如此生动，以至于你暂时忘记自我，但若你保持与这个意识层面的接触，这种情况将很少发生。通常你会非常清楚自己在做什么。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: During Western years of adulthood, consciousness is focused most intently in one specific area of activity and physical manipulation. From childhood, the mind is trained to use its argumentative, separating qualities above all others. Creativity is allowed to flow only through certain highly limited, accepted channels.
quotes.translation: 在西方成年岁月里，意识最专注地聚焦于特定领域的活动与物质操控。从童年起，心智就被训练优先运用其争辩性、区分性的特质。创造力只被允许通过某些高度受限、被认可的渠道流动。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: To a very limited extent, the different civilizations and cultures with which you are historically familiar represent a dim glimmering of the various qualities of consciousness and their varieties of experience. But as there are physical species, so there are what you may call species of consciousness also (intently).5
quotes.translation: 在极其有限的程度上，你们历史上所熟悉的不同文明与文化，代表着意识的各种特质及其经验变体的微弱闪光。但正如存在物质物种一般，也存在着你们可称为意识物种的东西（专注地）。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: You are one conscious version of yourself, creating along with all of your contemporaries the realities of the times. When I use the term "contemporaries," I refer to all of the species. You read your consciousness in certain fashions, but it is quite possible to read the consciousness of the world in other ways also.
quotes.translation: 你是自己意识的一个版本，与所有同时代者共同创造着时代的实相。当我使用"同时代者"一词时，我指的是所有物种。你以特定方式解读自己的意识，但完全有可能以其他方式解读世界的意识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: But self A is not limited to the egos perceptions only, therefore it may be said that self As perceptions are not limited, in toto, to the field in which it exists. For it is not so limited in dreams and in other states, yet while consciousness is in these other conditions, self A still exists within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 但自我A并不仅限于自我感知，因此可以说自我A的感知整体上并不受限于其存在的场域。因为在梦境及其他状态中它并不受此限制，然而当意识处于这些其他状态时，自我A仍存在于物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Anyone can say, of course, that in Seth's book the hidden processes are so separate from my normal consciousness that the final product only seems to come from another personality. I can only state my own feelings and emphasize that Seth's book, and the whole six-thousand-page manuscript of Seth material, don't take care of my own creative expression or responsibility. If both came from the same unconscious, it seems that there would be no slack to take up.
quotes.translation: 当然任何人都可以说，在赛斯书中，隐藏的历程与我的正常意识如此分离，以至于最终成品似乎来自另一个人格。我只能陈述自己的感受并强调：赛斯书及整部六千页的赛斯资料手稿，并未取代我自身的创作表达或责任。若两者都源自同一无意识，似乎就不会留下任何需要填补的空白了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In such instances a dream, or a series of them, will often then alter the person's beliefs in a way that could not otherwise occur, by providing new information. The same data might come in a state of inspiration, but it would in any case be the result of an acquisition of knowledge otherwise inaccessible. Love, purpose, belief, and intent -- these shape your physical body and work upon it and with it even as at other levels cellular consciousness forms it.
quotes.translation: 在此类情形中，一个梦或一连串梦境往往会通过提供新信息，以其他方式无法实现的方式改变当事人的信念。同样的信息也可能在灵感状态下获得，但无论如何，这都源于获取了原本无法触及的知识。爱、目的、信念与意图——这些塑造着你的物质身体，作用于它并与它共同运作，正如在另一层面上细胞意识塑造它一般。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: "Effective" space travel, creative space travel on your part, will not occur until you learn that your space-time system is one focus. Otherwise you will seem to visit one dead world after another, blind to civilizations that may exist on any of them. Some of these difficulties could be transcended if you learned to understand the miraculous multidimensionality of even your own physical structure, and allowed your consciousness some of its greater freedom.
quotes.translation: 除非你领悟到自己的时空系统只是一个焦点，否则你无法实现"有效"的太空旅行——即属于你的创造性太空旅行。否则你只会看似造访一个又一个死寂的世界，对其中可能存在的文明视而不见。若能理解自身物质结构那不可思议的多维性，并允许意识获得更大自由，某些困境本可超越。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Now, dictation: Consciousness operates with what you may call code (spelled) systems. These are beyond count. Consciousness differentiates itself, therefore, by operating within certain code systems that help direct particular kinds of focus, bringing in certain kinds of significances3 while blocking out other data.
quotes.translation: 口授：意识运作于你们所谓的编码系统之中。这些系统不可胜数。意识通过在某些编码系统内运作来分化自身，这些系统帮助引导特定类型的专注，引入特定种类的意义，同时屏蔽其他数据。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (9:27.) In your daily life you may suddenly know something without knowing how you know, without being aware of any particular image or sense impression. The knowledge is simply "there." This kind of activity approaches the sort of knowing of your own consciousness when it is uninvolved with any kind of ordinary sense stimuli. It simply knows. In those certain dream states, then, you know in the same fashion. You experience your being unallied with flesh.
quotes.translation: （9点27分）在日常生活中，你可能会突然知道某件事，却不知自己如何知晓，也意识不到任何特定的图像或感官印象。知识就这么"存在"着。当你的意识不涉及任何普通感官刺激时，这种活动方式便接近了它自身的认知方式——它只是单纯地知道。因此，在某些梦境状态中，你以同样的方式知晓。你体验着与肉身无关的存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Since Seth obviously sees little real difference between the concepts of fields and wave/particles, I'd say that in the 775th session he cast his material in accord with the latter so as to make it as clear as possible to us who are so bound by ideas of space and time: "In those terms ..." But overall the physicists discuss energy and Seth talks about consciousness -- and therein, as I see it, lies the basic contrast between the two approaches to reality.
quotes.translation: 既然赛斯显然认为场与波/粒子概念之间并无实质差异，我想在第七七五节中他采用后者来呈现资料，是为了让我们这些深受时空观念束缚的人能尽可能清晰地理解："用那些术语来说……"但总体而言，物理学家讨论能量，而赛斯谈论意识——在我看来，这正是两种接近实相的方法之间的根本差异。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Now in the dream state, you suddenly become aware on occasion of greater perspective. This perspective cannot "work" at your usual level of consciousness, any more than the artist's perspective will work for the ant's -- though there is much you could learn from an ant's consciousness (intently). Say that I smiled.
quotes.translation: 现在，在梦境状态中，你们偶尔会突然意识到更广阔的视角。这个视角无法在你们通常的意识层面“运作”，就像艺术家的视角无法为蚂蚁所用一样——尽管你们可以从蚂蚁的意识中学到很多（专注地）。就说我笑了。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: These became more and more biologically prominent, so that man's consciousness rode them, or leaped upon them. These particular pulses or messages became the biologically and mentally accepted ones. They were clued into sense perception, then. These pulses or messages became the only official data that, translated into sense perception, formed physical reality. This selectivity gave an understandable line of reference from interior to exterior existence.
quotes.translation: 这些脉冲变得越来越具有生物学上的显著性，以至于人类的意识驾驭它们，或跃上它们。这些特定的脉冲或信息成了生物学上和心智上被接受的讯息。它们随后与感官知觉相连。这些脉冲或信息成了唯一的官方数据，经感官知觉转译后，形成了物质实相。这种选择性为从内在到外在的存在提供了一条可理解的参照线。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: You are seeing shadows upon a blank and a black screen. The three-dimensional system is like a shadow of realities that you do not perceive. Now. (Pause.) The heavy hydrogen molecules had a large part to play in the birth of that system. Consciousness had first to create thevoid, or the dimension in which the system could exist, and also to endow thatvoid with all the probabilities for development that have come about in your time, and are to come about.
quotes.translation: 你们是在一片空白与黑暗的屏幕上看见影子。三维系统就像你们未曾感知的实相之影。现在。（停顿。）重氢分子在那个系统的诞生中扮演了重要角色。意识必须先创造空无，或该系统得以存在的维度，并赋予那空无所有在你们时代已发生及将发生的演化可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: (10:19.) There will be no distance between the personality and the experience of birth, then. The newly entered personality, as a consciousness, flickers, in that there is a while before stabilization takes place. When the child, particularly the young child, is sleeping, for example, the personality often simply vacates the body. Gradually the identification with the between-life situation dwindles until nearly full focus resides in the physical body.
quotes.translation: （10点19分）届时人格与出生体验之间将不复存在距离。新进入的人格作为意识会闪烁不定，在稳定之前需经历一段过渡期。例如当孩童（尤其是幼童）睡眠时，人格往往直接脱离躯体。对死后状态的身份认同逐渐减弱，直至几乎全部焦点都驻留在肉体之中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (A one-minute pause at 9:50, head bowed, eyes closed.) The organizations of consciousness "grow" even as cells grow into organs. Groups of probable selves, then, can and do form their own identity structure, which is quite aware of the probable selves involved. In your reality, experience is dependent upon time, but all experience is not so structured. There are, for example, parallel events that are followed as easily as you follow consecutive events.
quotes.translation: （9点50分停顿一分钟，低头闭眼。）意识的组织"成长"，如同细胞成长为器官。因此，可能的自体的群体能够且确实形成它们自己的身份结构，这结构完全知晓所涉及的可能自体。在你们的实相中，经验依赖于时间，但并非所有经验都如此结构。例如，存在着平行事件，你们可以像跟随连续事件一样轻易地跟随它们。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Your film, however, will only take pictures today, of today. No yesterday or tomorrow will suddenly appear in the snapshots of the present. The photographer in the dream world, though, will find an entirely different situation, for there consciousness can capture scenes from entirely different times as easily as the waking photographer can take pictures of different places. Unless you realize this, some of your "dream albums" will make no sense to you.
quotes.translation: 然而，你们的胶片今天只会拍摄今天的照片。昨天或明天不会突然出现在当下的快照中。不过，梦世界的摄影师会发现一种完全不同的情况，因为在那里，意识可以像清醒的摄影师拍摄不同地点一样轻易地捕捉来自完全不同时间的场景。除非你认识到这一点，否则你们的一些"梦的相册"对你来说将毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The psyche knows itself and is aware of its parts. When ego consciousness reached a certain point of biological and mental competence, when experience in the present became extensive enough, then ego consciousness would be at the stage where it could begin to accept greater data. Indeed, it is now at that stage.
quotes.translation: 心灵认识它自己，并知晓它的各个部分。当自我意识达到生物性和心智能力的某一点，当当下的经验变得足够广泛时，那么自我意识就会达到一个阶段，它能够开始接受更大的资料。事实上，它现在正处于那个阶段。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: It is obvious, however, that all these powers of the entity cannot be vested in its various personalities. The consciousness of a part of the whole could not hear the weight of the consciousness of the whole. Fragment personalities could not possibly contain the whole, but they do contain the seeds of the whole.
quotes.translation: 然而，实体所有的这些能力显然不能完全赋予其各种人格。整体一部分的意识无法承受整体意识的重量。片段人格不可能包含整体，但它们确实包含着整体的种子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Other fields do allow for greater complexity of psychic organization, and let me remind you again that such psychic organizations do not involve a blurring of individuality in some undefinable whole, as for example any drowning of consciousness in some gigantic, benign super consciousness. This is not the point.
quotes.translation: 其他场域确实允许更复杂的心理组织，让我再次提醒你，这种心理组织并不涉及个体性在某种不可名状的整体中模糊化，例如意识淹没在某种巨大、仁慈的超意识中。这不是重点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The source and the power of your present consciousness is not and has never been physical, and where I am many are not even aware that such a physical system exists. You have chosen your own illusion, and so you must accept it, and from its viewpoint must you try to understand the realities that exist beyond it.
quotes.translation: 你当前意识的源头与力量并非来自物质，也从未是物质的，而在我所在之处，许多人甚至不知道存在这样一个物质系统。你选择了自己的幻相，因此你必须接受它，并必须从其视角尝试理解超越它的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The higher centers of intuition are activated while physically oriented portions of consciousness remain with the body. The "absent" portion of the self cannot be traced through brain patterns, though the point of its departure and the point of its return may show a particular pattern. The "time out" itself, however, will not be detected in any way, the tracings showing only whatever characteristic pattern was being given immediately before departure.
quotes.translation: 直觉的较高中心被激活，而意识中面向肉体的部分仍留在体内。自我"缺席"的部分无法通过脑波模式追踪，尽管其离开点和返回点可能呈现特定模式。然而，"暂停时段"本身无论如何都无法被侦测到，脑波记录只会显示离开前即刻呈现的特征模式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "Because you cannot follow a thought, you wonder where it has gone; has it fallen off some invisible cliff in your mind? But because you can no longer hold that thought in consciousness does not mean it no longer exists, that it does not have a reality of its own, for it does indeed. And if a world escapes you -- if you cannot follow it and think it has been destroyed -- then the same thing applies to the world as to the thought. It continues to live.
quotes.translation: "因为你无法追踪一个念头，便疑惑它去了何处——是否坠入你心智中某道无形悬崖？但无法再将那念头保留在意识中，并不代表它不再存在，不代表它没有自己的实相——它确实存在。倘若一个世界从你眼前消失——你无法追踪它，以为它已被摧毁——那么世界与念头适用相同法则：它继续存活着。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: It is this dilemma, precisely between identity's constant attempts to maintain stability, and actions inherent drive for change, that results in the imbalance, the exquisite creative by-product that is consciousness of self. We have a series of creative strains. Identity must seek stability while action must seek change, yet identity could not exist without change, without action, for it is the result of action, and not apart from it but a part of it.
quotes.translation: 正是这个困境——身份认同不断试图维持稳定，与行动内在的变革驱力之间的张力——导致了失衡，这种失衡正是自我意识那精妙的创造性副产品。我们拥有一系列创造性的张力。身份认同必须寻求稳定，而行动必须寻求变革，然而没有变革、没有行动，身份认同便无法存在，因为它正是行动的结果，并非与行动分离，而是行动的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Deeper projections into that environment may then be possible. In this state also great vistas of historic pasts and futures may be seen. All of these levels of consciousness are filled with the tapestry of various communications that can be followed through according to the purpose of the personality involved.
quotes.translation: 随后，更深入的投射可能进入那个环境。在这种状态下，也可能看到历史过去与未来的广阔景象。所有这些意识层面都充满了各种沟通的织锦，可以根据所涉及人格的目的来追踪探索。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: That identity would contain the you that you have always known, and in no way threaten it. The new you would simply be more than you are now. You would just have another expansion of consciousness, another self-who-is-aware-of-being in the same way that -- using an analogy, granted -- the writer is aware of the self who lives, in those terms; is the self who lives while being in a position of some apartness, able to comment upon the life being lived.
quotes.translation: 那个身份将包含你一直所知的自己，并且绝不会威胁到它。新的你只是比现在的你更丰富。你只是拥有另一次意识的扩展，另一个觉知自身存在的自己——打个比方，就像作家在那些层面上，既觉察到那个活着的自己，又是那个活着的自己，同时处于某种超然的位置，能够评论正在经历的人生。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Ruburt has been reading old poetry of his own, and he was appalled to find such beliefs in rather brutal, concentrated form. Until our sessions began, he followed the official line of consciousness, and though he railed against those precepts he could find no other solution. The self, so spectacularly alive, seemed equipped with reason to understand the great import of its own certain extinction. Such a tragedy to project upon the living personality.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏最近重读自己早年写的诗，震惊地发现其中竟有如此残酷而集中的信念。在我们的课程开始前，他遵循着正统的意识观念，尽管他抨击那些教条，却找不到其他出路。那个如此鲜活的生命，似乎被赋予理性去理解自身必然消亡的重大意义。将这样的悲剧投射到活生生的人格上，是何等荒谬。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: No psychological system is closed, no consciousness is closed, regardless of any appearances to the contrary within your own system. The soul is a traveler, as has been said so often; but it is also the creator of all experience, and of all destinations in your terms. It creates worlds as it goes, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 没有任何心理系统是封闭的，没有任何意识是封闭的，无论在你自己的系统内看起来多么相反。灵魂是一位旅者，正如常被提及的那样；但它也是一切经验的创造者，也是你们所谓一切目的地的创造者。可以说，它一边前行一边创造世界。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Man is himself a particular system or unit of action within other systems of action, and he is himself composed of other units of action. This unity and interdependence is in itself responsible for that interplay of mental and psychic action which results in the individual consciousness, that is, with the ego.
quotes.translation: 人本身是其他行动系统内的一个特定系统或行动单元，而他本身又由其他行动单元组成。这种统一性和相互依赖性本身导致了心智与心灵活动的相互作用，从而产生了个体意识，即与自我相关的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Consciousness, being active within all cellular structures, triggers itself ahead of time [in each case], so to speak, to react to certain conditions and not to others. Many are born the same day of any given year, and generally within the same time period -- but individually the inner triggering may be far different, so that while the overall conditions at birth may appear more or less the same, the inner reactions to them will vary widely. Period.
quotes.translation: 意识在所有细胞结构中活跃，可以说，它在每个案例中提前触发自身，以对某些条件作出反应，而非其他条件。许多人在任何特定年份的同一天出生，且通常在同一时间段内——但个体内在的触发可能大相径庭，因此，尽管出生时的总体条件看似大致相同，但个体对它们的内在反应却千差万别。句号。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (10:05.) If that were not the case, your own species would not have existed as long as it has. Nor would the constructs of civilization -- art, commerce, or even technology -- have been possible. Framework 2 combines order and spontaneity, but its order is of another kind. It is a circular, associative, "naturally ordering process," in which spontaneity automatically exists in the overall order that will best fulfill the potentials of consciousness.
quotes.translation: （十点零五分。）若非如此，你们这个物种根本不可能存活这么久。文明的结构——艺术、商业甚至科技——也不可能存在。架构二结合了秩序与自发性，但其秩序属于另一种类型。它是一种循环的、联想的"自然排序过程"，其中自发性自动存在于最能实现意识潜能的整体秩序中。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: All of these projects are interconnected, and they will help both of you in your writing and painting, and greatly increase your capabilities in your own fields. Again, we shall proceed cautiously, precisely but steadily, and always you shall be in control. But when we are finished, and it will not be for a long time, you should be able to travel from any state of consciousness to another and back again, safely, with full awareness of your identity.
quotes.translation: 所有这些计划都相互关联，将有助于你们二人的写作与绘画，并大幅提升你们各自领域的才能。再次强调，我们会谨慎、精准而稳健地推进，你们始终掌握主导权。但当我们完成时——这需要很长时间——你们应当能够从任何意识状态安全地穿梭至另一种状态，并带着对自我身份的完全觉知返回。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: After you have managed to feel yourself above your body in your astral form, you again tell yourself to see the image of the same past self, you may then imagine its image merging with your own, and its memories a part of your own consciousness. When you have succeeded, then still feeling yourself in the astral form, tell yourself that you will next see the image of the life before last: the image of the person you were, then repeat the other steps.
quotes.translation: 当你成功以星光体形态感知到自身悬浮于肉体之上后，再次告诉自己：要看见同一前世自我的影像。接着想象这个影像与你的星光体融合，让它的记忆成为你意识的一部分。成功之后，保持星光体形态，告诉自己接下来将看见再前一世的影像——那个你曾是的个体的形象，然后重复其他步骤。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: As you dream, and have a dream existence while still involved in the physical dimension, so is the physical dimension a dream within another dimension in which your consciousness is far more acute. And as in your dream you set up situations and work out problems, so you do the same in your physical existence.
quotes.translation: 当你做梦并在物质维度中仍拥有梦境存在时，物质维度本身也是另一个维度中的一场梦，而在这个维度里，你的意识要敏锐得多。正如你在梦中设定情境并解决问题，你在物质存在中也做着同样的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: As you know, so-called inert objects possess consciousness also, though in a more generalized and much less specific manner, in which to a large degree choice is denied to them. It should be apparent that psychic identity is no more dependent upon physical permanence, certainly when you consider that even a chair retains its form as a chair, even though it is actually not one thing or object, and that no atom or molecule remains the same within it.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，所谓惰性物体也拥有意识，只是以更普遍且远非具体的方式存在，在这种方式中，它们很大程度上被剥夺了选择权。显然，心灵身份并不依赖于物质恒常性——当你想到即使一把椅子也保持其作为椅子的形态，尽管它实际上并非单一物体，且其中没有任何原子或分子保持不变时，这一点就更加显而易见了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It exists then, "eternally," separated from the physical clothing that you need in order to understand it. Physical existence is one way in which the soul chooses to experience its own actuality. The soul, in other words, has created a world for you to inhabit, to change -- a complete sphere of activity in which new developments and indeed new forms of consciousness can emerge.
quotes.translation: 因此，它"永恒"地存在着，脱离了为理解它而需要的物质外衣。物质存在是灵魂选择体验自身实相的一种方式。换言之，灵魂为你创造了一个可供居住、改变的世界——一个完整的活动领域，在其中新的发展乃至新的意识形式都能涌现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The gradations of intensities are so minute that it would be impossible to measure them, and yet each field contains in coded form the actual living reality of endless eons; contains therefore what you would call the past, present and future of unnumbered universes; contains the actual coded data of any and every consciousness that has been or will be, in any universe; those that have appeared to vanish, and those which seemingly do not yet exist.
quotes.translation: 这些强度的层级如此精微，以至于无法测量，但每个场域都以编码形式包含着无尽永劫的真实鲜活实相；因此也包含着你们所谓的无数宇宙的过去、现在与未来；包含着在任何宇宙中曾经存在或将要存在的每一个意识的实际编码数据——那些看似已消失的，以及那些看似尚未存在的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now mankind uses but a portion of his capabilities, and when you are along in these experiments, properly set up, you will find that you handle them very well, with no draining of energies or difficulties. Your sleeping hours are already productive. We shall also use them to give you training in the utilization of various stages of consciousness, that will result in time with excellent control over various aspects and stages of your own awareness.
quotes.translation: 人类目前仅运用了自身能力的一小部分。当你们正确设置并参与这些实验时，会发现能轻松驾驭它们，既不会消耗能量也不会遭遇困难。你们的睡眠时段本就具有生产力。我们还将利用这些时段训练你们运用意识的各种阶段，最终使你们能完美掌控自身觉察力的各个面向与层次。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: (11:22.) Such a development would, however, necessitate first of all a broadening of concepts about the self, and a greater understanding of human potential. Human consciousness is now at a stage where such a development is not only feasible, but necessary if the race is to achieve its greatest fulfillment.
quotes.translation: （11点22分。）然而，这样的发展首先需要拓展关于自我的概念，并更深入地理解人类潜能。人类意识目前正处于这样一个阶段：这种发展不仅可行，而且对于人类实现其最大成就而言是必要的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: There are other layers of awareness beneath this one, but here there is a much greater tendency for one to merge into the other. In the next level, for example, communication is possible with various kinds of consciousness that have never been physically manifested, in your terms -- personalities who do not have a physical reality in either your present or future, yet who are connected with your system of reality both as guardians and custodians.
quotes.translation: 在这一层之下还有其他意识层次，但这里存在着一种更强的相互融合倾向。例如，在下一层次中，可以与各种从未以你们所谓的物质形式显现的意识进行沟通——这些人格在你们的现在或未来都没有物质实相，却作为守护者和保管者与你们的实相系统相连。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "If physical form is made up of such multitudinous, invisible particles, how much more highly organized must be the inner components of consciousness, without whose perceptions matter itself would be meaningless. The alliances of consciousness, then, are far more vast than those of particles in any form."
quotes.translation: "如果物质形态由如此众多不可见的粒子构成，那么意识的内在组成部分必然组织得更为精妙，没有它们的感知，物质本身将毫无意义。因此，意识的联盟远比任何形态的粒子联盟更为宏大。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The entity, after all, does just this in creating the various personalities. What are they but projections or fragments from the entity itself? What the entity does however it does consciously and with purpose, since it is by definition beneath consciousness, and without consciousness there is no purpose.
quotes.translation: 存有在创造各种人格时，终究正是如此运作的。这些人格若非存有自身的投射或片段，又能是什么？然而存有所为皆出于自觉与目的，因其本质即超越意识——若无意识，便无目的可言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Not one portion of consciousness is lost in this process, you understand. When you think of a possible destruction of your planet, you imagine perhaps the mutilation of nature as you know it, the species changed. Or you imagine the race of man vanishing, or starting all over again as it were from scratch.
quotes.translation: 这个过程中没有任何一部分意识会流失，你要明白。当你想到你们星球可能毁灭时，你或许会想象你所知的自然遭到摧残、物种改变。或者你想象人类种族消失，或者仿佛从零开始重新来过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: (10:24.) God, therefore, became an idea projected outward, independent of the individual, divorced from nature. He became the reflection of man's emerging ego, with all of its brilliance, savagery, power, and intent for mastery. The adventure was a highly creative one despite the obvious disadvantages, and represented an "evolution" of consciousness that enriched man's subjective experience, and indeed added to the dimensions of reality itself.
quotes.translation: （10点24分）因此，神变成了一个向外投射的意念，独立于个体，与自然分离。祂变成了人类新兴自我的反映，带着其所有的辉煌、野蛮、力量与主宰意图。这场冒险尽管有明显的不利之处，却极具创造性，代表了意识的"进化"，丰富了人类的主观经验，并确实增加了实相本身的维度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This concentration away from the physical system may make it appear as if her consciousness is blotted out. Instead, more is added to it. Now from my own field of reality I focus my attention toward the woman, but the words that she speaks -- these words upon the pages -- are not initially verbal at all.
quotes.translation: 这种对物质系统的注意力转移，可能使她的意识仿佛被抹除了。实则不然，反而有更多内容被添加进去。现在，从我自己的实相领域，我将注意力聚焦于这位女性，但她所说的话语——这些印在纸页上的话语——最初根本不是语言形式的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: At that level environment, creatures, and the elements of the natural world are all united--a point we will return to quite often. Your intellect as you think of it operates so clearly and precisely, so logically (with amusement), sometimes so arrogantly, because the intellect rides that great thrust of codified, "ancient," "unconscious" power--the power of instant knowing that is a characteristic of the body consciousness (all very intently).
quotes.translation: 在那个层面，环境、生物与自然界的元素皆为一体——这一点我们将反复提及。你们所认为的智力之所以运作得如此清晰精准、如此逻辑严密（带着戏谑），有时甚至如此傲慢，正是因为智力驾驭着那股被编码的、"古老的"、"无意识的"巨大力量——那是身体意识所特有的瞬间知晓之力（全程极为专注）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Do you think your abilities originate with the self that sits in the classroom? What does your inner identity have to do with the self that brushes your teeth? Yet surely you are wide awake when you brush your teeth, and when you dream surely you will say you are sleeping and your consciousness is dead.
quotes.translation: 你以为你的能力源自坐在教室里的那个自我吗？你内在的本体与刷牙的那个自我又有什么关系？然而你刷牙时无疑清醒得很，而当你做梦时，你定会说自己在睡觉，意识已经死亡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: If you will remember what I have said about the way in which the universe expands, that has nothing to do with space, then you may perhaps perceive, though dimly, the existence of a psychic pyramid of interrelated, ever-expanding consciousness that creates simultaneously and instantaneously universes and individuals that are given, through the gifts of personal perspectives, duration, intelligence, psychic comprehension, and eternal validity.
quotes.translation: 若你记得我曾说过宇宙扩展的方式与空间无关，那么你或许能隐约感知到一种相互关联、不断扩展的意识心灵金字塔——它同时且即刻创造出宇宙与个体，并通过个人视角的馈赠赋予其存续、智慧、心灵理解力与永恒有效性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is therefore theoretically possible for you to see the world through a frog's eye, or a bird's or an ant's. We are speaking here of physical senses. The inner self has also latent inner senses beside the ones that it normally uses while the consciousness is tuned into a particular camouflage system.
quotes.translation: 因此理论上，你有可能透过青蛙、鸟或蚂蚁的眼睛看世界。此处我们讨论的是物质感官。当意识调频至特定伪装系统时，内在自体除了惯用的感官外，还潜藏着内在感官。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You are made basically of the same ingredients as a chair, a stone, a head of lettuce, a bird. In a gigantic cooperative endeavor, all consciousness joins together to make the forms that you perceive. Now, because this is known to us, we can change our environments and our own physical forms as we wish, and without confusion, for we perceive the reality that lies beneath.
quotes.translation: 你本质上与椅子、石头、生菜、鸟由相同成分构成。在一种宏大的合作性努力中，所有意识共同协作，形成你所感知的形态。正因我们知晓此理，故能随心所欲改变自身环境与物质形体而无困惑——因为我们洞见其下的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You look out into the physical universe, and interpret reality according to the information received from your "outer senses." I will stand, figuratively speaking, in physical reality and look inward for you, and describe those realities of consciousness and experience that you are presently too fascinated to see. For you are fascinated with physical reality, and you are in as deep a trance now as the woman is through whom I write this book.
quotes.translation: 你透过“外在感官”接收的信息来观察物质宇宙，并据此诠释实相。容我打个比方：我将立足于物质实相，为你向内探视，描述那些你因过于着迷而未能看见的意识与经验实相。因为你正沉迷于物质实相，其沉迷程度之深，不亚于此刻借其手撰写此书的女子所处的出神状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In those times men spoke and confided to the spirits of birds, trees, and spiders, knowing that in the interior reality beneath, the nature of these communications was known and understood. In those times, death was not feared as it is in your terms, now, for the cycle of consciousness was understood.
quotes.translation: 在那个时代，人们会向鸟、树与蜘蛛的灵性倾诉心声，深知在内在实相底层，这些沟通的本质早已被知晓与理解。在那个时代，死亡并不像你们现今这般令人恐惧，因为意识的循环已被理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now: While consciousness enjoys its physical orientation, it is also too creative to confine its activities in one direction. Dreams provide consciousness with its own creative play, therefore, when it need not be so practical or so "mundane," allowing it to use its innate characteristics more freely.
quotes.translation: 现在：当意识享受其物质导向时，它也同样具有创造力，不会将活动局限于单一方向。梦境为意识提供了自身的创造性游戏，因此当意识无需如此务实或如此"世俗"时，它得以更自由地运用其固有特质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: They will grow in consciousness and continue their own lines of development on different levels. In one way, we are all thought-forms, and this will be further explained in the material dealing with the god concept. Understand, however, that I do not mean that we lack our own initiative for action, individuality or purpose -- and remember also here that you live from the inside out. Then perhaps the statement will have more meaning for you.
quotes.translation: 它们将在意识中成长，并在不同层面上继续自身的发展路线。从某种角度来看，我们都是思想形态，这一点将在探讨神祇概念的资料中得到进一步解释。但请理解，我并非意指我们缺乏自身的行动主动性、个体性或目的——同时请记住，你们是由内而外地生活。这样，这句话或许对你们会有更深的意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (With emphasis:) Reincarnation simply represents probabilities in a time context (underlined) -- portions of the self that are materialized in historical contexts. Period. All kinds of time -- backward and forward -- emerge from the basic unpredictable nature of consciousness, and are due to "series" of significances. Each self born in time will then pursue its own probable realities from that standpoint. Again, each such self is immediate.
quotes.translation: （强调地：）转世仅仅代表时间脉络中的可能性（划线强调）——即自我在历史脉络中物质化的部分。句号。所有类型的时间——向前与向后——都源于意识那不可预测的基本本质，并源于"系列"的意义。每个诞生于时间中的自我，都将从那个立足点追寻自身的可能实相。再次强调，每个这样的自我都是即刻的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: On a very basic level, as consciousness with a self （but no conscious "I" exists in the most minute division of consciousness）, all action and all sensations and all stimuli are instantly and automatically and joyfully accepted, regardless of their nature. At this level no knowledge of threat exists.
quotes.translation: 在最基础的层面上，作为具有自我但无意识"我"（在最细微的意识划分中不存在有意识的"我"）的意识，所有行动、所有感受和所有刺激，无论其性质如何，都会立即、自动且喜悦地被接受。在这个层面上，不存在对威胁的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: He wondered about their mental condition in relation to the overall consciousness. Now. Consciousness can never fully express itself in physical terms, as you know. Through various reincarnations the entity attempts to express itself more and more competently within the framework of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 他好奇他们的心智状态与整体意识之间的关系。现在。如你所知，意识永远无法在物质层面完全表达自身。通过不同的转世，存有试图在物质实相的框架内越来越充分地表达自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: The entity sees the whole event, the whole person-event, with the time element, or age in your terms, as simply another characteristic or dimension. The person-event is not cut off, however. Its greater reality simply cannot appear within three dimensions. It is instead composed of atoms and molecules that you do not perceive, both above and below the physical range of intensities -- and all of these in their own way possess consciousness.
quotes.translation: 存有看到整个事件、整个"人-事件"，在你们的时间要素或年龄中，这仅仅是另一种特性或维度。然而"人-事件"并未被切断。它的更大实相根本无法在三维空间中显现。它反而由你们无法感知的原子与分子构成——这些粒子既在物理强度范围之上也在其之下——而它们都以各自的方式拥有意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The birth of the world represented a divine psychological awakening. Each consciousness that takes a part in the physical universe dreamed of such a physical existence, in your terms, before the earth was formed. In greater terms than yours, it is quite true to say that the universe is not formed yet, or that the universe has vanished. In still vaster terms, however, the fact is that in one state or another the universe has always existed.
quotes.translation: 世界的诞生代表了一种神圣的心理觉醒。每个参与物质宇宙的意识，在你们的时间概念里，早在地球形成之前就梦想过这样的物质存在。从比你们更宏大的角度来看，说宇宙尚未形成或宇宙已经消失，都是相当正确的。然而，从更广阔的视角来看，事实是宇宙以某种状态一直存在着。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: For example, Mr. Foxs dream meetings were quite valid. This is what happens in such a case. Those who agree on such a meeting within dream reality must have certain abilities developed. They must be capable of taking waking consciousness into the dream state. They must be able to manipulate within it. Each of them therefore constructs, you see, the dream location at which the have agreed to meet, a point not thought of by Ruburt's Mr. Fox.
quotes.translation: 例如，福克斯先生的梦境会面是相当有效的。这就是这种情况下的实际过程。那些同意在梦境实相中会面的人必须发展出某些能力。他们必须能够将清醒意识带入梦境状态。他们必须能够在其中运作。因此，你们看，他们每个人都构建了约定会面的梦境地点——这是鲁柏的福克斯先生未曾想到的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: To the entity, your own consciousness could be likened to one stream of consciousness, in your terms. The greater part of your own identity, then, is completely aware of all of your conscious and unconscious living material. It is also aware of the same kind of data from all of (its and your) parts.
quotes.translation: 对存有而言，你们自己的意识在你们的时间概念里可被比作一条意识流。因此，你们自身身份中更大部分完全知晓你们所有有意识和无意识的生活素材。它也知晓来自其（以及你们的）所有部分的同类资料。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: These units combine into various kinds of gestalts of consciousness. Basically, it is not correct to say that one is more progressed than another. The petal of a flower, for example, is not more developed than the root.
