An ant on the ground may see that the petal is way above the root and stem, but ants are too wise to think that the petal must be better than the root.
quotes.translation: 这些单位组合成各种意识完形。基本上，说一个比另一个更进步是不正确的。例如，花瓣并不比根更发达。地上的蚂蚁可能看到花瓣远高于根和茎，但蚂蚁足够聪明，不会认为花瓣一定比根更好。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Now: When you properly understand how to use psychological time, then to some extent you can learn to alter the nature and focus of your consciousness. You can turn it in many directions. You can focus it in other ways, away from physical reality. This does not mean that you will be left high and dry here. It does mean that you will begin to explore the reality of yourselves, and of those other dimensions in which you have your existence.
quotes.translation: 现在：当你正确理解如何使用心理时间时，你可以在某种程度上学会改变你意识的本质和焦点。你可以将它转向许多方向。你可以以其他方式聚焦它，远离物质实相。这并不意味着你会在这里被晾在一边。它确实意味着你将开始探索你自己以及你存在的其他维度的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: If your conscious beliefs are causing you great distress, countering beneficial beliefs may be received from this source. Your being, the greater consciousness that is yourself, intersects with space and time; it is born in flesh simultaneously at many [moment] "points." (See the 668th session in Chapter Nineteen.) You would call each of these immersions into three-dimensional existence a life, with its own self. And you are one of these.
quotes.translation: 如果你的意识信念正在引起你极大的痛苦，那么从这个源头可能会接收到有益的相反信念。你的存有，即你自身的更大意识，与时空相交；它同时在许多“点”化身为血肉。（见第十九章第六六八节。）你会把每一次沉浸于三次元存在称为一个生命，每个生命都有其自身。而你就是其中之一。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: You are used to a particular kind of orientation, accustomed to using your consciousness in one particular manner. In order to study the "unknown" reality, however, you must try to see what else your consciousness can do. This really means that you must learn to regain the true feeling of yourself.
quotes.translation: 你已习惯于某种特定的取向，惯于以某种特定方式运用你的意识。然而，若要研究"未知"实相，你必须试着看看你的意识还能做些什么。这实际上意味着你必须学会重新找回你真正的自我感受。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Otherwise I should be all life force and no self. Now, I communicate through this level of Ruburt's consciousness. It is subconscious to him or to his ego, but it is not without consciousness by any means. And again, I communicate through that level. At my own level this is not in itself difficult.
quotes.translation: 否则我将只有生命力而没有自我。此刻，我通过鲁柏意识的这个层次进行沟通。这对他或他的自我而言是潜意识层面，但绝非没有意识。我再次通过那个层次沟通。在我自己的层次上，这本身并不困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: All consciousness has within it the deep abiding impetus to use its abilities fully, to expand its capacities, to venture joyfully beyond the seeming barriers of its own experience. The very consciousnesses within the smallest molecules cry out against any ideas of limitation. They yearn toward new forms and experiences. Even atoms, then, constantly seek to join in new organizations of structure and meaning. They do this "instinctively."
quotes.translation: 所有意识内在都怀有深切的持久动力，要充分发挥自身能力，扩展自身容量，欢欣鼓舞地超越自身经验中看似存在的障碍。就连最小分子中的意识也在呐喊反对任何限制的观念。它们渴望新的形态与体验。因此，就连原子也不断寻求加入新的结构与意义组织。它们"本能地"这样做。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: But past, present and future as such simply do not have meaning to the other aspects of the personality. The idea and reality of physical time parallels the development of the ego. Consciousness of self, alone, is unaware of your physical time. The physical time idea is a product of the ego's tendency to make finer distinctions in order that it can classify and categorize, and therefore identify and give permanence to its own sensations.
quotes.translation: 但过去、现在与未来这类概念，对人格的其他层面而言根本毫无意义。物理时间的概念与实相，与自我的发展是平行的。唯有自我意识本身，并不知晓你们的物理时间。物理时间观念是自我倾向的产物——它为了能分类与归纳，从而识别并赋予自身感受以永恒性，而做出更精细的区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: These units are natural emanations from all kinds of consciousness. They are the invisible formations resulting from reaction to any kind of stimuli. They very seldom exist in isolation, but unite under certain laws. They change both their form and their pulsation. Their relative "duration" depends upon the original intensity behind them -- that is, behind the original thought, emotion, stimuli, or reaction that brought them into being.
quotes.translation: 这些单位是各类意识的自然放射物。它们是对任何刺激产生反应后形成的无形结构。它们极少孤立存在，而是在特定法则下结合。它们既改变形态也改变脉动频率。其相对"存续时间"取决于背后的原始强度——即催生它们的最初思想、情绪、刺激或反应背后的强度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: 5. By now, a number of the world's leading scientists in the physical disciplines have publicly stated their beliefs that basically consciousness plays the primary role in our world and/or universe. For reasons too complicated to go into here, this attitude prevails even with some mathematicians who seek to penetrate to the core of our reality as they understand it.
quotes.translation: 5. 如今，许多世界顶尖的物理学科科学家已公开声明，他们相信意识在我们的世界和/或宇宙中扮演着首要角色。由于原因过于复杂，此处无法详述，这种态度甚至盛行于一些试图深入理解我们所认知的现实核心的数学家之中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: (10:10. Deliberately but intently:) Other quite-as-valid messages were ignored. They became, while present, biologically invisible. The cells still reacted to these otherwise neglected pulses, as they needed data from both the past and future to maintain the body's balance in "the present." The necessity for immediate conscious exterior action at a "definite" point of intersection with events was left to the emerging ego consciousness.
quotes.translation: （10点10分。刻意而专注地：）其他同样有效的讯息被忽略了。它们虽然存在，却在生物学上变得不可见。细胞仍对这些被忽视的脉冲做出反应，因为它们需要来自过去和未来的数据来维持身体在“当下”的平衡。在“明确”的事件交汇点上立即进行有意识的外部行动之必要性，则留给了正在浮现的自我意识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Despite this, I'm aware of the fact that I was necessary to the production of Seth's book. He needs my ability with words; even, I think, my turn of mind. Certainly my writing training aids in the translation of his material and helps give it form, no matter how unconsciously this is done. Certain personality characteristics are important too, I imagine -- the agility with which I can switch the focus of my consciousness, for example.
quotes.translation: 尽管如此，我意识到自己对赛斯书的产生是必要的。他需要我的语言能力；甚至，我认为，还需要我的思维方式。当然，我的写作训练有助于翻译他的资料，并帮助赋予其形式，无论这是多么无意识地完成的。我想，某些人格特质也很重要——比如我能够灵活切换意识焦点的能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "Man is therefore set against his nature in his own mind, and he thinks he must control it. The fact is that man's consciousness can indeed become aware of -- aware of -- those spontaneous processes. But he himself has largely closed the door of comprehension, so that he only identifies with what he thinks of as his rational mind, and tries to forget as best he can those spontaneous processes upon which the mind rides so triumphantly.
quotes.translation: 因此，人类在自己的心智中与自己的本性对立，并认为必须控制它。事实上，人类的意识确实能够觉察到——觉察到——那些自发的过程。但他自己却很大程度上关闭了理解之门，以至于他只认同自己视为理性心智的部分，并尽可能试图遗忘那些心智如此得意洋洋地驾驭其上的自发过程。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: In those terms, neutral data are not transferred through the chromosomes. Consciousness passes on information through "living" vehicles. Whether physically materialized or not, knowledge is possessed by consciousness. It is always "individualized" (pause), though not necessarily in your terms.8
quotes.translation: 按那些术语来说，中性数据并不通过染色体传递。意识通过"活的"载体传递信息。无论是否以物质形态显现，知识都为意识所拥有。它总是"个体化的"（停顿），尽管不一定按你的说法。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: It may be significant that such distractions did not bother him until he read that they were supposed to. There is a reason also in that a deeper state of consciousness is sometimes needed when the upper level of his subconscious is concerned, as it still is since he gave notice at the gallery.
quotes.translation: 值得注意的是，直到他读到那些干扰本应存在时，它们才开始困扰他。这其中也有原因：当他潜意识的上层部分仍如他在画廊辞职时那样活跃时，有时需要更深层的意识状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now, this is not to be a technical book, so this is not the time nor place to discuss thoroughly the action, behavior or effects of these coordinate points; nor of the electromagnetic energy units -- those natural emanations of consciousness of which I spoke. I want it known, however, that thoughts and emotions are formed into physical matter by very definite methods and through laws quite valid, though they may be presently unknown.
quotes.translation: 现在，这并非一本技术性书籍，因此现在不是也不适合详细讨论这些坐标点的行动、行为或效应；也不适合讨论我提过的电磁能量单元——那些意识自然散发之物。然而，我希望大家明白，思想和情感是通过非常明确的方法和相当有效的法则被塑造成物质实相的，尽管这些法则目前可能尚不为人知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The Speakers help you in the formation of dreams which are indeed multidimensional artistic productions of a kind -- dreams existing in more than one reality, with effects that dissect various stages of consciousness that are real, in your terms, to both the living and the dead and in which both the living and the dead may participate. It is for this reason that inspirations and revelations are so often a part of the dream condition.
quotes.translation: 传讯者协助你形成梦境，这些梦境确实是一种多维度的艺术创作——存在于不止一个实相中的梦境，其效应剖析了各种真实的意识阶段，用你们的说法，这些阶段对生者和死者都真实存在，且生者与死者皆可参与其中。正因如此，灵感与启示常常成为梦境状态的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: When this occurs you will be able to use your normal abilities in addition to other abilities used while in the dream state itself. You will be certain of your identity. You will realize that your physical self is sleeping, or in a dream state, and that the inner self is fully awake. Now this represents a definite increase in the scope of consciousness, and a considerable expansion over the usual limitations set by you upon the self.
quotes.translation: 当这种情况发生时，你将能在梦境状态中使用正常能力，同时运用其他能力。你会确知自己的身份，意识到物质身体正在睡眠或处于梦境状态，而内在自我则完全清醒。这代表着意识范畴的明确扩展，以及对你所设定的自我常规限制的显著超越。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: I am barely beginning to hint here of the psychological structures and capacities. In some way the inner self becomes the conscious egotistical self in your terms. (Pause.) Consciousness handles more and more activity. (Pause.) Feeling then is allowed to directly (Long pause; hesitant) activate. (Pause.) We are not getting this concept through as clearly. (Pause.) Thought instantly becomes as real as your physical universe is to you.
quotes.translation: 我此刻仅能略微暗示这些心理结构与能力。从你们的角度而言，内在自我在某种程度上成为了有意识的自我本位自我。（停顿）意识处理着越来越多的活动。（停顿）随后情感被允许直接（长停顿；犹豫地）激活。（停顿）这个概念的传递还不够清晰。（停顿）思想瞬间变得如同物质宇宙对你而言那般真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: It's not unusual that students should dream of Seth, of course, or that they should dream of me. But certainly Seth has achieved independent status in their eyes and has become a vehicle of instruction even in the dream state. In other words, besides producing the continuing Seth material and this book, Seth has entered the minds and consciousness of many people.
quotes.translation: 学生们梦见赛斯或梦见我本人并不罕见。但赛斯确实在他们眼中获得了独立地位，甚至在梦境状态中也成为了教导的载体。换言之，除了持续产出赛斯资料与本书之外，赛斯已进入了众多人的心智与意识之中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: To some extent I also travel through such environments. Consciousness must show itself, however. It cannot unbe. It is not physical, it must therefore show its activation in other ways. In some systems for example, it forms highly integrated mathematical and musical patterns that are themselves stimuli for other universal systems. I am not very well acquainted with these, however, and cannot speak of them with any great familiarity.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，我也穿越过这类环境。然而，意识必须显现自身。它无法“不存在”。它并非物质性的，因此必须以其他方式展现其活化。在某些系统中，它会形成高度整合的数学与音乐模式，这些模式本身又成为其他宇宙系统的刺激源。不过我对这些并不十分熟悉，无法以任何程度的熟稔来谈论它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now, so do the cells in your own body have self-consciousness and individuality to some extent, and so on a different scale entirely do they make decisions. Their decisions affect you, though they have but vague awareness that you exist as a whole at all. Their decisions indirectly affect your manipulations of camouflage, and of course directly influence your whole state of being. The cells are developed to the fullest at this time.
quotes.translation: 现在，你们体内的细胞也在某种程度上拥有自我意识与个体性，并且以完全不同的尺度做出决定。它们的决定会影响你们，尽管它们对你们作为整体存在仅有模糊的认知。这些决定间接影响你们对伪装的操作，当然也直接影响你们整个存在状态。此刻细胞已发展到最充分的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The amount of focus and the intensity varies according to the individual, but consciousness is never entirely focused within physical reality. Now when conscious projections occur you are taking advantage of these intervals between materializations. You may call these non intervals, actually.
quotes.translation: 专注的程度与强度因人而异，但意识从未完全聚焦于物质实相。当有意识的投射发生时，你正在利用这些物质化之间的间隙。实际上，你可以称这些间隙为"非间隙"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The concepts of God that you have, have gone hand-in-hand with the development of your consciousness. The ego, emerging, needed to feel its dominance and control, and so it imagined a dominant god apart from nature. Often nations acted as group egos -- each with its own god-picturing, its own concepts of power. Whenever a tribe or a group or a nation decided to embark upon a war, it always used the concept of its god to lead it on.
quotes.translation: 你们所拥有的神的概念，与你们意识的发展是相辅相成的。自我在浮现时，需要感受到它的支配与控制，因此它想象出一个与自然分离的支配之神。国家常常扮演着群体自我的角色——每个国家都有自己描绘的神祇，自己的权力概念。每当一个部落、群体或国家决定发动战争时，它总是利用其神的概念来引领自己。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: There are earthquakes that erupt physically, and tracings are made of them. There are also inner earthquakes of consciousness from which the physical ones emerge -- storms of mind or being, eruptions in which one segment of the world consciousness, repressed in one area, explodes in another.
quotes.translation: 有在地壳中爆发的物理性地震，人们会记录其轨迹。也有从内在爆发的意识地震——心灵或存有的风暴，世界意识中被压抑在某处的某个部分，会在另一处爆发。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (10:39.) Some cases of strong neurotic behavior result from your present sleeping habits. Sleepwalking to some degree is also connected here. Consciousness wants to return to the body, but it has been hypnotized into the idea that the body must not awaken. Excess nervous energy takes over, and rouses the muscles to activity, because the body knows it has been inactive for too long and otherwise severe muscular cramps would result.
quotes.translation: (10:39.) 某些强烈的神经质行为源于你们目前的睡眠习惯。梦游在某种程度上也与此相关。意识想要回归身体，但它被催眠而相信身体不能醒来。过剩的神经能量接管了身体，唤醒肌肉活动，因为身体知道自己已经静止太久，否则会导致严重的肌肉痉挛。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Either state, however, puts off the time of choosing and the next existence. There is one point I would like to mention here: In all cases, the individual creates his experience. I say this again at the risk of repeating myself because this is a basic fact of all consciousness and existence. There are no special "places" or situations or conditions set apart after physical death in which any given personality must have experience.
quotes.translation: 然而，这两种状态都会推迟选择的时间与下一次存在。这里我想提一点：在所有情况下，个体创造自己的经验。我冒着重复的风险再次强调这一点，因为这是所有意识与存在的基本事实。在物质死亡之后，并没有任何特殊的"地方"、情境或条件被预先设定，让某个特定人格必须去经历。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In this model, changes of form are the result of creative syntheses. This model is seen to have its origin (long pause, eyes closed) within a vast, infinite, divine subjectivity--a subjectivity that is within each unit of consciousness, whatever its degree. A subjective divinity, then, that is within creation itself, a multidimensional creativity of such proportions that it is itself the creator and its creations at the same time.
quotes.translation: 在此模型中，形态的变化是创造性综合的结果。此模型被认为起源于（长停顿，闭眼）一个浩瀚、无限、神圣的主体性——这种主体性存在于每个意识单位之中，无论其程度如何。因此，一个内在于创造本身的神圣主体性，一种多维度的创造力，其规模之大，以至于它同时是创造者及其创造物。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Your tree lives through its inner senses, experiencing many sensations and reacting to many stimuli of which you are unaware. Minute earth tremors, even the motion of small ants about its lower trunk, are recognized and experienced by tree consciousness. Such invisibilities as humidity, radioactivity and all electrical earthly values, are felt as quite real things by your tree and recognized as being separate from the tree itself.
quotes.translation: 你的树木通过内在感官生活，体验许多你未曾察觉的感觉，并对众多刺激做出反应。微小的地震颤动，甚至小蚂蚁在其树干下部爬行的动作，都被树木意识所识别和体验。诸如湿度、放射性以及所有地球电气值等无形之物，被你的树木视为真实的事物，并被认知为与树木本身分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Consciousness predates physical forms. Consciousness predates the physical universe. (Long pause.) Consciousness predates all of its manifestations.
quotes.translation: 意识先于物质形态。意识先于物质宇宙。（长停顿。）意识先于其所有显化。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: This would not lead to a blurring of consciousness or focus. Instead the greater flexibility would result in a perfection of conscious focus. The seeming great division between the waking and the sleeping self is largely a result of the division in function, the two being largely separated -- a block of time being allotted to the one, and a larger block of time to the other. They are kept apart, then, because of your use of time.
quotes.translation: 这不会导致意识或焦点的模糊。相反，更大的灵活性反而会带来意识焦点的完美化。醒时自我与睡时自我之间看似巨大的分野，很大程度上是功能分工的结果——两者被大致分离，一段时间分配给前者，更长的时间分配给后者。因此，它们之所以被分隔开来，是因为你们对时间的运用方式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Back here, we have a question from the gallery. (Smiling.) You must realize that you do not form events alone. You are involved in a cooperative venture. Usually then you alone are not responsible for an event, because others participate in its creation -- for their own reasons. The question cannot be answered simply in one evening, but each consciousness has its own defense system and its own vitality; you should trust your own.
quotes.translation: 回到这里，我们收到观众席的一个问题。（微笑。）你们必须明白，你们并非独自形成事件。你们参与的是一个合作性的冒险。通常来说，你们个人并不单独为某个事件负责，因为其他人也出于自身的原因参与了它的创造。这个问题无法在一晚之内简单回答，但每个意识都有其自身的防御系统和生命力；你们应当信任自己的意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (10:35.) Give us a moment ... The true scientist understands that he must probe the interior and not the exterior universe; he will comprehend that he cannot isolate himself from a reality of which he is necessarily a part, and that to do so presents at best a distorted picture. In quite true terms, your dreams and the trees outside of your windows have a common denominator: they both spring from the withinness of consciousness.5
quotes.translation: （10:35分。）请稍等片刻……真正的科学家明白，他必须探索内在宇宙而非外在宇宙；他会领悟到，他无法将自己与必然参与其中的实相分离开来，而强行分离最多只能呈现扭曲的画面。用相当真实的话来说，你们的梦境与窗外的树木有着共同的分母：它们都源自意识的内在性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: How dead is sleeping consciousness, and where do you travel when you sleep? How many miles do you cover in a day? How many miles do you cover in a dream? How many things do you learn in a dream? You learn more things in a dream than you learn in this classroom. You learn your identity in a dream state. You have experiences even while you dream that are more real and more valid than any that you have while your eyes are wide open.
quotes.translation: 睡眠中的意识究竟有多"死寂"？当你沉睡时，你又游历何方？一日之间你跨越了多少里程？一场梦境中你穿越了多少距离？你在梦境中学到的东西，远比在这间教室里学到的更多。你在梦境状态中认知自己的身份。即便在梦中，你所经历的体验也比睁着双眼时更为真实、更具价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: (9:54.) You change what needs to be changed in whatever way occurs to you, then -- by directing the body's energy in that direction, by entering the flesh and bringing certain portions together that need this adjustment, by manipulating areas of the spine. Then from this adjacent platform of A-l consciousness, you perceive the mental thought patterns of yourself or the other person in whatever way you find characteristic of you.
quotes.translation: （9:54）你以任何想到的方式改变需要改变的事物——通过将身体能量导向那个方向，通过进入肉身并聚合需要调整的特定部位，通过操控脊柱区域。然后从这个毗邻的A-1意识平台，你以自己特有的方式感知自身或他人的心智思维模式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now, this constant creation of the physical universe is not maintained through some localized subconscious that exists somewhere between two ears, behind the forehead. The individual subconscious, as I have explained, is the result of a psychic pooling of resources and abilities. It is a gestalt, maintained and formed by the cooperating, generalized consciousness of each atom and molecule of which the physical body is composed.
quotes.translation: 须知，物质宇宙的持续创造并非通过存在于两耳之间、前额之后的某个局部潜意识来维持。如我所解释的，个体潜意识是心灵资源与能力汇聚的结果。它是一个完形，由组成物质身体的每个原子和分子所合作、共通的广义意识维持并形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: An awareness of the existence of the supraselfis in itself of great benefit. The author of Ruburt's new book calls this God, and I am simply telling you what it is. The supraselfis indeed a portion of a higher gestalt, which is part of yet another higher consciousness-gestalt. This is true. But this supraselfis you in a highly personal way, and it is superior in many aspects. It controls and organizes larger portions of action.
quotes.translation: 对超我存在的觉知本身就有极大益处。鲁柏新书的作者称之为神，而我只是在告诉你它究竟是什么。超我确实是更高完形的一部分，而该完形又是另一个更高意识完形的一部分。事实确实如此。但这个超我以高度个人化的方式呈现为你自身，并且在许多方面更为优越。它控制并组织着更大范围的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: We will maintain some sort of sensible consecutive nature here in the material, though the separation is of course arbitrary. Give us a moment. (Pause.) We will also be developing the God concept in terms of my choosing (amused), the pyramid consciousness gestalts of which I have spoken in the past. This will be given along with and as a part of the basic characteristics of reality, as divorced from camouflage materializations.
quotes.translation: 我们将在材料中保持某种合理的连贯性，尽管这种划分当然是人为的。请稍等片刻。（停顿。）我们还将以我选择的方式（带着笑意）发展神的概念，即我过去曾提及的金字塔意识完形。这些内容将作为实相基本特性的一部分来阐述，与伪装物质化相分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: These are implied, however, in the nature of your own consciousness, which could not exist otherwise as you know it. As language gains and attains its meaning not only by what is included in it, but also by what is excluded, so your consciousness attains its stability also by exclusions.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些特性都隐含在你自身意识的本质中——若非如此，你所知的意识便无法存在。正如语言不仅通过其包含的内容获得意义，也通过其排除的内容获得意义，你的意识同样通过排除而获得稳定性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: There would indeed be a mass transference of consciousness, but not necessarily at all to one particular reality. The individual consciousness involved would not for example necessarily choose to start anew, in the same kind of reality, agreeing to form more or less identical conditions.
quotes.translation: 确实会有大规模的意识转移，但未必完全转向某个特定的实相。例如，涉及到的个体意识不一定选择在同类实相中重新开始，同意形成大致相同的条件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The cells do not have free will in your terms. They have the innate capacity to form other organizations, but not while affiliated with you. To leave you they must change their form. To some extent you determine their "good health" within the framework of their nature. They also help maintain yours. (Pause.) In terms of consciousness, the entity or greater you knows as much more than you know, as you know more than your cells.
quotes.translation: 细胞在你们的说法中并不拥有自由意志。它们天生具备形成其他组织的能力，但在与你关联期间无法做到。要离开你，它们必须改变形态。在它们本性的框架内，你在某种程度上决定了它们的"健康状态"，它们也协助维持你的健康。（停顿）就意识而言，本体或更大的你所知的远比你多，正如你所知的远比你体内的细胞多。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: (2.) In some systems of physical existence, a multipersonhood is established, in which three or four "persons" emerge from the same inner self, each one utilizing to the best of its abilities those characteristics of its own. This presupposes a gestalt of awareness, however, in which each knows of the activities of the others, and participates; and you have a different version of mass consciousness. Do you see the correlation?
quotes.translation: （2.）在某些物质存在的系统中，会建立一种多重人格状态，其中三或四个"人格"从同一个内在自体浮现，每个都尽其所能运用自身特质。这预设了一种意识完形，其中每个都知道其他个体的活动并参与其中；于是你们有了大众意识的不同版本。你看出其中的关联了吗？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: There is a subjective feel to such a state that he is beginning to recognize. It is like a strong beam, and he must learn how to use it, and how to change its direction. In this case he must learn to be in command of it. It is like a tool of perception. It turns on brightly and intensely, and has a boring quality. In many ways it is an aggressive tool that the consciousness uses to pierce through time and space as you know it.
quotes.translation: 他开始认识到这种状态具有一种主观感受。它就像一束强光，他必须学会如何运用它，以及如何改变它的方向。在这种情况下，他必须学会掌控它。它就像一种感知工具，明亮而强烈地开启，具有穿透的特性。从许多方面来说，它是一种具有攻击性的工具，意识用它来穿透你们所认知的时间和空间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Consciousness possesses the most unimaginable agility without ever losing any potency. Those units of consciousness, for example, can mix and combine with others to form a million different sequences of memory and desire, of neural achievement and recognition, [of] structure and design.
quotes.translation: 意识拥有最难以想象的灵活性，却从不丧失任何效力。例如，那些意识单位可以与其他单位混合结合，形成记忆与欲望、神经成就与认知、结构与设计的百万种不同序列。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Aggressiveness and passivity are both behind symbols of birth, for both are needed. They are both beneath symbols of death, though this is not understood. Inertia results when aggressiveness and creativity are not in the proper proportions, when consciousness leans too severely in one direction or another, when the flow of symbols is either too quick or too slow for the particular psychological environment in which you dwell.
quotes.translation: 攻击性与被动性皆存于出生象征的背后，因为两者皆为必需。它们亦存于死亡象征之下，尽管这一点尚未被理解。当攻击性与创造力未保持适当比例时，当意识过度倾向某一方向时，当象征之流对你所栖息的特定心理环境而言过快或过慢时，惰性便随之产生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:14.) If it were not for this most basic, initial loving cooperation, that is a given quality in life itself, life would not have continued. Each individual of each species takes that initial zest and joy of life as its own yardstick. Each individual of whatever species, and each consciousness, whatever its degree, automatically seeks to enhance the quality of life itself--not only for itself but for all of reality as well.
quotes.translation: （9:14）若非这最基本、最初始的爱的合作——这是生命本身固有的品质——生命将无法延续。每个物种的每个个体都将这初始的热忱与生命喜悦作为自身的衡量标准。无论何种物种的个体，无论其意识程度如何，都会自动寻求提升生命本身的品质——不仅为了自身，也为了所有实相。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Before you embark upon other journeys of consciousness, understand that your beliefs will follow you and form your experience there as they do here. If you believe in demons you will meet them -- in this life as enemies, and in other realms of consciousness as devils or "evil spirits."
quotes.translation: 在你们踏上其他意识旅程之前，请明白你们的信念将如影随形，并在彼处如在此地般塑造你们的经验。若你们相信恶魔的存在，便会遭遇它们——在此生以仇敌之姿，在意识的其他领域则以魔鬼或"邪灵"之貌显现。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: It is the self that looks outward. It is the self that you call egotistically aware. The inner self became what I refer to as the inner ego. It looks into that inner reality, that psychic dimension of awareness from which both your own consciousness and your body consciousness emerged.
quotes.translation: 它是向外看的自我。它是你称之为自我意识的那个自我。内在自我变成了我所谓的内在自我意识。它向内审视那个内在实相，那个你自身意识与身体意识皆从中涌现的心灵次元。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Many of the old ideas of precivilization come closer to anything near the truth. What you prefer to think of as God is basically and above all, indeed as I have said, an infinite energy gestalt: or pyramid consciousness. It is aware of itself as being, for example, you, Joseph. It is aware of itself as what seems to you as your own future and past selves.
quotes.translation: 文明前的许多古老观念更接近真相。你们偏好视为神的存在，根本上且首要地——正如我所说——是一个无限能量完形：或金字塔意识。它意识到自身即是例如你，约瑟夫。它意识到自身即是那些在你看来属于你未来与过去的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You cannot perceive either the consciousness or comprehension, condensed and latent, in the sperm, and then in the fetus, before the human body's complete construction; nor can you see or perceive the comprehension or the consciousness that is still there, when so-called death occurs.
quotes.translation: 你无法感知精子中凝聚潜伏的意识或理解力，也无法在胎儿完全成形前感知它；当所谓的死亡发生时，你同样看不见或感知不到依然存在的理解力或意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: (10:35.) Perhaps reincarnations are over for a given individual, for example, yet within him is still some sense of yearning for the natural earth with which he has so often been involved. So he may project a fragment of his consciousness in such a way into an animal form. When this is done, the earth is then experienced in the way natural for the form. A man is not an animal, then, nor does he invade, say, the body of one.
quotes.translation: （10:35。）举例来说，也许某个个体的转世已经结束，但他内心仍对经常涉足的自然地球怀有某种渴望。于是他可能将自己的意识碎片投射到动物形态中。当这样做时，地球便以该形态自然的方式被体验。因此，人不是动物，也不会侵入动物的身体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: If you are presently experiencing a life in which you have chosen high emphasis upon physical locomotion, for example, then through vague dream memories of flying you can be inspired toward, say, the invention of airplanes or rockets; but if you actually understand the fact that your own consciousness can indeed travel outside of the body, then the impetus toward physical developments in locomotion is not nearly so intense.
quotes.translation: 如果你目前正经历一个选择高度强调身体移动的人生，那么通过模糊的飞行梦境记忆，你可能会受到启发去发明飞机或火箭；但如果你真正理解自己的意识确实能离开身体旅行，那么对移动方面物理发展的推动力就不会那么强烈了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now, each brush stroke of a painting represents concentrated experience, and compressed perceptions. In a good painting these almost explode when perceived by the lively consciousness of another. The observer is washed over by intensities. Again, experience that has nothing to do with physical time. The same can be said for a successful poem, though here I speak of Ruburt's knowledge of poetry, rather than of any of my own.
quotes.translation: 一幅画作的每一笔触都代表着浓缩的经验与压缩的感知。在一幅佳作中，当另一个活泼的意识感知到这些时，它们几乎会迸发开来。观察者被强烈的感受所淹没。再次强调，这与物理时间无关的经验。一首成功的诗作也是如此，不过在此我指的是鲁柏对诗歌的认知，而非我自己的任何见解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You may think of your soul or entity -- though only briefly and for the sake of this analogy -- as some conscious and living, divinely inspired computer who programs its own existences and lifetimes. But this computer is so highly endowed with creativity that each of the various personalities it programs spring into consciousness and song, and in turn create realities that may have been undreamed of by the computer itself.
quotes.translation: 你可以将你的灵魂或存有——尽管只是为了这个类比而短暂地——视为一个有意识、有生命、受神圣启发的计算机，它编程自己的存在与生命历程。但这台计算机被赋予了如此高度的创造力，以至于它所编程的每个不同人格都迸发出意识与歌声，进而创造出连计算机本身都未曾梦想过的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: As a result of more frequent, briefer sleep periods, there would also be higher peaks of conscious focus, and a more steady renewal of both physical and psychic activity. There would not be such a definite division between the various areas or levels of the self. A more economical use of energy would result, and also a more effective use of nutrients. Consciousness as you know it would also become more flexible and mobile.
quotes.translation: 由于更频繁、更短暂的睡眠周期，意识聚焦的高峰也会更高，身体与心灵活动都会得到更稳定的更新。自我的各个领域或层面之间不会有如此明确的划分。能量将得到更经济的利用，营养物质的利用也会更有效。你所知的意识也将变得更加灵活与流动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Ruburt's perception is highly altered this evening, and this is an example of certain kinds of both affirmation and denial. He has always emphasized his own unique creative and intuitive processes. In so doing, he denied many of the concepts believed in by others. He accepted the belief that any consciousness could be in some kind of direct intimate contact with experiences and realities usually not perceived, but ignored.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏今晚的感知高度改变，这是某种肯定与否定的例证。他一向强调自己独特的创造性与直觉过程。如此做时，他否定了许多他人所相信的概念。他接受这样的信念：任何意识都能与通常不被感知、却被忽视的经验与实相，建立某种直接而亲密的接触。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: "Usual memory is as much a sifting process as it is anything else, in which experience's intensity varies -- sometimes 'alive' neurologically and sometimes not -- just to focus our consciousness in one probable action or series. (As I type I add: We forget anything not pertinent to our selected series of probable actions. The psyche knows its own parts. Seth says so in his books, but we ask the psyche the wrong questions.)
quotes.translation: "通常的记忆与其说是别的，不如说是一种筛选过程，其中经验的强度有所变化——有时在神经学上'活跃'，有时不然——只是为了将我们的意识聚焦于某一种可能行动或系列中。（我打字时补充：我们会忘记任何与我们选择的可能行动系列无关的事。心灵知晓自身的各个部分。赛斯在他的书中如此说，但我们却向心灵提出了错误的问题。）"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The knowledge of probabilities4 brings forth present time and reality. Voices speak through the genes and chromosomes that connect the future and the past in a balance that you call the present form. The history of the private psyche and the mass experience of the species, again, resides in each individual. The archaeology of the past and the future alike is alive within the layers of consciousness that compose your being.
quotes.translation: 对可能性的认知催生了当下时间与实相。声音透过基因与染色体传递，在你们称为当下形态的平衡中连接未来与过去。个体心灵的历史与物种的集体经验，再次存于每个个体之内。过去与未来的考古学，皆鲜活地存在于构成你存有的意识层中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: There is also a corresponding, but lesser, self-consciousness that connects your present personalities with the dream world, which is aware of its origin and communicates data from you to it. Again you are no more aware of your dream creations, and no less aware than your entity is of you, but in the last analysis you are aware and connected with your entity through this self-conscious part of you that faces another plane.
quotes.translation: 另有一种相应但较次要的自我意识，将你们当前的人格与梦境世界相连，它知晓自身起源，并将来自你的数据传递至梦境。同样，你对自身梦境创造的觉察程度，既不高于也不低于你的存有对你的觉察，但最终而言，你正是通过面向另一实相层面的自我意识部分，与你的存有相连并保持觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The chair is being fully constructed simultaneously and instantaneously. Now take the blade of grass, and the seed. Energy and the consciousness within continually constructs itself into completely new constructions; because of the various speeds I have spoken of, and because you do not perceive the full reality, you do not notice the simultaneous constructions, and think them continuous, rather than separate and ever new.
quotes.translation: 椅子正在同时且瞬间被完整建构。现在来看草叶与种子。内在的能量与意识持续将自身建构为全新的结构；由于我提及的各种速度差异，且因你们未能感知完整实相，便无法察觉这些同时性的建构，误以为它们是连续的，而非各自独立且永远崭新的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You recall we spoke of primary and secondary physical constructions. These classifications apply regardless of the basic nature of the consciousness that is to be materially formed. An apparition constructed as a result of telepathic data, picked up by the perceiver in message form, will be constructed by him in precisely the same manner that an apparition will be constructed that is a reflection of a survival personality.
quotes.translation: 你记得我们曾讨论过初级与次级物质建构。这些分类适用于任何即将以物质形态成形的意识之基本本质。由感知者以讯息形式接收的通灵数据所构建的幻象，其构建方式与反映存续人格的幻象完全相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You can intuitively become aware to some extent of your own reincarnations, so that you feel a recognizable sense of familiarity. Now there is unity in all. You have been told that there is a point where all dimensions and systems of reality merge. Now the same is true of consciousness. You are a part of a larger self, an entity, and because you are there is a portion of you that has access to the knowledge of your entity.
quotes.translation: 你可以在某种程度上直觉地觉察到自己的转世，从而感受到一种可辨识的熟悉感。须知万法归一。你被告知存在一个所有实相维度与系统交汇的节点。意识亦是如此。你是一个更大自体的组成部分——一个存有，正因如此，你内在有一部分能够触及你存有的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: While you have highly limited concepts about the nature of the self, you cannot begin to conceive of a multidimensional godhood, or a universal reality in which all consciousness is unique, inviolate -- and yet given to the formation of infinite gestalts of organization and meaning.
quotes.translation: 由于你对自我本质的概念极为有限，你根本无法想象一个多维度的神性，或一个所有意识皆独特、不可侵犯——却又被赋予形成无限组织与意义完形的宇宙实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The male-female tendencies at that time became psychically alienated from each other.* The differences were exaggerated. The ancient mother-goddess concept became "unconscious"; the male, purposely forgetting the great natural aggressive thrust of birth, took physical aggression and force as his prerogative -- for this came to represent the quality of ego consciousness in its need to physically manipulate its environment.
quotes.translation: 当时男女倾向在心灵层面彼此疏离，差异被过度夸大。古老的母神概念变得"无意识"；男性刻意遗忘生育那伟大的自然攻击驱力，将肉体攻击与力量视为己有——因为这逐渐代表了自我意识在物理操控环境需求中的特质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: There are organizations of consciousness, however, that leapfrog the species, that produce no arts or sciences per se -- yet these together form the living body of the earth and the physical creatures thereon. Their products are the seas upon which you sail your ships, the skies through which your airplanes fly, the land upon which your cities sprawl, and the very reality that makes your culture, or any culture, possible.
quotes.translation: 然而，有些意识组织跨越物种界限，它们本身不产生艺术或科学——却共同构成了地球及其上所有生物的生命之躯。它们的产物是你航行其上的海洋、飞机翱翔的天空、城市蔓延的大地，以及使你的文化——或任何文化——成为可能的实相本身。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Your dreams affect your cellular reality, even as that reality is also largely responsible for the fact that you dream, in your terms, at all. Dreams are a natural "product" of cellularly tuned consciousness. As fire gives off light, cellularly tuned consciousness gives off dreams.
quotes.translation: 你的梦境影响着你的细胞实相，正如这实相在很大程度上也决定了你（按你们的说法）能够做梦这一事实。梦境是细胞调谐意识的一种自然"产物"。如同火焰发出光芒，细胞调谐的意识也会释放出梦境。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The inner senses are equipped to perceive data that is not physical. They are not deceived by the images that you project in three-dimensional reality. Now, they can perceive physical objects. Your physical senses are extensions of these inner methods of perception, and after death it is upon these that you will rely. They are used in out-of-body experiences. They operate constantly beneath normal waking consciousness...
quotes.translation: 内在感官能够感知非物质的资料。它们不会被你在三维实相中投射的影像所蒙蔽。它们当然也能感知物质对象。你的肉体感官正是这些内在感知方法的延伸，死后你将依赖的正是这些内在感官。它们被用于出体经验中，并持续运作于正常清醒意识之下……
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Each portion of the entity is unique and independent, and through its own beliefs determines what it will accept in terms of influences within its immediate life situation. The great miracle, in fact, is that each consciousness, whatever its degree, is itself and no other, even while in the unending fields of interaction it may be a portion of another -- as a city is part of a state, or an individual is part of a family.
quotes.translation: 存有的每个部分都独特且独立，并通过自身的信念决定在其直接的生命情境中接受哪些影响。事实上，最伟大的奇迹在于：每个意识，无论其程度如何，都是它自己而非其他，即使在永无止境的互动场域中，它可能成为另一意识的一部分——如同城市是州的一部分，或个人是家庭的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: (10:15.) In the dream state, many people have learned to escape from a bad dream by waking up, or altering the focus of consciousness. Ruburt and Joseph do not feel threatened, again, by Star Trek. (Long pause.) The program does not make them feel less safe. When you are in the middle of a frightening physical experience, however, or caught in the throes of a nightmare, then you wish you knew how to "change the station."
quotes.translation: （十点十五分。）在梦境状态中，许多人已学会通过醒来或改变意识焦点来逃离噩梦。鲁柏和约瑟再次感到《星际迷航》并未构成威胁。（长停顿。）这个节目并未让他们感到不安全。然而，当你身陷可怕的肉体经历，或被困在梦魇的剧痛中时，你会希望自己知道如何"切换频道"。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Benefits received by personalities who are in deep trance are not nearly as long-lasting as they are in my method. It is true that in the trance state the subconscious learns. However, the subconscious knowledge eventually must be transferred to the personality-consciousness. In other methods than my own this transference takes place at a later time, usually on a midplane after the death of the personality on your plane.
quotes.translation: 处于深度出神状态的人格所获得的益处，远不如用我的方法所获得的那么持久。的确，在出神状态中，潜意识在学习。然而，潜意识的知识最终必须转移到人格意识。在除了我自己的方法之外的其他方法中，这种转移发生在较晚的时候，通常是在你们层面的人格死亡后的中界面上。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is possible (underlined) that the psychedelic experience for these individuals would involve consciousness expansion directed toward (underlined) usual physical reality, and bring about a more unified personality structure from society's standpoint. Insanity as a term means nothing. All mental life is characterized by divergent perceptions of any given set of Sense data that is recognized as Reality, with a capital R.
quotes.translation: 对这些个体而言，迷幻体验可能（强调）涉及朝向（强调）通常物质实相的意识扩展，并从社会的观点带来更统一的人格结构。疯狂这个词毫无意义。所有心智生活的特征，都是对任何一组被视为实相（大写R）的感官资料所产生的不同感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Dictation. (Quietly:) Your attitudes toward sleep, dreams, or any alterations of consciousness are all colored to some extent then by beliefs concerning good and evil in your Western society. These emerge from the old Puritan work ethic: "The devil finds evil work for idle hands."
quotes.translation: 口授。（轻声地：）你们对睡眠、梦境或任何意识改变的态度，在某种程度上都受到西方社会中关于善恶信念的渲染。这些信念源自古老清教徒的工作伦理："魔鬼为游手好闲者找邪恶之事做。"
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Another thought here is the love of continuing creation, which is continually formed by, through, and because of inquiring consciousness. It, inquiring consciousness, is as you know always individualized, and it is because of this amazing diversity that so many forms are possible.
quotes.translation: 此处另有一项思考：对持续创造的热爱，这种创造由、透过、且因为探究意识而不断形成。如你所知，这探究意识始终是个体化的，正因这惊人的多样性，才可能产生如此众多的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Identity is no longer limited to the outer ego alone. The outer ego is now familiar with the whole self, or the entire identity, and has available to it strength of which it was not previously aware. In periods of exuberance, when you are working well, and your health is extraordinarily good, when you are able to remember and manipulate your dreams, then such periods are signs of the emergence of this new consciousness.
quotes.translation: 身份不再局限于外在自我。外在自我如今已熟悉整体自性或完整身份，并能运用先前未曾觉察的力量。当你处于精力充沛、工作顺遂、健康极佳、能记忆并操控梦境的状态时，这些时期正是这种新意识浮现的征兆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There is nothing, neither knowledge nor beauty nor truth, that exists independently of consciousness or personality. My personality is such that it is not intimate or understandable to you, now, simply because it is a personality based upon different root assumptions than your own, and has its prime existence in dimensions that are composed of personality structures and gestalts based on alien psychological activities.
quotes.translation: 没有任何事物——无论是知识、美或真理——能独立于意识或人格而存在。我的人格之所以此刻对你而言既非亲密亦非可理解，纯粹是因为它基于与你截然不同的根本假设，其首要存在维度是由基于异质心理活动的人格结构与完形所构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Now I do not mean this to be merely a symbolic exercise, for though it may begin with imagination, it is based upon fact, and emanations from your consciousness and the creativity of your soul do indeed reach outward in that manner. The exercise will give you some idea of the true nature, creativity, and vitality of the soul from which you can draw your own energy and of which you are an individual and unique portion.
quotes.translation: 我并非仅将此视为象征性练习——虽然它可能始于想象，但实则基于事实：你意识的辐射与灵魂的创造力确实以这种方式向外延伸。这个练习将使你窥见灵魂的真实本质、创造力与生命力——你从中汲取自身能量，且正是这灵魂独特而不可分割的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: To me, consciousness or All That Is is an omnipresent, really indescribable awareness that to us human beings has no limits, "one" containing not only the attributes of time and space and of all feeling, thought, and objectivity, but numberless other properties, manifestations, and probabilities that lie outside our very limited interior and exterior perceptions. In terms of physics, then, reality is still unknowable.
quotes.translation: 对我而言，意识或一切万有是一种无所不在、真正难以形容的觉知，对人类来说它没有界限，"一"不仅包含时间、空间以及所有感受、思想和客观性的属性，还包含无数其他特性、显化与可能性，这些皆超越我们极为有限的内外感知。就物理学而言，实相仍是不可知的。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Now: This is highly simplified, but the subjective experience of any consciousness is automatically expressed as electromagnetic energy units. These exist "beneath" the range of physical matter. They are, if you prefer, incipient particles that have not yet emerged into matter.
quotes.translation: 现在：这已极度简化，但任何意识的主观经验会自动表达为电磁能量单位。这些单位存在于物质范围"之下"。若你偏好，可称其为尚未显现为物质的初始粒子。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now: Man has a far greater leeway. He forms his reality according to his conscious beliefs, even while its basis lies in the deep unconscious nature of the earth in corporeal terms. Man's "I am," [seemingly] apart from nature -- a characteristic necessary for the development of his kind of consciousness -- led him into value judgments, and also necessitated some break with the deep inner certainties of other species.
quotes.translation: 现在：人类拥有远更宽广的余地。他根据自己有意识的信念形成自己的实相，即便其基础在肉体层面植根于地球深层的无意识本质。人类那看似独立于自然的"我是"——这种特质对其意识类型的发展不可或缺——引导他进入价值判断，也必然导致与其他物种深层内在确定性的某种断裂。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: (9:58.) Your reality exists in a particular area of activity in which aggressive qualities, thrusting-outward characteristics, are supremely necessary to prevent a falling back into the infinite possibilities from which you have only lately emerged. Yet from this unconscious bed of possibilities you derive your strength, your creativity, and the fragile yet powerful kind of individual consciousness that is your own.
quotes.translation: （晚上9:58。）你们的实相存在于一个特定的活动领域，在此领域中，攻击性特质与向外推进的特性至关重要，以防止坠入你们刚刚脱离的无限可能性之中。然而，正是从这无意识的可能性之床中，你们汲取了力量、创造力，以及那脆弱却强大的个体意识——那正是你们自己的意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: ane finds her "massive feelings," as she calls them, not only instructive psychically, but exhilarating indeed when they encompass revelatory or transcendent states of consciousness. One day in April, 1973, she had a fine series of encounters with massiveness, many of them embodying those extra qualities; see her own account of the whole adventure in the notes for the 653rd session in Chapter 13 of Personal Reality.
quotes.translation: 珍发现她所谓的"庞大感受"不仅在心灵层面具有启发性，当这些感受涵盖启示性或超越性的意识状态时，更是令人振奋。1973年4月的一天，她经历了一系列精彩的庞大感受接触，其中许多体现了那些额外的特质；请参阅她在《个人实相》第十三章第653节笔记中对此完整冒险的记述。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: (10:24.) Consciousness connected with the flesh, then, has great leeway spiritually and biologically, and can focus itself in many ways with and through the flesh, beside your own particular orientation. There have been highly sophisticated, developed civilizations that would not be apparent to you because the main orientation was mental or psychic, while the physical race itself would seem to be highly undeveloped.
quotes.translation: （10点24分）与肉体相连的意识，在灵性与生物学上拥有极大自由度，能通过肉体以多种方式聚焦自身，远不止你们特定的取向。曾有高度精妙发达的文明，对你们而言却不可见，因其主要取向是心智或心灵层面，而物质种族本身看似极不发达。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The book will begin when I first tried to contact you, although, there will be back flashes into my own previous experience in your time. It will also include in the opening chapter several occasions when I tried to reach Ruburt in the dream state, and the ways in which I was able to insert several ideas into his dreaming consciousness, and the ways in which the conscious mind utilized and distorted the information.
quotes.translation: 本书将从我第一次尝试接触你时开始叙述，尽管其中会闪回我在你们时间中的前世经历。开篇章节还将包含数次我在梦境状态试图接触鲁柏的经过，以及我将若干理念植入其梦境意识的方式，还有显意识如何运用并扭曲这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: I am myself using simple terms here to try and make these ideas clearer. In a trance state, Ruburt can contact me. In a state in some ways similar to a trance, I can contact Seth Two. We are related in ways quite difficult to explain, united in webs of consciousness. My reality includes, then, not only reincarnational identities but also other gestalts of being that do not necessarily have any physical connections.
quotes.translation: 我在此使用简单术语试图阐明这些概念。在出神状态下，鲁柏能接触到我。在某种类似出神的状态中，我能接触到赛斯第二。我们以极难解释的方式相互关联，交织于意识之网中。我的实相不仅包含转世身份，还包含其他未必与物质相连的存在完形。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There must be, however, a willingness to admit that there are other dimensions in which you exist. You must also have faith in your physical self -- faith that it will be here when you get back, and I assure you that it will. There is no other way -- and I repeat this -- there is no other way of getting firsthand information about other realities except by the exploration and manipulation of your own consciousness.
quotes.translation: 然而，你必须愿意承认自己存在于其他维度。你也必须对物质自我怀有信心——相信当你返回时它仍在此处，我向你保证它会的。别无他法——我重申——除了探索和运用自己的意识，没有其他途径能获得关于其他实相的第一手资讯。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The basic psychological structures available have definite solidity, depth, mass, et cetera, in the psychological perspective, and they may be formed into numberless gestalt patterns, which are then constructed physically. The variations of construction are endless. There is nothing to force an individual for example to form psychological gestalts of hate and fear from the basic structure of consciousness survival.
quotes.translation: 可用的基本心理结构在心理层面上确实具有明确的坚实性、深度、质量等属性，它们可被组合成无数完形模式，随后在物质层面被构建。这些构建的变化无穷无尽。例如，没有任何力量会迫使个体从意识存续的基本结构中形成仇恨与恐惧的心理完形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I am telling you that you are not a cosmic bag of bones and flesh, thrown together through some mixture of chemicals and elements. I am telling you that your consciousness is not some fiery product, formed merely accidentally through the interworkings of chemical components.
quotes.translation: 我要告诉你，你不是一袋偶然通过化学元素混合而成的宇宙骨肉。我要告诉你，你的意识并非某些化学成分相互作用时意外产生的炽热产物。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (10:11.) The final and more specific interpretation is done in areas of dreaming closer to the waking self, when the symbols grow more and more specific. There is a much more narrow aspect to symbolism, therefore: The closer you get to waking consciousness, the more limited and narrow the symbol. The handier it is in a given physical circumstance, the less valuable it is as a waking lifetime characteristic symbol.
quotes.translation: （10:11。）最终且更具体的诠释是在更接近清醒自我的梦境区域中完成的，此时象征符号变得越来越具体。因此象征主义存在一个更狭窄的面向：越接近清醒意识，象征就越受限、越狭隘。它在特定物质情境中越实用，作为清醒人生特征性象征的价值就越低。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (1.) It is quite possible, for example, for several selves to occupy a body, and were this the norm it would be easily accepted. That implies another kind of multipersonhood, however, one actually allowing for the fulfillment of many abilities of various natures usually left unexpressed. It also implies a freedom and organization of consciousness that is unusual in your system of reality, and was not chosen there.
quotes.translation: 例如，多个自我完全有可能共用一个身体，若此为常态，便极易被接受。但这暗示着另一种多重人格，一种实际上允许各种性质的能力得以实现——这些能力通常未被表达。这也暗示着一种在你们的实相系统中不寻常的意识自由与组织方式，而这种方式并未被选择。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Your cats are as alive in all ways inside of the house as out. They understand their relationship with your human reality. They enjoy contributing in your life as much as any wild animal enjoys being a part of its group. Their consciousnesses lean in a new direction, feel about the edges of concepts, sense openings of awareness of a different kind, and form alliances of consciousness quite as natural as any other.
quotes.translation: 你们的猫在屋内与屋外同样充满活力。它们理解与你们人类实相的关系。它们享受参与你们的生活，就像任何野生动物享受成为群体的一部分一样。它们的意识朝向新方向倾斜，摸索概念边缘，感知不同种类的觉知开口，并形成与其他任何意识联盟同样自然的联盟。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Adequate scientific proofs, such as science so surely needs, requires the enlargement of consciousness; not, my dear doctor, on my part, but on the part of science. There are some things that I can indeed do, and I will do what I can. Nevertheless the fact remains that I am indeed extending myself, and my dear doctor it is science which is not extending itself, and it is science that will not meet reality halfway.
quotes.translation: 科学如此确信所需的充分科学证据，要求意识的扩展；我亲爱的医生，不是从我这边，而是从科学那一边。有些事我确实能做到，我也会尽力而为。然而事实依然是，我确实在扩展自己，而我亲爱的医生，是科学没有扩展自己，是科学不愿与实相各走一半路。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Man forgot the teaching and healing elements, and concentrated instead upon the unpleasant experience itself. To some extent this was quite natural, for the new species developed in order to change the nature of its consciousness, to follow a reality in which instinct was no longer "blindly" followed, and to individualize in strong personal focus corporeal experience that had previously taken a different pattern.
quotes.translation: 人类遗忘了教导与疗愈的元素，反而专注于不愉快的经验本身。这在某种程度上相当自然，因为新物种的发展是为了改变其意识的本质，追随一种不再"盲目"遵循本能的实相，并将先前以不同模式进行的物质经验，以强烈的个人焦点加以个体化。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: When you think of reincarnation, you suppose a series of progressions. Instead the various lives grow out of what your inner self is. They are not thrust upon you by some outside agency. They are a material development, as your consciousness opens up and expresses itself in as many ways as possible. It is not restricted to one three-dimensional lifetime, nor is it restricted to three-dimensional existence alone.
quotes.translation: 当你想到轮回时，你假设了一系列的进展。相反，各种人生是从你内在自性所是的状态中生长出来的。它们并非由某种外在力量强加于你。它们是物质性的发展，随着你的意识开启并以尽可能多的方式表达自己。它不受限于一次三维度的人生，也不受限于三维度的存在本身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Consciousness's experiences following such therapy may be those of elation, but it feels that any of its adventures rest on issues that it cannot understand, and its capacity to deal with physical reality is less secure than before. This is not the case with natural inner treatments that are carried on in individual behavior. These are the ones that should be understood and encouraged, say, by the psychologists.
quotes.translation: 意识在经历此类疗法后的体验可能是兴高采烈的，但它觉得自己的任何冒险都建立在它无法理解的问题上，而它处理物质实相的能力也比以前更不稳定。在个体行为中进行的自然内在治疗则并非如此。这些才是应该被理解与鼓励的，比如说，由心理学家们来理解与鼓励。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Telepathic communications go on continually beneath consciousness, and without the aid of telepathy and without the aid of the inner senses, language itself would be meaningless. The hidden cues are the symbols that make language intelligible. I have said before that the inner senses experience reality as it exists beneath camouflage pattern, though of course camouflage pattern is in itself part of this reality.
quotes.translation: 心电感应沟通在意识之下持续进行，没有心电感应的帮助，没有内在感官的帮助，语言本身将毫无意义。隐藏的线索是使语言可理解的符号。我以前说过，内在感官体验实相，就像它存在于伪装模式之下一样，当然伪装模式本身也是这实相的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: You are in the process of evolving another form of consciousness, that is individually. This will be new to you to some large extent. In the past any such experiences have been accidental on your parts. I have been involved in some instances with Ruburt on such occasions.
quotes.translation: 你正在演化另一种形式的意识，即个体化的意识。这在很大程度上对你而言将是全新的。过去，你们身上任何这类经验都只是偶然发生。在某些情况下，我曾与鲁柏共同参与过这类时刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Before this the generalized dimension was simply nonexistent, a vacuum, which consciousness had not yet filled. Since consciousness or action can never fully materialize itself, there are literally infinities of such nonexistent areas from which new dimensions can spring.
quotes.translation: 在此之前，这个广义维度根本不存在，是一片意识尚未填充的真空。由于意识或行动永远无法完全具现自身，因此确实存在无数这样的未存在区域，新的维度可以从其中涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: I have referred to them at various times as animal medicine men, for man did learn from them. The impact of many of my statements of the past goes unrecognized, or perhaps the words sound pat, but there are other conditions of life that you do not perceive, sometimes because your time sequences are too different. Before the smallest cell appeared, in your terms, there was the consciousness that formed the cell.
quotes.translation: 我曾多次称它们为动物药师，因为人类确实向它们学习。我过去许多陈述的影响力未被察觉，或许听起来过于轻巧，但你们尚未感知到其他生命状态，有时是因为你们的时间序列差异太大。在你们看来，最小的细胞出现之前，早已存在形成该细胞的意识。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: It means that the word is nothing, and that it is merely a symbol for that which you can neither see nor feel nor touch. It is merely a symbol for that small particle of yourselves which you permit your consciousness to perceive. It is a symbol to express that portion of an unseeable self, that is brought most obviously into operation for purposes of manipulation of the physical image within a camouflage field.
quotes.translation: 这意味着文字本身毫无意义，它只是你们无法看见、感受或触摸之物的象征。它只是你们允许意识感知的那一小部分自我的象征。这个象征用以表达那不可见自我中，为在幻相场域内操控物质形象而最明显运作的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now. (Pause.) Information does not exist as I have told you independently of consciousness. There is not therefore any particular event, say an automobile accident, that exists independently of the consciousness of those involved in it, for a given perceiver to perceive.
quotes.translation: 现在。（停顿）如我先前所说，信息并非独立于意识而存在。因此没有任何特定事件——比如一场车祸——能独立于涉事者的意识而存在，供某个特定观察者去感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The very practice of pinpointing the time of physical birth at conception itself errs. There is no point at which you can say in basic terms (underlined twice) that an individual is alive,2 though you do find it more practical to accept certain points of life and death. It is true that you emerge into space and time at a certain point in your perception. Your consciousness has been itself long before, however.
quotes.translation: 将受孕时刻定为肉体诞生时间的做法本身就是错误的。从根本层面而言，你无法明确指出某个个体"活着"的确切节点——尽管你确实发现接受某些生死节点更为实际。诚然，你是在感知中的特定时刻进入时空的，但你的意识在此之前早已存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Let him rest. he has become aware of distances in his own consciousness, in a fashion difficult to describe. Neurologically he became familiar to some extent with the stuff beneath language, the inner rhythms unexpressed, and felt the odd connections that exist between words and your sense of time. This confused him, for this was material directly felt but verbally inexpressible. He will readjust "in no time."
quotes.translation: 让他休息吧。他以一种难以描述的方式，觉察到了自身意识中的距离。在神经学层面，他某种程度上熟悉了语言之下的基质、未被表达的内在韵律，并感受到词语与时间感之间存在的奇特关联。这令他困惑，因为这是直接感受却无法言说的材料。他"转眼间"就会重新调整过来。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The Fox experiments are quite valid, with some changes that you will make, I imagine. At one level of the dreaming state it is possible for you to recognize and align yourself with that portion of yourself that is aware of itself within fourth-dimensional reality. You have both occasionally learned to take our waking consciousness into the dream state, and here Fox is correct, for you must start at this point.
quotes.translation: 福克斯实验相当有效，不过我想你们会做些调整。在梦境状态的某个层面，你有可能认出并校准自己那个在第四维实相中觉察自身的部分。你们两人都曾偶尔学会将清醒意识带入梦境状态，福克斯这点说对了——你必须从此处着手。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Diversity is a necessity even for that which is. To some extent, that which is must always be lost within itself. Lost in a multiplicity of numberless selves. The selves are self directing units, however. As you know there are no limitations to any identity. The limitations are illusions. And yet the extent to which the illusions are shattered represents on your level the sparks of the expanding consciousness.
quotes.translation: 多样性对于“存在本身”而言也是必要的。在某种程度上，“存在本身”必然迷失于自身之中，迷失于无数自我的多样性里。然而，这些自我是自我导向的单位。如你所知，任何身份都没有限制。限制是幻相。但幻相被粉碎的程度，在你们的层面上，代表着意识扩展的火花。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The consciousness of the personality has not left too soon, or unusually soon, as in your father's case, but stubbornly persists. It is as if an artist found the last painting showing up over and over in the next one. In such cases there is a lack of understanding. The inner identity does not understand that it is simply taking a different guise, fulfilling different obligations, or using unfulfilled energies.
quotes.translation: 人格的意识并未过早或异常迅速地离开，就像你们父亲的情况那样，而是固执地持续存在。这好比一位艺术家发现上一幅画作反复出现在下一幅中。在这种情况下，存在一种理解上的缺失。内在身份不明白它只是换了一种不同的伪装，履行不同的义务，或运用未实现的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: He is aware of a different kind of being. He encounters his consciousness first, and then he encounters the world--so I am saying, of course, that each person has an identity that is larger than the framework of consciousness with which you are usually familiar in life.
quotes.translation: 他意识到一种不同的存在。他首先遇见自己的意识，然后才遇见世界——所以我当然是在说，每个人都拥有一个比你们在生命中通常熟悉的意识框架更宏大的身份。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Alternate focus is merely a state in which you turn your consciousness in other than its habitual direction, in order to perceive quite legitimate realities that exist simultaneously with your own. You must alter your perception to perceive any reality that is not geared practically toward material form. This is something like looking out of the corner of your eye or mind, rather than straight ahead. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 交替焦点不过是一种状态，你在此状态中将意识转向其惯常方向之外，从而感知与你自身现实同时存在的、完全合理的实相。你必须改变感知方式，才能觉察任何并非实际导向物质形态的实相。这有点像用眼角或心灵余光观察，而非直视前方。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: At no time, as a rule, is your body not here to you. Your experience seems centered within it, with the rest of the world safely outside. However, the particular selectivity of your kind of consciousness rides over lapses that you do not recognize. In a manner of speaking, your bodies blink off and on like lights. Their reality fluctuates, from your standpoint. For that matter, so does the physical universe.3
quotes.translation: 通常而言，你的身体从未不在你身边。你的体验似乎以身体为中心，外部世界则安全地处于其外。然而，你这类意识的特定选择性会掩盖你未能察觉的间隙。打个比方，你们的身体像灯光般明灭闪烁。从你们的立场来看，它们的实相在波动。就此而言，物质宇宙也是如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Much more is involved, however, for there are "separate" strands,4 if you prefer, of consciousness that are naturally pursued in the dream state, and these can be followed with some training and diligence. They involve probable "series" of events. For example, if one particular dream event is chosen for physical materialization, then in your reality other events will appear in due time, and in serial fashion.
quotes.translation: 然而其中牵涉更多——若你愿意，可以说存在"独立"的意识丝线，这些丝线在梦境状态中自然延伸，通过适当训练与勤勉可以追踪。它们涉及可能的事件"序列"。例如，若某个特定梦境事件被选为物质显化，那么在你们的实相中，其他事件将依时序以系列方式相继显现。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The next chapter will deal with the basic methods of communication that are used by any consciousness, according to its degree, whether or not it is physical. This will lead up to the basic communication used by human personalities as you understand them, and point out these inner communications as existing independently of the physical senses (Pause), which are merely physical extensions of inner perception.
quotes.translation: 下一章将探讨任何意识根据其程度所使用的基本沟通方法，无论其是否具有物质形态。这将引导至你们所理解的人类人格使用的基本沟通方式，并指出这些内在沟通独立于物质感官而存在（停顿），而物质感官不过是内在感知的物质延伸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: (9:48.) Dream dramas are highly complicated, artistic productions. On the one hand they represent other events of the predream state, events beyond your comprehension in their "natural condition." Such events are not lost, however, but translated into dreams as your own consciousness returns closer to its "home base." Each aspect of a dream stands in coded form as a symbol for greater, undecipherable events.
quotes.translation: （9点48分。）梦境戏剧是高度复杂的艺术创作。一方面，它们代表着入梦前的其他事件——那些在"自然状态"下超出你们理解范畴的事件。然而这些事件并未消失，而是随着你们的意识回归更接近其"本家"时，被转译为梦境。梦的每个面向都以编码形式存在，作为更宏大、无法破译事件的象征符号。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: I don't mean at all to put down everything we've created in our world, and to proclaim that Seth's concept of All That Is is the magical solution that mankind has been searching for throughout his existence. I do mean to relate the self-created elements of our interior and exterior, individual and mass worlds to a larger whole of consciousness. It's inevitable that we'll grow. How we'll grow is the question!
quotes.translation: 我绝非意在贬低我们在世间所创造的一切，并宣称赛斯的“一切万有”概念是人类在其存在中一直寻找的神奇解决方案。我确实是想将我们内在与外在、个体与集体世界中那些自我创造的要素，与一个更宏大的意识整体联系起来。我们必然会成长。问题在于我们将如何成长！
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: In dreams consciousness operates to some degree independently of the physical system. In projections this independence is more pronounced. In physical death of course the connection between consciousness and matter is broken. It is broken and yet not entirely severed.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，意识在某种程度上独立于物质系统运作。在出神状态中，这种独立性更为显著。当然，在肉体死亡时，意识与物质之间的联系被切断了。它被切断，却并未完全断绝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now first of all, there are no limitations or divisions to the self, though for purposes of discussion a word like "ego" may be used here because you understand what you think it means. You can indeed depend upon seemingly unconscious portions of yourself. As you will see later, you can become more and more consciously aware, therefore bringing into your consciousness larger and larger portions of yourself.
quotes.translation: 首先，自体并没有任何限制或分割，尽管为了讨论方便，这里可能会使用"自我"这样的词，因为你们自以为理解它的含义。你们确实可以信赖自己看似无意识的部分。正如你们稍后会看到的，你们可以越来越有意识地觉察，从而将自体越来越大的部分带入你们的意识中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The consciousness, with its source in the inner universe, being not bound by time or space, is in a position to expand along the lines that I have mentioned. The physical body in a large degree is not. Do not mistake me. For practical purposes, theory aside, you could not maintain allegiance to your plane, live out a normal life span for example （and this is necessary） while separate from the physical body.
quotes.translation: 意识，其源头在内在本体宇宙，不受时间或空间的束缚，因此能够沿着我所提及的路线扩展。而肉体在很大程度上则不能。请别误解我的意思。就实际目的而言，撇开理论不谈，你们在脱离肉体的情况下，无法维持对你们层面的忠诚，例如活出正常的寿命（而这是必要的）。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is the ability of such a unit of consciousness to utilize or create other forms and dimensions of itself that regulates the dimensions of the mental enclosure and of the effective self. You understand that about this mental or psychic enclosure the other elements of self are constructed, the physical image and its extensions into physical environment. This process, in various fields, continually goes on.
quotes.translation: 正是这种意识单元利用或创造自身其他形式与维度的能力，调控着心灵围场与有效自我的维度。你们应当明白，自我其他要素——包括物质形象及其向物质环境的延伸——都是围绕这个心灵或精神围场构建的。这个过程在不同场域中持续进行着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You will have to give us time ... (Pause, one of many.) When a man's consciousness, for example, blended with that of a tree, those data became "visual" for others to perceive. When a man's consciousness merged with an animal's, that blending became visual data also.
quotes.translation: 你们需要给我们时间……（停顿，多次之一。）举例而言，当一个人的意识与树木的意识相融合时，那些数据就会变成他人可感知的"视觉"信息。当人的意识与动物意识交融时，这种融合同样会转化为视觉数据。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Human personality will reap benefits that now would seem unbelievable. An open-ended consciousness will imply far greater freedom. From birth, children will be taught that basic identity is not dependent upon the body, and that time as you know it is an illusion. The child will be aware of many of its past existences, and will be able to identify with the old man or woman that in your terms it will become.
quotes.translation: 人类人格将收获如今看似不可思议的益处。开放式的意识将意味着远为广阔的自由。从出生起，儿童将被教导：基本身份认同并不依赖肉体，而你们所知的时间实为幻相。孩童将知晓自身许多前世经历，并能与按你们说法它未来将成为的老者或老妪产生认同。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The larger self, then, seeds itself in time. In this process no identity is lost and no identity is the same, yet all are interrelated. So you can theoretically expand your consciousness to include the knowledge of your past lives, though those lives were yours and not yours. They have a common root, as next year's leaves have a common root with the leaves now of this plant (pointing again to the begonia).
quotes.translation: 更大的自己，于是将自己播种于时间之中。在这个过程中，没有身份会丢失，也没有身份完全相同，然而所有身份都相互关联。因此，理论上你可以扩展你的意识，以包含你前世的认知，尽管那些前世既是你的，又不是你的。它们拥有共同的根源，就像这株植物（再次指向秋海棠）明年的叶子与现在的叶子拥有共同的根源一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Nevertheless the dream world, the mind, and the basic inner universe do exist ... in what we will call the value climate of psychological reality. This is the medium. This takes the place of what you call space. It is a quality which makes all existences and consciousness possible. It is one of the most powerful principles behind or within the vitality that itself composes from itself all other phenomena.3
quotes.translation: 然而，梦境世界、心智以及基本的内在宇宙确实存在……存在于我们所谓的心理实相的价值气候中。这就是媒介。它取代了你所谓的空间。它是一种品质，使得一切存在与意识成为可能。它是生命力背后或之内最强大的原则之一，而生命力本身由自身构成所有其他现象。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: "It all gives me this feeling of great hilarity that I often have about these ideas. And the thought of families of consciousness merging for different reasons -- even while I accept that all of this is put in very limited terms -- seems to have such perfect inner logic and delightful playfulness about it that I launch into the mergings notion with all kinds of questions, and impressions exploding outward.
quotes.translation: 这一切都让我对这些观念产生一种极大的欢愉感。即使我明白这一切都是用非常有限的措辞表达的，但想到意识家族因不同原因而融合——这似乎具有如此完美的内在逻辑和令人愉悦的嬉戏性，以至于我带着各种问题投入融合的概念，而印象则向外迸发。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The Christ drama did splash over into historical reality. Man's fears of not achieving brotherhood, of not achieving a secure state of consciousness, or a workable morality, result in his dreams of destruction, however they are expressed. And indeed, the present physical event as it exists now at the energy plant near Harrisburg can easily be likened to -- and is -- a warning dream to change man's actions.
quotes.translation: 基督的戏剧确实溅入了历史现实。人类对未能实现手足情谊、未能达到安全的意识状态或可行的道德的恐惧，导致了他们的毁灭之梦，无论这些梦以何种方式表达。事实上，目前存在于哈里斯堡附近能源厂的物理事件，很容易被比作——而且确实是——一个改变人类行为的警告之梦。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: There are possibilities in all inwardness that seek to establish conditions that will make it possible for them to come into existence. They, the possibilities inherent in inwardness, collect magnetically, so to speak, about other like possibilities, setting up coherent fields of like attractions. In your universe they began with the psychic possibility of a world of physical matter, born in consciousness.
quotes.translation: 所有内在性中都存在着可能性，它们寻求建立条件，使自身得以实现。这些内在性中固有的可能性，可以说，会像磁铁般聚集在其他类似可能性周围，建立起具有相似吸引力的连贯场域。在你们的宇宙中，它们始于一个物质世界的灵性可能性，诞生于意识之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Jung's dark side of the self is the ego, not the unconscious. The complicated, infinitely varied, unbelievably rich tapestry of Jung's, in quotes "unconscious," could hardly be unconscious. It is the product of an inner consciousness with far more sense of identity and purpose than the daily ego. It is the daily ego's ignorance and limited focus that makes it view so-called unconscious activity as chaotic.
quotes.translation: 荣格所谓的"自我的阴暗面"其实是自我，而非无意识。荣格笔下那复杂多变、无限丰富、难以置信的所谓"无意识"织锦，几乎不可能是无意识的。它是内在意识的产物，其身份感与目的感远超日常自我。正是日常自我的无知与狭隘焦点，才使得它视所谓的无意识活动为混沌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: What you have, really, is a manifested and an unmanifested consciousness, but only relatively speaking. You do not perceive the consciousness of objects. It is not manifest to you because your range of activities requires boundaries to frame your picture of reality.
quotes.translation: 实际上，你所拥有的是显意识与未显意识，但这只是相对而言。你并未感知到物体的意识。它对你而言并非显意识，因为你的活动范围需要界限来框定你的实相画面。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: To become familiar with the "unknown" reality you must to some extent grant that it exists, then, and be willing to step aside from your usual behavior. All of the methods given are quite natural, inherent in the body structure, and even biologically anticipated. Your consciousness could not leave your body and return to it again unless there were biological mechanisms that allowed for such a performance.
quotes.translation: 要熟悉"未知"实相，你必须在某种程度上承认它的存在，并愿意暂时脱离惯常行为模式。所有给出的方法都极其自然，是身体结构固有的，甚至在生物学上已被预设。你的意识之所以能离开身体再返回，正是因为存在允许这种运作的生物机制。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: And as far as motion is concerned, the tree moves upward and downward. It is quite unfair to say that it cannot transport itself since it does so to an amazing degree, the roots and limbs moving in all directions. The inner senses of all plant life are well attuned, alert and very important. All these fragments have consciousness to a rather high degree, considering that man holds them in such ill repute.
quotes.translation: 就运动而言，树木向上与向下生长。说它无法自行移动是极不公平的，因为它以惊人的程度移动着——根与枝干向四面八方伸展。所有植物生命的内感官都高度协调、敏锐且至关重要。考虑到人类对这些生命片段如此不屑一顾，它们其实拥有相当高程度的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: You normally organize your experience in terms of time. Your usual stream of consciousness is also highly associative, however. Certain events in the present will remind you of past ones, for example, and sometimes your memory of the past will color present events.
quotes.translation: 你们通常以时间为基础来组织经验。然而，你们平常的意识流也具有高度的联想性。例如，当下的某些事件会提醒你过去的事，有时你对过去的记忆也会为当下的事件染上色彩。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: In your terms, you are in a state of evolution as a species. Part of this experience includes a natural fascination with exterior events. You are developing properties of consciousness that are in their own way uniquely your own, as your environment is. A strong focus is a necessary counterpart, since you are involved in a learning process in which all elements inherent in the situation will be explored.
quotes.translation: 就你们而言，你们正作为一个物种处于进化状态。这种体验的一部分包括对外在事件天生的着迷。你们正在发展意识的各种特性，这些特性以独特的方式属于你们自己，正如你们的环境一样。强烈的专注是必要的对应物，因为你们正参与一个学习过程，其中情境中固有的所有元素都将被探索。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: You must therefore explore the psyche, the living consciousness. It will lead you to the withinness. This is not an impractical, but very practical, endeavor in all areas. Scientifically, such studies would vastly enlarge your concepts so that a loving technology could follow the most beautiful contours of the mind, rising on the natural mountains of human abilities and then more easily into fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们必须探索心灵，即活生生的意识。它将引领你们走向内在性。这不是一个不切实际，而是在所有领域都非常实际的事业。在科学上，这样的研究将极大地扩展你们的概念，使一种充满爱的技术能够追随心灵最美丽的轮廓，升起于人类能力的自然山脉之上，然后更轻松地进入圆满。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: （Speaking of the fact that civilized man should not kill, Seth said the whole idea of killing is fallacious to begin with: an enemy who is "dead" is far more harmful than one who is still alive. Here he was dealing with the basic unity of all consciousness again. Killing is not thought of as an end in itself on other planes, he repeated. But it is wrong to kill on our plane when we do consider it an end.
quotes.translation: （谈到文明人不该杀戮的事实，赛斯说杀戮的整个概念从一开始就是谬误的：一个“已死”的敌人远比一个还活着的敌人更有害。他再次处理了所有意识的基本统一性。他重复道，在其他层面上，杀戮本身并不被视为目的。但在我们的层面上，当我们确实将其视为目的时，杀戮就是错误的。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Man thinks as naturally as the birds fly. He looks at physical reality for the rest of physical reality: He is earth coming alive to view itself through conscious eyes--but that consciousness is graced to be because it is so intimately a part of earth's framework.
quotes.translation: 人类思考如同鸟儿飞翔般自然。他以物质实相的目光审视物质实相：大地通过有意识的双眼苏醒过来观看自身——而这份意识之所以被赋予恩宠，正因它与大地的架构如此亲密地融为一体。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Any of these changing characteristics of symbols should alert you to the altered state of your consciousness. If you let yourself drift off into sleep here, you would most probably manufacture two or three dreams that symbolized the fear, dreams in which you consider and try out possible solutions within the dream context. The job situation might never appear as such within any of the dreams, of course.
quotes.translation: 符号的这些变化特征应能提醒你注意自身意识状态的转变。若在此处放任自己沉入睡眠，你很可能会编织出两三个象征恐惧的梦境，在梦中你审视并尝试在梦境脉络中寻找可能的解决方案。当然，工作情境可能永远不会以本来面目出现在任何梦境中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "At once" does not imply a finished state of perfection nor a cosmic situation in which all things have been done, for all things are still happening. You are still happening -- but both present and future selves; and your past self is still undergoing what you think is done. Moreover, it is experiencing events that you do not recall, that your linear-attuned consciousness cannot perceive on that level.
quotes.translation: "当下"并非指完美完成的终极状态，也不是万事皆已完成的宇宙情境，因为万事万物仍在发生。你仍在发生——但既是当下的自己也是未来的自己；而你过去的自己仍在经历着你认为已经完成的事。不仅如此，它正在经历着你无法忆起的事件，那是你线性调谐的意识在那个层面无法感知的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: "Other species of consciousness gain their experience at different 'levels'; often we encounter such consciousnesses in the dream state, then interpret their actions in the wrong order of events ... according to our own camouflage3 system ... Our bodies are the focuses for only the physical part of our consciousnesses ... My latest dreams are giving me a picture of the nonphysical inner wonderworks ..."
quotes.translation: 其他种类的意识在不同的“层面”获得经验；我们常在梦境状态中遇到这类意识，随后根据我们自己的伪装系统，以错误的事件顺序解读它们的行动……我们的身体只是我们意识中物质部分的焦点……我最近的梦境正向我展现非物质的内部奇妙构造……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Your future thoughts and acts are as real in these dimensions as if they had already occurred, and as much a part of your development. You are formed not only by your past but by your future, and by alternate existences. These great interactions are only a part of the framework of your soul. You can, therefore, change present reality as you understand it from any of these other layers of consciousness.
