quotes.translation: 你未来的思想和行动在这些维度中如同已经发生般真实，并且同样是你发展的一部分。你不仅由你的过去塑造，也由你的未来和交替存在所塑造。这些伟大的互动只是你灵魂框架的一部分。因此，你可以从这些意识的其他任何层面改变你所理解的当下现实。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The tree makes adjustments as you make adjustments. The tree listens to its growth up from the earth and listens also to the murmur of the growth of its roots beneath. It adjusts each root ending according to what impediments might lie in its way. Without the so-called mind of man, it nevertheless retains this inner consciousness of all its parts above and below the ground, and adjusts them constantly.
quotes.translation: 树木如同你做出调整一般进行调整。树木倾听自己从大地向上生长的声音，也倾听地下根系生长的低语。它根据路径中可能遇到的障碍调整每个根尖。虽然没有所谓的人类心智，它却保留着对地上地下所有部分的内在意识，并持续调整它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Such inner therapeutics also occur however at various levels of consciousness where they may be sparked by exterior stimuli of an esthetic or pleasing nature. Other exterior conditions have also their effect. To involve oneself in large groups, for example, is beneficial often, not simply to take attention away from the self, but because a larger range of electromagnetic realities are easily available.
quotes.translation: 这种内在疗愈也发生在各种意识层面，可能由具有美感或愉悦性质的外在刺激所触发。其他外在条件同样会产生影响。例如，参与大型团体活动往往是有益的，这不仅是为了转移对自我的注意力，更因为这样更容易获得更广泛的电磁实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It is therefore some force to be reckoned with. If it were a primary reality, you would not escape from it even in the sleeping state. Those realities which are primary and basic you can never escape from. This should give you an idea, for those realities which run through all systems, and which are primaries, are those which exist for you in all conditions of consciousness and under any circumstances.
quotes.translation: 因此，它是一种不容忽视的力量。如果它是主要实相，即使在睡眠状态你也无法摆脱它。那些基本且主要的实相，你永远无法逃离。这应该能让你明白，那些贯穿所有系统、作为主要实相的存在，正是你在所有意识状态和任何情况下都能体验到的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: For this is a non interval to the inner self. This material is extremely important. One portion of you leaves the inner self to explore in depth a particular non interval. To the inner self no time passes. You experience of course physical time. This non interval however creates its own interval points that you also explore, in your dreams and waking projections that escape your ordinary consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因为这对内在自体而言是一个无间隔。这份资料极为重要。你的一部分离开内在自体，深入探索某个特定的无间隔。对内在自体而言，时间并未流逝。你当然会经历物理时间。然而，这个无间隔会创造出它自己的间隔点，你在梦境和超越普通意识的清醒投射中也会探索这些点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Some of these particles drastically alter their velocity, appearing sometimes at your slower rate, usually in cyclic fashion. The inner vortex of some such particles has a much greater velocity than the orbiting portions. EE units are formed spontaneously from the electromagnetic reality of feelings emitted from each consciousness, as, for example, breath automatically goes out from the physical body.
quotes.translation: 这些粒子中的一部分会剧烈改变其速度，有时以较慢的速率显现，通常呈循环模式。某些此类粒子的内部漩涡比其轨道部分具有更高的速度。EE单位由每个意识所散发感受的电磁实相自发形成，正如呼吸自动从肉体中呼出一般。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: According to Seth, each of us chose such a course at this time -- but now, we think, a time of imperative change is necessary if we are to continue our progress as a species. A new blending of inner and outer consciousnesses -- a new, more meaningful coalition of intellectual and intuitive abilities -- will be the latest step in the process of "consciousness knowing itself," as Seth has described it.
quotes.translation: 根据赛斯的说法，我们每个人都在此刻选择了这样的进程——但如今我们认为，若要延续人类物种的进化，必须迎来一场迫切的变革。内在意识与外在意识的新融合——智力与直觉能力之间更具意义的崭新联盟——将成为"意识认识自身"进程的最新阶段，正如赛斯所描述的那样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: What you call racial memory exists as inner emotional memory experience. The line between inner and outer does not exist in actuality any more than a line exists between consciousness and unconsciousness. What you call the subconscious is merely an ill-defined meeting place of inner and outer experience; and I am forced to use these terms inner and outer only because of your misconception of duality.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的种族记忆，是作为内在情感记忆经验而存在的。内在与外在之间的界线实际上并不存在，正如意识与无意识之间也不存在界线一样。你们所谓的潜意识，不过是内在与外在经验一个定义模糊的交汇处；而我之所以被迫使用内在与外在这些术语，仅仅是因为你们对二元性的误解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: To those who want easy answers, this is no answer, I admit. There is, I know, in heroic terms a love, a knowledge, a compassion, a creativity that can be assigned to All That Is, which is within each creature. I know that each smallest "particle" of consciousness can never be broken down, and that each contains an infinite capacity for creativity and development -- and that each is innately blessed.
quotes.translation: 对于那些寻求简单答案的人，我承认这并非答案。我知道，从宏大的角度而言，存在一种爱、一种知识、一种慈悲、一种创造力，可归于“一切万有”，它存在于每个生灵之中。我知道，每个最微小的“意识粒子”永不可被分解，且每个粒子都蕴含着无限的创造力与发展潜能——每个粒子都天生受福佑。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: At other levels, while each individuality is maintained, it rides the wavelike formations of consciousness. It is everywhere at once, and the units of consciousness that make up your cells know the positions of all other such units, both in time and in space.
quotes.translation: 在其他层面上，当每个个体性得以维持时，它便乘着意识如波浪般的形态前行。它同时存在于所有地方，而构成你们细胞的意识单位，既知晓时间中所有其他此类单位的位置，也知晓空间中的位置。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: (Deliberately I began to snore even louder, if possible. I wanted to build up a massive sound-impetus that I would use as a propellant, although I didn't know how this was supposed to work. The strange thing is, I enjoyed both the feeling of lying just above my physical body, and my ability to use the latter to produce sound. This implies a dual consciousness here, since I was aware of both bodies.
quotes.translation: （我故意开始打鼾，甚至更响，如果可能的话。我想制造一个巨大的声音冲力，用作推进剂，尽管我不知道这该如何运作。奇怪的是，我既享受漂浮在肉体正上方的感觉，也享受用肉体制造声音的能力。这暗示着一种双重意识，因为我同时意识到两个身体。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The third personality of Christ will indeed be known as a great psychic, for it is he who will teach humanity to use those inner senses that alone make true spirituality possible. Slayers and victims will change roles as reincarnational memories rise to the surface of consciousness. Through the development of these abilities, the sacredness of all life will be intimately recognized and appreciated.
quotes.translation: 基督的第三人格确实将被称为伟大的通灵者，因为他将教导人类使用那些内在感官——唯有这些感官才能使真正的灵性成为可能。随着转世记忆浮现到意识表面，杀戮者与受害者将互换角色。通过发展这些能力，所有生命的神圣性将被深切地认识与珍视。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "The pendulum is a very old method. I use it, with excellent results, to obtain ideomotor -- "subconscious" -- responses about knowledge that lies just outside my usual consciousness. I hold a small heavy object suspended by a thread so that it's free to move. By mentally asking questions, I obtain 'yes' or 'no' answers according to whether the pendulum swings back and forth, or from side to side."
quotes.translation: “钟摆是一种非常古老的方法。我用它来获得关于刚好超出我平常意识的知识的意念运动——‘潜意识’——反应，效果极佳。我手持一个用线悬挂的小重物，使其可以自由移动。通过在心里提问，根据钟摆是前后摆动还是左右摆动，我得到‘是’或‘否’的答案。”
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Even a quick and automatic rejection or withdrawal from such stimulus is in itself a way by which consciousness knows itself. The ego may attempt to ignore or escape from such experiences, but the basic nature of action itself is the knowing of itself in all aspects; and in a basic manner, in a very basic and deep manner, action does not differentiate between pleasant, painful or enjoyable actions.
quotes.translation: 即便是对这类刺激的快速自动排斥或退缩，其本身也是意识认识自身的一种方式。自我可能试图忽略或逃避这类经验，但行动的基本本质就是在所有面向中认识自身；从根本上说，在非常根本且深层的意义上，行动并不区分愉悦、痛苦或快乐的行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: You have trained your consciousness to follow certain patterns that are not necessarily natural for it, and these patterns increase the sense of alienation between the waking and dreaming self. To some extent you drug the body with suggestion, so that it believes it must sleep away a certain amount of hours in one block. Animals sleep when they are tired, and awaken in a much more natural fashion.
quotes.translation: 你们训练自己的意识遵循某些对它而言未必自然的模式，这些模式加剧了清醒自我与做梦自我之间的疏离感。你们用暗示给身体下药，使其相信必须连续睡足若干小时。动物累了就睡，醒来时则更为自然。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You can never force them to exist for a specified period of clock time, nor for that matter can you do that to a dream. Though this may sound impossible at this stage, nevertheless you can control such data when in a waking state better than you can control a dream. Here you learn to use certain parts of the consciousness for the purposes of the whole self, but I will discuss this at a later date.
quotes.translation: 你永远无法强迫它们存在于特定的时钟时间内，同样地，你也无法强迫一个梦如此存在。尽管在现阶段这听起来似乎不可能，但你在清醒状态下控制这类数据的能力，其实比控制梦境要强。在此你学会为了整体自我的目的而运用意识的某些部分，不过这点我日后再讨论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: At first, in your terms, all of probable reality existed as nebulous dreams within consciousness of All That Is. Later the unspecified nature of these "dreams," in quotes, grew more particular and vivid. The dreams became recognizable one from the other, until they drew the conscious notice of All That Is. And with curiosity and yearning, All That Is paid more and more attention to his own dreams.
quotes.translation: 起初，用你们的话来说，所有可能实相都作为模糊的梦境存在于"一切万有"的意识中。后来，这些"梦"（引号内）未明确的性质变得越发具体而生动。梦与梦之间开始变得可以区分，直到它们引起了"一切万有"的有意识注意。带着好奇与渴望，"一切万有"越来越关注自己的梦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: "These 'past' probabilities are not fleshed out in our terms, but they're brilliantly focused in their own life. In the Saratoga experience1 I felt ghostly because there I was a future probability ... At certain levels of consciousness, through bypassing direct neurological activity and impact, you can then glimpse other portions of your own probable experience -- both in the future and the past.
quotes.translation: 这些“过去”的概率并未以我们的方式具体成形，但它们在自己的生命中却异常聚焦。在萨拉托加体验中，我感到自己像幽灵般存在，因为在那里我是未来的概率……在意识的某些层面，通过绕过直接的神经活动和冲击，你便能瞥见自身其他部分的可能经验——无论是未来还是过去。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: （During his discussion on the creation of matter, Seth used the coffee table and a wineglass in making his points about how each of us creates his own world, with its own atoms and molecules. This led also into a discussion of the consciousness of each atom and molecule, etc., and our agreement telepathically on such things as the placement of objects in space. See sessions 66 and 68 in Volume 1.
quotes.translation: （在讨论物质创造时，赛斯以咖啡桌和酒杯为例，阐述我们每个人如何创造自己的世界，包括其原子和分子。这还引出了对每个原子和分子意识的讨论，以及我们在诸如空间中物体位置等事物上通过心电感应达成的共识。参见第一册第66节和第68节。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Nerve patterns are indeed very important here, and mechanisms of metabolism. An understanding of the methods used by the dreamer to construct dream images will, however, allow you to understand more clearly those other constructions. The chemical percentages are important here; that is, the chemical percentages vary from those found in the body during what you call normal states of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 神经模式在此确实非常重要，代谢机制亦然。理解做梦者构建梦境意象的方法，将使你更清晰地认识那些其他建构。化学比例在此至关重要——即这些比例与你所谓正常意识状态下的身体化学比例有所不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: It must, of course, succeed to some extent, or the physically oriented personality as you know it would not exist. The ego is of course a part of action. There are endless levels of action however, which the ego does not perceive. It is possible for the inner and outer egos to merge to some extent, and this merging when it occurs does indeed represent the formation of a new kind of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 当然，它必须在一定程度上成功，否则你所知的物质导向人格便不会存在。自我自然是行动的一部分。然而，存在着自我无法感知的无穷层次之行动。内在自我与外在自我有可能在一定程度上融合，这种融合发生时，确实代表着一种新型意识的形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This concept is hardly a new one. It is not a generally accepted theory, but it has ancient roots. When you carry the waking I into the dream state, this is one approach to this different consciousness. There is also an opening up that can occur in the waking condition. When this occurs the inner and outer egos merge. The outer ego recognizes its own duties, but it is aware that more is involved.
quotes.translation: 这个概念并非新创。它虽非普遍接受的理论，却有着古老的根源。当你将清醒的“我”带入梦境状态，这便是接近这种不同意识的一种途径。在清醒状态下也可能发生一种开启。当这种开启发生时，内在自我与外在自我便融合了。外在自我认知到自身的职责，但它明白其中还涉及更多层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: "I got some of it before the session--about the initial ones before the earth was formed--you could call them nonphysical entities. But it sounds dumb when you say it now: Physical entities couldn't hold all that much consciousness. I didn't know it was that definite until the end of the session, though.... Boy, that was a really good state," she said with satisfaction. "I really enjoyed it...."
quotes.translation: 课前我领悟到了一些——关于地球形成前的初始存有——你可以称它们为非物质实体。但现在说出来显得很蠢：物质实体无法承载那么多意识。不过直到课程结束我才知道这竟是如此明确……天啊，那真是个绝妙的状态，"她心满意足地说，"我真的很享受……"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: A large variety of dreams are the memories of this nonphysical existence that constantly occurs, though in waking life you are seldom aware of them. This cycle that psychologists have recently discovered, having to do with the various dream levels, corresponds to the ebb and tide of consciousness as it appears within and disappears from physical reality. It creates physical reality, as you know.
quotes.translation: 大量形形色色的梦境正是这种持续发生的非物质存在的记忆，尽管在清醒时你很少意识到它们。心理学家最近发现的这个与不同梦境层次相关的循环，对应着意识在物质实相中显现与消失的潮起潮落。如你所知，正是它创造了物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Your consciousness expands and develops according to its own abilities. Previous lives are handled in conscious terms when you are in existence between physical lives. When you are completed in those terms you may operate within a two reality field psychological pattern, in which you are consciously aware of existing in two systems at once, and able to manipulate with full awareness within each.
quotes.translation: 你的意识会依据自身能力扩展与成长。当你在物质生命之间的存在状态时，前世经历会以意识可理解的方式被处理。当你完成这些层面的课题后，便能在双重实相场的心理模式中运作——此时你能同时清醒地意识到自己存在于两个系统之中，并在每个系统内都能以全然的觉知进行操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Your concept of consciousness is fearful and limiting, and depends for its existence upon ignorance and barriers, barriers that divide parts of the self from others, from other parts of the self, and from other selves, and from experiences of the selves.
quotes.translation: 你们对意识的观念充满恐惧且局限，其存在依赖于无知与障碍——那些将自我各部分彼此分割、将自我与其他自我分割、以及将自我与自身经验分割的障碍。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now because of their knowledge and temperaments, they had already begun to play cards -- to distract their conscious attention -- and to drink wine to help reduce tension. Ruburt then went into an altered state of consciousness, and quite correctly foresaw their situation. The bridge a mere half a block away would collapse, but they would be safe as long as they did not panic and try to leave.
quotes.translation: 现在，由于他们的知识和性情，他们已经开始打牌——以分散有意识的注意力——并喝酒来帮助减轻紧张。鲁柏随后进入一种改变的意识状态，并相当准确地预见了他们的处境。仅半条街外的桥会坍塌，但只要他们不惊慌并试图离开，就会安全。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: That kind of dream awareness can literally regenerate your life, though the original impact will be forgotten, and the entire event will usually be translated into images before awakening. Such dream events may be called experiences of basic being. During them, the self or consciousness literally travels to the source of its own energy. On another level atoms possess this same kind of knowing.
quotes.translation: 那种梦境觉知确实能重焕你的生命活力，尽管最初的影响会被遗忘，整个事件通常会在醒来前转化为意象。此类梦境事件可称为"基本存在体验"。在此期间，自我或意识确实会旅行至自身能量的源头。在另一层面上，原子也拥有这种了悟。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The mass race consciousness, in its terms, possesses an identity. You are a portion of that identity while still being unique, individual and independent. You are confined only to the extent that you have chosen physical reality, and so placed yourself within its context of experience. While physical, you follow physical laws, or assumptions. These form the framework for corporeal expression.
quotes.translation: 就群体种族意识而言，它拥有一个本体。你是该本体的一部分，同时保持独特、个别且独立。你仅受限于自己选择物质实相的程度，因而将自己置于其经验脉络中。当处于物质状态时，你遵循物质法则或假设——这些构成了肉体表达的框架。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Individuation, however, was dependent upon the cooperation of individuals. As the ego learned to feel more secure, the cooperative tendencies broadened so that the growth of nations was possible. It was inevitable, however, that ego consciousness would produce a reality in which it would finally need, in those terms, to accept other data and information that in the beginning it had to ignore.
quotes.translation: 然而，个体化有赖于个体的合作。当自我学会感到更安全时，合作倾向便扩大开来，使得国家的发展成为可能。但不可避免的是，自我意识终将产生一种实相，在这种实相中，它最终需要——以那些术语而言——接纳最初不得不忽略的其他资料与信息。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: In a way you are simply overexuberant, like children playing a new game. You will discover that at best you are using children's blocks. Some of you have already come to that conclusion. As this book continues, I will indeed outline some beginning proposals as to ways in which you can use your consciousness to understand the nature of reality, and to make some of those inner blueprints clear.
quotes.translation: 从某方面来说，你们只是过度亢奋，就像玩新游戏的孩子。你们终会发现，自己充其量只是在玩孩童的积木。有些人已经得出了这个结论。随着本书的进展，我确实会概述一些初步建议，说明你们如何运用意识来理解实相的本质，并让那些内在蓝图变得清晰。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Do not be impatient. As you continue with this exercise over a period of time you will be able to go further away, orienting yourself as you grow more familiar with the feeling of your mind. Gradually you will discover that this inner sense data will become clearer and clearer as you move toward another "station." It will represent reality as perceived from a different state of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 不要急躁。当你持续进行这个练习一段时间后，你将能走得更远，随着你对心智的感受越来越熟悉而调整自己的方向。渐渐地，你会发现，当你移向另一个"站点"时，这些内在感官资料会变得越来越清晰。它将代表从不同意识状态所感知到的实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Now I am obviously such a one in your terms, swimming up through other dimensions of reality and observing a dimension of existence that is yours rather than my own. There are, therefore, channels that exist between all these streams of consciousness, all these symbolic rivers of psychological and psychic experience, and there are journeys that can be made from my dimension as well as yours.
quotes.translation: 现在，以你们的说法，我显然是这样一位存在，从其他实相维度向上游动，观察着一个属于你们而非我自己的存在维度。因此，在所有意识之流、所有心理与灵性经验的象征性河流之间，存在着通道，并且从我的维度以及你们的维度都可以进行旅程。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Roots do not struggle to exist. One species does not fight against the others to live. Instead creativity emerges, and cooperatively the environment of the world is known and planned by all the species. What appears to be struggle and death to you at those levels is not, now, for the experience of consciousness itself is different there, as is the experience of your own cellular composition.
quotes.translation: 根并不挣扎着存在。一个物种并不与其他物种争斗以求生存。相反，创造力涌现出来，所有物种合作性地认识并规划着世界的环境。在那些层面上，你们眼中看似挣扎与死亡的东西，其实并非如此，因为意识本身的体验在那里是不同的，正如你们自身细胞组成的体验也不同。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: We have discussed this before but it should not be forgotten in any of the discussions. The urge and drive toward value fulfillment provides the spark for the initiation of any system or unit. Increased consciousness and awareness of itself, through the manipulation and materialization of its own energy into more complicated camouflage patterns, is another characteristic of a system or unit.
quotes.translation: 我们之前讨论过这一点，但在任何讨论中都不应忘记。价值完成的驱动力和推动力，为任何系统或单位的启动提供了火花。通过将其自身能量操纵和物质化为更复杂的伪装模式，来增强意识及对自身的觉知，是系统或单位的另一特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is this inner self, out of the massive knowledge and unlimited scope of its consciousness, that forms the physical world, that provides stimuli to keep the ego constantly at the job of awareness . It is the inner self, termed here the inner ego, that organizes, initiates, projects, controls the EE units of which we have been speaking lately, transforming energy into objects, into matter.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在自体，凭借其意识的广博知识与无限范畴，形成了物质世界，提供了刺激让自我持续保持觉察的运作。正是这个内在自体——此处称为内在自我——组织、启动、投射并控制我们近来讨论的EE单位，将能量转化为物体、转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: All of this is also connected with your beliefs about the waking and dreaming states, white being acquainted with the day, and black with the dreaming condition. Here again is the old connection between the God of Light and the Prince of Darkness, or Satan -- all distinctions made at various levels of development, and having to do with the nature of the origin of the present consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这一切也与你们对清醒与做梦状态的信念有关——白色与白昼相熟，黑色与梦境相连。这里再次出现光明之神与黑暗王子（或撒旦）的古老关联——所有区分都在不同发展层次上形成，且与当前意识的起源本质有关。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: A double dream is like the double life lived by some people who have two families -- one in each town -- and who seemingly manipulate separate series of events that other people would find most confusing. If the body can only follow certain sequences, still consciousness has inner depths of action that do not show on the surface line of experience. Double dreams are clues to such activity.
quotes.translation: 双重梦境就像某些人过着双重生活——在两地各有一个家庭——他们看似操纵着他人会感到困惑的独立事件序列。身体只能遵循特定序列，但意识具有不显现在经验表层的内在行动深度。双重梦境正是此类活动的线索。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: We have, again, almost a mental afterimage that gives you the illusion that one moment leads smoothly to the next. You do exist during these intervals, but you do not exist in any physical terms. It is not a matter--if you will excuse my pun--it is not a matter of the consciousness escaping from the body. It is a matter concerning the fact that no physical body exists from which to escape.
quotes.translation: 我们再次拥有近乎心理残像的体验，让你产生"一个瞬间平滑过渡到下一个"的错觉。在这些间隙中你确实存在，但并非以任何物质形式存在。这并非——请原谅我的双关——这并非意识逃离身体的问题，而是关乎根本不存在可供逃离的物质身体这一事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The psychic centers would be activated more frequently, and the entire identity of the personality would be better strengthened and maintained. The resulting mobility and flexibility of consciousness would cause an added dividend in increased conscious concentration, and fatigue levels would always remain below danger points. A greater equalization, both physical and mental, would result.
quotes.translation: 灵性中心会更频繁地被激活，人格的整体身份将得到更好的强化与维持。由此产生的意识流动性与灵活性，会带来意识专注度提升的额外收益，而疲劳程度将始终保持在危险阈值以下。身心两方面都将达成更均衡的状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Again, from the waking standpoint these other neurological recognitions could be thought of as ghost or trace methods of perception. Waking, you do not usually use them. They are utilized to some extent in daydreaming, however, and in certain alterations of consciousness while you perceive as real, or nearly real, events that are not immediately happening within your space-time structure.
quotes.translation: 从清醒视角来看，这些其他神经系统的认知可被视为感知的幽灵或痕迹模式。清醒时你通常不会使用它们，但在白日梦中，以及当你将非即时发生于时空结构内的事件感知为真实或近乎真实时，这些认知会在意识状态的某些转变中被部分运用。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Each unit of consciousness inherently possesses within itself all of the information available to the whole, and its specific nature when it operates as a particle rests upon that great "body" of inner knowledge. Any one such particle can be where it "is," be what it is, and be when it is only because the positions, relative positions, and situations of all other such particles are known.
quotes.translation: 每个意识单位本身即内蕴整体可得的一切信息，当其以粒子形态运作时，其特定本质便建立于那庞大的内在知识体之上。任何此类粒子之所以能"在"其所在之处、成其所是、存于其时，皆因所有其他粒子的位置、相对位置与情境皆被知晓。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Here we run into something that will be difficult for me to explain to you. Any particular self theoretically could expand his consciousness to contain the universe and everything in it. The closed-in, solitary, isolated self of which you are so proud is, as I have said, an arbitrary formation, containing the core of identity; and you seem to prefer, psychically speaking, to stay at home.
quotes.translation: 此处我们将触及一个难以向你解释的概念。理论上，任何特定自我都能扩展其意识以包容宇宙及其万物。你们引以为傲的那个封闭、孤绝、隔离的自我，如我所说，实为一种任意形成的结构，其中包裹着身份的核心；而从心灵层面而言，你们似乎更偏好安居于这方寸之地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Environments are primarily mental creations of consciousness thrust out into many forms. I have a fourteenth-century study, my favorite, with which I am very pleased, for example. In your physical terms it does not exist, and I know quite well it is my mental production. Yet I enjoy it, and often take a physical form in order to sit at the desk and look out the window at the countryside.
quotes.translation: 环境主要是意识投射成多种形态的心灵创造。例如，我最钟爱的一间十四世纪书房，虽在你们物质层面并不存在，我深知它是我的心灵产物，却仍乐在其中，常化出肉身坐于书桌前，眺望窗外乡野景致。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The eyes muscles are not used, the normal muscular activity that usually occurs in sleep vanishes. The physical body is in a deep trance state. The trance may be masked also by sleep, if the projection occurs from a dream state. According to the intensity of the projection and according to the systems visited, the physical body becomes more or less rigid when consciousness returns to it.
quotes.translation: 眼部肌肉停止运作，睡眠时惯常的肌肉活动消失。肉体处于深度出神状态。若投射始于梦境，出神状态可能被睡眠表象掩盖。根据投射强度与所访系统的不同，当意识回归时，肉体会呈现不同程度的僵直。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: You may ask how real are those other existences, but if so you must ask in whose terms. Existence has a physical version. In that framework you are born and die, and in a definite sequence. Death is a physical reality. It is real, however, only in physical terms. If you accept those terms as the only criterion of reality then surely it appears that death is an end to your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你可能会问那些其他存在有多真实，但若如此，你必须以谁的术语来问。存在有一个物质版本。在那个架构中，你出生和死亡，且遵循明确的顺序。死亡是物质实相。然而，它只在物质层面是真实的。如果你接受那些术语作为实相的唯一标准，那么死亡显然看似是你意识的终结。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: For your particular purposes you might imagine that you are walking through, or traveling through, one of your own paintings. Try to throw your consciousness into the environment you have painted. Observe particularly the colors that would be observable to you in many out-of-body states. There are gradations with which you are not familiar. They will inspire changes in your own palette.
quotes.translation: 为了你特定的目的，你可以想象自己正行走或穿行于自己的一幅画作中。试着将你的意识投入你所描绘的环境。特别留意那些在众多出体状态中你能观察到的色彩。有些色阶是你所不熟悉的。它们将激发你调色盘上的变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: "... basically, consciousness has nothing to do with size. If that were the case, it would take more than a world-sized globe to contain the consciousness of simply one cell"
quotes.translation: “……基本上，意识与大小无关。如果是那样的话，要容纳仅仅一个细胞的意识，就需要比地球还大的球体。”
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: This is not meant to dilute the function or natural abilities of reasoning awareness, for its powers allow you to focus experience in a highly specific manner, and to direct energy with great purposeful attention. (Pause.) In your terms, this action is in the process of automatically changing the nature of rational consciousness -- which is, as you think of it, in a state of evolution.
quotes.translation: 这并非要削弱理性觉知的功能或自然能力，因为它的力量让你能以高度特定的方式聚焦经验，并以极大的专注意图引导能量。（停顿。）用你们的话来说，这种行动正自动改变理性意识的本质——而你们所认为的理性意识，正处于演化状态中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Since you both are tiring I will end this session. The one point I would like to make, first, is this: Conscious fear is usually the main hindrance as far as data from the inner senses is concerned. Therefore, a realization that these senses belong to you and are quite natural will help you avoid the otherwise unavoidable, almost automatic closing off of such data by the consciousness.
quotes.translation: 既然你们俩都累了，我就结束这节课。我首先要指出的一点是：就内在感官的资料而言，有意识的恐惧通常是主要的障碍。因此，认识到这些感官属于你且十分自然，将有助于你避免意识几乎自动关闭这类资料的不可避免的情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: I would like you to seriously embark upon the hobby of out-of-body travel. There is no reason why you cannot become proficient at it if you are strongly enough motivated. You will find all kinds of people that can serve as models for you. The alteration of consciousness involved will also enable you to make several distinct and advantageous changes of focus, in line with your own work.
quotes.translation: 我希望你认真投入出体旅行的嗜好。只要动机足够强烈，你完全有理由能精通此道。你会发现各式各样的人可以作为你的榜样。所涉及的意识转变，也将使你能够根据自身工作，做出若干截然不同且有利的焦点转换。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: You see, the work involved in these experiments will of itself allow you to be extremely flexible, and you will discover finally that you can bring a portion of your consciousness with you while you sleep. A portion of the self will be investigating other portions of the self. We shall also have you using suggestion to bring about certain types of dreams in which we may be interested.
quotes.translation: 你看，这些实验所涉及的工作本身，将使你变得极具弹性。你终将发现，在睡眠时你能携带一部分意识同行。自我的一部分将探索自我的其他部分。我们也会让你运用暗示，引发某些我们可能感兴趣的特定梦境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: This is somewhat like drugging a child about to be born as a side effect of drugging the mother to make the birth easier, you see. Without drugs, the psychedelic experience will not occur unless circumstances are excellent from all aspects. There is little danger involved, as a rule. The chemical changes are automatically byproducts of the mobility of consciousness in such situations.
quotes.translation: 这有点像为了让分娩更顺利而给母亲用药，结果却意外地给即将出生的孩子也下了药，你明白吗。不用药物的情况下，除非各方面条件都极为理想，否则迷幻体验不会发生。通常来说，这几乎没什么危险。在这种情境下，化学变化只是意识流动性的自然副产品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: All of this talk about consciousness and action does not mean that consciousness is without identity.
quotes.translation: 所有这些关于意识与行动的讨论，并不意味着意识没有身份认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: On the other hand, all probable existence is open, and consciousness can make a door where there was none in those terms. There are guides and teachers in this time of choosing and decision, to point out alternatives and to explain the nature of existence. All personalities are not at the same level of development. There are therefore advanced teachers and teachers at "lower" levels.
quotes.translation: 另一方面，所有可能的存在都是开放的，意识可以在那些原本没有门的地方创造一扇门。在这个选择与决定的时刻，有向导和老师存在，他们指出各种可能性，并解释存在的本质。并非所有的人格都处于相同的发展层次，因此既有高等的导师，也有"较低"层次的老师。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: To some extent dreams are participated in by cellular consciousness also, for the cells have an equal interest in the individual's psychic and body events. In a way dreams are of course composite behavior -- mental and psychic games that suit the purposes of mind and body alike. Feedback from the physical environment may trigger an alarming dream that causes the individual to awaken.
quotes.translation: 梦境在某种程度上也受到细胞意识的参与，因为细胞对个体的心灵与身体事件同样感兴趣。从某种角度看，梦境自然是复合行为——是适合心智与身体目的的心灵与精神游戏。来自物理环境的反馈可能触发令人警觉的梦境，导致个体醒来。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The physical world that you recognize is made up of invisible patterns. These patterns are "plastic," in that while they exist, their final form is a matter of probabilities directed by consciousness. Your senses perceive these patterns in their own ways. The patterns themselves can be "activated" in innumerable fashions. There is something out there (humorously emphatic) to observe.
quotes.translation: 你所认知的物质世界由无形的模式构成。这些模式具有"可塑性"，即它们虽已存在，其最终形态却是受意识引导的概率事件。你的感官以各自的方式感知这些模式。这些模式本身能以无数种方式被"激活"。外界确实存在着可供观察的某种东西（幽默地强调）。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The chemical changes propel consciousness outward, or far inward. This is aside: A small dose of salt, regular salt, taken with the drugs would help maintain a certain stability. It has a binding action on consciousness and acts as a cohesive.
quotes.translation: 化学变化将意识向外或向内深处推进。附带说明：少量食盐，普通食盐，与药物同服有助于维持某种稳定性。它对意识有约束作用，并起到凝聚剂的效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This will take some acclimation on his part; for his manners and gestures and behavior is maintained but my consciousness is behind them. Now in this state I am indeed very close, although it will be more difficult for you to sensemy presence.
quotes.translation: 这需要他逐步适应；因为他的举止、姿态和行为虽保持不变，但我的意识已居于其后。在此状态下，我确实非常接近，尽管你们要感知我的存在会更加困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: While you go about your daily chores and endeavors, beneath normal waking consciousness you are constantly focused in other realities also, reacting to stimuli of which your physical conscious self is not aware, perceiving conditions through the inner senses, and experiencing events that are not even registered within the physical brain. That whole last portion should be underlined.
quotes.translation: 当你们忙于日常琐事与追求时，在正常清醒意识之下，你们也持续聚焦于其他实相，对物质意识自我未曾察觉的刺激做出反应，通过内在感官感知状况，并经历那些甚至未被物质大脑记录的事件。最后这一整段应当划线强调。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Your own consciousness as you think of it, as you are familiar with it, can indeed help lead you into some much greater understanding of the simultaneous nature of time3 if you allow it to. You often use tools, instruments, and paraphernalia instead -- but they do not feel time, in those terms. You do. Studying your own conscious experience with time will teach you far more. Period.
quotes.translation: 你所以为的、所熟悉的那个意识，确实能帮助你更深入地理解时间的同步性本质——只要你允许它这么做。但你却常常使用工具、仪器和辅助设备——而这些工具从本质上无法感知时间。你才能。研究你自己对时间的主观体验，将教会你更多。句号。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The value climate of psychological reality can be likened to an ocean in which all consciousness has its being. There are multitudinous levels that can be plunged into, with various life forms, diverse and alien, but nevertheless interconnected and dependent one upon the other. I like the ocean analogy because you get the idea of continuous flow and motion without apparent division.
quotes.translation: 心理实相的价值气候可以比作一片海洋，所有意识都在其中存在。有无数层次可以潜入，其中有着各种生命形态，多样而陌生，却又相互关联、彼此依存。我喜欢海洋这个比喻，因为你能感受到持续流动与运动，而没有任何明显的分割。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Your tale about the Garden of Eden, then, is a legend about earth's last beginning. Each world is so cunningly constructed, again, that each consciousness, regardless of its degree, plays a vital part. And each of your actions, however inconsequential, becomes connected in one way or another--in one way or another--to each other reality and each other world (all with much emphasis).
quotes.translation: 你们关于伊甸园的故事，其实是地球上一次开端的传说。每个世界都如此精巧地构建，以至于每个意识——无论其层次高低——都扮演着重要角色。而你们的每个行动，无论多么微不足道，都会以某种方式——以某种方式——与所有其他实相和所有其他世界相连（语气着重强调）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The traveling consciousness as you know it often experiences the feeling of motion and movement through space. This is because there is still translation through the physical senses. You are moving more effectively within camouflage reality, but you are still dealing with it. The focus of your attention has changed somewhat, but you are still strongly relating to the physical field.
quotes.translation: 你们所认知的旅行意识，常会体验到穿越空间的运动感。这是因为仍存在通过物质感官的转译。你们在伪装实相中的移动效率更高，但仍在与之互动。你们注意力的焦点虽有所改变，却仍与物质场域保持强烈关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: If you firmly believe that your consciousness is a product of your physical body, then you may attempt to cling to it. There is an order of personalities, an honorary guard, so to speak, who are ever ready to lend assistance and aid, however.
quotes.translation: 如果你坚信自己的意识是肉体的产物，那么你可能会试图紧抓它不放。然而，存在着一种人格序列，可以说是一支荣誉护卫队，随时准备提供协助与支持。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You could not die unless you were the kind of creature who was born, nor could you have a present moment as you consider it. Your body is aware of the fact of its death at birth, and of its birth at its death, for all of its possibilities for action take place in the area between. Death is therefore as creative as birth, and as necessary for action and consciousness, in your terms.
quotes.translation: 除非你是那种被生下来的生物，否则你无法死亡；同样地，你也不可能拥有你所认为的当下时刻。你的身体在出生时就知晓死亡的事实，在死亡时也知晓出生的事实，因为它所有行动的可能性都发生在两者之间的领域。因此，死亡与出生一样具有创造性，就你们而言，它对行动和意识而言同样不可或缺。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: 1. "Now, for example," Seth told us this evening, "man deals with a kind of dual selfhood, in that he presently thinks of himself as an uneasy blend of body and mind. He identifies primarily with what I call a limited portion of his consciousness. That portion he equates with mind or intelligence. He identifies with events over which he is aware (underlined) of having some control.
quotes.translation: "例如，今晚赛斯告诉我们：'人类目前处理着一种二元自我性，因为他将自己视为身体与心灵不安的混合体。他主要认同于我所称的'意识有限部分'，并将这部分等同于心智或智力。他认同于那些他意识到（强调）自己能掌控的事件。'
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Though he does not understand what he does, he is learning control at other layers of consciousness, and he will be able to utilize his abilities far better in our sessions and in other experiments. In other words, various types of such experiences, within reason, are highly beneficial, for he learns from them.
quotes.translation: 虽然他不明白自己在做什么，但他正在意识的其他层面学习掌控，并将能在我们的课程及其他实验中远更好地运用自身能力。换言之，在合理范围内，各种类型的这类体验都极具裨益，因为他能从中学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: These dream personalities or fragments indeed have their own consciousness. They are as unaware, and as aware, of you as you are of them. They exist once you have created them. No action can be ？？2withdrawn. It must complete its nature according to the dimensions in which it exists, and so the dream personalities or fragments continue to exist whether or not you are aware of them.
quotes.translation: 这些梦中的性格或片段确实拥有自己的意识。它们对你的无知与觉知程度，正如你对它们的无知与觉知程度。一旦你创造了它们，它们便存在。任何行动都无法撤回。它必须根据其存在的维度完成其本性，因此无论你是否意识到它们，这些梦中的性格或片段都会继续存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Obviously the self that engages upon this study is not the waking normal consciousness, which becomes instead part of that which is studied, so another portion of the self is brought into activity. All of these exercises provide training that helps you in all your other work. This particular exercise however definitely requires some success in the recognition of dream projections.
quotes.translation: 显然，从事这项研究的自我并非清醒的正常意识，后者反而成为被研究的一部分，因此自我的另一部分被带入活动。所有这些练习都提供训练，帮助你在其他所有工作中取得进展。然而，这项特定练习确实需要在识别梦投射方面取得一定成功。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: At one level of your being there is a common ground where body consciousness merges with that higher consciousness from which your own identity springs. This is the ground of your being where soul and flesh meet, both in time and out of it.
quotes.translation: 在你存在的某个层面，存在一个共同基础，身体意识与那股更高意识（你的身份从中涌现）在此融合。这是你存在的根基，灵魂与肉体在此相遇，既在时间之内，也在时间之外。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: A consciousness is characterized by the particular ways in which it views or perceives available action. It is characterized by the type of action which it is more likely to perceive. It is characterized by the pattern of perception itself.
quotes.translation: 意识的特征在于它看待或感知可用行动的特定方式。它由更可能感知的行动类型所界定。它由感知模式本身所界定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Those people were aware just beneath consciousness of the possibilities of such an event long before the disaster occurred, and could until the last moment choose to avoid the encounter. Animals know of weather conditions ahead of time, as old tales say. This perception is a biological part of your heritage also. The body is prepared, though consciously it seems you are ignorant.
quotes.translation: 那些人早在灾难发生前，便已在意识表层之下觉察到此类事件的可能性，并且直到最后一刻都能选择避开这场遭遇。正如古老传说所言，动物能预知天气变化。这种感知力同样是你与生俱来的生物本能。身体早已做好准备，尽管意识层面看似一无所知。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The excellent work of art recreates for the observer inner experience of his own also, of which he has perhaps never been aware. As you know, paintings have motion, yet the painting itself does not move. This idea perhaps will help you to understand experience in terms of intensity, and projections, or the movement of consciousness, without necessarily any involvement with space.
quotes.translation: 卓越的艺术作品也为观察者重新创造了他自身的内在体验——那些他或许从未察觉的体验。如你所知，画作具有动态，但画作本身并不移动。这个观念或许能帮助你理解以强度、投射或意识运动为特征的体验，而不必涉及空间维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This is the myth of the exteriorized consciousness -- a consciousness that you are told is open-ended only so far as objective reality is concerned. It seems to be closed "at the other end," which in those terms would represent your birth.
quotes.translation: 这就是外化意识的神话——你被告知这种意识仅在客观现实层面是开放的。它似乎"在另一端"是封闭的，按此说法，那端便代表你的出生。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Other kinds of consciousness coexist within the same "space" that your world inhabits. They do not perceive your physical objects, for their reality is composed of a different camouflage structure. You do not perceive them, and generally speaking they do not perceive you. This is a general statement, however, for various points of your realities can and do coincide, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 其他种类的意识共存于你们世界所占据的同一"空间"中。它们感知不到你们的物质物体，因为它们的实相由不同的伪装结构组成。你们也感知不到它们，一般而言它们也感知不到你们。不过这只是概括性的说法，因为你们实相的各种交汇点确实能够且确实会重合，可以这么说。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (10:55. This may be a tricky point, and it may not. Seth used the word "dimming." Certainly some of my abilities for physical expression had withdrawn considerably, yet I had remained clearheaded and alert, and, out of habit, thoroughly occupied with trying to use them.... Nor had I become aware of any kind of heightened consciousness, or sudden telepathic or clairvoyant powers.
quotes.translation: （10:55。这可能是个棘手的问题，也可能不是。赛斯用了"减弱"这个词。当然，我用于物质表达的一些能力已经明显消退，但我仍然头脑清醒、警觉，而且出于习惯，我完全专注于尝试使用这些能力……我也没有意识到任何形式的意识提升，或突然出现的通灵或透视能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Before you see the whole form you may try to mentally communicate with it however, asking it questions. This is one approach. You may for example end up using this as the main method of communication between your present and your past one. Otherwise will your consciousness as mentioned earlier into the image, then ask yourself: Who am I? Where was I born? What memories are mine?
quotes.translation: 在你看到完整形态之前，你可以尝试在心灵层面与它沟通，向它提问。这是一种方法。例如，你最终可能会将此作为你现在与过去自我之间的主要沟通方式。否则，如前所述，将你的意识投射到那个形象中，然后问自己：我是谁？我出生在哪里？哪些记忆属于我？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: This does not mean that a human being contains no consciousness before the moment, or the arbitrary point of birth. You merely say life begins here. Your saying so, however, does not preclude the fact that consciousness began long before.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着人类在出生时刻或任意设定的出生点之前不包含任何意识。你只是说生命始于此处，但你的说法并不能排除意识早已存在的实情。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: In the dreaming state and in other states of consciousness, he can indeed to some degree become aware of perceptions which will be neglected by the ego alone. In other words, psychologically there is only one portion of self A that is limited in its perceptions to the physical dimension, and that is the ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境状态及其他意识状态下，他确实能在某种程度上觉察到那些仅凭自我所忽略的感知。换言之，从心理学角度来看，只有自我这一部分自我A的感知局限于物质维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: When consciousness leaves the body and is away for some time then the connection is, of course, broken. In out-of-body states the connection still holds. Now it is possible for an individual who has died to completely misinterpret the experience and attempt to reenter the corpse. This can happen when the personality identified himself almost exclusively with the physical image.
quotes.translation: 当意识离开身体并远离一段时间后，连接自然就会中断。在出体状态中，连接依然存在。然而，已逝者有可能完全误解这种体验，并试图重新进入尸体——当人格几乎完全认同于物质形象时，这种情况便可能发生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: We have to some extent touched upon the various ways by which this process is carried out. The process is carried out so quickly as to seem simultaneous on your plane, but the pause and resulting pulsation is always present. This mental enclosure is arbitrary, necessary again, a device used by the self. It would seem to limit the extension of consciousness, and yet it does not.
quotes.translation: 我们已在一定程度上触及了这个过程得以进行的各种方式。这个过程进行得如此迅速，以至于在你们的层面上看似同时发生，但停顿与随之而来的脉动始终存在。这种心智的围栏是人为设定的，且再次成为必要，是自我使用的一种手段。它看似限制了意识的延伸，实则不然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I do not want to minimize the importance of your state of consciousness; as, for example, you read this book. Presumably you are awake, but in many ways when you are awake, you are resting far more than you are in your so-called unconscious nightly state. Then to a larger extent you realize your own reality, and are free to use abilities that in the daytime you ignore or deny.
quotes.translation: 我不愿低估你们意识状态的重要性；例如，当你们阅读这本书时。想必你们是清醒的，但在许多方面，当你们清醒时，你们休息的程度远超过所谓的夜间无意识状态。那时你们更大程度地认识到自己的实相，并能自由运用那些在白天被忽视或否认的能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There is a temporary and initial, barely perceivable enlargement, a deep pulsing in the manner of a beating forth of cells and molecules--actually a sort of pulsation resulting in a minute but definite enlargement of tissue. You experience this in slow motion. Completed, the process would represent what would appear to be a propulsion of consciousness or self from the tissues.
quotes.translation: 存在一种短暂而初始的、几乎难以察觉的扩张，一种以细胞与分子搏动方式进行的深沉脉动——实际上是一种导致组织产生微小但明确扩张的搏动。你以慢动作体验这个过程。若完成，这个过程将表现为意识或自我从组织中的一种推进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Sentiment is practical. The idea of birth and death each day is close. Those who cry when they hurt a flea come close... Those who appreciate the consciousness in every rock, tree, bird... come close. Fools and idiots are often wiser than the wise man. Hatred is death. All things are sacred, and every thought is a reality and has its own potential for creation and destruction.
quotes.translation: 情感是务实的。每日生死交替的观念近在咫尺。那些因伤及跳蚤而哭泣的人接近真理……那些在每块岩石、每棵树、每只鸟中觉察意识的人接近真理。愚人与白痴往往比智者更明智。仇恨即死亡。万物皆神圣，每个念头皆为实相，并拥有其创造与毁灭的潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: We will again use this chair, this time to explain our point. The chair is being constantly constructed. Now the chair represents a subdivision in matter, being what you term dead matter, though we know that consciousness is everywhere.
quotes.translation: 我们将再次使用这把椅子，这次是为了说明我们的观点。这把椅子正被不断地构建着。现在这把椅子代表了物质中的一个细分部分，属于你们所谓的死物质，尽管我们知道意识无处不在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The concepts in "Unknown" Reality will help expand the consciousness of each of its readers, and the work itself is presented in such a manner that it automatically pulls your awareness out of its usual grooves, so that it bounces back and forth between the standardized version of the world you accept, and the unofficial7 versions that are sensed but generally unknown to you.
quotes.translation: 《未知的实相》中的概念将有助于扩展每位读者的意识，而这部作品本身以这样一种方式呈现，它自动将你的觉知拉出惯常的轨道，使其在你所接受的标准化世界版本与那些被感知但通常不为你所知的非官方版本之间来回弹跳。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: "The physical world that you recognize is made up of invisible patterns. These patterns are 'plastic,' in that while they exist, their final form is a matter of probabilities directed by consciousness. Your senses perceive these patterns in their own way. The patterns themselves can be 'activated' in innumerable fashions. (Humorously:) There is something out there to observe.
quotes.translation: "你所认知的物质世界由无形的模式构成。这些模式具有'可塑性'，即当它们存在时，其最终形态是由意识引导的概率问题。你的感官以自己的方式感知这些模式。这些模式本身可以以无数种方式被'激活'。（幽默地：）那里确实有某种东西值得观察。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: "Our explorations involved no second-handed evidence handed down by others, but the direct personal encounter of our consciousness and being with the vast elements of the unknown--a meeting of the self (human and vulnerable) with the psychological realms of gods and eternities; giant realms of mind that our nature felt attracted to ... and [was] uniquely equipped to perceive.
quotes.translation: 我们的探索并非依赖他人转述的二手证据，而是意识与存有直接亲身遭遇未知的浩瀚元素——自我（人性且脆弱）与诸神及永恒的心理领域相遇；我们的本性被这些庞大的心灵领域所吸引……并[被]赋予独特的感知能力。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: That led you, just below normal consciousness, to consider the relationship between father and daughter, and then to think of Ruburt's father, Del. He appeared younger and more vital than you had ever known him -- indeed, transformed in a fashion. He was redeemed in your mind, and appeared as his ideal self. In that capacity he helped lead you along safe paths, out of danger.
quotes.translation: 这引导你在正常意识之下，思考父女之间的关系，进而联想到鲁柏的父亲戴尔。他比你记忆中的任何时刻都更显年轻、更有活力——确实以某种方式转化了。他在你心中得到救赎，呈现出理想自我的样貌。以这种身份，他协助引领你沿着安全路径脱离险境。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health

quotes.text: Whenever you are attached in any way, whenever consciousness is attached to a physical organism, then inner data will be interpreted in physical terms. You can indeed learn to perceive reality in other terms, and you are both doing so.
quotes.translation: 每当你在任何方面有所依附，每当意识依附于物质有机体时，内在信息就会被诠释为物质形式。你确实可以学会以其他方式感知实相，而你们两人正在这样做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: You are not powerless before ideas. Using this analogy, you will certainly find some furniture that you did not expect. Do not simply look in the center of your inner room of consciousness; and make sure that you are on guard against the certain invisibility that was mentioned earlier (in this chapter), where an idea, quite available, appears to be a part of reality instead.
quotes.translation: 你并非在观念面前无能为力。用这个比喻来说，你必然会发现一些未曾预料到的家具。不要只盯着你内在意识房间的中心；务必警惕本章前面提到的某种不可见性——在那里，一个本可触及的观念，反而显得像是现实的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: If you examine such troublesome stimuli, you will always find that they originally rose after a long process, a process in which you were afraid to take small positive steps toward some ideal. Your own impulses naturally lead you to seek creative fulfillment, the expansion of your consciousness, psychic excursions, and the conscious knowledge and manipulation of your dreams.
quotes.translation: 如果你审视这些令人困扰的刺激，总会发现它们最初是经过漫长过程才浮现的——在这个过程中，你害怕朝着某个理想迈出微小的积极步伐。你自身的冲动自然引导你寻求创造性的圆满、意识的扩展、心灵的漫游，以及对梦境的有意识认知与掌控。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: I will go into this in a later chapter, but in a very real manner, space as you perceive it simply does not exist. Not only is the illusion of space caused by your own physical perceptive mechanisms, but it is also caused by mental patterns that you have accepted -- patterns that are adopted by consciousness when it reaches a certain stage of "evolution" within your system.
quotes.translation: 我将在后续章节深入探讨这一点，但就真实意义而言，你所感知的空间根本不存在。空间的幻象不仅源于你自身的物理感知机制，更源于你所接受的心智模式——这些模式是意识在你的系统内达到特定"演化"阶段时所采纳的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now this honorary guard is made up of people in your terms both living and dead. Those who are living in your system of reality perform these activities in an "out-of-body" experience while the physical body sleeps. They are familiar with the projection of consciousness, with the sensations involved, and they help orient those who will not be returning to the physical body.
quotes.translation: 这支荣誉卫队由你们所谓的生者与死者组成。那些在你们现实系统中活着的人，在肉体睡眠时以"出体"经验执行这些活动。他们熟悉意识投射及其相关感受，并协助引导那些不会返回肉体的个体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This is creativity of a most specialized nature and allows him to probe, if he will, into the nature of consciousness, the psyche, and creativity in a way that few can. Now he himself set up the conditions that would make such results possible. A certain part of my reality is a portion of a certain part of his reality, and here the creation of what I seem to be takes place.
quotes.translation: 这是最特殊性质的创造力，让他得以深入探索意识、心灵与创造力的本质，其深度鲜有人能及。他自身设定了促成这些结果的条件。我实相的某部分与他实相的某部分重叠，在此处，我看似存在的创造得以发生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Doing the exercise will simply acquaint your normal consciousness with the sense of its own flexibility. You will be exercising the invisible muscles of your consciousness as certainly as you might exercise your body with gymnastics.
quotes.translation: 进行这个练习只是为了让你的正常意识熟悉自身的灵活性。你正在锻炼意识的隐形肌肉，就像用体操锻炼身体一样确定无疑。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: For this reason, you are much less apt to travel in those directions. In some there are built-in impediments. Even projection from your universe into a universe of antimatter is most difficult, for example. The electromagnetic makeup even of your thoughts would be adversely affected, and yet theoretically this is possible from one of these adjacent levels of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，你较不容易朝那些方向旅行。有些方向存在内在障碍。例如，即使从你的宇宙投射到反物质宇宙也极为困难，连你思想的电磁组成都会受到不利影响，然而理论上，从这些邻近的意识层面之一出发仍是可能的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You possess within yourself all of those potentials in which consciousness creatively takes part. The cell does not need to be consciously aware of you in order to fulfill itself, even though your expectations of health largely influence its existence, but your recognition of the soul and entity can help you direct energies from these other dimensions into your daily life.
quotes.translation: 你内在拥有意识创造性参与的所有潜能。细胞无需有意识地认知你就能实现自身，尽管你对健康的期望极大影响其存在，但你对灵魂与存有的认知，能帮助你将这些其他维度的能量导向日常生活。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: These arts are useless if they are not practiced -- useless in that they lie ever latent, that they are not brought out into the exterior framework of your world. To use these arts requires first of all the knowledge that beneath the world you know is another; that alongside the focus of consciousness with which you are familiar there are other focuses quite as legitimate.
quotes.translation: 这些技艺若不实践便毫无用处——它们永远潜藏，未被带入你世界的外在架构。要运用这些技艺，首先需知你所知的世界之下另有一个世界；在你熟悉的意识焦点旁，存在同样合理的其他焦点。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: "There are no ceilings to the self, and no boundaries set about you. There is no place where identity need stop -- yours or anyone else's. Now, if you want to rest for a while in the familiar privacy of your self-adopted selfhood, then that is all right. But if you discover paths or 'strands of consciousness' leading from yourself into other realities, then follow them....
quotes.translation: “自我没有天花板，你周围也没有界限。身份——无论是你的还是他人的——没有必须停止的地方。现在，如果你想在你自选的熟悉私密性中稍作休息，那也无妨。但如果你发现从你自己通向其他实相的道路或‘意识之线’，那就跟随它们……”
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (9:44.) Give us a moment. ... (A one-minute pause.) These units of consciousness, however, add themselves up to form psychological beings far greater in number than, say, the number of stars in [your] galaxy (over 400 billion of them), and each of those psychological formations has its own identity--its own soul if you prefer--its own purpose in the entire fabric of being.
quotes.translation: （晚上9点44分）给我们一点时间……（停顿一分钟。）这些意识单位，然而，它们累积起来形成的心理存在数量，远大于（你的）银河系中恒星的数量（超过4000亿颗），而每一个这样的心理结构在整个存在织体中都有其自己的身份——如果你愿意，也可以说是自己的灵魂——自己的目的。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Such medications also often prevent certain necessary dream cycles that can help the body recuperate, and the consciousness then becomes highly disoriented. Some of the divisions between different portions of the self, therefore, are not basically necessary but are the result of custom and convenience.
quotes.translation: 这类药物也常会阻止某些必要的梦境周期——这些周期本可帮助身体恢复——导致意识变得高度迷失。因此，自我不同部分之间的某些划分并非根本必要，而是习俗与便利的产物。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Your closest point to the withinness of which I speak is your own consciousness, though you use it as a tool to examine the exterior universe. But it is basically free of that reality, not confined to the life-and-death saga, and at other levels deals with the blueprints for its own physical existence.
quotes.translation: 你与我所言内在实相最接近的接触点，正是你自己的意识——尽管你将它用作检视外在宇宙的工具。但它本质上不受该实相束缚，不受限于生死传奇，并在其他层面处理着自身物质存在的蓝图。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The physical material, it is true, makes the consciousness effective within a particular field. Growth does not involve one particular physical extension, in terms of one thing that of itself is permanent enough, in itself, to expand. As individualized psychic energy approaches your particular field it begins to express itself within that field to the best of its ability.
quotes.translation: 物质材料确实使意识在特定领域内发挥作用。成长并不涉及某一特定物理延伸，就某样本身足够恒久、足以自行扩展的事物而言。当个体化的心灵能量接近你们的特定领域时，它开始在该领域内尽其所能地表达自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The investigation of dreams, then, must be accomplished in or on a subconscious level. In order to study dreams properly you must indeed immerse yourself in that medium in which dreams occur. The intense but limited focus of usual consciousness will itself distort the true nature of dreams, and the ego will hold any such conscious examination of dreams within rigid bonds.
quotes.translation: 因此，对梦的探究必须在潜意识层面或通过潜意识来完成。为了恰当地研究梦，你确实必须沉浸于梦发生的那个媒介中。通常意识那强烈却受限的焦点本身会扭曲梦的真实本质，而自我会将任何对梦的有意识检视束缚在僵化的框架内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Consciousness as manifested individually simply adopts various images, though some of these are not physical in your terms. There is nothing so strange at this, since in physical life there is the definite difference between the body form of the child, the young adult, and the old man. You do not think this strange, nor do you think of it as three separate forms, you see.
quotes.translation: 以个体化方式展现的意识只是采用各种形象，尽管其中有些在你们看来并非物质形态。这并无任何奇特之处，因为在物质生命中，孩童、青年与老年的身体形态存在明确差异。你们并不觉得这奇怪，也不会将其视为三种分离的形态，明白吗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: All of existence and consciousness is interwoven. Only when you think of the soul as something different, separate, and therefore closed, are you led to consider a separate god -- a personality that seems to be apart from creation.
quotes.translation: 一切存在与意识皆相互交织。唯有当你视灵魂为某种不同、分离因而封闭之物时，你才会构想出一个独立的神——一个看似与造物分离的人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This applies to the seeds of any flower or tree or person. I have told you that consciousness is in all things, and the power behind all things. The entity itself constantly changes, and an entity can indeed choose to disintegrate.
quotes.translation: 这适用于任何花朵、树木或人类的种子。我曾告诉你们，意识存在于万物之中，是万物背后的力量。存有本身不断变化，而存有确实可以选择解体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You will continue to grow and develop, and you will become aware of other environments, even as you left your childhood home. But environments are not objective things, conglomerations of objects that exist independently of you. Instead you form them and they are quite literally extensions of yourself; materialized mental acts that extend outward from your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你会继续成长与发展，并会意识到其他环境，就像你离开童年时的家一样。但环境并非客观事物，也不是独立于你而存在的物体集合。相反，你塑造了它们，而它们确实是你自身的延伸；是物质化的心智行为，从你的意识向外延伸。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: A cat playfully killing a mouse and eating it is not evil. It suffers no guilt. On biological levels both animals understand. The consciousness of the mouse, under the innate knowledge of impending pain, leaves its body. The cat uses the warm flesh. The mouse itself has been hunter as well as prey, and both understand the terms in ways that are very difficult to explain.
quotes.translation: 一只猫嬉戏地杀死一只老鼠并吃掉它，这并非邪恶。它不会感到内疚。在生物层面上，两者都理解这一点。老鼠的意识在预知即将到来的痛苦的本能认知下，离开了它的身体。猫利用了温暖的肉体。老鼠本身也曾是猎手和猎物，两者都以难以解释的方式理解这些条件。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Your beliefs about sexuality, and hence your experience with it, makes you consider it in a very limiting light. The psyche's own knowledge, of course, is far more expansive. Alterations of consciousness, or attempts on the part of the individual to explore the inner self, may then easily display glimpses of a kind of sexuality that can appear to be deviant or unnatural.
quotes.translation: 你对性的信念，以及因此对性的体验，使你以非常局限的眼光看待它。而心灵自身的知识当然要广阔得多。意识的改变，或个人探索内在自我的尝试，便可能轻易显露出某种看似异常或非自然的性特质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Those characteristics that you consider female are, then, those that did not predominate because they represented the source of nature from which the species sought release. To some extent this was a true, creative, sexual drama -- again, of high pretense, for in its own way the consciousness of the species was playing for high stakes, and the drama had to be believable.
quotes.translation: 因此，你认为属于女性的那些特征，之所以未占主导地位，是因为它们代表了物种寻求解脱的自然之源。在某种程度上，这是一场真实而富有创造性的性戏剧——再次强调，这是一场高度假装的戏剧，因为物种的意识以其自身方式在豪赌，这场戏剧必须令人信服。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Now the moment points could also represent various personalities belonging to the entity, portions of its own consciousness that it sends upon the journeys of exploration and discovery. It is as if the nuclei of a cell could travel through itself. The boundaries of the entity would be imaginary, taking in as many moment points as the entity felt it could handle. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在，瞬间点也可以代表属于该存有的各种人格，即它派去进行探索与发现之旅的自身意识的部分。这就像细胞核能在自身内部穿行。存有的边界将是虚构的，囊括了存有认为能处理的尽可能多的瞬间点。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: He has found your location, and he will be here. You may instead quite clearly see him in a strong vision within a dream. If so he will announce himself. It is highly important however for any such work that you begin to train yourself to take your waking consciousness with you in sleep. It is the reason why you do not remember quite legitimate projections you have made.
quotes.translation: 他已找到你的位置，即将到来。你反而可能在梦中通过强烈的异象清晰地看见他。若如此，他会表明自己的身份。然而，对于任何此类工作而言，训练自己带着清醒意识进入睡眠状态至关重要。这正是你记不住自己确实进行过的合法投射的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: These encounters of consciousness go on constantly. They form their own kind of adjacent identities. You would call them subspecies of consciousness, perhaps, but they are really identities that operate in a trans-species fashion.
quotes.translation: 这些意识的相遇持续不断地发生。它们形成自己特有的相邻身份。你或许会称它们为意识的亚种，但它们实际上是跨越物种模式运作的身份。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Now: I call the building blocks of matter CU's--units of consciousness. They form physical matter as it exists in your understanding and experience. Units of consciousness also form other kinds of matter that you do not perceive.1
quotes.translation: 现在：我将物质的基本单位称为CU——意识单位。它们构成你们理解与经验中存在的物质实体。意识单位也构成你们无法感知的其他物质形态。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Your particular set of camouflages is not the only set, you see. Other realities have entirely different systems, but all personalities have inner senses that are attributes of consciousness, and through these inner senses communications are maintained about which the normally conscious self knows little. Part of my purpose is to make some of these communications known.
quotes.translation: 你们那套特定的伪装系统并非唯一的一套，其他实相拥有完全不同的体系，但所有的人格都拥有作为意识属性的内在感官，通过这些内在感官，通常有意识的自我所知甚少的沟通得以维持。我部分的目的就是要让其中一些沟通为人所知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: It is true that the patterns will have their own flow at certain points in your life. Following your own rhythm, longer or shorter periods will naturally ensue. Your consciousness as you think of it will be expanded through such practices. Generally speaking, eight-hour sleep periods, or longer ones, are not beneficial, nor in larger terms are they natural for the race.
quotes.translation: 确实，这些模式会在你生命的某些节点拥有自己的流动。跟随你自己的节奏，或长或短的时期自然会随之而来。你所以为的意识会通过这样的练习得到扩展。一般来说，八小时的睡眠时间或更长时间并无益处，从更宏观的角度看，对人类种族而言也并非自然。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: When you are using this exercise following any experiment with an alteration of consciousness, then end it here and go about your other concerns. You may also utilize it as an initial step that will help you get the feeling of your own inner mobility. To do this proceed as given, and when you have the moment's perception as clearly as possible, then willfully let it go.
quotes.translation: 当你在任何意识改变实验后使用这个练习时，就在此处结束，然后去处理你其他的事务。你也可以将其作为初始步骤，帮助你感受自己内在的流动性。要做到这一点，请按给出的步骤进行，当你尽可能清晰地获得那片刻的感知时，便有意地让它消散。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: I do indeed. Now: We will call the basic units of consciousness "CU" -- the letter "C," the letter "U" -- consciousness units. From them EE units are formed, and the first roots sent out into the world of physical matter. Period.
quotes.translation: 确实如此。现在：我们将意识的基本单位称为"CU"——字母"C"和字母"U"——即意识单位。由它们形成EE单位，并将最初的根须伸入物质世界的领域。句号。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Consciousness therefore forms the primary construction about itself, not to protect itself from matter but in order to become allied with matter, the consciousness obviously being diffused through the whole physical construction.
quotes.translation: 因此，意识在其自身周围构建了主要的结构，并非为了保护自己免受物质的侵害，而是为了与物质结盟，意识显然弥漫于整个物质构造之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It would not be seen under usual circumstances. On the other hand, if the desire were still more intense, the energy core would be greater, and a portion of your own flow of consciousness would be imparted to the form, so that for a moment you in your room might suddenly smell the salt air, or in some other way perceive the environment in which this pseudoimage stands.
quotes.translation: 在通常情况下，它不会被看见。另一方面，如果渴望更为强烈，能量核心就会更大，你自身意识流的一部分将被赋予这个形体，以至于那一刻，你在自己的房间里可能会突然闻到咸涩的海风，或以其他方式感知到这个伪像所处的环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: We will be dealing now, after what I hope is suitable background material, with some chapters on the nature of existence after physical death, at the point of death, and involving the final physical death at the end of the reincarnational cycle. It was important that you understand something about the nature and behavior of your own consciousness before we could begin.
quotes.translation: 在提供我认为合适的背景资料后，我们现在将探讨肉体死亡后的存在本质、死亡时刻，以及涉及轮回周期终结时的最终肉体死亡等章节。在开始之前，让你们了解自身意识的本质与行为特性至关重要。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Therefore you have a certain similarity in the forms in which matter appears. Matter could therefore, even in your field, appear in many forms which are presently unknown to you. The psychological structure existing in a perspective which you cannot physically perceive, must be first put together by individual consciousness before it can then be constructed materially.
quotes.translation: 因此，物质呈现的形态具有某种相似性。即使在你们的领域，物质也可能以许多你们目前未知的形态出现。存在于你们无法以肉体感知的视角中的心理结构，必须先由个体意识构建，然后才能以物质形式呈现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: This point is extremely important. All consciousness, therefore, either of a complicated psychic gestalt such as a man or animal, or of simpler gestalts such as an individual cell or molecule, nevertheless operate in and form about themselves mental or psychic enclosures, within which is naturally contained the capsule comprehension which is an attribute of all energy.
quotes.translation: 这一点极为重要。因此，所有意识——无论是人类或动物这类复杂的心理完形，还是单个细胞或分子这类较简单的完形——都在自身周围运作并形成心理或心灵的围场，其中自然包含着作为所有能量属性的胶囊式理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Because the conscious mind has been so stressed (while stripped of many of its characteristics), there is now an overreaction occurring in which normal consciousness is being put down, colloquially speaking.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……由于意识心被过度强调（同时被剥离了许多特性），现在正出现一种过度反应，通俗地说，正常意识正在被贬低。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: When I use the term time-wise, I refer it to the formation of a structure from which one kind of consciousness then views itself, sees itself as unique, and then tries to form other kinds of conscious structures. A fly is conscious of itself, fulfilled within that reality, and feels no need to form an "extension" of that awareness from which to view its own existence.
quotes.translation: 当我使用时间性这个术语时，我指的是某种结构的形成过程，一种意识由此审视自身、视自身为独特存在，并试图形成其他类型的意识结构。苍蝇对自身有意识，在该实相中感到圆满，并不觉得需要形成该意识的"延伸"来审视自身的存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Now: In purely physical terms, what you think of as consciousness of the self arises from a certain peak of intensity reached by the gestalt consciousness of the atoms and molecules, and cells and organs, that compose the body.
quotes.translation: 现在：从纯物理角度而言，你们所认为的自我意识，源于构成身体的原子、分子、细胞与器官之完形意识所达到的某个特定强度峰值。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The ordinary waking consciousness is left intact, you see. Another portion of the self catches it unaware, leaves no ripple upon its surface, and looks beneath it to other layers of reality. You are watching the self in motion.
quotes.translation: 你瞧，寻常的清醒意识完好无损。自我的另一部分趁其不备，在表面不留一丝涟漪，潜入其下窥探现实的其他层次。你正目睹自我在运动中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Each of you must discover what sexuality is, in all of its aspects, and connect it with the nature of your consciousness and your being. The answers must come from within. You have before you now certain hints and signs. Use them. And all of you who look upon me as a sign of great logical thinking (humorously), and therefore male-oriented, in your terms, then listen:
quotes.translation: 你们每个人都必须发现性是什么，及其所有面向，并将其与你们意识及存在的本质相连。答案必须来自内在。你们眼前已有某些提示与征兆。善用它们。而所有视我为伟大逻辑思维象征（幽默地说）、因而在你们眼中是男性导向的人，请听：
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The conscious ego then manipulates this material for the purposes of camouflage constructions. The transformation of vitality into physical properties is done by this self-conscious self that faces the inner world. The subconscious is the link between these two self-consciousness, and here you find an acceptance by the camouflage personality of the materials at hand.
quotes.translation: 接着，有意识自我为伪装建构之目的操控此材料。将生命力转化为物质属性，是由这个面向内在世界的自觉自我完成的。潜意识是这两种自我意识之间的纽带，在此你们会发现伪装人格对现有材料的接纳。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is actually a field, that is energy field, boundary. It protects the inner self by acting as a barrier that keeps the whole self's energy controlled, and keeps it from seeping away. At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it.
quotes.translation: 它实际上是一个场域，即能量场边界。它作为一道屏障保护内在自体，既控制整个自体的能量不使其外泄，又保护整个自体免受某些辐射影响——这些辐射与你们无关。任何层面的活意识都必须被这种组织囊包裹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: One portion of All That Is, is instantly aware, for example of your most insignificant and significant problems--of yours and yours alone. This portion of overall consciousness is the portion that is individualized within you.
quotes.translation: 一切万有中有一部份，能瞬间觉察你最微不足道和最重大的问题——属于你且仅属于你的问题。这整体意识中的特定部分，正是你内在个性化的那部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Consciousness left to itself is like April left to itself. It is you who project disasters into the month of April... whenever disasters occur. And it is you who project disasters into consciousness when those disasters occur.
quotes.translation: 意识任其自然发展时，就像四月天任其自然流转。是你们将灾难投射进四月...每当灾难发生时。而当那些灾难发生时，也是你们将灾难投射进意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: This inner and yet physical transmigration of consciousness has always been extremely important, and represents a natural method of communication, uniting all species and all physical life. Inside all physical organisms, therefore, there is a thrust for development and change, even as there is also a pattern of stability within which such alterations can take place.
quotes.translation: 这种内在而兼具物质性的意识转世始终至关重要，它代表着一种自然的沟通方式，联结所有物种与一切物质生命。因此，在所有生物有机体内部，既存在着发展与变革的驱动力，也存在着让这些变化得以发生的稳定模式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (10:01. Emphatically.) I am not, on the one hand, an easy author to deal with, because I speak from a different level of consciousness than the one with which you are familiar. On the other hand, my voice is as natural as oak leaves blowing in the wind, for I speak from a level of awareness that is as native to your psyche as now the seasons seem to be to your soul.
quotes.translation: （十点零一分，强调地）一方面，我并非容易相处的作者，因为我的言说来自与你们所熟悉的意识层次不同的层面。另一方面，我的声音却如风中橡树叶般自然，因为我所表达的觉知层次，对你们的心灵而言，正如季节之于灵魂般浑然天成。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: This seems strange because you do not fully comprehend that the energy, the vitality that is individualized into consciousness forms the physical body; and once it appears on your plane it can leave the body and reassemble itself. It would represent no more in one way to the atoms and molecules through which it passed, than the wind that passes through the treetops.
quotes.translation: 这看似奇怪，因为你尚未完全理解：被个体化为意识的能量与活力，构成了物质身体；一旦它出现在你的层面，便能离开身体并重新组装自身。对它穿过的原子与分子而言，这就像穿过树梢的风一样，不会造成更多影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You are being allowed freedom within limits. (Long pause.) The human race is a stage through which various forms of consciousness travel. The ideals keep the race pointed in beneficial directions. Thoughts and emotions form the basis. You learn by seeing these turn into physical reality. You may be killed by what you have created. If so the lesson is doubly learned.
quotes.translation: 你在限制中被允许自由。（长停顿。）人类种族是各种意识形式穿行的一个阶段。理想使种族指向有益的方向。思想与情感构成基础。你通过目睹它们转化为物质实相而学习。你可能会被自己所创造的东西杀死。若如此，教训便加倍深刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Using an analogy, its "particles" could be dispersed throughout the universe, with galaxies between, yet the identity would be retained. So unknowingly, now, portions of your consciousness mix and merge with those of other species without jarring your own sense of individuality one whit -- yet forming other psychological realities upon which you do not concentrate.
quotes.translation: 打个比方，它的"粒子"可散布于整个宇宙，其间横亘着星系，但身份仍得以保留。因此，此刻你意识的部分正不知不觉地与其它物种的意识混合交融，却丝毫不干扰你自身的个体感——同时形成你并未专注的其他心理实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The ability to project idea or energy into physical construction is, therefore, generalized throughout the whole physical human body, and throughout the bodies of any living thing. This capacity, being a part of the generalized consciousness, or what you would call the subconsciousness, therefore performs its function without egotistical awareness or comprehension.
quotes.translation: 将意念或能量投射为物质构造的能力，因此遍及整个人类肉体，也遍及所有生物的身体。这种能力作为广义意识（即你们所称的潜意识）的一部分，因此在没有自我觉知或理解的情况下执行其功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It may be thought that such perception patterns or identities may be limited, but this is hardly the case. For without them, whole portions of reality would never be perceived. There is much here that will take us a long while to explain, for the line can theoretically be drawn anywhere in the formation of identities and consciousness. And herein lies your freedom.
quotes.translation: 或许有人认为这样的感知模式或身份是有限的，但事实绝非如此。因为没有它们，实相的完整部分将永远无法被感知。这里有许多内容需要花很长时间来解释，因为理论上，在身份与意识的形成过程中，界限可以划在任何地方。而你们的自由正蕴含于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Dictation: When I speak of natural law, I am not referring to the scientists' laws of nature, such as the law of gravity, for example -- which is not a law at all, but a manifestation appearing from the viewpoint of a certain level of consciousness as a result of perceptive apparatus. Your "prejudiced perception" is also built into your instruments in that regard.
quotes.translation: 口授：当我谈及自然法则时，我指的不是科学家所说的自然律，例如万有引力——那根本不是什么法则，而是从特定意识层次通过感知机制所显现的表象。在这方面，你们"带有偏见的感知"也已被植入你们的仪器之中。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Now. There are indeed a body of symbols that are more or less basic within all kinds of perception--bridgeworks from one form of perception to another, since beneath all perceiving systems there is consciousness. Certain symbols therefore will have meaning. I do not see any particular purpose in giving these to you now, but at some time I will do so. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在。确实存在一套象征符号，在各种感知中或多或少是基础性的——它们是从一种感知形式到另一种感知形式的桥梁，因为在所有感知系统之下都有意识。因此某些象征符号将具有意义。我看不出现在把这些告诉你们有什么特别的目的，但将来某个时候我会这么做。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: ("Ruburt already has a head start on this, so I am not spoiling his fun. There are indeed 'aspects' of your own consciousness that operate in completely different environments. Environments, for example, that are not physical. There are aspects of you, therefore, that know many other kinds of information than those available to you at the conscious level now ..."
quotes.translation: （“鲁柏在这方面已经领先了，所以我不会破坏他的乐趣。你们自己的意识确实有‘面向’在完全不同的环境中运作。例如，非物理的环境。因此，你们有某些面向知道许多其他种类的信息，而不仅仅是你们目前意识层面可获得的那些……”）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: He would in no way lose consciousness of who he was, and he would perceive these experiences, again, somewhat in the same manner that you perceive heat and cold. In your camouflage pattern you must adapt yourself to the effects of heat and cold, but our man in the inner world would not be under any such obligation. I am speaking now only of our first inner sense.
