quotes.translation: 他绝不会失去对自我身份的觉知，并且会以类似你感知冷热的方式体验这些经历。在你的伪装模式中，你必须让自己适应冷热的影响，但内在世界的那个人却不受任何此类义务的约束。我现在只谈论我们的第一个内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Nevertheless, you can leave the physical body and reassemble it. I am sorry to say that if you have a bad gall bladder, the reassembled body will also have a bad gall bladder, since it is the consciousness who has caused the illness to begin with. Even if you leave the body momentarily you do not leave your problems behind, or at least you must come back to them.
quotes.translation: 然而，你可以离开物质身体并重新组装它。很遗憾地说，如果你的胆囊有问题，重新组装的身体也会有一个有问题的胆囊，因为正是意识首先导致了疾病。即使你暂时离开身体，你也无法将问题抛在身后，至少你必须回来面对它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: --and to what degree? If five people were in this room, then they would each construct, in their own personal perspective, their own image of Ruburt, which would be composed of definite, material, atoms and molecules. You would have five actual physical constructions, plus Ruburt's own. Do all five constructions, plus Ruburt's own, contain Ruburt's consciousness?
quotes.translation: ——以及到什么程度？如果这个房间里有五个人，那么他们每个人都会从自己的个人视角构建出鲁柏的形象，这个形象由确定的、物质的原子和分子组成。你将拥有五个实际的物质构造，加上鲁柏自己的。这五个构造加上鲁柏自己的，是否都包含了鲁柏的意识？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: For energy regenerates itself. And as I have told you consciousness, conscious energy, continually manifests itself in various forms. Now. Remember last sessions explanation of mental enclosures, composed of inward, individualized, aware energy, materializing itself in physical form, and at a particular point closing off and becoming more or less a closed system.
quotes.translation: 能量会自我更新。如我曾告诉你们的，意识——有意识的能量——持续以各种形态显现自身。现在请记住上一节关于精神围场的解释：它由内在的、个体化的、有觉知的能量构成，在物质形态中具现自身，并在特定节点封闭自身，或多或少成为封闭系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You can travel anywhere within your solar system however with it. In the first form it is possible to perceive the past, present and future on a limited basis. In the second form this perception is on a larger scale, the scope of consciousness being further opened. Now this is the form that you will use if you meet appointments with others within the dream state.
quotes.translation: 然而你可以借助它游历太阳系内的任何地方。在第一种形态中，你能够有限度地感知过去、现在与未来。在第二种形态中，这种感知范围更为广阔，意识的视野进一步敞开。这正是你在梦境中与他人会面时所使用的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The motivating force is still All That Is, but the individuality is no illusion. Now in this same way do you give freedom to the personality fragments within your own dreams, and for the same reason. And you create for the same reason, and within all of you is the memory of that primal agony--that urge to create and free all probable consciousness into actuality.
quotes.translation: 驱动力仍是"一切万有"，但个体性绝非幻象。同样地，你在自己的梦境中赋予人格片段自由，也是基于相同的原因。你们因相同的原因而创造，在你们所有人内在都存有那原初的剧痛记忆——那股将一切可能意识催生为实相的冲动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Dream objects are Secondary constructions , but very valid ones. Now they do have much more than an imaginative reality, and they do possess consciousness, but a fragmentary consciousness, that can however further develop.
quotes.translation: 梦中的物体是次级建构，但却是非常有效的建构。它们确实拥有远超想象的真实性，也确实具备意识，但那是一种片段式的意识，不过仍可进一步发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Most realities have absolutely nothing to do with space as you imagine it. Most realities have their growth and existence in something closely akin to what we have called psychological time, and this is completely independent of space as you conceive it to be. Psychological time is a sort of climate or environment conducive to the existence of all consciousness.
quotes.translation: 大多数实相与你所想象的时空毫无关联。大多数实相的生长与存续都存在于某种与我们所谓的"心理时间"密切相关的领域中，这完全独立于你所认知的时空概念。心理时间是一种有利于所有意识存续的气候或环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Your Ruburt experienced a transmigration of systems. It was not meant to be unpleasant. (Pause.) This was his subjective interpretation. First he was involved in a microscopic adventure. Consciousness does not take up space. You must understand this. He then entered your own system of physical blocks, and by contrast that system then appeared huge and monstrous.
quotes.translation: 你们的鲁柏经历了一次系统的转世迁移。这并非刻意令人不悦。（停顿）这是他主观的诠释。起初他沉浸于一场微观的冒险。意识并不占据空间——你必须理解这一点。随后他进入你们自身的物质区块系统，相比之下，那个系统显得庞大而骇人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Our next rule, or law, of the inner universe is of course consciousness. Everything that exists on any plane and under any circumstances contains consciousness, condensed knowledge, and even self awareness to some degree.
quotes.translation: 我们内在宇宙的下一条规则或法则，当然是意识。任何层面、任何情况下存在的一切，都包含意识、浓缩的知识，甚至某种程度的自我觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: If you read your selves adjacently, you would build up confidence in the body, and in those cooperative consciousnesses that form it. You would have an intimate awareness of the body's healing processes also. You would not fear death as annihilation, and would feel your own consciousness gently disentangle itself from those others that so graciously couched it.
quotes.translation: 若你们能邻近地阅读自己的各个自我，便会建立起对身体的信心，以及对构成身体的那些合作性意识的信心。你们也会对身体的自愈过程有亲密的觉知。你们不会将死亡视为湮灭而恐惧，反而会感受到自己的意识温柔地从那些如此优雅地包裹它的其他意识中解脱出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The consciousness therefore would never be destroyed in reality. The most minute blossom within it would experience only an almost instantaneous change of form, and all of this would transpire in the breath of an instant. The individual petals would merely change, as the personalities of men change in what seems like a series of before and after reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 因此，意识在实相中永远不会被摧毁。其中哪怕最微小的花朵，也只会经历几乎瞬间的形态变化，而这一切都将在刹那的呼吸间发生。个体花瓣只是改变，如同人类的人格在一系列看似前后相继的转世中改变一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: The window cannot see through itself, but you can see through the window. So this personality does not always know what it is about, and yet the results can be seen. The personality is transparent also with your nature, and learning to use those abilities which are natural to it, can indeed then rather easily learn to merge consciousness with natural phenomena.
quotes.translation: 窗户无法看见自身，但你能透过窗户看见外界。因此这个人格并不总是清楚自己的本质，但其结果却能被看见。人格也如你的本性般透明，学习运用那些与生俱来的能力，便能相当轻易地学会将意识与自然现象融合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Now: Some individuals are being reborn at this time simply to help you understand. They are forcing the issue, and forcing the crisis, for you still have time to change your ways. You are working on two main problems, but both involve the sacredness of the individual, and the individual's relationship with others and with all physically oriented consciousness.
quotes.translation: 现在：有些个体在此刻转世，仅仅是为了帮助你们理解。他们正在迫使问题浮现，迫使危机发生，因为你们仍有时间改变自己的方式。你们正在处理两个主要问题，但两者都涉及个体的神圣性，以及个体与他人及所有物质导向意识的关系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (Loud:) The energy that sweeps down through this frame is but a small shadow of the energy that is at my command and at your command. This energy can be translated into knowledge, and when it is translated into knowledge it must also be translated into behavior, then it becomes a psychic adventure. Then you begin to use your consciousness as you should use it.
quotes.translation: （大声说：）席卷这个框架的能量，不过是我所能调遣、你们所能调遣的能量的一小部分投影。这种能量可转化为知识，而当它转化为知识时，也必须转化为行为，如此便成为一场心灵冒险。那时你们将开始以应有的方式运用自己的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: When I speak of mosaics, you might think of small segments, shining and of different shapes and sizes. Yet the mosaics of consciousness are more like lights, radiating through themselves and through a million spectrums.
quotes.translation: 当我谈及镶嵌画时，你或许会想到细小的碎片，闪耀着不同形状与尺寸的光芒。然而意识的镶嵌画更像是光，透过自身与无数光谱辐射而出。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: To this extent we indulge in relaxation and sleep, for we can spend a century as a tree or as an uncomplicated life form in another reality. We delight our consciousness with the enjoyment of simple existence. We may create, you see, the forest in which we grow. Usually however we are highly active, our full energies focused in our work and in new challenges.
quotes.translation: 我们如此沉溺于放松与睡眠，因为我们可以花一个世纪的时间成为一棵树，或在另一实相中成为简单的生命形态。我们以单纯存在的喜悦滋养意识。你看，我们甚至可以创造自己生长的森林。但通常我们高度活跃，全部能量聚焦于工作与新的挑战。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I am alive in Seth Two's memory, as a self from which he sprang. Yet the self I am now is not the self from which he sprang. Only your rigid ideas of time and consciousness make these statements seem strange to you; for in a larger context, again, I can remember Seth Two. All of these connections therefore are open. All psychological events affect all others.
quotes.translation: 我在赛斯第二的记忆中鲜活存在，作为他所源自的自我。然而此刻的我并非那个他所源自的自我。唯有你们对时间与意识的僵化观念才使这些陈述显得怪异；因为在更大的脉络中，我同样能忆起赛斯第二。因此所有关联都是开放的。所有心理事件都相互影响。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now it is here that the seeming division in the self occurs, for in physical life the conscious mind must be connected with the brain, and in terms of time that organ itself must grow and develop. So all of your consciousness cannot be physically aware. The portion that must "wait for" the brain's development is the part you call in life "the conscious mind."
quotes.translation: 自我表面的分裂便在此处发生，因为在物质生命中，意识心必须与大脑相连，而就时间而言，这个器官本身必须成长发展。因此，你所有的意识无法在物质层面被觉知。那个必须"等待"大脑发展的部分，就是你生前所称的"意识心"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: This does not mean that apparitions are only the result of such construction on the part of the perceiver. The perceiver constructs the pseudo material apparition as he constructs the physical image of his contemporaries, but in, or rather and in line with telepathic data that is received by or from the consciousness whose material image is being constructed.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着幻影仅仅是感知者此类建构的结果。感知者建构出伪物质幻影的方式，与他建构同时代人的物质形象相同，但这是依据——或者说配合——来自或通过其物质形象正在被建构的意识所接收的心电感应数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: This is some material that we have not given you, lest the implications lead you to thoughts of insignificance. But you are not simply receivers, you are also givers. As your own universe was formed by entities that you do not presently understand, so the discards of your own consciousness form realities for entities that are scarcely aware of your existence.
quotes.translation: 这部分资料我们先前未曾提供，以免其含义引发你产生微不足道之感。但你并非单纯的接收者，同时也是给予者。正如你目前的宇宙由你尚不了解的存有们所形成，你自身意识的遗弃物也为几乎察觉不到你存在的存有们构建了实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Since past, present, and future do not exist, this is a level of crystal clear communication of consciousness. Those involved have an excellent knowledge of their own backgrounds and histories, of course, but in this state possess also a much larger perspective, in which private and historical backgrounds are seen as a portion of a greater perceivable whole.
quotes.translation: 由于过去、现在与未来并不存在，这是一个意识水晶般清澈透明的沟通层面。参与者自然深谙自身背景与历史，但在此状态下更拥有更宏大的视野，将个人与历史背景视为可感知整体的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:27.) EE units are, then, emanations from consciousness. The intensity of the thought or emotion determines the characteristics of the units themselves. As certain ranges are reached, they are propelled into physical actualization. Whether or not this occurs in your terms, they will exist as small matter particles -- as, say, latent matter or pseudomatter.
quotes.translation: （9:27）因此，EE单位是意识的辐射。思想或情感的强度决定了单位本身的特性。当达到特定范围时，它们便被推进物质实现。无论是否以你们的时间尺度发生，它们都将作为微小物质粒子存在——例如，作为潜在物质或伪物质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You are growing in consciousness; therefore using it expands its capabilities. It is not a thing, but an attribute and characteristic. That is why your understanding and desire are so important. The processes initiated are beyond your normal awareness. They occur automatically with your intent if you do not block them through fear, doubt or opposing beliefs.
quotes.translation: 你正在意识中成长；因此运用意识会扩展其能力。它并非一个物件，而是一种属性与特征。这就是为何你的理解与渴望如此重要。所启动的过程超越你平常的觉知。若你不以恐惧、怀疑或对立信念加以阻挠，这些过程便会随着你的意图自动发生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: "The ways in which dream material becomes real, the processes involved, are the same ones by which the universe itself becomes objectified to our views and experience. The universe is the result of a certain kind of focus of consciousness; the stuff of it, the matter, rises out of inner wonderworks -- of which the private wonderworks of each of us is a part.
quotes.translation: "梦境素材化为现实的方式与过程，与宇宙本身具象化为我们所见所经验的方式完全相同。宇宙是意识特定聚焦的结果；其构成物与物质皆源自内在的奇妙工坊——而我们每个人私密的奇妙工坊正是其中一部分。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: I have told you many times that your consciousness is not stationary, but ever-moving and creative, so that each of you through your life moves through your psyche. Your physical experience is correspondingly altered.
quotes.translation: 我曾多次告诉你们，你们的意识并非静止不动，而是不断流动且具有创造性的，因此你们每个人终其一生都在穿越自己的心灵。你们的物质经验也随之相应改变。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: He is told the nature of those who participate with him. He realizes they are thought-forms, for example, and his own; but again, thought-forms do possess a certain reality and consciousness. They are not cardboard actors for him to simply push around at will. He must, therefore, take them into consideration, and he has a certain responsibility toward them.
quotes.translation: 他被告知与他共同参与者的本质。例如，他意识到这些是思想形态，也是他自己的思想形态；但同样地，思想形态确实拥有某种真实性与意识。它们并非他可以随意摆弄的纸板演员。因此，他必须将它们纳入考量，并对它们负有某种责任。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Each of you are involved in the same kind of relationships, whether or not you are aware of them. Though it seems to you that reincarnational existences involve past and future events, they are existences parallel or adjacent to your own present life and consciousness. Other aspects of your greater identity exist, relatively speaking, about or around these.
quotes.translation: 你们每个人都涉入相同类型的关系中，无论你们是否意识到这一点。尽管对你们而言，转世存在似乎涉及过去与未来的事件，但这些存在是与你们当前生活及意识平行或相邻的存在。相对而言，你们更大身份的其他面向，存在于这些存在之上或环绕其周围。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The personality structure does not make sense unless such past experience is taken into consideration. Potentials do not simply appear, they evolve. I have told you that the most minute portion of energy possesses consciousness and has its own identity. This identity of itself is never annihilated. It may form into new gestalts but the identity is retained.
quotes.translation: 若不考虑这些过往经验，人格结构便毫无意义。潜能并非凭空出现，而是逐步演化而成。我曾告诉过你们，最微小的能量单位也拥有意识并保有自身身份。这身份本身永不会湮灭。它可能形成新的完形，但身份始终被保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now: One point here before we close. I would like to give some hint as to the psychological realities that form personality structures on higher levels than your own. These personalities are able to deepen value fulfillment amazingly through an expansion of consciousness that allows them to focus into many areas within the systems and planes simultaneously.
quotes.translation: 现在：在结束前还有一点。我想就形成高于你们层次的人格结构的心理实相稍作提示。这些人格能够通过意识的扩展，惊人地深化价值实现——这种扩展使它们得以同时聚焦于系统与层面中的多个领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: In some fragments such as much plant life and vegetative life there is strong use of certain inner senses. Your rocks, Joseph, I will call vegetative. Rocks are far from lifeless. Other types of life, including your own, rely on the recognized outer senses. The ideal of course is a consciousness that is adept at using both the inner and outer senses fully.
quotes.translation: 在某些片段中，如许多植物生命和植被生命，内感官被强烈运用。约瑟，你们的岩石，我将称之为植被。岩石远非无生命。其他类型的生命，包括你们自己的，依赖公认的外感官。当然，理想状态是一个能熟练且充分运用内外感官的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Conscious projections-- I should clear this: Projections that are conscious ones--usually occur only to highly creative individuals. Spontaneous projections however do occur constantly to every consciousness. You do not dwell within your physical universe as completely as you imagine, and as I have told you, you exist as long out of it as you do within it.
quotes.translation: 有意识的投射——我该澄清这点：有意识的投射通常只发生在高度创造性的人身上。然而，自发的投射却持续发生在每个意识中。你并非如自己所想那般完全栖身于物质宇宙之内，正如我曾告诉你的，你存在于其外的时间与存在于其内的时间一样长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Because time is open-ended, as you think of it, you can also affect what you would think of as past reincarnational selves, and at times react in and to their environment. You would usually do this in the dream state, but this is often accomplished just below the level of waking consciousness, and is blotted out by you as you go about your daily business.
quotes.translation: 由于时间如你所想是开放性的，你也能影响你认为的过去转世自我，有时还会对其环境做出反应并置身其中。你通常在梦境状态中做到这点，但这常发生在清醒意识之下的层面，并在你忙于日常事务时被自己抹除。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You are not now what you were ten minutes earlier. You are not the same being physically, psychologically, spiritually, or psychically, and ten minutes later you will be different again. To deny this is to try to force consciousness into some rigid form from which it cannot ever be freed, to apply rules to it that make a very neat psychological landscape.
quotes.translation: 此刻的你并非十分钟前的你。你在身体、心理、灵性及心灵层面都已不同，而十分钟后你又将再次改变。否认这点就是试图将意识强行塞入某种永远无法解脱的僵化形式，为其套上规则，从而制造出一幅过于整齐的心理景观。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There are also emotional interactions among the animals that completely escape you, and biological mechanisms, so that animals felled as natural prey by other animals "understand" their part in nature. They do not anticipate death before it happens, however. The fatal act propels the consciousness out from the flesh, so that in those terms it is merciful.
quotes.translation: 动物之间也存在着完全为你所忽略的情感互动与生物机制，因此被其他动物作为天然猎物扑杀的动物"理解"自己在自然中的角色。然而它们并不会在死亡发生前预知死亡。致命的行为将意识从肉体中驱离，就那个层面而言，这是仁慈的。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: In the beginning entry to your plane requires a simple energy unit, a sperm, a simple but potent capsule that contains all the future potentiality. After entry into your plane, the self or identity, the consciousness, without any physical act, can leave the physical body, expand, travel through the medium of atoms and molecules, and completely reassemble.
quotes.translation: 进入你们层面的初始阶段需要一个简单的能量单位——一个精子，一个简单却强效的胶囊，其中蕴含着所有未来的潜能。进入你们层面后，自我或本体、意识无需任何物理行为，即可离开肉体、扩展、穿越原子与分子的介质，并完全重组。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You could compare these units, simply for an analogy, to the invisible breath of consciousness. This analogy will not carry us far, but it will be enough initially to get the idea across. Breath is of course also a pulsation, and these units operate in a pulsating manner. They are emitted by the cells, for example, in plants, animals, rocks, and so forth.
quotes.translation: 你可以将这些单位比喻为意识的无形气息。这个比喻虽不能深入，但足以初步传达概念。气息当然也是一种脉动，而这些单位以脉动的方式运作。例如，它们由植物、动物、岩石等细胞所发射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now, I will tell you further that these dimensions merely represent various capacities of consciousness. All these dimensions exist at once, and even within your system, but your consciousness cannot perceive them.
quotes.translation: 现在，我要进一步告诉你们，这些维度仅仅代表了意识的各种能力。所有这些维度同时存在，甚至存在于你们的系统之内，但你们的意识无法感知它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: While this may seem like the sheerest Pollyanna, nevertheless there is no evil in basic terms. This does not mean that you do not meet with effects that appear evil, but as you each move individually through the dimensions of your own consciousness, you will understand that all seeming opposites are other faces of the one supreme drive toward creativity.
quotes.translation: 虽然这听起来像是纯粹的盲目乐观，但本质上并没有邪恶。这并不意味着你们不会遇到看似邪恶的结果，但当你们每个人各自穿越自己意识的维度时，就会明白所有看似对立的事物，都是那朝向创造力的至高驱力的另一面。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: To one extent or another your consciousness will indeed be traveling. Again, a playful attitude is best. If you retain it and remember children's games, then the affair will be entirely enjoyable; and even if you experience events that seem frightening, you will recognize them as belonging to the same category as the frightening events of a child's game.
quotes.translation: 你的意识或多或少确实会旅行。再次强调，保持游戏心态最为理想。若你能保持这种心态并回忆孩童的游戏，整个过程将充满乐趣；即便经历看似可怕的事件，你也会明白它们与孩童游戏中的惊险情节属于同一范畴。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: In one way or another, they are always invited (underlined) -- again, always invited -- in response to that greater rhythm of existence in which physical life is dependent upon constant transformation of consciousness and form. Some early chapters in our latest book (Mass Events)1 throw light on reasons other than biological ones, for such circumstances.
quotes.translation: 它们总是以某种方式被邀请（强调）——再次强调，总是被邀请——以回应那更宏大的存在韵律，在此韵律中，物质生命依赖于意识与形态的持续转化。我们最新著作《群体事件》的前几章揭示了此类情况除生物学原因之外的缘由。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: A belief in hell fires can cause you to hallucinate Hades' conditions. A belief in a stereotyped heaven can result in a hallucination of heavenly conditions. You always form your own reality according to your ideas and expectations. This is the nature of consciousness in whatever reality it finds itself. Such hallucinations, I assure you, are temporary.
quotes.translation: 对地狱之火的信念会让你产生冥府景象的幻觉。对刻板天堂的信念会导致天堂境况的幻觉。你始终根据自身的观念与期待构建自己的实相。无论意识处于何种实相中，这都是其本质。我向你保证，这类幻觉都是暂时的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In double dreams and triple dreams consciousness shows its transparent, simultaneous nature. Several lines of dream experience can be encountered at the same time, each complete in itself, but when the dreamer wakes to the fact, the experience cannot be neurologically translated; so one dream usually predominates, with the others more like ghost images.
quotes.translation: 在双重梦境与三重梦境中，意识展现出其透明而同时性的本质。多条梦境经验可同时被体验，每条自成一体，但当做梦者清醒意识到此事实时，这种经验无法以神经学方式转译；因此通常只有一条梦境占据主导，其余则更像重影意象。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: In the case of projection, this trance forms a safe channel through which the consciousness may travel and return. It is associated with the pyramid effect, usually going outward from the center of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 在投射的情况下，这种出神状态形成一条安全通道，意识可经由其旅行并返回。它与金字塔效应相关，通常从意识中心向外扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The creative body consciousness creates the eye. The creative inner psyche creates the ego. The body forms the eye in the splendid wisdom of its great unconscious knowing. The psyche brings forth the ego that perceives psychologically as the eye perceives physically. Both the eye and the ego are formations focused toward perception of exterior reality.
quotes.translation: 创造性的身体意识创造了眼睛。创造性的内在心灵创造了自我。身体以其伟大无意识认知的卓越智慧形成了眼睛。心灵引出自我，它像眼睛感知物质世界那样进行心理感知。眼睛和自我都是聚焦于感知外在现实的构造。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The tree itself in some ways is wiser than man. We have spoken of the inner consciousness of a tree before. But the tree does not--and you'll have to take my word for this--consider itself in divisions. A tree does not divide itself up into a self that grows leaves and roots, and into a self that is automatically moved by the wind through its branches.
quotes.translation: 树木本身在某些方面比人类更智慧。我们之前谈论过树木的内在意识。但树木并不——你得相信我的话——将自己视为分裂的。树木不会把自己分裂成生长叶子和根部的自我，以及被风吹动枝叶的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Your consciousness then takes many forms, and these forms need not be alike any more, say, than a caterpillar is like a butterfly. The soul or entity has complete freedom of expression. It changes its form to suit its expression, and it forms environments like stage settings, and worlds to suit its purposes. Each setting brings forth new developments.
quotes.translation: 因此，你的意识呈现许多形态，这些形态不必相似，好比毛毛虫与蝴蝶不必相同。灵魂或存有拥有完全的表达自由。它改变形态以适应其表达，并像布置舞台布景那样塑造环境，创造世界以符合其目的。每个布景都带来新的发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Those realities however which appear only in certain stages of consciousness, are secondaries. This is perhaps one of the most important bits of information I have given you; for if you are bright enough, and I think that you are, then you have a yardstick by which to measure the nature of primary reality, from which all other manifestations are spun.
quotes.translation: 然而，那些仅出现在特定意识阶段中的实相，皆为次要实相。这或许是我给予你们最重要的信息之一；因为若你们足够聪慧——我相信你们确实如此——那么你们便掌握了一把衡量原初实相本质的标尺，所有其他显化皆由此衍生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: If ever in a dream experience you defy gravity, then gravity is not a primary reality, but only a manifestation within your own physical system. If clock time is escaped within the dream state, then clock time is not a primary. What you cannot escape within any range of consciousness, can be called a Primary Condition, and you may capitalize the term.
quotes.translation: 若在梦境体验中你曾摆脱重力束缚，那么重力便非原初实相，而仅是你们物理系统内的显化。若在梦境状态中能挣脱钟表时间，那么钟表时间亦非原初实相。在任何意识范畴内都无法逃脱之物，方可称为原初条件，此词可大写首字母。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: I am not sugarcoating the process for you, for this would not be to your advantage. Nor will I understate the advantages that can be yours if you do so continue, for there are many. There will be direct experience of inner reality that is encountered most infrequently, and expansion of consciousness and a resulting fulfillment of your own personality.
quotes.translation: 我并非在粉饰这个过程，因这对你并无益处。我也不会低估若你持续精进所能获得的诸多益处。你将获得极为罕见的内在实相直接体验，意识得以扩展，最终实现人格的圆满。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Those units of consciousness are the building blocks for the physical material of your body, for the trees and rocks, the oceans, the continents, and the very manifestation of space itself as you understand it.
quotes.translation: 那些意识单位是构成你身体物质、树木岩石、海洋大陆，乃至你所理解的空间本身显现的基本构件。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The second dream was brought on by the memories subconsciously released in the first dream, and the whole memory block, oddly enough, was released by the fact that Ruburt had in the present some difficulty with his monthly periods. It had been on his mind, brought to his consciousness once the possibility of the difficulty as being a cancer symptom.
quotes.translation: 第二个梦是由第一个梦中潜意识释放的记忆引发的，而整个记忆区块——说来奇怪——竟是因为鲁柏近期月经不顺而被释放的。他心中一直挂念此事，当这种不适被怀疑可能是癌症症状时，便浮现在了他的意识中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: At your stage it is of course easier if the actual separation of consciousness from the physical body occurs without your awareness. However the experience itself is excellent training. I have told you that these projections may carry you to different systems. In the beginning you are safer perhaps in those projections that involve your own reality.
quotes.translation: 在你们现阶段，若意识与肉体的分离能在无意识状态下自然发生，自然更为容易。然而这种体验本身是极佳的训练。我曾告诉过你们，这些投射可能将你们带往不同的系统。初期阶段，涉及你们自身实相的投射或许更为安全。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Consciousness survival: construction of this basic psychological structure of consciousness survival must be interpreted, or projected or constructed, in terms of physical survival within your physical field.
quotes.translation: 意识生存：这种意识生存基本心理结构的建构，必须在你们物质场域中以物质生存的角度来诠释、投射或建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: [Each] cell, then, as I have often said, operates so well in time because it is, in those terms, precognitive. It is aware of the position, health, vitality, of all other cells on the face of the planet. It is aware of the position of each grain of sand on the shores of each ocean, and in those terms it forms a portion of the earth's consciousness.
quotes.translation: 正如我常说的，每个细胞之所以能在时间中运作得如此完美，正是因为从那些角度而言，它们具有预知能力。它们知晓地球上所有其他细胞的位置、健康状态与活力，知晓每片海洋岸边每粒沙的位置——从那些角度而言，它们构成了地球意识的一部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: It can only be achieved as a rule after some proficiency has been gained with recalling dream projections. Here you are dealing with the waking consciousness in its normally strong and dominant condition. You must be able to let it operate and yet perceive beneath its surface the other conditions, the projection conditions, that are also operating.
quotes.translation: 通常只有在熟练掌握回忆梦投射之后，才能达成这一点。此时你面对的是处于正常强势主导状态下的清醒意识。你必须让它运作，同时感知其表面之下同样在运作的其他状态——即投射状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: We were discussing the nature of perception some while back, and its relation to clairvoyant activities. We were discussing the fact that no knowledge exists apart from consciousness. I told you that any perception alters the perceiver. Not only mentally and emotionally but also alters the electromagnetic reality of the internal physical structure.
quotes.translation: 我们之前讨论过感知的本质，以及它与千里眼活动的关系。我们讨论过这样一个事实：没有任何知识能脱离意识而存在。我曾告诉你，任何感知都会改变感知者本身——不仅在心理和情感层面，还会改变内在物理结构的电磁实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The structure of probabilities deals with parallel experience on all levels. Your consciousness picks and chooses to accept as real the results of, and ramifications of, only certain overall purposes, desires, or intents. You follow these through a time structure. Your focus allows other just-as-legitimate experience to become invisible or unfelt.
quotes.translation: 概率的结构处理所有层面上的平行经验。你的意识会挑选并选择接受某些整体目的、欲望或意图的结果及其衍生为真实。你通过时间结构追随这些选择。你的焦点使得其他同样合理的经验变得不可见或无法感知。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: When I enter your environment, I turn my consciousness in your direction, therefore. In one way, I translate what I am into an event that you can understand to some extent. In a much more limited manner, any artist does the same thing when he translates what he is, or a portion of it, into a painting. There is at least an evocative analogy there.
quotes.translation: 因此，当我进入你们的环境时，我会将意识转向你们的方向。从某种角度来说，我将自己的本质转化为一个你们能在某种程度上理解的事件。以更有限的方式而言，任何艺术家在将自身本质或其中一部分转化为画作时，也在做同样的事。这其中至少存在一种引人共鸣的类比。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: 2. This paragraph of Seth's at once reminded me of some of his most evocative earlier material on animal consciousness. He gave it in the 832nd session for Chapter 5 of Mass Events (on January 29, 1979), and I quoted it in the Preliminary Notes to the Preface for Dreams: "Nature in all of its varieties is so richly encountered by the animals...."
quotes.translation: 2. 赛斯的这段话立刻让我想起他早期关于动物意识的一些最引人共鸣的论述。他在1979年1月29日第832节《群体事件》第五章中给出这些内容，我在《梦》序言的预备注释中引用过："大自然以其万千形态如此丰饶地呈现在动物面前……"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: The personality is more integrated, yet through its acceptance of inner data, the ego, to use the term lightly, has expanded. It has not shrunk. It is now composed of more various elements from the whole personality. Retaining its own consciousness of reality it can now afford to step out of itself momentarily in order to gain further experience.
quotes.translation: 人格更为整合，然而通过接纳内在资料，轻用术语来说，自我已扩展而非萎缩。它如今由整个人格中更多元的元素组成。在保有自身对实相的意识的同时，它现在能够暂时跳出自身以获取进一步经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There is release also, you see, for the body consciousness, which as you know then changes to other forms. The exercises which Ruburt is barely beginning will be of great help in our work, and in the development of his abilities. They are also however excellent exercises that will result in the training so advantageous at the point of transition.
quotes.translation: 你看，身体意识也获得释放，随后如你所知将转化为其他形态。鲁柏刚刚开始的练习将对我们的工作及他能力的发展大有助益。这些练习同时也是极佳的锻炼，能在过渡阶段带来如此有益的训练。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: You are not a forsaken offshoot of physical matter, nor is your consciousness meant to vanish like a puff of smoke. Instead, you form the physical body that you know at a deeply unconscious level with great discrimination, miraculous clarity, and intimate unconscious knowledge of each minute cell that composes it. This is not meant symbolically.
quotes.translation: 你并非被遗弃的物理物质分支，你的意识也并非注定如烟消散。相反，你在深层的无意识层面，以非凡的辨识力、奇迹般的清晰度，以及对构成身体的每个微小细胞亲密无间的无意识认知，形成了你所知的物质身体。这并非象征性说法。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: All personal contact with the multidimensional God, all legitimate moments of mystic consciousness, will always have a unifying effect. They will not, therefore, isolate the individual involved, but instead will enlarge his perceptions until he will experience the reality and uniqueness of as many other aspects of reality of which he is capable.
quotes.translation: 所有与多维神性的人格接触，所有合法的神秘意识时刻，都会产生统一的效果。因此它们不会孤立个体，反而会扩展其感知，直到他能体验到自身所能触及的实相中众多其他面向的真实性与独特性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (Very emphatically:) It is absurd to believe that you can learn something about consciousness by destroying it. It is absurd to believe that you can learn one iota about the inner reality of life when your search leads you to destroy it. Destruction, you see, in your terms (underlined twice), presupposes a misunderstanding of life to begin with.
quotes.translation: （非常强调地：）认为通过摧毁意识就能了解意识，这是荒谬的。认为通过毁灭生命的内在实相就能探知其分毫，这也是荒谬的。要知道，在你们的说法里（双划线强调），毁灭本身就预设了对生命的根本误解。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The cells of your physical body incidentally also have their awareness, which may seem minute and insignificant to you, but they make independent decisions upon which you depend in very important degrees. Your term, instinct, is a very unfortunate one, and coined to begin with because you insist that no organism except man has any consciousness.
quotes.translation: 顺便说一句，你们物质身体的细胞也有其觉知，这在你们看来或许微不足道，但它们会做出独立的决定，而你们在非常重要的程度上依赖这些决定。你们所说的"本能"一词非常不幸，它之所以被创造出来，根本原因在于你们坚持认为除了人类之外，没有任何生物拥有意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now, there are many ways... but only one real way. And the way is to begin the journey, as Ruburt told you, into the nature of your own consciousness for the answers are within you and not out from you... and no one can tell you the answers. Now in one way, each individual will find his own answer... and yet all answers, in another way, are one.
quotes.translation: 现在，有许多方法……但只有一个真正的方法。这个方法就是如鲁柏告诉你的那样，开始探索你自己意识的本质之旅，因为答案在你之内而非你之外……而且没有人能告诉你答案。从某种角度来看，每个人都会找到自己的答案……然而从另一种角度来看，所有答案都是一体的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: There are systems of probability not connected with your own system at all, much more advanced than any you presently imagine, and in these, the truths of which I have been speaking are well known. In them individuals creatively and purposely create realities, knowing how to do so and giving full rein to the creative abilities of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 存在着与你们系统完全无关的概率系统，远比你们目前想象的任何系统都要先进，在这些系统中，我一直在谈论的真理是众所周知的。在这些系统中，个体创造性地、有目的地创造实相，知道如何做到这一点，并充分释放意识的创造能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: A point I wanted to add, Joseph. What you actually felt when the tree fell was the pain of the tree, in much muted form. The tree while dead still had consciousness. As a rule you will usually have such experiences to begin with through one inner sense. You are not adept enough yet to recognize inner data from more than one direction at a time.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，我想补充一点。当那棵树倒下时，你实际感受到的是树的痛苦，只是以非常微弱的形式呈现。那棵树虽然死了，但仍然拥有意识。通常，你一开始会通过一种内在感官经历这样的体验。你还不够熟练，无法同时从多个方向识别内在信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: That is simply because everything is now scheduled in a fashion, with the time available. That material, however, is "excellent medicine," and can indeed be life-saving (intently). It is indeed unfortunate that those beliefs that show themselves so simply and effectively in nature seem so mysterious to the usual line of official consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这仅仅是因为现在一切事物都按照可用的时间以某种方式安排。然而，那资料是"极好的药"，确实能救命（专注地）。那些在自然中如此简单而有效地显现自身的信念，对通常的官方意识而言却显得如此神秘，这实在是不幸。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health

quotes.text: There was a direct and instantaneous reaction between consciousness and matter. (Pause.) An outburst of electromagnetic power, strong enough to seed a universe. Your universe is but one of many, and you perceive but a small portion of the universe in which you do exist, for there are dimensions within it that you do not perceive. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 意识与物质之间存在着直接而瞬间的反应。（停顿）一股电磁能量的爆发，强大到足以孕育一个宇宙。你们的宇宙只是众多宇宙之一，而你们所感知的仅是你们确实存在的宇宙中的一小部分，因为其中存在着你们无法感知的维度。（长停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The ideas that you have involving the nature of reality will strongly color your experiences, for you will interpret them in the light of your beliefs, even as now you interpret daily life according to your ideas of what is possible or not possible. Your consciousness may withdraw from your body slowly or quickly, according to many variables.
quotes.translation: 你们对实相本质所抱持的观念，将强烈地影响你们的经验，因为你们会根据信念来诠释这些经验，就像此刻你们根据自己对可能或不可能之事的观念来诠释日常生活一样。你们的意识可能根据许多变数，缓慢或快速地脱离身体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: ugust 6, 1980. So we were back at the sessions again. It took me only a few seconds to come out of trance. "Though I should stay in one," I said, "because I was more comfortable than I've been all day." Because the heat didn't bother Seth, (or me speaking for him) at all. Returning to my usual state of consciousness I was instantly hot again.
quotes.translation: 1980年8月6日。所以我们又回到了课中。我只花了几秒钟就脱离了出神状态。"虽然我应该保持这种状态，"我说，"因为我比整天都舒服。"因为炎热完全影响不了赛斯（或我为他说话）。回到我平常的意识状态后，我立刻又感到炎热了。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach

quotes.text: The intellect is a part of the ego, and its development is important. Therefore the appearance of separate events trains the intellect. Otherwise full use of the intuitions would be relied upon and the intellect would not develop, for the intellect is an important feature in the further specialization of individual consciousness and identity.
quotes.translation: 智力是自我的一部分，其发展至关重要。因此，独立事件的出现训练了智力。否则，人们将完全依赖直觉的运用，而智力便无法发展，因为智力在个体意识与身份认同的进一步分化中扮演着重要角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In usual historic terms, humanity has been experimenting with its own unique kind of consciousness, and as I have mentioned many times, this necessitated an arbitrary division between the subject and the perceiver -- nature and man -- and brought about a situation in which the species came to consider itself apart from the rest of existence.
quotes.translation: 以通常的历史观点来看，人类一直在实验其独特的那种意识，而正如我多次提及的，这必然导致主体与感知者——自然与人类——之间的人为划分，并造成一种局面，使该物种认为自己与其余存在分离。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: (9:58.) Mentally it can form an infinite number of events, and consciousness can take an infinite number of roles. The child may easily dream of being its own mother or father, sister or brother, the family dog, a fly, a soldier. In waking play the child will then try out those roles, and quickly see that they do not fit physical conditions.
quotes.translation: （9:58）在心灵上，它可以形成无限数量的事件，而意识可以扮演无限数量的角色。孩子可能轻易梦见自己是自己的母亲或父亲、姐妹或兄弟、家里的狗、一只苍蝇、一名士兵。在清醒的游戏中，孩子会尝试这些角色，并迅速发现它们不符合物质条件。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The inner ego knows what it is about. This inner data is transmitted through the mental genetic system by way of the generalized molecular consciousness to the chromosome system, and the chromosome system then translates data into a physical code for the cells to follow. You will find this fits in with the material from our previous session.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道自己在做什么。这个内在数据通过心灵遗传系统，经由概括性的分子意识传递到染色体系统，然后染色体系统将数据翻译成细胞遵循的物质密码。你会发现这与我们上次课的材料相符。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Study and practice with psychological time will show you the validity and strength of that inner self, so that you will clearly see that it is not completely bound to the so-called objective universe by any means. Matter is not an imprisoning form. It is a means by which consciousness expresses itself within the limits of the physical field.
quotes.translation: 对心理时间的研究与修习，将向你展现内在自体的真实性与力量，使你清楚看见它绝非完全受制于所谓的客观宇宙。物质并非禁锢的形式，而是意识在物质场域限制内表达自身的一种方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now these categories do not come first. Your individuality comes first. You have certain characteristics of your own. These place you in a certain position. As you are not a rock or a mineral, but a person, so your individuality places you in a particular family or species of consciousness. This represents your overall viewpoint of reality.
quotes.translation: 这些分类并非首要。你的个体性才是首要。你拥有自身独特的气质，这些特质将你置于特定位置。正如你并非岩石或矿物，而是一个人，你的个体性将你置于某个特定的意识家族或物种中。这代表了你对实相的整体视角。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: It remains nebulous because it is consciously unrealized. The best I can do is to point out areas that have been relatively invisible, to help you explore, actually, different facets of your own consciousness.2 To some extent this book has been written to help you exercise your own intuitive and mental capacities from a different viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 它之所以保持模糊，是因为尚未被有意识地认知。我所能做的，是指出那些相对隐而不显的领域，实际上是为了帮助你探索自身意识的不同面向。在某种程度上，本书旨在协助你从不同视角运用自身的直觉与心智能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The ego has completely changed its structure. It has changed its electromagnetic identity in your cases, since our sessions. It has learned, to some extent, to assimilate your inner experiences. In the long run this is the most effective method. And in the long run no consciousness expansion can occur unless the ego structure is so altered.
quotes.translation: 自我已彻底改变了其结构。在你们的情况中，自我们的课程以来，它已改变了其电磁身份。它在某种程度上学会了吸纳你们的内在经验。从长远来看，这是最有效的方法。而从长远来看，除非自我结构如此改变，否则任何意识扩展都不可能发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: (10:33.) Molecular structures send out their own messages, and unless you are tuned in to perceive them, they may be interpreted as static or meaningless noise. Any one of these levels of consciousness can be covered in a twinkling, and no notice taken of it; or, at least theoretically, you could spend a lifetime exploring any given level.
quotes.translation: （10:33）分子结构会发出它们自己的讯息，除非你调准频率去感知它们，否则它们可能被解读为静电或无意义的噪音。这些意识层次中的任何一个都可能在一瞬间被掠过，而不被注意；或者，至少在理论上，你可以花一辈子时间去探索任何一个特定的层次。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Within their happening there may be a distorted -- to it -- grotesque duration in which action may be seemingly impossible. No separation between self and experience may be allowed. Even an exalted experience can be an assault upon consciousness if it is forced. The price paid is much too high as far as the entire personality is concerned.
quotes.translation: 在其发生过程中，可能存在一种扭曲的——对其而言——怪诞的持续性，其中行动看似不可能。自我与经验之间可能不允许有任何分离。即使是崇高的体验，若是被迫的，也可能对意识造成冲击。就整个人格而言，付出的代价实在太高了。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: "If we really understand how dreams worked and allowed ourselves to explore dream levels, we'd see how the universe is formed. It is the ... creative product, en masse, of our individual and joint dreams ... Our world is a dream level for some other types of consciousness; it's shared to some extent, then, and can serve as a meeting point.
quotes.translation: “如果我们真正理解梦境如何运作，并允许自己探索梦的层次，我们就会看到宇宙是如何形成的。它是我们个人与集体梦境的……集体创造产物……我们的世界是其他类型意识的一个梦境层次；它在某种程度上是共享的，因此可以作为一个交汇点。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The kind of reality thus created by that portion of your consciousness forms a given kind of experience. It is valid and real. When you want to travel, you do so within the dimensions of the reality thus created. If you drive or fly from one city to another, you do not consider the journey imaginary. You are exploring the dimensions given.
quotes.translation: 你意识的那部分所创造出的这类实相，形成了一种特定的经验。它是有效且真实的。当你想旅行时，你就在这样创造出的实相维度内进行。如果你开车或乘飞机从一个城市到另一个城市，你不会认为这趟旅程是虚幻的。你是在探索既定的维度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: A note of further explanation here. The difference between consciousness of self as a result of our second dilemma, and ego consciousness as a result of our third dilemma, should be made very clear.
quotes.translation: 此处需进一步说明：由第二困境产生的自我意识，与由第三困境产生的自我意识，两者之间的区别必须厘清。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There is an ebb and tide. Your consciousness is not fully focused within physical reality, even during those intervals when you exist within it. The focus varies considerably, and in certain rhythm.
quotes.translation: 意识如潮汐般涨落。即便在你存在于物质实相的那些时段，你的意识也并非完全聚焦其中。其聚焦程度会随特定韵律产生显著变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: (10:35.) The seeming division is not arbitrary, or forced upon you. It is simply caused by your present stage of development, and it does vary. Many people take excursions into other realities -- swim, so to speak, through other streams of consciousness as a part of their normal waking lives. Sometimes strange fish pop up in those waters!
quotes.translation: （十点三十五分）这种看似分裂的状态并非任意强加于你，而是由你当前的发展阶段自然形成，且具有可变性。许多人会在清醒生活中进行意识漫游——可以说，他们如同在意识之河中畅游，穿梭于其他实相。有时，那些水域中会跃出奇异的生灵！
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You saw for example the therapeutic effect of your brief shopping trip to the mall, and the overwhelming effect of a simple emotion like laughter and different surroundings, to break up a difficult depression. Your vacation plans can serve in the same manner. Different environments simply give consciousness some new material to nibble on.
quotes.translation: 例如，你看到了短暂去商场购物的治疗效果，以及像笑声和不同环境这样简单情绪的强大作用，能够打破难以摆脱的抑郁。你的假期计划也能以同样的方式发挥作用。不同的环境只是给意识提供一些新的素材来慢慢品味。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: A certain level, again, of consciousness is necessary, a certain kind of knowledge, a certain understanding of energy organization before an identity can manipulate a complicated physical organism.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，在身份能够操控复杂的物质有机体之前，必须达到一定程度的意识、一定种类的知识，以及对能量组织的某种理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: These units--let us discuss them as they are related, for example, to a rock. The rock is composed of atoms and molecules each with their own consciousness. This forms a gestalt-rock-consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这些单位——让我们讨论它们与岩石的关联。岩石由原子和分子组成，每个原子和分子都有自己的意识。这形成了整体岩石意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: It was aware, and conscious. However it was simply frightened to find what seemed like the body in a position normally impossible for it. The next time it will go further. In the same way however you will both find the inner ego inserting itself into periods of waking consciousness, and there may or may not be a momentary disorientation.
quotes.translation: 它觉察着，也意识着。然而它只是惊恐地发现，那个看似身体的东西竟处于通常不可能的位置。下一次它会走得更远。不过同样地，你们两人都会发现内在自我会插入清醒意识的时段，并可能或不会出现短暂的迷失方向感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The plants in a room, or in a house, are quite aware of the growing fetus; the plants will also pick up the fact that a member of a family is ill, often in advance of physical symptoms. They are that sensitive to the consciousness within cellular structure. Plants will know whether a fetus is male or female, even if the mother does not.
quotes.translation: 房间或房屋里的植物完全能感知到正在成长的胎儿；植物还会察觉到家庭成员生病的事实，往往在身体症状出现之前。它们对细胞结构内的意识如此敏感。植物会知道胎儿是男是女，即使母亲不知道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The brain itself never sleeps, of course, since it's endlessly involved in running the vastly complicated physiological functions of the body. Sleep for the conscious mind results when neural activity in the reticular activating system (the RAS), which screens the sensory information reaching consciousness, falls below a minimum level.
quotes.translation: 大脑本身当然从不睡眠，因为它无休止地参与运作身体极其复杂的生理功能。当网状激活系统（RAS）中筛选到达意识的感官信息的神经活动降至最低水平以下时，意识心便进入睡眠状态。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: 6. I listed the families of consciousness (along with simple clues to their pronunciations) when Seth first gave them at 11:14 in the 732nd session. Here I'll not only remind the reader of the sessions in which Seth described the characteristics of each family, but will try to summarize in a few words the overall function of each one.
quotes.translation: 6. 当赛斯在第732节课的11:14首次列出意识家族时（附带了简单的发音提示），我在此不仅提醒读者回顾赛斯描述各家族特征的课程，还将尝试用寥寥数语概括每个家族的整体功能。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: In your particular state of consciousness on that particular evening, your attention strayed beyond your ordinary fields of perception. You perceived an inhabitant of another system. There was indeed a quite unusual point of contact reached; most unusual indeed in that you not only perceived this individual, but he also perceived you.
quotes.translation: 在那个特定夜晚的特定意识状态下，你的注意力超越了寻常的感知领域。你感知到了另一个系统的居民。确实达成了相当不寻常的接触点——最不寻常之处在于，不仅你感知到了这个个体，他也感知到了你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Consciousness does not refresh itself in sleep. It is merely turned in another direction. Consciousness does not sleep then in those terms and while it may be turned off it is not like a light.
quotes.translation: 意识并非在睡眠中更新自己，它只是转向另一个方向。意识在那种意义上并不沉睡，虽然它可能被关闭，但不像一盏灯。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now. Such enclosures are the innermost basis of any consciousness, regardless of the type of consciousness. They could be said to represent the inner psychic form even of the most minutes cell.
quotes.translation: 现在。这样的围场是任何意识的最内在基础，无论意识类型为何。它们可说是代表了最微小细胞的内在心灵形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: One small point might explain what I mean here. If you do not want to remember a particular dream, you yourself censor the memory on levels quite close to consciousness. Often you can even catch yourself in the act of purposely dropping the memory of a dream. The touching-up process occurs almost at this same level, though not quite.
quotes.translation: 有个小细节或许能说明我的意思。如果你不想记住某个特定的梦，你自己会在非常接近意识的层面审查这段记忆。你甚至常常能当场逮到自己刻意丢弃梦境记忆的行为。修饰过程几乎也发生在同一层面，尽管不完全相同。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: There is no one particular pattern followed by consciousness in its perception of itself as action. Mankind is more familiar with certain patterns and relatively unfamiliar with others. Any action changes itself. Nothing is constant. This rule is not forced upon action from some outside agency, but is simply a part of its own nature.
quotes.translation: 意识在感知自身为行动时，并无特定模式可循。人类对某些模式较为熟悉，对另一些则相对陌生。任何行动都会改变自身。没有什么是恒常不变的。这条规则并非由外在力量强加于行动，而仅仅是其本性的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Ego failure may result. Development of the inner senses is a much more effective method of perceiving other realities, and followed correctly, the ego is not only stronger but more flexible, and consciousness even of physical reality is increased. Such development becomes an unfolding and a natural expansion of the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 自我可能因此失败。发展内在感官是感知其他实相更有效的方法，若正确遵循，自我不仅更强大，也更灵活，甚至对物质实相的意识也会增强。这种发展将成为整个人格的自然展开与扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This self can give directions to both the ego and the subconscious and can instruct the subconscious to speed up healing processes. Now you address this I automatically and identify it in with your own mind as a sort of supra-consciousness. You are only familiar with a small part of it, however. Here again, the division is arbitrary.
quotes.translation: 这个自己能够对自我和潜意识下达指令，并能指示潜意识加速疗愈过程。你自动地将这个"我"视为某种超意识，并认同它就是你自己的心智。然而你只熟悉它的一小部分。这里再次说明，这种划分是武断的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: With some, the lapses are more noticeable, outside of the norm. If the situation is not understood, then the personality may find it difficult to relate to physical events. If he is able to perceive the other areas of consciousness, he may find himself in still more difficulty -- not realizing that both systems of reality are valid.
quotes.translation: 对某些人而言，这种失神状态比常人更为显著。若不了解此情况，人格可能难以与物质事件建立关联。若此人能感知意识的其他领域，他可能会陷入更大的困境——未能意识到两种实相系统都是有效的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (10:00.) Beneath the dreams that you recall are experiences of consciousness that appear only now and then, and in distorted form. These express in nonphysical terms your relationship with your own being. Here you are regenerated, and you are quite free of any conscious beliefs. From this level individual and mass ideals are formed.
quotes.translation: （十点整。）在你记得的梦境之下，存在着偶尔才以扭曲形式显现的意识体验。这些体验以非物质方式表达你与自身存有的关系。在此你获得重生，完全不受任何意识信念的束缚。个体与群体的理想皆由此层面形成。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The animals were also accepted in this natural philosophy of selfhood as the individual plainly saw the living quality of consciousness. The characteristics of the animals were understood to continue "life," adding their qualities to the experience of the self in a new way.3 You had better put "life" in quotes in that last sentence.
quotes.translation: 动物也被接纳于这种关于自我本质的自然哲学中，因为个体清楚地看到了意识的生命特质。动物的特性被理解为延续着"生命"，并以新的方式将其特质添加到自我的经验中。3 最后那句"生命"最好加上引号。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The inner senses are an attribute of consciousness. The outer senses make this information meaningful to the physical organism, and the body consciousness, the ego. This is for Ruburt's book.
quotes.translation: 内在感官是意识的一种属性。外在感官使这些信息对物质有机体、身体意识和自我具有意义。这是为鲁柏的书准备的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The splendid biological acceptance of life could not be thrust or forced upon his emerging consciousness, so to be effective, efficient, to emerge in the new focus of awareness, grace had to expand from the life of the tissue to that of the feelings, thoughts and mental processes. Grace became the handmaiden of natural guilt, then.
quotes.translation: 生命辉煌的生物性接纳无法强行或逼迫地注入他初生的意识中，因此为了有效运作、高效显现于这崭新的觉知焦点，恩宠必须从组织的生命扩展至情感、思想与心智历程的生命。于是恩宠成了自然罪咎的侍女。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: "The units of consciousness that organized to form his identity as you knew it, still form that pattern -- but not physically. The cat exists as itself in the greater living memory of its own 'larger' selfhood. Its organization -- the cat's -- exists inviolately, but as a part of the greater psychic organization from which it came.
quotes.translation: "那些组织成你所知的他之身份的意识单位，仍持续构成那个模式——但并非以物质形式。那只猫以其自身存在于它那'更大'自性所拥有的更广大鲜活记忆里。它的组织——猫的——完整无缺地存在着，但作为它从中而来的更大心灵组织的一部分。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: On Ruburts part we had a definite manipulation of consciousness that was directed to some extent. You projected once into the past, and I was one of your friends. This episode was the less distorted. One episode involved a small future projection, and was intermixed with ordinary dream elements. This involved the operating episode.
quotes.translation: 就鲁柏而言，我们进行了一次明确的意识操控，且在一定程度上具有方向性。你曾投射到过去一次，而我是你的朋友之一。这个片段扭曲较少。另一个片段涉及一次小小的未来投射，并与普通梦境元素混杂。这涉及了操作片段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: None of us are ever equipped, for general purposes, to perceive reality in all of its forms. The pyramid gestalts can do this, and we help the pyramid gestalts perform this feat. But as a rule we must pick and choose. There is too much for any consciousness to digest except those so highly developed that even I know little of them.
quotes.translation: 我们之中没有任何人天生就具备能力，能够以全盘通用的方式感知所有形态的实相。金字塔形完形意识能做到这一点，而我们则协助金字塔形完形意识完成这项壮举。但一般而言，我们必须有所取舍。任何意识所能消化的信息都太过庞杂，除非是那些高度发展的意识——连我对它们也所知甚少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The consciousness always exists before the physical materialization. The God concept, of course, originated from mankind's innate knowledge that consciousness precedes physical construction.
quotes.translation: 意识永远先于物质具体化而存在。当然，神的概念源自人类与生俱来的认知：意识先于物质建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Or it may be used as a step leading to an adjacent level of consciousness; two steps away, therefore, on the same level from normal reality. In this case it will lead you not into a deeper examination and perception of the present moment, but instead into an awareness and recognition of what I will call alternate present moments.
quotes.translation: 或者它可能被用作通往邻近意识层面的阶梯；因此，在正常实相的同一层面上相隔两步。在这种情况下，它不会引导你更深入地检视和感知当下，而是让你觉察并认识到我所谓的"交替当下时刻"。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The self will truly utilize the atoms and molecules; the consciousness will travel by this method. The particular physical body will then be known for what it is: a cooperative psychic gestalt, a psychio-physical structure formed together by the inner ego, utilizing atoms and molecules that are in themselves living and conscious.
quotes.translation: 自我将真正运用原子与分子；意识将以此方法旅行。届时，特定的物质身体将被认知为其本质：一个合作性的心灵完形，一个由内在自我共同形成的心灵-物理结构，运用着本身即具有生命和意识的原子与分子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: It is more aggressive than receptive, in contrast to some other trance states that are used to receive, rather than go out after, information. (Long pause.) It pierces, opening up dimensions through which the consciousness can then perceive events or on occasion travel through the dimension to experience the events more directly.
quotes.translation: 它比接受性更具攻击性，这与某些用于接收而非主动追寻信息的出神状态形成对比。（长停顿。）它穿透并开启维度，意识可借此感知事件，或偶尔穿越该维度更直接地体验事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Man became aware of his state of grace when he lived within the dimensions of his consciousness as it was turned toward his new world of freedom. When he did not violate, he was aware of his own grace. When he violated, it fell back into cellular awareness, as with the animals, but he felt consciously cut off from it and denied.
quotes.translation: 当人类活在自身意识的维度中，并将意识转向其崭新的自由世界时，他便觉察到自身的恩宠状态。当他未曾违逆时，他感知到自身的恩宠；当他违逆时，恩宠便退入细胞意识中——如同动物那般——但他却自觉与之隔绝，并否认其存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: In your terms, time considerations involved extensions of that kind of consciousness, in which separations could occur and divisions could be made. In terms of an organic structure, this could be likened to developing another arm or leg, or protrusion or filament -- another method of locomotion through another kind of dimension.
quotes.translation: 以你们的时间观念而言，时间考量涉及那种意识的延伸，其中可能产生分离与划分。从有机结构的角度来看，这好比发展出另一只手臂或腿、或突起物、或丝状体——另一种穿越不同维度的移动方式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: "Units of consciousness do help form different kinds of physical realities--as indeed Ruburt has himself hinted in some of his poetry. There are many dimensions that are as physical, so to speak, as your own world, but if you are not focused in them you would not at all be aware of their existence, but perceive only empty space.
quotes.translation: 意识单位确实有助于形成各种不同的物质实相——正如鲁柏在他的一些诗作中暗示的那样。有许多维度，可以说，和你们自己的世界一样物质，但如果你不聚焦于其中，你根本不会意识到它们的存在，只会感知到空无的空间。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Yet the physical matter of the born infant contains none of the same physical matter which was received initially from the parents. The original matter has completely disappeared, to be replaced by other matter as the consciousness of the infant slowly constructs about itself its growing awareness of itself into physical matter.
quotes.translation: 然而，新生婴儿的物质身体中，并不包含最初从父母那里接收的任何相同物质。原始物质已完全消失，被其他物质所取代，因为婴儿的意识在其成长过程中，逐渐将自身对自我的觉知构建进物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: This, temporarily, is something like what happened to you, Joseph. The inner self is aware of other realities. It is aware of the ego. Remember here the difference between consciousness of self and the ego, for the difference is important. The ego is but part of the self, part of the conscious self, but focused in one direction.
quotes.translation: 这暂时有点像发生在你身上的情况，约瑟夫。内在自我意识到其他实相。它意识到自我。请记住这里自我意识与自我之间的区别，因为这种区别很重要。自我只是自体的一部分，是有意识自体的一部分，但聚焦于一个方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Consciousness simply changes its form. The physical body is maintained, yet certain chemical changes occur in it also. Initially when projection is first accomplished, there is a strong charge of adrenaline. There is high activity of the thyroid gland. There is a charge of sexual hormones, which are utilized also for projection.
quotes.translation: 意识只是改变了它的形式。肉体被维持着，但其中也发生了某些化学变化。最初当投射首次完成时，会有强烈的肾上腺素激增。甲状腺活动高度活跃。性激素也会激增，这些激素也被用于投射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Consciousness on its own has a larger choice. The North-South position is still the best body position, though other positions may be used. This applies to either the drug or drugless experience. For various reasons, the time of the full moon is most beneficial. Rainy weather is an aid. For Ruburt, the time of ovulation is good.
quotes.translation: 意识本身有更大的选择范围。南北朝向的姿势仍然是最好的身体姿势，尽管其他姿势也可以使用。这适用于药物或非药物体验。出于各种原因，满月时期最为有利。雨天是一种辅助。对鲁柏来说，排卵期是好的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... No chance encounter of physical elements alone, under any circumstances, could produce consciousness -- or the conditions that would then make consciousness possible.
quotes.translation: 请稍等……在任何情况下，仅凭物质元素的偶然相遇，都不可能产生意识——或者使意识成为可能。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Fear taken into the various stages of consciousness acts as a distorting lens, hiding the natural dimensions of all symbols, acting as a barrier and as an impediment to free flow. Symbols of an explosive nature serve as releasing agents, setting loose that which has been encased. Without physical storms you would all go insane.
quotes.translation: 恐惧进入意识的不同阶段时，会像扭曲的透镜般遮蔽所有符号的自然维度，成为阻碍自由流动的屏障与障碍。具有爆发性质的符号则充当释放媒介，松脱被禁锢之物。若无物理世界的风暴，你们都将陷入疯狂。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In greater terms, seconds and moments do not exist, either, but the reality that is behind time or that you perceive as time, the "outside time" events, are composed of units that also have their own kind of consciousness. They form what appears as time to you, as atoms and molecules form what appears as space to you. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 从更宏大的视角而言，秒与瞬间同样不存在，但时间背后的实相——或你们感知为时间的"时间之外"事件——是由同样拥有自身意识的单位所构成。这些单位形成你们眼中的时间，正如原子与分子形成你们眼中的空间。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In physical life there is a lapse while messages leap the nerve ends. (See the 625th session in Chapter Five.) In other terms and on other levels, this was represented in that "moment of reflection" that took place as man's consciousness emerged from that of the animals. (Note: I did not say that man emerged from the animals.)
quotes.translation: 在物质生命中，当信息跃过神经末梢时存在时间差。（参见第五章第625节）从其他层面与角度而言，这正体现在人类意识从动物意识中浮现时那个"反思的瞬间"。（注：我并未说人类是从动物演化而来）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: (11:11.) The unknown reality, however, is unknown enough to usual reaches of the most flexible consciousness, in your terms, that it can only be approached by a personality as couched in it as I am. Once expressed, however, it can be comprehended. One of my purposes then has been to make this unknown reality consciously known.
quotes.translation: （11点11分）然而，那未知实相对最灵活的意识通常所能触及的范围而言，在你们的说法里，仍是如此未知，以至于只有像我这样置身其中的存有才能接近它。但一旦被表达出来，它就能被理解。因此，我的目的之一就是让这未知实相被有意识地认知。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: This sense would permit our man to feel the basic sensations felt by the tree, so that instead of looking at the tree his consciousness would expand to contain the experience of what it is like to be a tree. According to his proficiency, in a like manner he would feel the experience of being the intervening grass and so forth.
quotes.translation: 这种感知会让我们的这个人感受到树木所体验的基本感觉，这样他就不再只是看着树，而是他的意识会扩展，去包含成为一棵树是什么感觉的体验。根据他的熟练程度，他同样会感受到成为其间草丛等存在的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The same kind of questions occur at the other end of the scale: When does death actually come? In most of these debates, this hypothetical self or consciousness is taken as the measure.
quotes.translation: 同样的问题也出现在另一端的尺度上：死亡究竟何时真正到来？在大多数这类争论中，这个假设性的自我或意识被当作衡量的标准。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The power to dream springs from that source. Dreaming is not a passive activity. It demands a peculiar and distinctive mixture of various kinds of consciousness, and the transformation of "nonphysical perception" into symbols and codes that will be sensually understood, though not directly experienced as in waking experience.
quotes.translation: 做梦的力量源自那个源头。做梦并非一种被动的活动。它需要各种意识以一种独特而鲜明的混合方式运作，并将“非物质感知”转化为能被感官理解的符号与密码，尽管这些体验不像清醒时的体验那样被直接经历。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: It is almost impossible to explain clearly, through the use of words, this massive complexity, for all fields of activity are self-generating. Even the dream field is self-generating. No consciousness can bring itself to destruction. It can only cease experiencing a certain portion of action. This is a rather important point.
quotes.translation: 几乎不可能通过文字清楚解释这种庞大的复杂性，因为所有活动场域都是自我生成的。就连梦境场域也是自我生成的。没有任何意识能将自己导向毁灭。它只能停止体验行动的某个特定部分。这一点相当重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Animals, then, do not think of illness in terms of good or bad. Disease in itself on that level is a part of the life-survival process, and a system of checks and balances. With the emergence of man's particular kind of consciousness, other issues become involved. Mankind feels its own mortality even more than the beasts do.
quotes.translation: 动物并不以善恶观念看待疾病。在那个层面上，疾病本身就是生命存续过程的一部分，是一种制衡系统。随着人类特有意识的出现，其他问题也随之介入。人类比野兽更深刻地感受到自身的必死性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: They enter then such forms as are available, or make such forms as could survive. This has been done within your own system on several occasions. It is not done often in such a way, since with the materials at hand often a complicated-enough structure cannot be formed in which consciousness can fully- enough express itself.
quotes.translation: 于是它们进入可用的形体，或制造能存活的形体。这在你们系统内已发生过数次。但这种方式并不常用，因为手头材料往往无法构成足够复杂的结构，让意识得以充分表达自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: If it were scientifically inclined, the body would know that such spontaneous performance was impossible, for science cannot explain the reality of life itself in its present form, much less its origins. Consciousness within the body knows that its existence is within the body's context, and apart from it at the same time.
quotes.translation: 若身体具备科学倾向，它便会知道这种自发表现是不可能的——因为科学连生命本身在现下形态中的实相都无法解释，更遑论其起源。身体内的意识知道自身既存在于身体的脉络中，又同时独立于身体之外。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The next step is taken when identity is able to include within itself the intimate knowledge of all incarnations. Yet in this state the independence of the various reincarnated selves is not diminished. Each of these steps of consciousness involves identity with the inner recognition of its whole identity with All That Is.
quotes.translation: 当本体能够将累世转世的深层认知纳入自身时，便踏出了下一步。然而在此状态中，各个转世自我的独立性并未减损。意识的每个阶段都涉及本体对其与一切万有完整认同的内在认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The point will be made that all healings are the result of the acceptance of one basic fact: That matter is formed by those inner qualities that give it vitality, that structure follows expectation, that matter at any time can be completely changed by the activation of the creative faculties inherent in all consciousness.
quotes.translation: 重点在于：所有疗愈都源于接受一个基本事实——物质是由赋予其活力的内在特质所形成，结构跟随期待，物质随时可被一切意识中固有的创造能力彻底改变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: To other portions of yourself you would seem to be a sleepwalker. Full creative participation in any moment, however, awakens you to your own potentials, and therefore allows you to experience a unity between your own consciousness and the comprehension of your physical cells. Those cells are as spiritual as your soul is.
quotes.translation: 对你自身的其他部分而言，你仿佛是个梦游者。然而，在每个当下充分参与创造，能唤醒你自身的潜能，从而让你体验到自身意识与肉体细胞理解力之间的合一。那些细胞与你的灵魂同样具有灵性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: We will be dealing rather extensively with a study of space and distance and time as they appear within the dream state, and with the freedoms that are possible for the personality within it. All of this information can be used most beneficially. It will enable the ego itself to expand its consciousness and its knowledge.
quotes.translation: 我们将相当深入地探讨空间、距离与时间在梦境状态中的呈现方式，以及人格在其中可获得的自由。所有这些信息都能被最有益地运用，它将使自我本身得以扩展其意识与知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Some dream locations will be of your own construction. Others will be of constructions quite strange to you. They will belong to other dimensions entirely, and you may blunder into them. You are in a basic manner, you see, outside of your own system when you attempt to bring your waking consciousness into the dream state.
quotes.translation: 有些梦境场景是你自己构建的，另一些则对你而言完全陌生，它们属于其他维度，你可能会误入其中。你看，当你试图将清醒意识带入梦境状态时，你基本上已处于自身系统之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Each personality has within it the ability not only to gain a new type of existence in the environment -- in your case in physical reality -- but to add creatively to the very quality of its own consciousness, and in so doing to work its way through the specialized system, breaking the barriers of reality as it knows it.
quotes.translation: 每个人格内在不仅具备在环境中——就你们而言是物质实相——获得新型存在的能力，更能创造性地提升自身意识的品质，并借此穿越专属系统，打破其所知的实相壁垒。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: However, the mental system that parallels the chromosome system carries in condensed form within the atoms generalized consciousness, data that has been transmitted to it by the entity. That is, before entry into your plane, the main characteristics of a personality have already been determined by the personality itself.
quotes.translation: 然而，与染色体系统平行的心理系统，以浓缩形态在原子内存有普遍意识——即由存有传递至该系统的数据。也就是说，在进入你们层面之前，人格的主要特征已由人格自身决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Value fulfillment opens the many eyes of the self to its various portions. It enables the self to expand, to join in a gestalt with other selves. It is only your ego which leads you to believe that such an expansion would result in a lessening of consciousness on the one hand, or an invasion of other selves on the other.
quotes.translation: 价值完成开启了自性的众多眼睛，使其得以看见自身的各个部分。它使自性得以扩展，与其他自性形成完形。唯有你的自我让你相信，这种扩展一方面会导致意识的减弱，另一方面会侵犯其他自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: You are one self, then, but for operating purposes we will say that you have three parts: the inner self or inner ego, the body consciousness, and the consciousness that you know.
quotes.translation: 因此你是一个自性，但为了运作之便，我们可以说你有三个部分：内在自性或内在自我、身体意识，以及你所知的意识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Any physical image brings up this problem. When does it actually attain life? You know of course that the consciousness is the first, the image is the second resulting phenomenon.
quotes.translation: 任何物质影像都会引发这个问题：它何时才真正获得生命？你当然知道意识是首要的，而影像是随之产生的次要现象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The soul perceives all experience directly. Most experiences of which you are aware come packaged in physical wrapping, and you take the wrapping for the experience itself, and do not think of looking inside. The world that you know is one of the infinite materializations taken by consciousness, and as such it is valid.
quotes.translation: 灵魂直接感知所有经验。你所觉察到的大多数经验都包裹在物质外衣中，而你却将外衣当作经验本身，从未想过向内探究。你所认知的世界是意识采取的无限物质化形式之一，就此而言，它是真实有效的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Nor will you ever be swallowed by the self that in these terms seems so superior. Because you exist, you send out like projections of your own, as mentioned earlier. There is no end to the reality of consciousness, nor the means of its materialization. Nor is there any end to the developments possible for each identity.
quotes.translation: 你也不会被那个在此意义上看似更优越的自我所吞噬。因为你存在，你便如先前所述般投射出自己的影像。意识的实相永无止境，其物质化的方式亦无穷尽。每个本体可能的发展同样没有终点。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Whether or not the sessions happened as they did, however, once the two of you met, the probability brought about by your relationship meant that in one way or another you would seek out a larger context of consciousness -- a context, because of your talents, that would not remain private, but attract others (intently).
quotes.translation: 然而，无论那些课程是否如其所是地发生，一旦你们两人相遇，你们关系所带来的可能性意味着，你们会以某种方式寻求更广阔的意识的脉络——由于你们的才能，这个脉络不会保持私密，反而会吸引他人（专注地）。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach

quotes.text: This will be important in a later discussion. And pertaining to our imaginary situation concerning the three glasses, you must realize then that each of these three glasses, being valid physical constructions, are composed of atoms and molecules that contain their own capsule comprehension and generalized consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这在后续的讨论中将会很重要。至于我们关于三个杯子的想象情境，你必须认识到，这三个杯子作为有效的物质构造，都是由原子和分子组成的，而这些原子和分子各自包含着胶囊式的理解和普遍化的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: (9:31.) In certain terms, science and religion are both dealing with the idea of an objectively created universe. Either God "made it," or physical matter, in some unexplained manner, was formed after an initial explosion of energy, and consciousness emerged from that initially dead matter in a way yet to be explained.
quotes.translation: （9点31分。）从某些角度来看，科学与宗教都在处理一个客观创造的宇宙概念。要么是上帝“制造了它”，要么是物质以某种无法解释的方式，在最初的能量爆发后形成，而意识则以某种尚待解释的方式从最初无生命的物质中涌现出来。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: We will be deliberate for a moment to get this material through, since I know it is difficult for you. I want to make these points to lead up to the main one. Consciousness comes first, and forms the physical body in ways that I have described. Nevertheless there are no real boundaries that separate self from non-self.
quotes.translation: 我们要刻意放慢速度来传递这些资料，因为我知道这对你来说很困难。我想提出这些要点来引出主要观点。意识是第一位的，并以我描述过的方式形成物质身体。然而，并没有真正的界限将自我与非我分开。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I am not speaking symbolically. In the most intimate of terms, your past and future are modified by your present reactions. Alterations occur within the body. Circuits within the nervous system are changed, and energies that you do not understand seek out new connections on much deeper levels far beyond consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我并非在象征性地说话。以最亲密的方式而言，你的过去与未来正被你当下的反应所修改。身体内部发生着变化，神经系统中的回路被改变，而你所不了解的能量在远超出意识层面的更深层次上寻求新的连接。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Your idea of one soul, one self, forms a significance and a selectivity that blinds you to these other realities that are as much "here and now" as your present self. The units of consciousness that compose your physical being alone are aware of those greater significances, to which your limited ideas make you opaque.
quotes.translation: 你们对于单一灵魂、单一自我的观念形成了一种意义与选择性，使你们对同样存在于"此时此地"的其他实相视而不见，正如你们当下的自我一般。构成你们物质实相的意识单位本身便知晓那些更宏大的意义，而你们受限的观念使你们对其浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: I have told you that the ego, generally speaking, is self conscious action that attempts to set itself apart from action and to consider action as an alien object. Now this altered ego retains its highly specialized self consciousness, and yet it can now experience itself as an identity within and as a part of action.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你们，一般而言，自我是试图将自己与行动分离、并将行动视为异己客体的自我意识行动。如今这个被改变的自我仍保有高度专业化的自我意识，却能将自身体验为行动之内的本体，并成为行动的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The animals do not need such a message, of course, nor can it be literally translated, for your consciousness is flexible and leeway had to be left for your own interpretation.
quotes.translation: 动物当然不需要这类讯息，也无法被字面转译，因为你们的意识具有弹性，必须为你们自己的诠释保留余地。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The personality is that consciousness of self of which I have spoken, which is aware of itself within, and a part of, action. The ego attempts to stand apart from action, and to stand apart from the personality, and to mold the personality into a more or less permanent and stable, dependent portion of the ego itself.
quotes.translation: 人格即是我曾提及的自我意识，它在行动之内觉察自身，并成为行动的一部分。自我试图脱离行动，脱离人格，并将人格塑造成自我本身一个相对恒常稳定、从属的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Men repress many mammalian images in your particular civilization, because they do not want to be reminded of the female's reproductive advantages. But these apply to your social frameworks alone. The level of sleep is the real indicator. The individual becomes aware of cellular consciousness at certain sleep levels.
quotes.translation: 在你们特定的文明中，男人压抑了许多哺乳动物的意象，因为他们不愿被提醒女性在生殖上的优势。但这些仅适用于你们的社会架构。睡眠的层次才是真正的指标。个体在特定的睡眠层次中会觉察到细胞意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... The same applies to all consciousness of any type or variety. In a manner of speaking, then, your cells dream. There are minute variations of electrical discharge, not now perceivable, that could pinpoint this kind of fluctuation on the part of cells, and also on the part of atoms and molecules.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……这同样适用于任何种类或形式的意识。可以说，你们的细胞也在做梦。存在着细微的放电变化，目前尚无法察觉，但这些变化能精确标示细胞层面，以及原子和分子层面的这种波动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
