quotes.text: In larger terms, in the predream states you are aware of all of the activities of your own greater psyche as it participates in -- and contributes to -- the infinite existence of psychic consciousness as you understand it, and becomes aware of the psychological realities that form the framework of its own stability.
quotes.translation: 从更宏观的角度来看，在预梦状态中，你觉察到自己更大心灵的所有活动——它参与并贡献于你所理解的心灵意识的无限存在——并意识到那些构成其自身稳定性框架的心理实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: There are various levels all operating, various levels of consciousness and identity. They cannot be forcibly restrained, for they would learn nothing. What they do learn however is always retained. This does not mean that each succeeding earth experiment will be made up of selves who have been through these cycles.
quotes.translation: 各种层次都在运作，各种层次的意识与身份同时存在。它们无法被强行约束，因为那样将一无所获。然而它们所学到的一切始终被保留。这并不意味着每一次后续的地球实验都将由经历过这些循环的自我所构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now. Once your consciousness is outside of the physical body, then you are dealing with a different kind of reality indeed. This is experience every bit as real as any other.
quotes.translation: 现在。一旦你的意识脱离肉体，你确实是在与一种截然不同的实相打交道。这种体验与其他任何体验一样真实不虚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: This rigid control of consciousness prevented spontaneous enjoyment of an everyday variety that would otherwise have had a beneficial and balancing effect. On this dining out, for example: even the small shock, you see, involved in different tastes provides small surprises that are releasing to the sensemechanisms.
quotes.translation: 这种对意识的严格控制，反而阻碍了日常中本可带来平衡与裨益的自发享受。以在外用餐为例：不同口味带来的微小冲击，恰恰为感官机制提供了释放性的小惊喜。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: (Bert C.: "I think I understand then, that all of these different levels of my consciousness are being communicated -- not only by me consciously, but also telepathically.")
quotes.translation: （伯特·C.："我想我明白了，我意识的所有这些不同层次都在被传达——不仅通过我有意识的表达，也通过心灵感应。"）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:28.) These are not nebulous. They are profound psychological interconnections that bind you each to each, particularly in a telepathic framework, though this may be beneath normal consciousness. The unrealized physical connections that might have occurred, but did not, are worked out in other layers of reality.
quotes.translation: 这些并非虚无缥缈。它们是深刻的心理联结，将你们彼此紧密相连，尤其在心灵感应的架构中，尽管这可能在正常意识之下。那些未曾实现、本可能发生却未发生的物理联系，会在实相的其他层面得到化解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now without your particular physical senses you would not perceive the couch as solid. Consciousness that has different perceptive mechanisms than your own is unaware of our now famous blue couch. You make the organization. Your thoughts perceive an organization. You enforce the organization, and indeed create it.
quotes.translation: 现在，若没有你们特定的肉体感官，你们便不会感知到那张沙发是坚实的。拥有与你们不同感知机制的意识，根本察觉不到我们那张著名的蓝色沙发。你们组织了它。你们的念头感知到一种组织。你们强化了这种组织，并确实创造了它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:21.) The human consciousness has not, therefore, developed the best and most proper "tool" with which to examine the nature of reality. It is because you have used other methods that much evidence escapes you--evidence that would show that the physical universe exists in quite different terms than is supposed.
quotes.translation: 因此，人类意识并未发展出最恰当、最合适的“工具”来检视实相的本质。正因你们使用了其他方法，大量证据才从你们眼前溜走——这些证据本会显示物质宇宙的存在方式与人们所设想的截然不同。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: It is the same with the conscious retention of dreams in general. You are indeed exercising what amounts to an added ability. You are learning to manipulate within other dimensions of consciousness. Automatic controls are therefore used. （Voice somewhat deeper.） You proceed as your abilities and control develop.
quotes.translation: 有意识地保留梦境也是如此。你确实在运用一种额外能力，学习在意识的其他维度中操控。因此会使用自动控制机制。（声音稍显深沉。）随着能力与掌控力的发展，你逐步推进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now: The information received in any of these states of consciousness must be interpreted for the normal waking consciousness, if any physical memory is to be maintained.
quotes.translation: 现在：若要维持任何实质记忆，在这些意识状态中接收到的信息，必须为正常清醒意识进行诠释。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Much of this is very difficult to verbalize. (Long pause.) You are not subordinate to some giant consciousness. While you think in such terms, however, I must speak of reincarnational selves and counterparts, because you are afraid that if you climb out of what you think your identity is, then you will lose it.
quotes.translation: 这些内容大多难以言传。（长停顿。）你并非从属于某个巨大意识。然而，当你以这种思维模式思考时，我仍须谈论转世自我与对应体——因为你害怕若爬出你自以为的身份认同，便会失去它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: "And so there may be others now (like Seth), also without images, but knowing -- others who have been what we are and more -- others who remember what we have forgotten. They may have discovered through some acceleration of consciousness other forms of being, or dimensions of reality of which we are also part.
quotes.translation: "因此现在或许还有他人（如赛斯），同样无形无相却无所不知——那些曾与我们相同却更超越的存在——那些记得我们已遗忘之事的存在。他们或许通过意识的某种加速，发现了我们亦身处其中的其他存在形式或实相维度。"
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: 3. Seth could be referring to his remark in the 34th session for March 11, 1964: "Telepathic communications go on continually beneath consciousness, and without the aid of telepathy and of the inner senses, language itself would be meaningless. The hidden cues are the symbols that make language intelligible."
quotes.translation: 3. 赛斯可能指的是他在1964年3月11日第34节课中的论述："心电感应交流持续在意识层面之下进行，若无心电感应与内在感官的辅助，语言本身将毫无意义。那些隐藏的线索正是使语言可被理解的象征符号。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Only if you understand your own freedom in such areas will you allow yourselves to explore alternate states of consciousness, or the environment of dreams. Such exercises are not to be used to supersede the world you know, but to supplement it, to complete it, and to allow you to perceive its true dimensions.
quotes.translation: 唯有当你理解自身在这些领域的自由，你才会允许自己去探索意识的其他状态或梦境的环境。这类练习并非用来取代你所认知的世界，而是用来补充它、完善它，并让你得以感知其真实维度。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: You have each lived other existences, and that knowledge is within you though you are not consciously aware of it. I hope that this book will serve to release the deeply intuitive self within each of my readers, and to bring to the foreground of consciousness whatever particular insights will serve you most.
quotes.translation: 你们每个人都曾经历过其他存在形式，那份知识就在你们之内，尽管你们并未有意识地觉察到它。我希望这本书能帮助每位读者释放内在深层的直觉性自我，并将最能助益你们的特定洞见带入意识的前沿。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: -- to begin dictation: Physical existence is valuable for many reasons, one being that the flesh is so responsive to thought and yet so resilient. There are built-in guidelines so that the body consciousness itself, while mirroring your negative images at times, will also automatically struggle against them.
quotes.translation: ——开始口授：物质实相之所以珍贵，理由众多，其中之一便是肉体对思想如此敏锐回应，却又如此富有弹性。内建指引机制使身体意识本身，在偶尔映照你的负面意象时，也会自动与之对抗。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Now: Electrons themselves operate at different "speeds." The structure of the atom that you recognize, and its activity, is in larger terms one probable version of an atom.11 Your consciousness, as it is allied with the flesh, follows the activity of atoms as far as it is reflected in your system of reality.
quotes.translation: 现在：电子本身以不同"速度"运作。你所认知的原子结构及其活动，从更大层面而言，只是原子的一个可能版本。你的意识与肉体相连时，会追随原子的活动——只要这些活动反映在你的实相系统中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The experiments that you have done in projection were most beneficial to you in the past. Throw your consciousness outward into nature, and your inwardness will be replenished. The power and necessity to feel is a strong necessity within all planes. I have never suggested to you that you close off from this.
quotes.translation: 你过去所做的投射实验对你最有益处。将你的意识向外抛入自然，你的内在性便会得到滋养。感受的力量与必要性，在所有层面都是强烈的需求。我从未建议你对此封闭自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: At physical death, after the last reincarnation, then the normal body form is the dream body, and excursions are made from this point, you see. It is possible to suddenly switch from the third form to the dream body, but at a considerable jolt to the consciousness, as a rule. Transition is simply too sudden.
quotes.translation: 在最后一次转世后的肉体死亡时，正常的身体形态便是梦体，你瞧，所有出游都从这个基点出发。通常而言，从第三形态骤然切换至梦体虽有可能，却会给意识带来剧烈震荡——这种过渡实在过于突兀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Dictation. The brain is primarily an event-forming psycho-mechanism through which consciousness operates. Its propensity for event-forming is obvious even in young children. By obvious, I mean active, when fantasies occur involving activities far beyond the physical abilities as they are thus far developed.
quotes.translation: 口授。大脑本质上是一个借由意识运作的、以事件形成为核心的心理机制。即便在幼童身上，其事件形成的倾向也显而易见——所谓显而易见，是指当幻想涉及远超当前身体能力发展的活动时，这种倾向便活跃起来。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Pretend, all of you for a moment, that you are looking at this situation from the other side. Pretend that while you are in the dream state, you are concerned with the problem of consciousness and existence. From that viewpoint the picture is entirely different, for you are indeed conscious while you sleep.
quotes.translation: 你们所有人暂且假装正从另一面看待这个情境。假装当你们处于梦境状态时，你们关心的是意识与存在的问题。从那个观点来看，画面完全不同，因为你们在睡眠中确实是有意识的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Only some of the data in projections is thus translated. Now, it is possible but difficult to catch your own consciousness in the act of its own natural perception, before impressions become crystallized in physical terms. Even the survival personality must translate perception into terms jt can understand.
quotes.translation: 投射中的某些资料仅以这种方式被转译。在印象固化为物质形式之前，捕捉自身意识处于自然感知过程中的状态是可能的，但相当困难。甚至存续人格也必须将感知转译成它能理解的术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: There are no presents or pasts to these minds, only simultaneous experience, and a creativity that constantly of itself and its existence creates more. Consciousness of itself forms all of these realities and systems. It does not forget as you forget, that you form all the dimensions within your own system.
quotes.translation: 对这些心智而言，没有现在或过去，只有同时性的经验，以及一种不断从自身及其存在中创造更多事物的创造力。意识本身形成了所有这些实相与系统。它不像你们遗忘自己形成了自身系统内的所有维度那样遗忘。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Most people, however, are so utterly serious that they suspect their own creativity. They expect that its products will be unreal or not valid in the physical world. Yet there is a great correlation between what you think of as creativity, altered states of consciousness, play, and "spiritual" development.
quotes.translation: 然而，大多数人过于严肃，以至于怀疑自己的创造力。他们预期其产物在物质世界中会不真实或无效。然而，你们所谓的创造力、意识状态改变、游戏与"灵性"发展之间存在着极大的关联性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: In exploring these non intervals however （smile） you also create that which you explore, for none of this exists without creative consciousness. This evening's material, read along with the discussions concerning the nature of action, will give you a more comprehensive idea of what I am trying to tell you.
quotes.translation: 但在探索这些非间隔时（微笑），你们也同时创造了所探索的对象，因为若无创造性的意识，这一切便不存在。今晚的材料，若与关于行动本质的讨论一并阅读，将使你们更全面地理解我试图传达的内容。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: This is constant creation. The initial creation provided the energy, the dimension, of possibility itself, but every particle of consciousness will always attempt to express itself within as many possibilities as possible. The inner self therefore creates the physical body and the land upon which it moves.
quotes.translation: 这是持续不断的创造。初始创造提供了能量与可能性本身的维度，但每个意识粒子始终会尽可能在众多可能性中表达自身。因此，内在自体创造了物质身体及其所行走的大地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: Concerning your tree: You were aware that the tree would fall. You received this inner data at noon but you ignored it. In this case your outer senses served to restimulate the inner data. The noise of the wind and so forth gave you a glimmering of the earlier data that had not reached your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 关于你的树：你早就知道那棵树会倒下。你在中午就收到了这个内在数据，但你忽略了它。在这种情况下，你的外在感官起到了重新激发内在数据的作用。风声等等让你隐约想起了之前未进入你意识的数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now. Those within the system know this. Regardless of what you may think of their present performance at any given "time" in quotes, it is from this system that the greatest potentials emerge; for having dealt with it, consciousness undergoes one of the severest tests in learning to handle its own energy.
quotes.translation: 现在。系统内的那些存在知道这一点。无论你如何看待他们在任何带引号的特定“时间”里的当前表现，最伟大的潜能正是从这个系统中涌现出来的；因为处理过它之后，意识在学习掌控自身能量的过程中经历了最严峻的考验之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: In these and other cases, however, the innate individuality is not lost but remains indelibly imprinted. Consciousness must by its nature change, and so identities must also change -- not one blotting out the other, but building upon it while each succeeding step is maintained and not discarded, you see.
quotes.translation: 然而在这些及其他案例中，内在的个体性并未丧失，而是留下不可磨灭的印记。意识按其本质必须改变，因此身份也必须改变——并非一个抹去另一个，而是建立在彼此之上，每一步都得以延续而非抛弃，你明白吗。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Do not try to bring "dream interpretation" -- and kindly, now -- down to your level, but instead try to playfully enter that reality imaginatively, and allow your own waking consciousness to rise into a freer kind of interpretation of events, in which energy is not bounded by space, time, or limitations.
quotes.translation: 不要试图将"解梦"——请温和地——降低到你的层次，而是尝试以想象力嬉戏般地进入那个实相，允许你清醒的意识升华为对事件更自由的诠释，在其中能量不受空间、时间或限制的束缚。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Death is not an end, but a transformation of consciousness. Nature, with its changing seasons, constantly brings you that message. In that light, and with that understanding, nature's disasters do not claim victims: Nature and man together act out their necessary parts in the larger framework of reality.
quotes.translation: 死亡并非终结，而是意识的转化。大自然以其四季更迭不断向你传递这个讯息。基于此光明与理解，自然灾难并非在夺取生命：自然与人类在实相的更大架构中共同扮演着必要的角色。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: You will see that in the first mentioned examples the effect would be created by man in line with his abilities, and in the latter examples the effects would be created in some instances by what is sometimes called dead matter, but what we know as other forms of consciousness, according to their ability.
quotes.translation: 你将发现，在最初提及的例子中，效果由人类依其能力创造；而在后续例子中，效果有时由所谓死物质——但我们所知的其他意识形式——依其能力所创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The training in manipulation of consciousness of this kind is invaluable. There are at least three different kinds of projections that you should experience in the dream state, that will facilitate waking experiences. You should give yourself projection suggestions now as a matter of course before sleep.
quotes.translation: 这类意识操控的训练具有无可估量的价值。在梦境状态中，你至少应体验三种不同的投射方式，这将有助于清醒时的体验。睡前你应当习惯性地给自己下达投射暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The tissue capsule of which I have spoken earlier surrounds every living consciousness. To some extent it could be compared to an extra layer of skin surrounding the physical body, except that it is not constructed in the same manner upon your plane, and is invisible to you under ordinary circumstances.
quotes.translation: 我先前提及的组织囊包裹着每个活生生的意识。在某种程度上，它可比拟为包裹肉体的额外皮肤层，只不过它并非以你们层面的方式构成，在正常情况下对你们而言不可见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Identities are never constant, as you yourselves are not the same consciously or unconsciously from one moment to another. Every action is a termination, as we discussed earlier. And yet without the termination, identity would cease to exist, for consciousness without action would cease to be conscious.
quotes.translation: 身份从来不是恒常不变的，正如你们自己从一刻到下一刻，无论有意识或无意识，都不是相同的。每个行动都是一个终结，正如我们先前讨论过的。然而没有终结，身份就会停止存在，因为没有行动的意识将不再具有意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In an inverted time system the momentum is recognized and it is also taken advantage of, in that it is utilized by individual consciousness, so that your so-called present, past and future can be viewed as existing in a spacious now. Again, this sort of a system is very close to the true nature of time.
quotes.translation: 在倒转的时间系统中，动量被识别并被加以利用，因为它被个体意识所运用，以至于你们所谓的现在、过去和未来可以被视为存在于一个广袤的当下之中。再次强调，这类系统非常接近时间的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: There are many portions of the self, as you know. They do assume a form that is visible within their own dimension. These portions of the self are all simultaneous; in various stages of consciousness you become aware of other portions of the self, and an I identifies itself with one or another of these.
quotes.translation: 如你们所知，自我有许多部分。它们确实会以在其自身维度内可见的形式呈现。这些自我的部分都是同时存在的；在意识的不同阶段，你会觉察到自我的其他部分，而一个"我"会认同于这些部分中的这一个或那一个。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: As far as using all the powers of consciousness, this is strictly cultural, and has nothing to do with the inherent properties of either consciousness or matter.
quotes.translation: 就运用意识的所有能力而言，这完全是文化层面的问题，与意识或物质的固有属性毫无关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now: There are several very definite stages of sleep, and they all perform various services for the personality. They are also signals for different layers of consciousness, realization, and activity. They are accompanied by some physical variations, and there are some variations having to do with age.
quotes.translation: 现在：睡眠有数个非常明确的阶段，它们各自为人格提供不同的服务。它们也是不同意识层次、认知层次和活动层次的信号。这些阶段伴随着一些生理变化，并且有些变化与年龄有关。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: While each person generally follows a given strand of consciousness, and identifies with it as "myself," there are other alternate lines beneath the surface. They are also quite as legitimately the same identity, but they are not focused upon because the body must have one clear, direct mode of action.
quotes.translation: 虽然每个人通常遵循一条特定的意识流，并认同它为"我自己"，但在表面之下还有其他交替的路线。它们同样合理地属于同一个身份，只是没有被聚焦，因为身体必须有一个清晰直接的行动模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Sense images are built up, you see, in the same manner whether or not you are trying to perceive an apple, a star, or a human being. They are built up in the same manner whether or not you want to perceive a thought that must be made physical, or the image of a consciousness that must be made physical.
quotes.translation: 你看，感官影像的构建方式相同，无论你试图感知的是苹果、星星还是人类。无论你想要感知一个必须化为物质形态的思想，还是一个必须化为物质形态的意识影像，它们的构建方式也都相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Consciousness itself perceives directly, and these various methods of perception have been adopted to meet varying physical circumstances. Such thermal pictures are found in what is called the old brain, and to these, the body responds with changes of temperature that sparks various chemical reactions.
quotes.translation: 意识本身直接进行感知，而这些不同的感知方法是为了适应不同的物质环境而被采用的。这种热感图像存在于所谓的古老大脑中，身体会以温度变化来回应这些图像，从而引发各种化学反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: I do this for him in many instances. (Pause.) What I perceive (smile) is still dependent upon my own identity. It cannot be otherwise for any consciousness. In your terms I help keep to a minimum distortions which might otherwise occur as Ruburt's own mood or circumstances might otherwise misinterpret.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，我为他做这件事。（停顿）我所感知的（微笑）仍然取决于我自己的身份。任何意识都无法例外。用你们的话来说，我帮助将扭曲降到最低，否则鲁柏自己的情绪或处境可能会造成误解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The drugs also help in changing the patterns when it is necessary. If the brain patterns were not changed on entering and leaving a system, then theoretically at least the consciousness could become trapped within any given system. Acceleration or de-acceleration, you see, but mentally. (Deceleration.)
quotes.translation: 药物也有助于在必要时改变模式。如果进入或离开某个系统时大脑模式没有改变，那么至少在理论上，意识可能会被困在任何给定的系统中。加速或减速，你们明白，但这是心智上的。（减速。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: You may wonder why so many forms of life would be involved in what might seem to be self-destructive behavior, often leading to death -- but remember that no consciousness considers death an end or a disaster, but views it instead as a means to the continuation of corporeal and noncorporeal existence.
quotes.translation: 你或许会好奇，为何如此多生命形式会卷入看似自我毁灭的行为中，这些行为往往导致死亡——但请记住，没有任何意识将死亡视为终结或灾难，而是将其视为延续肉体与非肉体存在的一种手段。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health

quotes.text: I have been meaning to get into these subjects. We will only cover them rather superficially, I'm afraid, now; and go into them more deeply in connection with other topics. Nevertheless these psychological structures, again, are forms adopted by consciousness in a perspective not physically perceived.
quotes.translation: 我一直想探讨这些主题。恐怕现在我们只能浅尝辄止，日后会结合其他议题深入探讨。不过这些心理结构，再次强调，是意识在非物理感知的视角下所采取的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You see, then, that while the personality can act in a more or less normal manner while in the dream state, he can also act in ways that are denied him in periods of so-called normal consciousness. He has freedoms and abilities and talents in the dream state of which his waking self may be unfamiliar.
quotes.translation: 由此可见，人格在梦境状态中既能以近乎正常的方式运作，也能展现出所谓正常意识时期所不具备的行为模式。他在梦境中拥有清醒自我可能不熟悉的自由、能力与天赋。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: He is combining and alternating frequencies so that he literally brings forth a different creature of consciousness -- one that in your terms is not alive, yet one whose very reality straddles the life that you know. The most elemental portions of my reality begin at the furthest reaches of your own.
quotes.translation: 他正在组合并交替频率，从而真正创造出一种不同的意识生灵——一种按你们说法并不具备生命，但其真实本质却横跨你们所知生命的存在。我实相中最基础的部分始于你们自身实相的最远端。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The consciousness of atoms and molecules can be likened to the subconscious as you now know it, in that it is generalized to a large degree, but energy-propelled. You should perhaps realize by now that the inner self, the mind and its components, is composed or forms a unitary force field of its own.
quotes.translation: 原子与分子的意识可比拟为你们目前所知的潜意识，因其在很大程度具有普遍性，但受能量驱动。此刻你们或许应当明白，内在自体、心智及其组成部分，本身构成或形成一个独特的统一力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: There are points, quite imaginary, that can be used as references. However, those who ask concerning the time of the origin of consciousness within your universe, are those who do not understand that the most minute physical particle, the most microscopic, is a materialization of inner, aware energy.
quotes.translation: 存在一些完全虚构的点，可作为参照系。然而，那些追问你们宇宙中意识起源时间的人，正是那些不了解最微小的物理粒子、最微观的存在，都是内在觉知能量之物质化显现的人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Consciousness creates form. It is not the other way around. All personalities are not physical. It is only because you are so busily concerned with daily matters that you do not realize that there is a portion of you who knows that its own powers are far superior to those shown by the ordinary self.
quotes.translation: 意识创造形态，而非反之。所有的人格并非物质性的。只因你过于忙于日常事务，才未能意识到你内在有一部分知晓自身能力远胜于普通自我所展现的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Through such strands of consciousness all of your world is related. Your own identity sends out strands of itself constantly, then. These mix psychically with other strands, as physically atoms and molecules are interchanged. So there are different organizations of identity in which you play a part.
quotes.translation: 通过这样的意识之线，你的整个世界都相互关联。你的本体不断向外发送自身的意识之线。这些意识之线在心灵层面与其他意识之线交织，如同原子与分子在物质层面相互交换。因此存在着不同的本体组织，而你在其中扮演着角色。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Man tried to form a new realm, attain a different kind of focus and awareness. His consciousness turned a corner outside of itself. To do this he concentrated less and less upon inner reality, and therefore began the process of inner reality only as it was projected outward into the physical world.
quotes.translation: 人类试图形成新的领域，获得不同种类的焦点与觉知。他的意识在自身之外转了个弯。为此，他越来越不关注内在实相，于是开始仅将内在实相视为投射到物质世界的外在显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: At the same time, in psychoanalysis you are often programmed to believe that the "unconscious," being the source of such dark secrets, cannot be counted upon as any bed of creativity or inspiration, and so you are denied the help that the inner portions of the self could give to your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 同时，在精神分析中，你常被灌输一种观念，认为"无意识"作为这些黑暗秘密的源头，不能被视为创造力或灵感的温床，因此你被剥夺了自我内在部分可能给予意识的帮助。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: There is no limitation upon the variety of inner psychological structure per se. Nevertheless, for various reasons having to do with the development of individual consciousness, as a rule only a small portion of the theoretically possible psychological structures can be utilized at any given point.
quotes.translation: 内在心理结构本身的多样性并无限制。然而，出于与个体意识发展相关的各种原因，在任一特定时刻，理论上可能存在的心理结构中通常只有一小部分能被实际运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: In actuality of course both impulses exist simultaneously. The inner self knows this, but the ego does not. All of this material should add dimension to your understanding of capsule comprehension, and of the initial appearance of consciousness within the physical field, as I explained it earlier.
quotes.translation: 事实上，这两种冲动当然同时存在。内在自己知道这一点，但自我却不知道。所有这些资料应能加深你对胶囊式理解的理解，以及对我先前解释过的意识在物质场域中最初显现的理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The trick is to achieve the proper balance. As Ruburt discovered, you can try too hard to take waking consciousness into the dream state, so that you simply cannot sleep as easily. Trial and error will show you the proper balance, and each successful attempt gives you added experience and control.
quotes.translation: 诀窍在于达成适当的平衡。正如鲁柏所发现的，你可能过于努力地将清醒意识带入梦境状态，以至于反而难以入睡。通过试错法，你将找到适当的平衡，而每一次成功的尝试都会为你增添经验与控制力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Again, cellularly-attuned consciousness generates dreams. Consciousness, riding on a molecular back, generates a physical reality and events suited to it.
quotes.translation: 再者，以细胞为调谐的意识产生梦境。意识乘着分子之背，生成与之相应的物质实相与事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: But the training here is vastly important, and a manipulation of consciousness in this way has definite advantages. It will take some work on your part, but you will indeed by able, perhaps with some use of suggestion, to realize, when in the dream state, those occasions when you are projecting.
quotes.translation: 但此处的训练极为重要，以这种方式操控意识具有明确优势。你需要付出一些努力，但确实能够——或许借助些许暗示——在梦境状态中辨识出那些你正在投射的时刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: As your ordinary waking state perceives an entire universe of physical data, so each of these other states of consciousness perceive realities as complicated, varied, and vivid. It is for this reason that it is so difficult to explain the experiences possible within any given one. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 正如你寻常的清醒状态感知着整个物质宇宙，其他每种意识状态同样感知着同样复杂、多样且鲜活的实相。正因如此，要解释任一特定状态下可能获得的体验才如此困难。（长停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: While it might sound impossible to you, this generalized molecular consciousness, which you would call subconscious, contains within it, in condensed genetic fashion, all knowledge of the inner workings of the universe, this knowledge being acted upon and instantly accessible when it is needed.
quotes.translation: 尽管这在你听来或许不可思议，这种你称之为潜意识的广义分子意识，以浓缩的遗传方式，内蕴着宇宙内在运作的全部知识——当需要时，这些知识会被即时激活并随时取用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: These forms do exist, as your physical body does. They are fused however with your inner self. They are not physical, but they do exist in the whole package of the self, perhaps like the skins of an onion, you see. They are merely the forms that your own consciousness takes in different dreams.
quotes.translation: 这些形态确实存在，如同你们的肉体一般。然而它们与你们的内在自我融合在一起。它们并非物质性的，但确实存在于自我的整体结构中，或许就像洋葱的层层外皮。它们只是你们自己的意识在不同梦境中所采取的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: The chemicals you see alter the system that you inhabit, as well as your own perceptions of it. It is speeded up in many respects, and the problem is almost like returning to a moving ship in space, only the motion involved is consciousness. You would not have a stationary station to return to.
quotes.translation: 你所看到的化学物质改变了你所栖息的系统，以及你对它的感知。它在许多方面被加速了，问题几乎就像要返回一艘在太空中移动的飞船，只是所涉及的运动是意识。你将没有一个固定的站点可以返回。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The deeper explanations, however, demand a further expansion of ideas of consciousness, and a certain reorientation. It is extremely important that you bear in mind the importance of free will, and the presence of your own identity as you think of it. With that preamble, let me continue then.
quotes.translation: 然而，更深层的解释需要进一步扩展意识的概念，并进行某种程度的重新定位。当你思考自身时，牢记自由意志的重要性以及你个人身份的存在，这一点极为关键。有了这番开场白，容我继续阐述。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: It, of itself and from that state, has given life to infinities of possibilities. From its agony it found the way to burst forth in freedom, through expression, and in doing so gave existence to individualized consciousness that forever continues the process. Therefore it is rightly jubilant.
quotes.translation: 它凭其自身、从那种状态中，赋予了无限可能性以生命。从它的痛苦中，它找到了通过表达而爆发为自由的方式，并在此过程中赋予了持续这一过程的个体化意识以存在。因此它理所当然地欢欣鼓舞。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Remember that each unit of consciousness is a fragment of All That Is, a divine portion. Then perhaps what I am about to explain will make more sense.
quotes.translation: 请记住，每个意识单位都是“一切万有”的一个片段，一个神圣的部分。那么，我接下来要解释的内容或许会更有意义。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Animals, as a rule (underlined) are less physically-oriented in their dreaming states. They do dream of physical reality, but much more briefly than you. Otherwise, they immerse themselves in dreams in different kinds of dreaming consciousness that I hope to explain at a later date (louder).
quotes.translation: 动物通常（强调）在梦境状态中较少以物质为导向。它们确实会梦见物质实相，但比你们短暂得多。否则，它们会沉浸在各种不同的梦境意识中，我希望能稍后解释这些（更大声）。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: (She paused. Then: "I seem to get things that are different toward the ends of books, like where one is leading into the next one. Take the idea of the book Seth mentioned on therapy and value fulfillment, and so forth, and what you said today about body consciousness. Everything's related."
quotes.translation: （她停顿了一下。然后说：“我似乎会在书末得到一些不同的东西，就像一本书正引导着进入下一本那样。以赛斯提到的关于治疗与价值完成的书的概念为例，还有你今天关于身体意识所说的那些话。一切事物都是相关的。”）
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The solution may or may not be given to the consciousness. In many instances this would not be necessary. The inner ego of which we have spoken is the director of such unifying activities, and while the inner ego is mainly concerned with inner reality, it is also aware of physical existence.
quotes.translation: 解决方案可能给予意识，也可能不给予。在许多情况下，这并非必要。我们曾提及的内在自我正是此类统一活动的指挥者，而内在自我虽主要关注内在实相，却也知晓物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Left alone, any such construction will eventually vanish. It will however leave a trace. This does not necessarily mean it will leave a trace in your consciousness. A trace in electromagnetic reality, where it can then be activated by anyone when certain conditions are met, or are favorable.
quotes.translation: 若任其自然，任何此类建构终将消逝。然而它会留下痕迹。这未必意味着它会在你的意识中留下痕迹。而是在电磁实相中留下痕迹——当特定条件满足或有利时，任何人都可激活它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: While identity and consciousness are regarded as the result of primarily physical processes, then the nature of personality will never be understood.
quotes.translation: 当身份与意识被视为主要源自生理过程时，人格的本质将永远无法被理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now this picture is ever-changing and mobile. An alteration in just one cell is instantly noted by the body consciousness (the combined consciousnesses of the cells), and the future effect perceived. This information is used together with all other data from the body, and a prediction made.
quotes.translation: 这幅画面不断变化且流动。仅一个细胞的改变，便会立即被身体意识（细胞联合意识）察觉，并预见到未来的影响。此信息与身体所有其他数据结合，从而做出预测。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The important point here is that identity cohesion is projected upon the human physical structure from within, that is, from the inner ego by way of the inner senses. This of course includes the consciousness also, that is inherent in the separate molecules and atoms that compose the cells.
quotes.translation: 关键在于，身份认同的凝聚性是从内在投射到人类肉体结构上的——即经由内在感官，从内在自我投射而来。这当然也包括意识本身——即构成细胞的独立分子与原子所固有的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: To some extent then, physical structures are symbols of psychological structures; and psychological structures are adopted by consciousness and will be projected in many fields, differing in appearance and outward structure, but always following faithfully the inner psychological structure.
quotes.translation: 因此，在某种程度上，肉体结构是心理结构的象征；而心理结构被意识所采用，并将投射到诸多领域中，虽在外观与外在结构上有所差异，却始终忠实地遵循内在心理结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Practically speaking, three other forms are available to you in projections beside the physical, though others are theoretically available. It goes without saying that the consciousness works as hard at night as in the daytime, and always the experiences become part of the whole inner self.
quotes.translation: 实际上，除了肉体形态之外，在投射中你还能运用其他三种形态——尽管理论上还有更多形态可用。不言而喻，意识在夜间与白日同样辛勤运作，而所有经验都会成为整体内在自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Any one of these various layers of consciousness can be used as the normal acting consciousness, reality being viewed from that specific standpoint.
quotes.translation: 这些不同层次的意识中，任何一层都可作为正常运作的意识，现实便从该特定立场被感知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Give some thought to experimentation, observing the nature of color in usual consciousness and in altered states. Pay attention to color in your dreams also. You should go into your own ideas about the people you paint, and why, being fascinated with portraits, you often do not use models.
quotes.translation: 请思考进行实验，观察颜色在寻常意识与意识转换状态中的本质。同时留意梦境中的色彩。你应深入探究自己对所绘人物的看法，以及为何痴迷于肖像画却常不使用模特。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: To do this, Ruburt had to be free enough to accept the view of reality as perceived by someone else. To accomplish this, Ruburt allowed one portion of his consciousness to remain securely anchored in its own reality while letting another portion soak up, so to speak, a reality not its own.
quotes.translation: 为达成此目的，鲁柏必须足够自由，方能接纳他人所感知的现实。他让部分意识稳驻于自身现实，同时允许另一部分意识——姑且称之为——浸入不属于它的现实。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The next chapter will relate what experience I have had in all my existences, with those pyramid gestalts of which I speak in the material, and with my own and about my own relationship with the personality you call Seth Two, and with multidimensional consciousness far more evolved than I.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讲述我在所有存在中所获得的经验，包括与那些我在资料中提及的金字塔形完形意识，以及与我自身、与你们称为赛斯第二的人格的关系，还有与远比我进化程度更高的多维意识的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: This hidden self-consciousness can also at times look out through your outer senses upon your camouflage world. At these times you get something of the same effect as when you look through a telescope, and you may think of the long tube of the telescope as the channel of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 这种隐藏的自我意识有时也能透过你们的外在感官，向外观察你们的伪装世界。此时你们会获得类似透过望远镜观看的效果，而望远镜的长管可视为潜意识的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Your own survival as a species was your main concern. You considered other species only in the light of their use to you. You did not have any true conception of the great sacredness of all consciousness, nor of your relationship within it. You were losing your grasp of that great truth.
quotes.translation: 你们物种的生存曾是你们的主要关切。你们只根据其他物种对你们的用途来考虑它们。你们对一切意识的伟大神圣性，以及你们在其内的关系，没有任何真正的概念。你们正在失去对那伟大真理的把握。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The official3 line of consciousness that you accepted blithely ignores any deviations, and when such events occur usually continues merrily on as if nothing had happened. In the dreaming state, such fluctuations also happen. It should be obvious that there you can leap from time to time.
quotes.translation: 你们欣然接受的官方意识路线，轻率地忽略了任何偏差，当此类事件发生时，通常继续欢快地前行，仿佛什么都没发生过。在梦境状态中，这种波动也会发生。显然，在那里你们可以不时地跳跃。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: In a fully ego-oriented state of consciousness this is not so, for the ego constantly tries to maintain a rigid electromagnetic balance. This is obviously impossible, but in the attempt egotistical identity is helped in its efforts to maintain a more or less closed system of perceptions.
quotes.translation: 在完全以自我为导向的意识状态下并非如此，因为自我不断试图维持一种刚性的电磁平衡。这显然不可能，但在这种尝试中，自我认同得以维持一个近乎封闭的感知系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It is pointless to ignore the fact that you feel hatred, even though hatred is a distortion of a basic psychic mobility. Unless you learn never to distort the basic consciousness survival in terms of hatred, you will always have to deal with seemingly unresolved hatreds and aggressions.
quotes.translation: 忽视你感受到憎恨这个事实是毫无意义的，即使憎恨是基本心灵能动性的一种扭曲。除非你学会不再以憎恨的方式扭曲基本意识生存，否则你将永远不得不处理看似未解决的憎恨与攻击性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: If by chance you blunder （smile, eyes open） into my territory, then I will know it, and seek you out. Whenever you find yourself in any potentially dangerous dream situation during a projection, immediately terminate the dream. You will then return to an ordinary state of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 倘若你偶然（微笑，睁眼）误入我的领域，我便会察觉并寻你而来。每当你在出体期间发现自己处于任何潜在危险的梦境情境时，立即终止该梦境。你便会回归寻常意识状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: One strand of your mother's consciousness -- that one involved with you -- is intertwined with your reality because of her interest in homes.5 Another strand of hers is involved because of her interest in families -- and hence with the children of your two brothers, Linden and Richard.
quotes.translation: 你母亲意识中与你相关的那条脉络——因她对家居的兴趣——与你的实相交织在一起。她的另一条脉络则因她对家庭的兴趣——因而与你两位兄弟林登与理查德的子女们——交织在一起。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Without the particular plants, animals, people, or even individual cells or viruses, nature has no meaning. Your physical universe, then, had a nonphysical origin, in which it is still couched. In the same manner your individual consciousness has an origin in which it is still couched.
quotes.translation: 没有特定的植物、动物、人类，甚至没有个别的细胞或病毒，自然便毫无意义。因此，你们的物质宇宙有一个非物质的起源，它仍被包裹其中。同样地，你个人的意识也有一个起源，它仍被包裹其中。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Distortion is not falsehood. It is merely an interpretation of reality, colored or seen through a state of limited perception. I wish to make this most clear. I do intend to go into this matter thoroughly, since it involves various stages of consciousness through which we must journey.
quotes.translation: 扭曲并非虚假。它只是对实相的一种诠释，透过有限感知的状态被着色或观看。我希望这点能最清楚地被理解。我确实打算彻底探讨这个问题，因为它涉及我们必须穿越的意识的各个阶段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: As far as we can see, Seth's reincarnational, counterpart, and probable selves, and his families of consciousness, suggest the varied, complicated structure of human personality -- and hint of the invisible psychological thickness that fills out the physical event of the self in time.
quotes.translation: 就我们所见，赛斯的转世、对应体、可能自我以及意识家族，暗示了人类人格多样而复杂的结构——并隐约揭示了在时间中填满自我物理事件的无形心理厚度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Those who do not take advantage of such opportunities in this life often do not do so when it is over. Consciousness will expand. It will create. It will turn itself inside out to do so. There is nothing outside of yourself that will force you to understand these issues or face them.
quotes.translation: 那些在此生不利用这类机会的人，往往在生命结束后也不会这么做。意识会扩展。它会创造。它会为了做到这一点而将自己彻底翻覆。你自身之外没有任何东西会强迫你理解或面对这些问题。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You think for example in terms of good and bad suggestions, and I have on occasion used the terms myself, in order to make a point clear. However what you call suggestion, left alone, is a part of the inner impetus of action, which is translated in all areas of consciousness outward.
quotes.translation: 例如你们以好坏暗示来思考，我偶尔也使用这些术语以阐明观点。然而你们所谓的暗示，若任其自然，是行动内在驱力的一部分，它会向外显化于意识的所有领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Periods of renaissance -- spiritual, artistic, or psychic -- occur because the intense inner focus of those involved in the drama are directed toward those ends. The challenge may be different in each play, but the great themes are beacons to all consciousness. They serve as models.
quotes.translation: 文艺复兴时期——无论是灵性、艺术或心灵层面的——之所以发生，是因为参与这场戏剧者将强烈内在焦点导向这些目标。每场戏剧的挑战可能不同，但伟大主题是所有意识的灯塔。它们作为典范而存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (Class was a very busy one, with over 40 people present. When Seth came through Sue had time for but one question: Was Grunaargh connected to any of the families of consciousness Seth had named in the 732nd session? "It is indeed," Seth answered "It is related to one already given."
quotes.translation: （这堂课非常忙碌，有超过40人出席。当赛斯通过时，苏只来得及问一个问题：格鲁纳尔是否与赛斯在第732节课中提到的任何意识家族有关？“确实如此，”赛斯回答，“它与之前提到的一个家族有关。”）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The cooperative aspects of consciousness construction forms the whole fabric of your material universe. A subdivision of primary construction can be called the distortive mirror construction, which would include of course the physical construction of another physical being in birth.
quotes.translation: 意识构建的合作面向形成了你们物质宇宙的整体结构。初级构建的一个分支可称为扭曲镜像构建，这当然包括出生时另一个物质实体的物理构建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The basic idea of the material should be stressed, however, and strongly, since it is from this that our other concepts emerge. The mechanisms by which psychic energy or consciousness forms matter should also be included, and naturally the concept that matter does not have duration.
quotes.translation: 然而，应着重强调这个材料的基本理念，因为我们的其他概念皆源于此。也应包含心理能量或意识形成物质的机制，自然也要包括物质不具有持续性的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Projection can occur then in those terms or directions also. This is however much more difficult, and of a different nature entirely. The consciousness that ordinarily projects in an out-of-body experience could not practically project into one atom. The realities are too different.
quotes.translation: 投射也可以朝那些方向或层面进行，但这要困难得多，且性质完全不同。通常能在出体经验中投射的意识，实际上无法投射进一个原子。两者的实相差异太大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Now. There is one large point, underestimated by all of your psychologists, when they list the characteristics or attributes of consciousness. I am going to tie in this material with our discussion on what you call our EE units (electromagnetic), as there is a very close connection.
quotes.translation: 现在。当你们所有的心理学家列举意识的特征或属性时，有一个重大要点被他们严重低估了。我要把这个资料与我们讨论的所谓EE单位（电磁单位）联系起来，因为两者之间有非常密切的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Other portions of yourself, therefore, of which you are not consciously aware, do inhabit what you could call a supersystem of reality in which consciousness learns to handle and perceive much stronger concentrations of energy, and to construct "forms" of a different nature indeed.
quotes.translation: 因此，你自身中那些你并未有意识觉察的部分，确实栖居于一个你可以称为实相的超系统中，在那里，意识学会处理并感知更强烈的能量凝聚，并构建出性质截然不同的"形态"。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: When you have done this often enough so that you are intimately aware of the contrast, you will have a subjective feeling, a point of knowing within yourself, that will clearly indicate to you how your consciousness feels when it is at its finest point of focus in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 当你反复实践至能敏锐觉察这种对比时，内心将升起一种主观感受与认知基点，它会清晰昭示：当意识在物质实相中处于最精微的聚焦点时，其本质感受究竟为何。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The confusion arising, for example, in the case of witnesses to a particular event such as an accident, shows perhaps what I mean. You also know by now that not only men, but also all consciousnesses, contribute to the formation of your physical universe. Consciousness comes first.
quotes.translation: 例如，在特定事件（如事故）的目击者案例中产生的混乱，或许能说明我的意思。你们现在也明白，不仅人类，所有意识都参与构建了你们的物质宇宙。意识是第一位的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The material that I have given you on the nature of matter should make it clear that every atom and molecule has its own condensed, coded consciousness, and that no gestalt or formation of any kind can occur without the cooperation and comprehension of the consciousnesses involved.
quotes.translation: 我给予你们的关于物质本质的资料应当表明：每个原子与分子都拥有自身浓缩的、编码的意识，若无相关意识的合作与理解，任何形态或结构的形成都不可能发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: All animal gods hint of various experiments and species in which consciousness took different forms, in which the birth of egotistical awareness as you know it tried several areas of exploration. There were, for example, different versions of man-animal comprehension and activity.
quotes.translation: 所有动物神祇都暗示着各种实验和物种，其中意识采取了不同形式，你们所知的自我意识诞生在其中尝试了多个探索领域。例如，存在不同版本的人兽理解与活动方式。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: I have told you that all consciousnesses exist in the spacious present, which is spontaneous while also durable. Then it is no contradiction to say that entities existed before the birth of your planet, though in your time it seems that new ones are being brought to consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，所有意识都存在于广袤的当下，这个当下既是自发的，又是持久的。因此，说实体在你星球诞生之前就已存在，这并不矛盾——尽管从你们的时间观来看，似乎有新的实体正在被带入意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You however would view this in slow motion, so that eons of time would seem to have passed. And yet energy or action, which is consciousness, is always changing, and the shape of the flower and the blossom would constantly change. Energy can never be lost but only change its form.
quotes.translation: 然而，你们会以慢动作看待这一切，以至于仿佛经历了亿万年的时间。然而，能量或行动（即意识）始终在变化，花朵与花蕾的形态也会不断改变。能量永远不会消失，只会改变其形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: In no time experiences are far more direct. Words in your terms are not needed to describe them. In no time is the energy that provides the basis for time as you presently experience it. All individuals and consciousness cooperatively form and sustain the frameworks that you know.
quotes.translation: 在无时之境中，体验要直接得多。不需要你们所谓的语言来描述它们。无时之境提供了你们目前所体验的时间的基础能量。所有个体与意识合作形成并维持着你们所知的架构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now, in primary constructions, a consciousness, usually fully aware and alert, adopts a form -- not his "native" one -- and consciously projects it, often into another level of reality. Even this is a rather complicated endeavor, and one seldom used for purposes of communication.
quotes.translation: 在初级建构中，一个通常完全清醒警觉的意识会采用一个非其"本然"形态的形体，并有意识地将其投射到另一个实相层面。这本身就是相当复杂的尝试，很少用于沟通目的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I have mentioned that each physical construction is composed of atoms and molecules, which also possess a generalized consciousness and capsule comprehension. They lack strong organizational tendencies in themselves, and it is the individual's energy which aids in this formation.
quotes.translation: 我曾提过每个物质建构都由原子与分子组成，它们也拥有概括性的意识与胶囊式理解。它们本身缺乏强烈的组织倾向，而个体的能量协助了这种形构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: So far you have analyzed these dreams as best you could, but soon you will begin to look at them in a new way. The dream experiments with the recorder will be much more proficient. These investigations will also deal with a systematic examination into all levels of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 到目前为止，你们已尽可能分析这些梦境，但很快你们将开始以全新方式审视它们。使用录音机的梦境实验将变得更为熟练。这些探究也将涉及对意识所有层面的系统性检视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: No evolutionary line is a dead one. Therefore if in your system it disappears, it emerges within another. All probable materializations of life and consciousness have their day, and create those conditions within which they can flourish; and their day, in your terms, is eternal.
quotes.translation: 没有一条进化路线是死胡同。因此，若它在你们的系统中消失，它必会在另一个系统中重现。所有生命与意识的可能显化都有其时代，并创造它们得以繁盛的条件；而用你们的话来说，它们的时代是永恒的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Since action is not apart from structure, but is indeed the formulator of structure, then it is obvious that generally the type, nature, extent and scope of characteristic perception patterns of a consciousness will determine its physical structure, and not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 由于行动并非与结构分离，反而正是结构的形成者，那么显而易见的是，一般而言，一个意识的特征感知模式的类型、性质、范围与幅度，将决定其物理结构，而非相反。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: In other words the whole in almost any case is more than the sum of its parts. Yet the inner consciousness of the individual atoms and molecules is not changed; but each of them combine to form this extral--
quotes.translation: 换言之，几乎在任何情况下，整体都大于其部分之和。然而，个体原子与分子的内在意识并未改变；但它们每一个都结合起来，形成了这个额外的——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The one self that he recognizes is the only part of himself of which he is presently aware. Other facets of consciousness available to him, and a part of his greater nature, appear foreign, or "not-self," or "beyond self," because of the focus of selectivity as it now operates.
quotes.translation: 他所认知的那个单一自我，只是他目前所能觉察到的自身的一部分。其他可被他触及的意识面向，以及他更大本性的一部分，因选择性聚焦目前运作的方式，而显得陌生，或被视为"非我"，或"超越自我"。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: All the cells in the body are individual, and have a separate consciousness. There are certainly gradations here, but the fact remains that every cell is a conscious cell. There is conscious cooperation between the cells in all the organs, and between all the organs themselves.
quotes.translation: 身体内的所有细胞都是独立的个体，拥有各自的意识。虽然确实存在层级差异，但事实是每个细胞都是有意识的细胞。所有器官的细胞之间，以及所有器官本身之间，都存在着有意识的合作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Having read Priestley's ideas about Dunne, Ruburt now wonders if I am not a future self of his own, according to Dunne's ideas; that is, if I am not one of those future selves of which Dunne speaks, or if I am not consciousness number two, or three even, of Priestley's concept.
quotes.translation: 在阅读了普里斯特利关于邓恩的观点后，鲁柏现在怀疑，根据邓恩的理论，我是否就是他自己的某个未来自我；也就是说，我是否是邓恩所说的那些未来自我之一，或者我是否是普里斯特利概念中的第二意识，甚至是第三意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The despondencies that he encounters also should show him that these feelings emerge into his conscious awareness now, to be dealt with, where in the past they festered beneath consciousness, and he would not admit them as a problem for he was not that aware of their existence.
quotes.translation: 他所遭遇的沮丧情绪也应让他明白，这些感受此刻正进入他的意识层面以待处理，而在过去它们却在意识之下溃烂，他根本不愿承认它们是个问题，因为他甚至没有意识到它们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: A direct cognition is involved in which each consciousness knows what each other one is doing, its "position," and the implications of its experience. The entire fabric and framework of time and reality at each point is ascertained, and the probabilities probed and understood.
quotes.translation: 一种直接认知涉及其中，每个意识都知道其他意识在做什么、其“位置”以及其经验的意义。时间与实相的整体结构与框架在每个点上都被确定，或然性被探查并理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: The material was received, transformed into a poem, distorted in the last two or three lines where the prerequisites of technique involved the addition of a word that added a distorted meaning. And in the first place the data came into his consciousness in a watered-down form.
quotes.translation: 资料被接收、转化为一首诗，在最后两三行中因技巧要求添加了一个词而扭曲了原意。而且最初，这些数据是以一种稀释的形式进入他的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now we carry this even further, as you most probably suspected. You end up with organs composed of literally unnumbered individual cells, in which case the same combination with its resulting benefits for the individual, also results in the formation of a larger consciousness.
quotes.translation: 现在我们将此进一步延伸，正如你们很可能已经猜到的。最终你们拥有由无数个体细胞组成的器官，在这种情况下，同样的组合及其对个体产生的益处，也导致了更大意识的形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You can see now why the problem of creation does not really exist in the terms that you first thought of it. During one session I mentioned that since self-consciousness even exists in all living things, then the question of the exact entrance be specified becomes irrelevant.
quotes.translation: 现在你们可以看到，为什么创造的问题并不真正以你们最初所想的方式存在。在一次课程中，我提到既然自我意识甚至存在于所有生物中，那么精确指定其进入点的问题就变得无关紧要了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The physical image does not immediately disappear, for a number of reasons. The personality, through the inner self, has indeed created or constructed the physical form, but the very material from which it was constructed also contains its peculiar consciousness, as you know.
quotes.translation: 物质形象不会立即消失，原因有很多。人格通过内在自我确实创造或构建了物质形态，但构成它的物质本身也包含其独特的意识，如你所知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: This loss of contact applies only to the ego. It does not apply to those other portions of the self, and it is through the inner self, through inner consciousness, that to some degree the nature of action can make itself known. And when it is made known it will be seen then--
quotes.translation: 这种接触的丧失仅适用于自我。它不适用于自我的其他部分，正是通过内在自我、通过内在意识，行动的本质在某种程度上才能得以显现。而当它显现时，人们将会看到——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: We shall however consider those aspects of consciousness which are present within the dream environment, and absent in the physical environment. No study of human personality can pretend to be thorough that does not take into consideration the importance of the dream reality.
quotes.translation: 然而，我们将考虑那些存在于梦境环境、却不存在于物质环境中的意识面向。任何对人类人格的研究，若不考虑梦境实相的重要性，都不能自称是彻底的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Your own personalities will set the pace, for they are well-balanced ones. All of this demands spontaneity and control. This is the motion of consciousness. It is unfortunate that identity is considered generally as a rather static and permanent acknowledgment, for it is not.
quotes.translation: 你们自己的人格会设定步调，因为它们是平衡的。这一切都需要自发性和控制力。这就是意识的运动。遗憾的是，身份通常被视为一种相当静态且永久的认知，但它并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Give us a moment. (Pause.) The illness has not been thrust upon you, and this is your freedom. Since you have done this to your body, you can stop doing it. Try to become more alert to your own stream of consciousness. Notice when you are giving yourself negative suggestions.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻。（停顿。）疾病并非强加于你，这就是你的自由。既然你对自己的身体做了这些，你就能停止这样做。试着更加警觉地观察自己的意识流。注意你何时在给自己负面暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: 2. See the 683rd session in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality. As Seth told us: "All kinds of time -- backward and forward -- emerge from the basic unpredictable nature of consciousness, and are due to 'series' of significances ... Memory operates backward and forward in time."
quotes.translation: 2. 参见《未知的实相》第一卷中的第683节。正如赛斯告诉我们的：“所有的时间——向前和向后——都源于意识的基本不可预测性，并且是由于一系列的意义……记忆在时间中向前和向后运作。”
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: In such circumstances, there are not the great artificial divisions created between the two states of consciousness. The conscious mind is better able to remember and assimilate its dreaming experience, and in dreams the self can use its waking experience more efficiently.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，两种意识状态之间不会产生人为的巨大分野。意识心更能记住并吸收其梦境经验，而在梦中，自我也能更有效地运用其清醒时的经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: 4. The Grunaargh family of consciousness is a variation of the Gramada family -- the organizers. See Note 6 for the 737th session.
quotes.translation: 意识之格鲁纳尔家族是格拉玛达家族——组织者——的一个变体。参见第737节注6。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Whole consciousness adopts various forms. It need not always be within a form. All forms are not physical ones. Some personalities, therefore, have never been physical. They have evolved along different lines, and their psychological structures would be alien to your own.
quotes.translation: 整体意识采取各种形式。它不必总是存在于某种形式之内。并非所有形式都是物质性的。因此，有些人格从未物质化过。它们沿着不同的路线演化，其心理结构对你而言将是陌生的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: That identification often brings about in death -- but not always -- an added acceleration of consciousness, and involves such individuals in a kind of "group death experience," where all of the victims more or less embark into another level of reality "at the same time."
quotes.translation: 这种认同常常在死亡时——但并非总是——带来意识的额外加速，并使这类个体卷入一种"群体死亡经验"，其中所有受害者或多或少"同时"进入另一层实相。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Give us a moment.... The out-of-body was the result of a change in attitude, and made possible also because of his (Ruburt's) body's relaxation. He was exercising his consciousness, allowing himself greater freedom. A certain portion of your mind was drifting at the time.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……出体是态度转变的结果，同时也因他（鲁柏）身体的放松而成为可能。他正在锻炼自己的意识，允许自己获得更大的自由。当时你心智的某部分正在游离。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: When I say that chemicals alone will not give you consciousness, I am speaking of the theory held that physical matter, chemicals and atoms, that were inert and lifeless, suddenly through some metamorphosis attained the conscious state through an evolutionary development.
quotes.translation: 当我说单凭化学物质无法赋予你意识时，我指的是那种理论——认为原本惰性无生命的物理物质、化学物质与原子，突然通过某种蜕变，经由演化发展而获得了意识状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: On your plane each atom and molecule contains the potentiality for any physical construction whatsoever. Each atom and molecule contains, as I have said, a generalized consciousness, in which all of the basic laws are known, and also a limited but definite self-awareness.
quotes.translation: 在你们的层面上，每个原子和分子都蕴含着构成任何物理结构的潜能。如我所言，每个原子和分子都拥有一种广义的意识，其中了知所有基本法则，同时也具备有限但明确的自我觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The self is actually returning to more surface levels of consciousness, to check upon its environment. There is a transference of main energy in deeper dream states, from physical concentration to a mental concentration, actually quite separated from physical connections.
quotes.translation: 自我实际上正在回归意识的较表层，以检视其环境。在较深的梦境状态中，主要能量会从物质性专注转移至精神性专注，实际上与物质连结完全分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Ruburt is making certain rather important inner adjustments, that are resulting, or will very shortly result, in a definite expansion of consciousness and ability. To some extent these changes are structural, in that pathways of activity are being formed more completely.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏正在进行某些相当重要的内在调整，这些调整正在或即将导致意识与能力的明确扩展。某种程度上这些改变是结构性的，因为活动路径正在更完整地形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: These various stages of consciousness and fluctuations of psychic activity can also be examined through direct experience from the waking state. In the following chapter we will let you become more aware of these ever-active portions of your own reality. End of chapter.
quotes.translation: 这些意识的不同阶段与心灵活动的波动，也可通过清醒状态下的直接体验来检视。在下一章中，我们将让你更清楚地意识到自己实相中这些始终活跃的部分。本章结束。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now any group will show the same kind of interrelationships.* You can see them for yourselves. There is great diversity within the family of consciousness called Sumari, as there is within any physical race, and there is also great variety within other psychic families.
quotes.translation: 任何群体都会展现相同类型的相互关系*。你们可以自行观察。在名为苏马利的意识家族中存在着极大的多样性，正如任何物质种族内部一样，其他心灵家族中也存在着丰富的多样性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: To perceive more of action immediately involves mobility, and I am not speaking in terms of space. The act of perception itself involves mobility through intensities, and the many facets of consciousness can only be experienced as a direct result of this inner mobility.
quotes.translation: 要感知更多行动必然涉及流动性，我并非在空间层面谈论此事。感知行为本身即涉及通过强度进行的流动，而意识的诸多面向唯有作为这种内在流动性的直接结果才能被体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Consciousness is always conscious of itself, and of its validity and integrity, and in those terms there is no unconsciousness.
quotes.translation: 意识始终觉察自身的存在、真实性与完整性，就此而言，并不存在所谓的无意识状态。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: It is rather important that the reality of these electromagnetic systems be understood, as they are so important in the construction of physical images and dream images, and since they are responsible for the inner communication which takes place beneath consciousness.
quotes.translation: 理解这些电磁系统的实相相当重要，因为它们在构建物质影像和梦境影像中如此关键，并且它们负责发生在意识之下的内在沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Children recall animal dreams more frequently simply because they are closer to cellular consciousness to begin with. Such dreams do carry the individual out away from ego identity, and at the same time closer to an inner identity that the ego usually attempts to deny.
quotes.translation: 儿童更常回忆起动物梦境，仅仅是因为他们起初更接近细胞意识。这类梦境确实将个体带离自我认同，同时更接近自我通常试图否认的内在认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The fresh expression sets up a new kind of relationship between the so-called perceiver and the perceived. The Sumari then becomes a bridge between two different kinds of consciousness; and returning to his usual state, Ruburt can translate from the Sumari to English.
quotes.translation: 新鲜的表达在所谓的感知者与被感知者之间建立了新型关系。苏马利因此成为两种不同意识之间的桥梁；当鲁柏回归平常状态时，他能将苏马利语翻译成英语。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: To use full consciousness would be most distracting in many instances. When I speak, therefore, of primary constructions in the physical field, other fields of course have their own primary constructions also, though they would not be composed of matter in your terms.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，运用完整的意识会非常令人分心。因此，当我谈论物质场域中的主要建构时，其他场域自然也有其自身的主要建构，尽管它们并非以你们所谓的物质形式构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The individual then constructs fear and hatred into physical construction, giving fear and hatred definite physical form. The error is in the original inability to perceive the correct inner data, the basic underlying psychological structure of consciousness survival.
quotes.translation: 于是个体将恐惧与仇恨建构为物质形态，赋予恐惧与仇恨明确的物质形式。其错误在于最初无法感知正确的内在资料，即意识存续的基本潜在心理结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: You have each your own characteristic ways of advancement. You will discover, Joseph, that your ability to receive so-called telepathic data is showing itself in psychological time experiments and dreams, as well as in spontaneous flashes during regular consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你们各自拥有独特的进步方式。约瑟夫，你会发现，你接收所谓心电感应数据的能力，正显现在心理时间实验与梦境中，以及在常规意识状态下的自发闪现里。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Intensity not only governs their activity and size, but the relative strength of their magnetic nature. They will draw other such units to them, for example, according to the intensity of the emotional tone of the particular consciousness at any given, quote, "point."
quotes.translation: 强度不仅支配它们的活动与大小，也决定其磁性本质的相对强度。例如，根据特定意识在任一所谓"点"上情感基调的强度，它们会吸引其他此类单元靠近。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: 2. For some background information on Seth's basic units of consciousness (CU's), cells, probabilities, time structures and other material in connection with his delivery here, I suggest reviewing these sessions in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality: 682-84, 688, and 694.
quotes.translation: 2. 关于赛斯的基本意识单位（CU's）、细胞、可能性、时间结构以及他在此处传达的其他材料背景信息，建议查阅《未知实相》第一卷中的第682-84、688和694节。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Oh yes, this happens in countless cases, and could happen to your plane. It would in no way affect other planes. The vitality on your plane and on or in all planes in your grouping displays itself in terms of self-consciousness to some degree, as you understand it.
quotes.translation: 哦，是的，这种情况在无数案例中都会发生，也可能发生在你们的层面上。它绝不会影响其他层面。你们层面及所属群体中所有层面的生命力，都会以你们所理解的某种程度的自我意识来展现自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The act of artistic creation is therefore one to study, since it involves the intricate workings of the dual self-consciousness of one personality, inner data being transformed through the subconscious and greater individuality being made possible because of this.
quotes.translation: 因此，艺术创作的行为值得研究，因为它涉及一个人格双重自我意识的复杂运作——内在资料通过潜意识转化，并因此使更伟大的个体性成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: It is both the creative and aggressive aspects of consciousness that allow it to use symbols, to move through various levels of experience, and the aggressive nature of thought that so propels it, despite your knowledge, into realities that you do not understand.
quotes.translation: 正是意识的创造性与攻击性双重面向，使其能够运用符号、穿越不同经验层次；而思想的攻击性本质则如此驱动着它，即便违背你们的认知，仍将你们推入无法理解的实相中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: "Now it seems so obvious that there must be such alliances as Seth's families of consciousness, and that each of us alive at any given time takes part in one or more of such psychic groupings -- just as we form, say, nationalistic affiliations on ordinary levels.
quotes.translation: 如今看来，赛斯所说的意识家族这类联盟是如此显而易见，任何特定时代的每个活着的人都会参与一个或多个这样的心灵群体——就像我们在普通层面上形成国家归属感一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: My field of reality is not the same as it is for those who have recently left your system. It is not necessary for Ruburt to adopt the deep trance state for our sessions, since I am able to speak through him without shutting out most aspects of his consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我的实相领域与那些刚离开你们系统的人并不相同。鲁柏无需进入深度出神状态来进行我们的课程，因为我能够在不关闭他大部分意识的情况下通过他说话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It is easier then to say that they appear as matter when they are projected into your system, but this is not precisely correct. Nothing but the various stages of consciousness separates the dimensions, you see, but the separation is quite effective nonetheless.
quotes.translation: 因此，更容易的说法是，当它们被投射到你们的系统中时，它们显现为物质，但这并不完全准确。你看，唯有意识的不同阶段分隔了各个维度，不过这种分隔确实相当有效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now: Distorted ideas about sexuality prevent many people from attaining any close connection with the inner experience that continually stirs beneath ordinary consciousness. It is a good idea, then, to look at the psyche and its relationship to sexual identity.
quotes.translation: 现在：关于性欲的扭曲观念，使许多人无法与普通意识之下持续涌动的内在体验建立紧密联系。因此，审视心灵及其与性身份的关系是个好主意。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: ... But your thoughts also have a reality that you do not know. They have a reality that you do not perceive. Now I am going to give you a quickie course. The atoms and the molecules in this chair, you see, and in our friends camera, all have a consciousness...
quotes.translation: 但你们的思想也具有你们所不知的实相。它们具有你们无法感知的实相。现在我要给你们上一堂速成课。这把椅子里的原子与分子，以及我们朋友相机里的原子与分子，全都具有意识...
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now those who have such beliefs actually lack a necessary deep trust in the nature of consciousness, of the soul, and of All That Is. They concentrate upon not what they think of as the power of good, but fearfully upon what they think of as the power of evil.
quotes.translation: 那些持有此类信念的人，实际上对意识、灵魂与一切万有的本质缺乏必要的深层信任。他们并非专注于自己所谓的善之力量，而是恐惧地聚焦于自己所谓的恶之力量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: As I have often said, there are concepts most difficult to explain, particularly concerning the nature of consciousness, for often in your frame of reference certain concepts, quite valid, can appear contradictory so that one will seem to invalidate the other.
quotes.translation: 如我常说的，有些概念极难解释，尤其是关于意识的本质，因为在你们的参考架构中，某些完全有效的概念可能显得相互矛盾，以至于一个概念似乎会否定另一个。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The inner self is obviously not only conscious, but conscious of itself, both as an individuality apart from others, and as an individuality that is a part of all other consciousness.In your terms it is continually aware, both of this apartness and unity-with.
quotes.translation: 内在自体显然不仅具有意识，还能意识到自身——既是独立于其他个体的个体性，又是所有其他意识的一部分。用你们的说法，它持续觉察着这种分离性与一体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: In your terms, the ideas of good and evil help you recognize the sacredness of existence, the responsibility of consciousness. The ideas of opposites also are necessary guide lines for the developing ego. The inner self knows quite well the unity that exists.
quotes.translation: 以你们的话来说，善恶观念帮助你们认识存在的神圣性与意识的职责。对立观念也是发展中的自我必要的指引。内在自体深知存在的统一性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now: Throughout your reincarnational existences you expand your consciousness, your ideas, your perceptions, your values. You break away from self-adopted restrictions, and you grow spiritually as you learn to step aside from limiting conceptions and dogmas.
quotes.translation: 现在：在你们所有的转世存在中，你们扩展自己的意识、观念、感知与价值。你们摆脱自我设限的束缚，并在学习超越限制性概念与教条的过程中获得灵性成长。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This, again, is not to say that it is not real, but that it is not a primary reality that is more or less constant for the inner self. If an experience is a part of all levels of consciousness--this includes the trance state--then it is a primary experience.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这并非说它不真实，而是说它并非内在自体或多或少恒常不变的主要实相。若某个经验属于所有意识层面——包括出神状态——那么它就是主要经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: It recognizes its position as a part of the whole self. This is indeed a released, free consciousness. It does represent a giant step forward. It opens doors otherwise closed, and it automatically brings with it a state of excellent, buoyant physical health.
quotes.translation: 它认知到自身作为整体自性的一部分。这确实是一种释放的、自由的意识。它代表着向前迈进的一大步。它开启了原本关闭的门户，并自动带来极佳且充满活力的身体健康状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: I will here repeat an old definition of many sessions back: Consciousness is the direction in which the self looks.
quotes.translation: 在此我要重复许多节前的古老定义：意识是自性所注视的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now this is what you attempt when you experiment with psychological time, when your communication comes through the inner rather than the outer senses. And all living consciousness initially enter your plane of awareness by route of such a mental enclosure.
quotes.translation: 这就是你在尝试心理时间实验时所试图达成的，当你的沟通通过内在而非外在感官进行时。所有活生生的意识最初都是经由这样一道心灵围场进入你的觉知层面的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: As errors and mistakes creep into the physical organic system, bringing forth mutant genes and distortions, so also these mutant genes and distortions are, on a smaller scale, the result of inner distortions within the consciousness of the individual genes.
quotes.translation: 当错误与失误渗入物质有机系统，产生突变基因与扭曲时，这些突变基因与扭曲在较小尺度上，正是个体基因意识内在扭曲的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: This may not be the time to make this remark, but quite literally, tomorrows dream can change yesterday. All of the experiments that you are conducting are in themselves beneficial simply because of the training involved, and the expansion of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 此刻或许不是发表此言论的时机，但确切地说，明日的梦境可以改变昨日。你们正在进行的全部实验本身即有益处，仅因其中涉及的训练与意识的扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: They are like a dog worrying a bone. Those who have not identified their consciousness with the body completely, find it much easier to leave it. Those who have hated the body find, strangely enough, that immediately after death they are quite drawn to it.
quotes.translation: 他们就像狗啃骨头一样执着。那些尚未将意识完全等同于身体的人，发现离开身体要容易得多。而那些憎恨身体的人，奇怪的是，在死后反而会强烈地被身体吸引。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (11:10. Long pause during a strong delivery.) That godhood is formed from the eternal yet ever-new emergence and growth of those basic units of consciousness. The reality of the godhood straddles the reality of each unit, and the mass reality of all units.
quotes.translation: （11:10。在有力的传达中长时间停顿。）那种神性是由那些意识单位永恒却又常新的涌现与成长所构成的。神性的实相横跨每个单位的实相，也横跨所有单位的集体实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Your closest approximation will be, again, your experience with time in the dream state--or instances in which complicated problems are suddenly solved for you in dreams or in other states of consciousness, so that the answers appear full-blown before you.
quotes.translation: 你们最接近的类比，再次是你们在梦境状态中对时间的体验——或是复杂问题在梦中或其他意识状态中突然获得解答的实例，答案完整地呈现在你面前。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: I am speaking here in more or less historic terms for you. You must realize that the process has nothing to do with time as you know it, however. This particular kind of adventure in consciousness (smile) has occurred before, and in your terms will again.
quotes.translation: 我在此以你们较为历史性的说法来阐述。但你们必须明白，这个过程与你们所认知的时间毫无关联。这种特殊的意识冒险（微笑）此前已经发生过，以你们的时间观念而言，未来还会再次发生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Again, there is absolutely no continuity in the matter that composes the seeds, and the matter that composes the grass. What you have instead is the value fulfillment of the consciousness behind matter, as it expands and expresses itself in various forms.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，构成种子的物质与构成青草的物质之间绝对不存在连续性。你们所拥有的，是物质背后意识的价值完成，它通过不同形式扩展并表达自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: There are purposes beyond those that I can tell you. Their meanings unfold as your own development does. Within consciousness all things are incipient, and all creations are lovingly nurtured. You cannot step out of existence or reality even if you try.
quotes.translation: 有些目的超越了我能告诉你的范围。它们的意义会随着你自身的发展而展开。在意识之内，一切事物都处于萌芽状态，所有创造都得到慈爱的滋养。即使你试图脱离存在或实相，你也无法做到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The dimensions of consciousness are not arbitrary. They are not clearly drawn. They are open, they are action.
quotes.translation: 意识的维度并非随意设定。它们并非界限分明。它们是开放的，它们是行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: And I hope that our Jesuit will also follow those instructions I have given him. We will here consider the dream reality in an isolated manner, as if it were a thing disconnected from normal consciousness, although in reality it is not so disconnected.
quotes.translation: 我希望那位耶稣会士也能遵循我给他的指示。在此我们将把梦境实相视为独立存在来探讨，仿佛它与正常意识毫无关联，尽管实际上并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In The Nature of Personal Reality I stated that the point of action occurs in the present.10 In Adventures in Consciousness Ruburt said, quite properly, that time experience actually splashed out from the present to form an apparent past and future.11
quotes.translation: 在《个人实相的本质》中，我指出行动的发生点就在当下。在《意识探险》中，鲁柏恰当地表示，时间体验实际上是从当下向外迸溅，形成看似存在的过去与未来。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: This recognition does indeed involve a new performance on the part of your own consciousness, a mental and imaginative leap that gives you control and direction over achievements that you have always performed, though without your conscious awareness.
quotes.translation: 这种认知确实涉及你自身意识的新表现，一种心智与想象力的飞跃，使你能够掌控并引导那些你始终在完成、却从未有意识察觉的成就。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: There is obviously something identical, and some continuity between the child and the adult, but it is not matter. Consciousness, according to its ability, projects itself into the physical plane, and through value fulfillment it constructs its image.
quotes.translation: 孩童与成人之间显然存在某种同一性与连续性，但这并非物质。意识依其能力投射自身于物质层面，并通过价值完成构建其形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
