quotes.text: (And to me, the whole Sumari thing speaks of some kind of compassionate observation or knowledge of the human condition ... or in lieu of putting it that way, of an opening up of human awareness to embrace more of the possibilities of consciousness.)
quotes.translation: （对我而言，整个苏马利体系道出了对人类境遇的某种慈悲观察或认知……或者换个说法，这是人类觉知向意识更多可能性敞开的体现。）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Your cat and the birds on your rooftop all do their part. With expanded consciousness the responsibility for cooperation becomes more definite. And yet there is really no choice, for upon your physical plane there will be cooperation or annihilation.
quotes.translation: 你的猫与屋顶上的鸟儿都在各尽其责。随着意识扩展，合作的职责变得更为明确。然而实则别无选择，因为在你们的物质层面上，若非合作便是毁灭。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now. The physical body often and consistently acts upon subconscious knowledge, but in order to impress consciousness, such information must be carried by some kind of sense impression, whether this be a pseudo sense impression, or a more normal one.
quotes.translation: 现在。肉体经常且持续地依据潜意识知识行动，但为了将这类信息传达给意识，必须通过某种感官印象来承载，无论是伪感官印象还是较正常的感官印象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Unconsciously, the physical methods at hand are used, then, in such endeavors. It is highly unusual, but possible, according to the strength of the psychic discontent, that the consciousness could then split itself up, some residing in the new image.
quotes.translation: 在此类尝试中，潜意识会运用手边现成的物理方法。根据心灵不满的强度，意识有可能分裂自身，部分驻留在新形象中——这虽极不寻常，却是可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: When the lessons are learned there is no need for physical reality. The survival instinct, strongly connected with the physical self, keeps it anchored in focus within your system. Without it consciousness would tend to float free. It is your anchor.
quotes.translation: 当功课被学会后，便不再需要物质实相。与物质自体紧密相连的生存本能，将其锚定在你们系统内的焦点中。没有它，意识往往会自由漂浮。它就是你的锚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Yes, but the conscious mind should know what the unconscious is doing. Consciousness is after all the goal.
quotes.translation: 是的，但意识心应该知道无意识在做些什么。毕竟，意识才是目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: When consciousness leaves the body, it identifies itself with one of these portions, and travels in its form. Each form, embodying certain identity characteristics, has its own environment. Its abilities allow it to operate in particular dimensions.
quotes.translation: 当意识离开身体时，它会与这些部分中的某一特定部分认同，并以该形态进行旅行。每种形态都承载着特定的身份特征，拥有其专属环境，其能力使其能在特定维度中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Again however, the dog consciousness was its own. I did not for example control it, but I was aware of it.
quotes.translation: 然而再次强调，狗的觉知意识属于其自身。我并未控制它，只是觉察到它的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: It hovers about and within the construction. It is not imprisoned by the construction. The apparent imprisoning of consciousness within the primary construction is the result of ignorance, and also an inability that has arisen for various reasons.
quotes.translation: 它盘旋于结构之上与结构之内，并不受结构禁锢。意识看似被禁锢于初级结构之中，实则是无知所致，也是因各种缘由产生的无能之果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The inhabitants of some of these systems can perceive you. All of these inhabitants of various systems cannot perceive you however. Some are more or less within the same level of consciousness, but the perceptual mechanisms are entirely different.
quotes.translation: 某些系统的居民能感知到你们，但并非所有不同系统的居民都能如此。有些居民或多或少处于相同的意识层次，但其感知机制却截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: So the whole self turns various portions of its whole consciousness on or off, according to the field in which the whole self is endeavoring to make contact, manipulations, and according to the field in which he is endeavoring to project himself.
quotes.translation: 因此，整体自性会根据其试图建立联系、进行操控的场域，以及其试图投射自身的场域，开启或关闭其整体意识的不同部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: And then you can continue, you can continue to enlarge the scope of your understanding and consciousness... and as you do this, you take on a more conscious awareness of your responsibility. And your responsibility is not difficult to understand.
quotes.translation: 然后你可以继续，继续扩大你理解和意识的范围……当你这样做时，你会更清醒地意识到自己的责任。而你的责任并不难理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: When your consciousness leaves your body, the alpha state maintains its good condition for you. It does this of course in any case. The answer to past lives lies in a deeper level, however. You can fish for it from the alpha state if you prefer.
quotes.translation: 当你的意识离开身体时，阿尔法状态会为你维持其良好状态。当然在任何情况下它都会如此。然而，前世的答案存在于更深的层次。如果你愿意，可以从阿尔法状态中探寻它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Remember, again, the manifest [universe] emerges from a subjective reality, one that is implied in the very nature of your world itself. I would like you, then, to think of those units of consciousness from an entirely different scale of events.
quotes.translation: 再次记住，显化[宇宙]源自一个主观实相，这个实相隐含在你世界本身的本质中。那么，我希望你们从完全不同的事件尺度来思考那些意识单位。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: During your present life however the connection must be maintained. I will give you a break before our Instream material. I do want to mention however that all consciousness within your system has the same sort of freedom within certain degrees.
quotes.translation: 然而在你们目前的人生中，这种联系必须维持。在进入我们的内在资料之前，我会让你们休息一下。不过我想提的是，你们系统内的所有意识，在特定范围内都拥有同样的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Some ancient tales have come down through the centuries that tell of various gods and demons who guard the gates, so to speak, of other levels of reality and stages of consciousness. Astral levels are neatly laid out, numbered, and categorized.
quotes.translation: 几个世纪以来流传着一些古老传说，讲述着各种神祇与恶魔把守着所谓现实其他层次与意识阶段的门户。灵性层面被整齐地划分、编号和归类。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Consciousness does not simply choose to be born at a certain place in space and time, but it also endows its physical organism ahead of time with certain inner triggers so that it will respond to those conditions in highly individualistic ways.
quotes.translation: 意识并非单纯选择在时空中的某个特定位置诞生，它还会预先赋予其物质有机体某些内在触发机制，使其能以高度个性化的方式对这些条件做出反应。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The physical manipulation of events is indeed a psychological knack of considerable merit, in which consciousness and attention are exuberantly and wholeheartedly focused, bringing vitality and meaning to one relatively small range of activity.
quotes.translation: 对事件的具体操控确实是一种需要相当技巧的心理诀窍，在此过程中，意识与注意力得以充沛而全神贯注地聚焦，为某一相对有限的活动范围注入活力与意义。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: And in closing: The index for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality will contain (when that book is published) a comprehensive list of references to Seth's discussions of his units of consciousness, or CU's, as presented in both volumes of that work.
quotes.translation: 最后要说明的是：《未知的实相》第二卷索引（待该书出版时）将包含赛斯关于其意识单元（CU）论述的完整参考列表，这些内容在该著作两卷中均有呈现。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The idea of using animals for experimentation has far more drawbacks than advantages; there is the matter of one kind of consciousness definitely taking advantage of another kind, and thus going counter to nature's cooperative predisposition.
quotes.translation: 使用动物进行实验的弊端远大于益处；这涉及一种意识明显利用另一种意识的问题，因而违背了自然界的合作倾向。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health

quotes.text: In all cases however, we would have material structure of one sort or another, created by consciousness according to its ability to perceive, manipulate and construct an inner psychological structure, in this case an idea, into material form.
quotes.translation: 然而在所有情况下，我们都会拥有某种物质结构，这些结构由意识根据其感知、操控和构建内在心理结构的能力所创造——在此例中，即是将一个理念转化为物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: This allows the inner self to work much more quickly and effectively. You can trick normal consciousness quite easily with baubles, take its attention into other areas so that the inner self is left alone to do its work. Now give us a moment.
quotes.translation: 这使内在自体能够更快速有效地运作。你可以轻易用华而不实的小玩意欺骗普通意识，将它的注意力引向其他领域，这样内在自体就能不受干扰地完成其工作。现在请稍等片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: You were quite correct, Joseph, in your feeling that art created another plane, and now let me hit you with this one: that the paintings of an artist to some degree have a consciousness of their own, not imprisoned either by the form itself.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你直觉认为艺术创造了另一个层面，这点相当正确。现在容我告诉你：艺术家的画作在某种程度上拥有自己的意识，既不受形式本身的束缚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: In periods of stress, the physically attuned consciousness will often momentarily forsake its usual orientation and let itself fall back, as it were, into the source of its own being, where it knows it will be regenerated and indeed reborn.
quotes.translation: 在压力时期，调适于肉体的意识往往会暂时放弃惯常的取向，让自己退回到——可以说是——它自身存在的源头，在那里它知道自己将获得重生，甚至真正地再诞生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: "Those memories exist as patterns. In this life, each of you come together and part, come together and part again, forming a counterpart relationship when it suits your purposes, as streams of consciousness mix and merge, and then separate.
quotes.translation: 那些记忆以模式的形式存在。在这一生中，你们每个人聚合又分离，再聚合再分离，当符合你们的目的时便形成对应关系，如同意识之流混合交融而后分离。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: They were observed by others. They were hysterical productions born of your own desperation and given instant physical validity. Your un-conscious-awareness was within them. They had no independent personality consciousness of their own.
quotes.translation: 它们被他人所观察。它们是源于你自身绝望的歇斯底里产物，并被瞬间赋予了物理实相。你的无意识觉知存在于它们之内。它们自身并没有独立的人格意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Compassion "rose" from the biological structure up to emotional reality. The "new" consciousness accepted its emerging triumph -- freedom -- and was faced with responsibility for action of a conscious level, and with the birth of guilt.
quotes.translation: 慈悲从生物结构"升起"，进入情感实相。这个"新"意识接纳了它正在浮现的胜利——自由——却面临着有意识层面的行动责任，以及随之而来的罪恶感之诞生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: There is a unity and there is a joy and there is an exaltation in all aspects of life and consciousness. It is not to any religion's benefit that people starve. There is nothing wrong with using spiritual knowledge in practical manners.
quotes.translation: 生命与意识的每个层面都存在着统一、喜悦与升华。让人们挨饿对任何宗教都没有益处。以实际方式运用灵性知识并无不妥。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: (9:35.) Within, those frameworks are ever expanding, so that in your terms at least it seems that greater and greater distances are involved. Travel to any other land of physical reality must then involve alterations of consciousness.2
quotes.translation: （9点35分。）在这些架构之内，它们不断扩展，因此，至少在你们看来，似乎涉及越来越大的距离。要前往任何其他物质实相的土地，就必须涉及意识的改变。²
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Take as much time as you want to with this exercise. It places you in your universe clearly. This is an excellent exercise to use before you begin -- and after you finish with -- any experiment involving an alteration of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这个练习你可以想用多少时间就用多少时间。它清晰地让你置身于你的宇宙之中。在你开始——以及结束——任何涉及意识改变的实验之前，这是一个极好的练习。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: To some other types of consciousness, your physical reality is clearly understood in its symbolic form. Objects, as symbols, help construct the very framework of your existence. They, the objects, can then be manipulated quite freely.
quotes.translation: 对某些其他类型的意识而言，你们的物质实相以符号形式被清晰理解。物体作为符号，协助构建了你们存在的基本框架。这些物体随后可以被相当自由地操控。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You will end up with, if all goes well, a kind of "new" illuminated consciousness, an intellect who realizes that the source of its own light is not itself, but comes from the spontaneous power that provides the fuel for its thoughts.
quotes.translation: 若一切顺利，你终将获得一种"崭新"的清明意识——一种认识到自身光芒之源并非来自自己，而是源于为思想提供燃料的自发力量的智慧。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: The end can be achieved in either manner. Concentration upon one minute, limited, contracted object will result in consciousness expansion, for have I not said that within even the molecule and atom there exists capsule comprehension?
quotes.translation: 终点可通过两种方式达成。专注于一个微小、有限、收缩的对象将导致意识扩展，因为我难道没有说过，即使在分子和原子内部也存在着胶囊般的理解力吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: (With many pauses to start:) Dictation: During this period that we have labeled as belonging to the dreamers, certain subjective actions took place as the "structure" of earthly tuned consciousness formed the phenomena of "the self."
quotes.translation: （多次停顿后开始：）口授：在我们标记为属于做梦者的这段时期，某些主观活动发生了，因为"调谐至地球的"意识之"结构"形成了"自我"的现象。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: A primary construction is a psychic gestalt, formed into matter by a consciousness of itself. Such a primary construction is an attempt to create, in the world of matter, a replica of the inner psychic construction of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 初级建构是一种心灵完形，由自身意识形成物质。这种初级建构试图在物质世界中复制整体自我的内在心灵建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Dictation: There are also various states of consciousness in waking life, upon which you do not focus, and of which you are usually quite unaware. Each state knows its own conditions and is familiar with a different kind of reality.
quotes.translation: 口授：在醒时生活中也存在各种不同的意识状态，你们并未聚焦于这些状态，通常也完全意识不到它们。每种状态都知晓自身的条件，并熟悉一种不同的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: I have said that this condensed comprehension is readily available when it is needed. It is latent within the generalized consciousness of each atom and molecule, and is directly responsible for the combination into cell structure.
quotes.translation: 我曾说过，这种浓缩的理解在需要时随时可得。它潜藏于每个原子和分子的普遍化意识中，并直接负责组合成细胞结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Now. This comprehension, latent in all energy, is not broken up and distributed piecemeal within individualized consciousness, but completely contained within as if it were condensed; and indeed it is condensed into a capsule form.
quotes.translation: 现在。这种潜藏于所有能量中的理解，并非被拆解并零散地分配给个体化意识，而是完整地包含其中，仿佛被浓缩了一般；事实上，它确实被浓缩成胶囊形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: I have spoken often of consciousness also as being merely the direction of focus. Action implies infinite possibilities of focus. Action never happens along a straight line, although at times you may perceive it in such a fashion.
quotes.translation: 我常言意识不过是专注方向的指向。行动蕴含无限可能的专注方向。行动从不沿直线发生，尽管你有时可能以线性方式感知它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: At this point I am at the level, again, that could be compared to Dunne's number six self, as myself. I communicate through the third undifferentiated layer, that could be compared to Priestleys consciousness at number three time.
quotes.translation: 此刻我再次处于可类比为邓恩第六号自我的层次，作为我自身。我通过第三无差别层进行沟通，这层可类比为普里斯特利第三号时间中的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Your consciousness, as you think of it, may of course leave your body entirely before physical death. (As mentioned earlier, there is no precise point of death, but I am speaking as if there is for the sake of your convenience.)
quotes.translation: 你们所认为的意识，当然可能在肉体死亡前完全离开身体。（如前所述，死亡并无精确的时间点，但为方便你们理解，我姑且如此表述。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Ruburt is subconsciously aware of them in most cases, but seldom brings this to consciousness, so it is simply a feeling of disquietude on his part. He feels he will be interrupted, but is not consciously aware of this, you see.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在大多数情况下潜意识里知道这些，但很少将其带入意识层面，因此对他而言这仅是一种不安感。他感觉自己会被打断，但并未有意识地觉察到这点，你明白吗。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Generally speaking, the people living within any given century are related in terms of consciousness and identity. This is true biologically and spiritually, through interrelationships you do not understand.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……一般而言，生活在任何特定世纪的人们在意识与身份层面都相互关联。这在生物学与灵性层面皆成立，通过你们尚未理解的相互关联性而实现。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Thought takes time, and exists by virtue of cellular composition. Consciousness not focused in cellular construction involves itself with a kind of direct cognition, involving comprehensions that come in a more circular fashion.
quotes.translation: 思想需要时间，并借由细胞结构而存在。不聚焦于细胞结构的意识，则涉及一种直接认知，包含以更循环方式到来的理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: It did have a reality therefore. Ruburt leapt back to his body to safety and normal consciousness. The thing therefore dissipated, for when Ruburt ran home he automatically withdrew his energy from it. Give us a moment. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 因此它确实具有实相。鲁柏跳回他的身体，回到安全与正常意识。那东西于是消散了，因为当鲁柏跑回家时，他自动收回了注入其中的能量。请稍等片刻。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now the fetus utilizes these units. So does any consciousness, including that of a plant. Cells are not just responsive to light because this is the order of things, but because an emotional desire to perceive light is present.
quotes.translation: 胎儿运用这些单位，任何意识（包括植物意识）也是如此。细胞不仅因事物本然秩序而对光产生反应，更因存在着感知光的情感渴望。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: 3. See Seth's material on his units of consciousness, or CU's, in sessions 682-83 for Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality. In the 682nd session after 9:47, for example, he discussed relationships between CU's and probable realities.
quotes.translation: 3. 参见赛斯在《未知的实相》第一卷第六八二至六八三节中关于意识单位（CU）的资料。例如在第六八二节九点四十七分后的内容中，他探讨了意识单位与可能实相之间的关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: There was a tie-in, and it's that the Christ drama happened as a result of man's dream, at least, of achieving brotherhood -- a quiet, secure sense of consciousness, and a morality that would sustain him in the physical world.
quotes.translation: 其中存在关联——基督戏剧的发生，至少源于人类对实现手足情谊的梦想：一种宁静而安稳的意识状态，以及一种能在物质世界中维系他的道德准则。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Secondary constructions, being composed of atoms and molecules, contain generalized consciousness and innate capsule comprehension. They do not contain the unifying, integrating, organizing, personal direction of a whole self.
quotes.translation: 次级建构由原子与分子组成，包含普遍化意识与内在的胶囊式认知。它们不包含完整自体所具有的统一、整合、组织与个人化的方向性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The alterations of consciousness would give you a rather unique freedom that I cannot put into words, a perspective and a viewpoint above reality, that would show in your work. We have offered you suggestions to follow before.
quotes.translation: 意识的变化会赋予你一种我无法用言语形容的独特自由，一种超越现实的视角与观点，这将体现在你的工作中。我们之前曾给过你一些建议供你遵循。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: This is a dimension of existence native to consciousness, however, when it is not physically oriented. Ruburt can, and will, learn to explore this dimension even further. Only his lack of confidence in the past held him back.
quotes.translation: 这是意识本具的存在维度，然而，当它不以物质为导向时更是如此。鲁柏能够，也将会，学习进一步探索这个维度。只是他过去缺乏自信，才阻碍了他。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: And added over a year later: Note 35 for Appendix 18 contains excerpts from the 775th session. See Seth's comments on the patterns of identity formed by consciousness, with their "particleized" and "wavelike" characteristics.
quotes.translation: 一年后补充道：附录18的注释35摘录自第775节。请参阅赛斯关于意识形成的身份模式及其"粒子化"与"波动性"特征的论述。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: These portions, however, are intimately connected. They are like three different systems of consciousness operating together to form the whole. The divisions--the seeming divisions--are not stationary, but change constantly.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些部分紧密相连。它们如同三种不同的意识系统协同运作，共同构成整体。这些划分——看似存在的划分——并非固定不变，而是持续变化。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: These connections between you therefore and All That Is can never be severed, and its awareness is indeed so delicate and focused that its attention is (underlined) directed with a prime creator's love to each consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，你与一切万有之间的这些联系永远不会被切断，它的觉知确实如此精微而专注，以至于它的注意力（着重号）以创始者的爱指向每一个意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: These levels of the self have known self-consciousness in other existences, before the present one. But they cannot be allowed to remain completely dormant, but must continually reassert their characteristics and abilities.
quotes.translation: 自我的这些层次在今生之前就已于其他存在中知晓自我意识。但它们不能被允许完全沉睡，而必须持续重申其特性与能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: As to what I love, I find that question itself has many complications. I love the inquiring consciousness in whatever form it may appear. This is the simplest, most direct and spontaneous answer that I could possibly give.
quotes.translation: 至于我所爱之物，我发现这问题本身便有许多复杂性。我爱那探索的意识，无论它以何种形式显现。这是我能给出的最简单、最直接且最自然的回答。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is very important to understand that consciousness is never extinguished....
quotes.translation: 理解意识永不熄灭这一点至关重要……
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You take dreaming for granted, yet it is the result of a characteristic ability that is responsible for the very subjective feeling that you call conscious life. Without it your normal consciousness would not be possible.
quotes.translation: 你把做梦视为理所当然，然而它源于一种独特的能力，正是这种能力造就了你称之为意识生活的主观感受。没有它，你正常的意识便不可能存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Even a primary construction, therefore, is but a partial appearance of inner nature into matter. The term consciousness, as I am here using it, may need some explanation, although you should by now understand my meaning.
quotes.translation: 因此，即使是一个初级建构，也只是内在本质在物质中的部分显现。我在此使用的"意识"一词可能需要进一步说明，尽管此刻你应已理解我的意思。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: Only those children perfectly attuned to their environment in time and space survived. This does not mean that the consciousness of a child was annihilated, for example, if it was naturally aborted. It did not develop.
quotes.translation: 只有那些在时间与空间中与环境完美协调的儿童才能存活。这并不意味着，例如，若一个儿童自然流产，其意识就被消灭了——它只是没有发展。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Your present is the result of your own poised consciousness, choosing its perception and the nature of its life from a field that is at all predictable only because of the greater area of organization available to it.
quotes.translation: 你的当下是你自身平衡的意识所产生的结果，它从一片仅因可触及的更广大组织领域而具有可预测性的场域中，选择其感知与生命的本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Consciousness is the direction in which the self looks at any given time.
quotes.translation: 意识是自我在任何特定时刻所注视的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Accounts of projecting into distant future lives seem rare: Perhaps the conscious self deeply hesitates at swimming in such uncharted pools of consciousness, even though present and future relationships are assumed.
quotes.translation: 投射到遥远未来生活的记述似乎罕见：或许意识自我在游入如此未知的意识之池时深感踌躇，即便当前与未来的关系已被假定存在。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: New discoveries of the qualities inherent in the molecule will lead to an understanding of molecular consciousness, at least a rudimentary knowledge. The implications here again will not be recognized for some time.
quotes.translation: 对分子固有特质的新发现将引领对分子意识的理解，至少是基础认知。然而其深远意义仍需时日方能被认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: As all physical matter is connected in any particular time, or era, so the individual consciousness of each being is also connected with every other. This applies to all consciousnesses as you understand that term.
quotes.translation: 正如所有物质在特定时间或时代中相互关联，每个存有的个体意识也与其他所有意识相连。这适用于你们所理解的所有意识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: To some degree he becomes action. Like every other consciousness he is always action, but this evening he experienced to some degree action directly, without the usual attempt of the self to separate from action.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，他化为了行动。如同所有其他意识，他始终是行动本身，但今晚他直接体验了行动，没有像往常那样试图让自我与行动分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Certain injections, given to the brain, actually help consciousness outside of the brain, and act as nourishment. This is simply one way that is being used however. You may take your break and we shall continue.
quotes.translation: 某些针对大脑的注射剂，实际上能协助大脑之外的意识，并起到滋养作用。但这只是目前使用的一种方式。你可以休息片刻，我们稍后继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: As the self became more involved with objectivity, the subconscious, of itself, began the formation of the consciousness, which evolved as portions of it became specialized for the purpose of out-terialization.
quotes.translation: 随着自我越来越投入客观性，潜意识自身开始形成意识，而意识在演化过程中，其部分变得专门化，以服务于外在化的目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: A clear, uncluttered, bright, and powerful consciousness needs frequent rest periods if its efficiency is to be maintained, and if it is to correctly interpret reality. Otherwise it distorts what is perceived.
quotes.translation: 一个清晰、无杂念、明亮而强大的意识需要频繁的休息期，才能维持其效率，并正确诠释实相。否则它会扭曲所感知的一切。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The natural structures of the earth are formed as the result of the biological cooperation of all species, and consciousness itself is independent of any of the forms that it may at one time or another assume.
quotes.translation: 地球的自然结构是所有物种生物合作的结果，而意识本身独立于它可能在不同时期所采取的任何形式。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: This resulted in a mobility of consciousness that indeed insured his physical survival, and those intuitions that appeared to him in the dream state were remembered and taken advantage of in the waking state.
quotes.translation: 这导致了意识的流动性，确实保障了他的肉体生存，那些在梦境状态中出现的直觉，在清醒状态中被记住并加以利用。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Cities, therefore, existed in dreams before the time of tribes. The dream state provides the impetus for growth, and opens up to the earth-tuned consciousness avenues of information for its physical survival.
quotes.translation: 因此，城市在部落时代之前就已存在于梦境中。梦境状态为成长提供动力，并为与地球调谐的意识开辟了获取物理生存信息的途径。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: If the cells did not die and were not replenished, the physical image would not continue to exist, so now in the present, as you know it, your consciousness flickers about your ever-changing corporeal image.
quotes.translation: 如果细胞不死去且不被更新，物质形象就无法持续存在。因此，在你们所知的当下，你们的意识在你们不断变化的肉体形象周围闪烁不定。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: This business of primaries and secondaries will concern us for some time, and in more ways than you suppose. For we are outlining the stages of an investigation of the nature and conditions of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 关于首要与次要的问题，我们将花些时间探讨，其涉及层面远超你们的想象。因为我们正在勾勒对意识本质与状态进行探究的各个阶段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: ("The same applies of course to any animal or plant considered extinct. Only an objectively tuned consciousness like man's would imagine that the physical eradication of a species destroyed its existence."
quotes.translation: 当然，这同样适用于任何被认为已灭绝的动植物。只有像人类这样客观导向的意识，才会认为一个物种在物理上的灭绝就摧毁了它的存在。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: My consciousness does not normally operate at the same speeds as yours, either (see Note 9), so in my terms what I am saying has long ago been said, while in your present it is new, or just reaching you.
quotes.translation: 我的意识通常不以与你们相同的速度运作（见注9），因此从我的角度来看，我所说的话早已被说出，而在你们的当下，它却是新的，或刚刚抵达你们。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: You have put yourselves in a position where your consciousness must now become aware of the probable pasts and probable futures, in order to form for yourselves a sane, fulfilling, and creative present.
quotes.translation: 你们已将自己置于一个境地，使你们的意识现在必须觉察到可能的过去与可能的未来，以便为自己构建一个健全、充实且富有创造力的当下。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: You are like children, in your terms, with a game, and you think that the game is played by everyone. Physical life is not the rule. Identity and consciousness existed long before your earth was formed.
quotes.translation: 以你们的标准而言，你们就像玩着游戏的孩童，以为所有人都在玩这个游戏。物质生命并非规则。身份与意识早在你们地球形成之前就已存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Your earth was very dear to me. I can now turn the focus of my consciousness toward it, and if I choose, experience it as you do; but I can also perceive it in many ways that you cannot in your time.
quotes.translation: 你们的地球对我而言曾非常珍贵。我现在可以将意识的焦点转向它，若我选择，也能像你们一样体验它；但我同样能以你们在当下无法做到的许多方式感知它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Dictation. (Loudly:) Various -- this is the beginning of the next chapter (7) -- the headings were given -- various kinds of governments represent the exercise of different aspects of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 口述。（大声地：）各种——这是下一章（第七章）的开头——标题已经给出——各种形式的政府代表了意识不同面向的运作。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Each physical glass is constructed of quite real molecules and atoms, which have their own generalized consciousness and capsule comprehension, and which form together in the gestalt called a glass.
quotes.translation: 每个物理玻璃杯都由相当真实的分子和原子构成，它们拥有自身概括性的意识与胶囊般的理解力，并以称为玻璃杯的完形结构共同聚合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: The idea, then, is not to annihilate normal consciousness, but quite literally to expand it by bringing into its focus other levels of reality that it can indeed intrinsically perceive and utilize.
quotes.translation: 因此，其理念并非要消灭正常意识，而是通过将意识本质上能够感知和利用的其他实相层面带入其焦点，从而真正扩展它。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text:
There seems to be
no unexpressed self
in animals,
as if they are
as fully themselves
in flesh as possible,
with no lag
of consciousness
to fill up,
while we keep
trying to grow
into something
else.
quotes.translation: 动物身上似乎
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: In the most basic of ways, the world is formed from the inside out, and from dreaming reality into the physical one--and those processes happen at another level of consciousness (quietly emphatic).
quotes.translation: 在最根本的层面上，世界是由内而外形成的，从梦境实相转化为物质实相——而这些过程发生在意识的另一个层面上（语气平静而强调）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Obviously then ego is a part of identity, rather than the other way around, and it is only a part of consciousness. It is when ego attempts to confuse itself with identity that difficulties begin.
quotes.translation: 显然，自我是身份的一部分，而非相反，它只是意识的一部分。当自我试图将自己与身份混淆时，困难便开始了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Ego consciousness is the result of our third dilemma.
quotes.translation: 自我意识是我们第三个困境的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now often you tune into these other streams of consciousness without realizing that you have done so -- for again, they are a part of the same river of your identity. All are therefore connected.
quotes.translation: 你们常常不知不觉地调准到这些其他的意识流——因为它们同样是你身份之河的一部分。因此，所有这一切都是相连的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: To do this, I hope to explore a more meaningful concept of evolution1--and that concept must involve a discussion of subjective reality and its effect upon the "evolution" of man's consciousness.
quotes.translation: 为此，我希望探讨一个更有意义的进化概念——这个概念必须涉及对主观实相及其对人类意识"进化"影响的讨论。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: There are also what I will call genetic dreams, which are inspired directly by genetic triggering. These help form and direct consciousness as it exists in any given individual from before birth.
quotes.translation: 还有我所谓的基因之梦，它们直接由基因触发所激发。这些梦帮助形成并引导存在于任何特定个体中、从出生前就存在的意识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: What you have is this. Let us speak no more of a conscious self and a subconscious or unconscious self. There is one self, and it focuses its consciousness in various dimensions, and that is all.
quotes.translation: 事实是这样的。我们不要再谈论什么有意识的自我和潜意识或无意识的自我了。只有一个自我，它将其意识聚焦于不同的维度，仅此而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Identities, then, do send out "strands of consciousness" into as many realities as possible, so that all versions of any given identity have the potential to develop in as many ways as possible.
quotes.translation: 因此，身份会将"意识之丝"发送到尽可能多的实相中，这样任何特定身份的所有版本都有潜力以尽可能多的方式发展。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Probabilities intersect then in your experience, and their intersection you call reality. Biologically and psychically these are intersections, coming-togethers, consciousness adopting a focus.
quotes.translation: 概率于是在你们的经验中交汇，而它们的交汇你们称之为实相。在生物与心灵层面上，这些是交汇、聚合，是意识采取一个焦点。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: Individually and en masse, in the dream state you change the orientation of your consciousness, and deal with the birth of events which are only later time-structured or physically experienced.
quotes.translation: 无论是个体还是群体，在梦境状态中你们改变意识的取向，并处理那些后来才被时间结构或实际体验的事件之诞生。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: (11:13.) Next chapter (4): "The Characteristics of Framework 2." (Long pause.) "A Creative Analysis of the Medium in Which Physically-Oriented Consciousness Resides, and the Source of Events."
quotes.translation: （11:13。）下一章（第四章）："架构二的特性"。（长停顿。）"对物质导向意识所居媒介的创造性分析，以及事件的源头。"
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: This also has to do with pulsations of energy in which consciousness as you know it, now, exercises itself, using native abilities that cannot be expressed through physical orientation alone.
quotes.translation: 这也与能量的脉动有关，在其中，你们所知的意识此刻运用自身，使用那些无法仅通过物质导向来表达的本土能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Consciousness is like a flower with many petals.
quotes.translation: 意识如同一朵拥有众多花瓣的花朵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: The methods that I will outline demand concentration and effort. They will also challenge you, and bring into your life expansion and alterations of consciousness of a most rewarding nature.
quotes.translation: 我将概述的方法需要专注与努力。它们也将挑战你，并为你带来极具回报性的意识扩展与转变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Now: Since your conscious memory is connected so strongly with awareness within the body, although you leave the body when it sleeps, the waking consciousness usually has no memory of this.
quotes.translation: 现在：由于你们的意识记忆与肉体之内的觉察紧密相连，虽然当肉体睡眠时你们会离开它，但清醒的意识通常对此毫无记忆。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Cellular consciousness is therefore expansive.
quotes.translation: 因此，细胞意识是扩张性的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The psychic structure of consciousness that organizes that bodily gestalt is, however, not dependent upon it, and so the you that you experience is only a portion of this greater identity.
quotes.translation: 组织身体完形的意识之心灵结构，却并不依赖于此，因此你所体验的"你"只是这个更大身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: This material on action, and identities, and consciousness, will add much to your understanding of dreams, of the whole self, and of other facets of reality of which I will speak shortly.
quotes.translation: 这些关于行动、身份与意识的资料，将大大增进你对梦境、整体自我，以及我即将谈论的其他实相层面的理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now the suggestion to carry your waking consciousness into the sleep state is of particular value in Conscious projections, if you will use it. You would succeed if you use it habitually.
quotes.translation: 现在，将你的清醒意识带入睡眠状态的建议，在有意识的投射中具有特殊价值——只要你愿意运用它。若你习惯性地使用它，你将会成功。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The consciousness that have made up your race gain valuable experience. You must not forget that the analogy between your physical reality and the dream state does have a basic truth.
quotes.translation: 构成你们种族的意识获得了宝贵的经验。你们切莫忘记，你们的物质实相与梦境状态之间的类比确实具有基本真理。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Now: This state may be used also as a step to the next state of consciousness, leading to a deeper trance condition; still relating however to the reality system that you understand.
quotes.translation: 现在：这种状态也可用作通往下一意识状态的阶梯，导向更深的出神状态；然而它仍与你们所理解的实相系统相关。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now: We will continue. There are kinds of consciousness that cannot be deciphered in physical terms. The "personality" who originated the paragraphs you have just read is such a one.
quotes.translation: 现在：我们将继续。有些意识无法用物质术语来解读。你刚才所读段落的原创"人格"便是其中之一。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Consciousness therefore is not a thing in itself. It is a dimension of action. It is an almost miraculous state, made possible by what I choose to call a series of creative dilemmas.
quotes.translation: 因此意识本身并非一个实体。它是行动的一个维度。它是一种近乎奇迹的状态，由我称之为一系列创造性困境的条件所促成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Now: Give me a moment here. (Pause.) First of all, as a species, in the context of normal usage, you have considered yourselves as apart from the rest of nature and consciousness.
quotes.translation: 现在：请稍等片刻。（停顿。）首先，作为一个物种，在常规认知的脉络中，你们一直将自己视为与自然及意识的其余部分相分离的存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (With a laugh: "Thank you very much" 12:19 A.M. And so it turned out that I brought up my questions about self-consciousness, and Seth answered them, when that material did fit.
quotes.translation: （带着笑声说：“非常感谢”凌晨12点19分。结果我提出了关于自我意识的问题，赛斯回答了它们，当那段资料确实合适时。）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Now. He also recognized within each consciousness massive potential that existed. The means then came to him. He must release the creatures and the probabilities from his dream.
quotes.translation: 现在。他也认识到每个意识内部存在着巨大的潜能。方法随之而来。他必须从他的梦中释放那些生物和可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Again, you even do this in your sleep. If you do not do it in the waking state, it is because you have held your consciousness in too tight a rein. Now you may take your break.
quotes.translation: 再说一次，你们甚至在睡眠中也这样做。如果你们在清醒状态下没有这样做，那是因为你们把意识控制得太紧了。现在你们可以休息了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Projection is a normal occurrence under dream conditions. However for the further development of consciousness and of identity, the so-called waking I can be of great benefit.
quotes.translation: 投射在梦境状态下是正常现象。然而，为了意识与身份认同的进一步发展，所谓的清醒自我能带来极大助益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: "It is a personal consciousness. The difference in degree, however, between my recognition of my identity and your recognition of your own reality is vast. Do you follow me?"
quotes.translation: "这是一种个人意识。不过，我对自身身份的认知与你对自身实相的认知之间，存在着程度上的巨大差异。你明白我的意思吗？"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: (Now this is the right time to refer the reader to Appendix 27, which contains Sue Watkins's account of her past-life involvement with the Grunaargh family of consciousness.)
quotes.translation: （现在正是时候请读者参阅附录27，其中包含苏·沃特金斯关于她与格鲁纳尔家族意识的前世纠葛的记述。）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Returning to our last discussion, I want to make it clear that these generic images, activated during certain levels of consciousness, are then interwound into dream drama.
quotes.translation: 回到我们上次的讨论，我想明确指出，这些在特定意识层面被激活的通用意象，随后会交织成梦境戏剧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This is coded, shielded, even from his own ego. Each painting that is successful forces the consciousness to travel into it, in ways that I will more thoroughly explain.
quotes.translation: 这是经过编码和屏蔽的，甚至对他自己的自我也是如此。每一幅成功的画作都会迫使意识以我将更详细解释的方式进入其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: Secondary physical constructions are those created by a consciousness of its conception of other consciousnesses, from data received through telepathy and other means.
quotes.translation: 次要物质建构是由意识对其所认知的其他意识之概念所创造，这些概念通过心灵感应及其他方式接收的数据形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: For your identity is dependent upon primary reality, which is a certain kind of action, and all of this will lead to heightened consciousness under all circumstances.
quotes.translation: 因为你的身份依赖于主要实相，这是一种特定类型的行动，而这在所有情况下都将导致意识提升。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Now. These units of which we spoke earlier are basically animations rising from consciousness.
quotes.translation: 现在。我们先前谈到的这些单元，基本上是源自意识的动态显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: Inadequate perception, manipulation, or construction in the psychological structure of consciousness survival leads to the psychological creation of fear and hatred.
quotes.translation: 在意识存续的心理结构中，若感知、操控或建构有所不足，便会从心理层面衍生出恐惧与憎恨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: 4. I suggest reviewing Seth's excellent material on probabilities, cellular consciousness, the moment point, and related concepts in the 681st session for Volume 1.
quotes.translation: 我建议回顾赛斯在第681节中关于可能性、细胞意识、当下点及相关概念的精彩资料，这些内容收录于第一卷。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: There seems to be no reason for many of them, simply because the intricate inner communication systems of consciousness go utterly unrecognized, generally speaking.
quotes.translation: 其中许多现象看似毫无缘由，只因一般而言，意识那错综复杂的内在沟通系统完全未被认知。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Otherwise you may have consciousness drugged or in a disintegrating state, because of the body's condition. Under those circumstances the transition is not as easy.
quotes.translation: 否则，由于身体状态的影响，你的意识可能处于被麻醉或瓦解的状态。在此情况下，过渡过程便不那么顺利。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: The spirit, therefore, is never in a state of nothingness, with its consciousness extinguished. It is very important therefore that such be realized, for there ...
quotes.translation: 因此，灵性绝不会处于虚无状态，其意识也不会熄灭。认识到这一点非常重要，因为...
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: (9:55.) All of these forms are called secondary constructions, for as a rule full consciousness of the personality is not in them. They are automatic projections.
quotes.translation: （9:55。）所有这些形态都被称为次级建构，因为通常人格的完整意识并不在其中。它们是自动投射。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The consciousness that directs this transformation knows what it is doing. The molecules and ions change into the concept, which is thereby directly experienced.
quotes.translation: 主导这场转化的意识清楚自己的作为。分子与离子转化为概念，从而被直接体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: "Wonderworks -- inner experiences just beneath usual consciousness -- contain different orders of events.1 Literally the stuff of all creativity (in miniature).
quotes.translation: 神奇之作——潜藏于寻常意识之下的内在经验——包含不同层次的事件。1 实为一切创造力（以微观形式）的素材。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The constant motion within them is caused by the constant perceptive nature of any consciousness, however minute in your terms. Does that answer your question?
quotes.translation: 其内在的持续运动源于任何意识固有的感知本质，即便以你们的标准衡量极其微小。这回答了你的问题吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: At birth, all of this is suddenly over, and [new] stimuli [are] introduced with a rapidity that the body consciousness has never to that point experienced.
quotes.translation: 出生时，这一切突然结束，新的刺激以身体意识从未经历过的速度被引入。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Once you free your consciousness from limited concepts of time and self, then you can begin to explore the unknown reality that is the unrecognized self.
quotes.translation: 一旦你将你的意识从时间和自我的有限概念中解放出来，你就能开始探索那未知的实相——即未被认知的自己。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Since this is obviously impossible, since no consciousness or identity can exist without action, because they are inseparable, we have our third dilemma.
quotes.translation: 既然这显然不可能，因为没有行动就没有意识或身份存在，因为它们不可分割，我们便面临第三个两难困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: The projection was indeed informative, since Ruburt's physical body was able to speak clearly and concisely while the consciousness traveled elsewhere.
quotes.translation: 这个投射确实具有启发性，因为鲁柏的肉体能够清晰简洁地说话，而意识却旅行到了别处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: This newer type of consciousness would automatically allow you to understand, at a glance so to speak, the inner workings of your own personalities.
quotes.translation: 这种新型意识会自动让你——可以说是一目了然地——理解你自身人格的内在运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text:
THE CHARACTERISTICS OF FRAMEWORK 2.
A CREATIVE ANALYSIS OF THE MEDIUM IN WHICH
PHYSICALLY-ORIENTED CONSCIOUSNESS RESIDES,
AND THE SOURCE OF EVENTS
quotes.translation: 架构二的特征。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The ego is a state resulting from the third creative dilemma, which happens when consciousness of self attempts to separate itself from action.
quotes.translation: 自我是第三种创造性困境所导致的状态，当自我意识试图与行动分离时便会产生这种困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: Form always implies a discipline. The love of individualized inquiring consciousness has always been my strength, and the source of my energy.
quotes.translation: 形式总是暗示着一种纪律。对个体化探索意识的热爱始终是我的力量，也是我能量的源泉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: "The Seth books present an alternate map of reality with a new diagram of the psyche... useful to all explorers of consciousness."
quotes.translation: "赛斯书呈现了另一种实相地图，附有全新的心灵图谱……对所有意识探索者都很有用。"
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Dictation. There are channels of interrelatedness, connecting all physical matter -- channels through which consciousness flows.
quotes.translation: 口授。存在着相互关联的通道，连接着所有物质——这些通道是意识流动的管道。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Dictation. Now: Man's first encounter with physical reality in life is his experience with the state of his own consciousness.
quotes.translation: 口授。现在：人在生命中与物质实相的首次接触，便是体验自身意识的状态。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The consciousness that became so briefly physical is not annihilated, however, but in your terms waits for better conditions.
quotes.translation: 那曾短暂化为肉身的意识并未被消灭，只是以你们的说法，在等待更佳的条件。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: -- and dictation ... To be effective within your system of reality, consciousness must of course deal with specializations.
quotes.translation: ——口授……为了在你的实相系统内有效运作，意识当然必须处理各种专门化。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: This is most apparent with those who use the Ouija board or automatic writing as methods to alter consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这一点在使用灵应盘或自动书写作为改变意识方法的人身上最为明显。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: 9. My existence is dependent upon my experience in flesh. When my body dies my consciousness dies with it.
quotes.translation: 9. 我的存在依赖于我在肉身中的经验。当我的身体死亡时，我的意识也随之消亡。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Now. The psychedelic experience is primarily the expansion of consciousness. This implies inner mobility.
quotes.translation: 现在。迷幻体验主要是意识的扩展。这暗示了内在的流动性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: （Among others, Seth talked about the direction of focus of consciousness in the 94th session. Volume 3.）
quotes.translation: （赛斯在第94节中曾谈到意识聚焦的方向。第三卷。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: In all our sessions we have been dealing with the mobility of consciousness, with its nature and extent.
quotes.translation: 在所有的课程中，我们一直在探讨意识的流动性、其本质与范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: It is important for your training and development that consciousness be brought into the dream state.
quotes.translation: 将意识带入梦境状态，对你的训练与发展至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: A student asked: "What's the difference between a strand of consciousness and an identity?"
quotes.translation: 一位学生问道：“意识的一缕与身份之间有什么区别？”
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The state of dreaming provides the connecting links between these systems of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 做梦的状态提供了这些意识系统之间的连接环节。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: Dictation: There is a connection between counterparts and the families of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 口授：对应体与意识家族之间存在关联。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Thinking also rests firmly in the reality of cellularly attuned consciousness.
quotes.translation: 思想也稳固地立足于与细胞调谐的意识之实相中。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Physical matter by itself could never produce consciousness.
quotes.translation: 物质本身永远无法产生意识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Let us look for a moment at the body consciousness.
quotes.translation: 让我们暂且审视一下身体意识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
